bororo_text: Jesus Cristo, Davi Onaregedu, Abraão onaregedu, jeture otojiwu uwobe ekie epadui bapera kejedu
Abraão ure Isaac towuje. Isaac ure Jacó towuje. Jacó ure Judá towuje, ure Judá umanamage uwiemage etowuje jamedu
Judá mare Tamar ere Farés mare Zara etowuje. Farés ure Esron towuje. Esron ure Arão towuje
Arão ure Aminadabe towuje. Aminadabe ure Naasson towuje. Naasson ure Salmon towuje
Salmon mare Raabe ere Booz towuje. Booz mare Rute ere Obede towuje. Obede ure Jessé towuje. Jessé ure brae eimejera Davi towuje
Uria bokware pijiwu aredu apore, brae eimejera Davi ure Salomão towuje
Salomão ure Roboão towuje. Roboão ure Abias towuje. Abias ure Asa towuje
Asa ure Josafá towuje. Josafá ure Jorão towuje. Jorão ure Ozias towuje
Ozias ure Joatão towuje. Joatão ure Acaz towuje. Acaz ure Ezequias towuje
Ezequias ure Manassés towuje. Manassés ure Amon towuje. Amon ure Josias towuje
Josias ure Jeconias towuje, ure umanamage etowuje jamedu, Babilônia rorerui Judeudoge eidu kodiwu keje
Nowu Babilônia rorerui judeudoge eidu kodiwu rekodaji, Jeconias ure Salatiel towuje. Salatiel ure Zorobabel towuje
Zorobabel ure Abiude towuje. Abiude ure Eleacim towuje. Eleacim ure Azor towuje
Azor ure Sadoc towuje. Sadoc ure Aquim towuje. Aquim ure Eliude towuje
Eliude ure Eleazar towuje. Eleazar ure Matam towuje. Matam ure Jacó towuge
Jacó ure José towuje. José mugure Maria apo, dutabore Jesus ure tudowuje ai, dure iere Cristo

Dukodire ere pudato pudatodure ikera pudogidure ewudure iwurekoto pobe puibiji Abraão piji jii Davi ae. Jii Davi piji Babilônia rorerurewo kae dure ikera pudogidure ewudure pobe puibiji iwurekoto jii Cristo ae. Jesus buturedu
Ica, Jesus butu kodiwu: Uce Maria mare José ei tuienado puidu, emugumode puapodu otodaire, awu inodure tudowuje Mariaji: Kuiarure Aroe Pemegarewu koia
Nowu mugumode apowu José, imedu jetororewu, aidukare akaru pegawo: icare padure tugajeje tuwo turodo oino piji podu tabo

Meardaere oino kimo, dukejere icare Pao Aroe Eimejera ia o Tupare towadudo ji unuiao tada. Akore: - José, Davi onaregedu, apagudu kaba Maria makuduwo akai akoredujece. Paga karega, kejere Aroe Pemegarewu ure turawuje keje
Ema kuributumode ia tonaregedurogu apo, dure amode iedo Jesusce; emare umode tuwobe einorudo turo pegarewu piji kodi

Nowu inodu jamedu ure tudowuje uwo nono Aroe Eimejera makore profetadogei jiboe reore. 23"Ica, ia virgem kuiarumode, onaregedu butumode, du iemode Emanuel (nowu bataru inodure oino: Aroe Eimejera mugui pagabodu) (Is 7,14
Icare, tuiedadu kejere, José rore nono Tupai turoiagudu reore. Ure tugeragu ji pudae rugadu
Boekarema, emugukai puapo dutabo, Maria onaregedure, dure ure iedo Jesusce
Jesus buture ia Judeia kejewu bakurireu iei Belém cedu keje, brae eimejerai Herodes cedu kodiwu kodi. Dukejere icare magodoge etaregodure meri rutu piji nowu bakurireu iei Jerusalém cedu kae
Enorare: - Kaiba judeudoge eimejera buture? Ceerudure o kuieje kurireuji meri rutu kuda, kodire cedaregodure cewo cebujodo ji
Tumearudui nowu inodu jitu keje, nowu brae eimejera Herodes rore toku, nowu Jerusalém kejewuge erore toku apo jamedu
Icare ure baire eimejerage, escribadoge, ure edo tudo pui, unorare ei kaibamodeba Cristo butumode
Icare egore ji: - Belém keje, Judeia moto keje, oinore bapera atugododure profeta koia
Aki, Belém, Judeia kejewu, aki boe biegarewu karega ure aki Judeia kejewu bakurireuge etada. Paga karega, apijire boe eimejera jetumode inore emawuge Israeldogeiwu umode tudawuje (Miq 5,2
Kodire Herodes mako podure nowu magodoge ewogai. Icare unorare ei kakoduwu ia boe kejeba nowu kuieje kurireu ure towadudo eegai
Ure etuiagu nowu Belém kae, akore ei: - Toro taeruduwa birigodudo nowu negedurogu bogai. Taerudui jitu kejere tamode iwie, ituwo bogai, iwo ipujodo ji jamedu

Tumearudui nowu brae eimejera bataru jitu kejere icare, eture pugeje. Icarema, cewu eerudure ji meri rutu kudawu kuieje kurireu kodure etododai jii cewu negedurogu mugurewo kae, nonore icare ure tuwuredo
Cewu kuieje kurireu ui towadudo dukoiare icare ure aidureu gigireu jekarerewu ure enogorawu tabo

Tui turemo dukejere eerudure cewu negeduroguji tuje Maria apo. Ere turodo tuku. Ere tubujodo ji, tui kurido dutabo: tui toroe jado dukeje, ere meriri ekureu bu tu je, ere kidoguru rorewu, kidoguru jirireu, ere bu tu pugeje, ere jodo tuku keje
Ewiedure tunuiao tada ekawo tugirimi cewu Herodes ae, dukodi icare ere tugirimi to moto kae ia awara tuginoiwuji pugeje. Jesus uo, uce, eregodui apo Egito kaedu

Etu uiagejere icare ia Tupare towadudo José unuiao tada, akore ji: - Aragojedo, akeragu nowu negeduroguji, uceji, tarego Egito kae, taedudo toro jii imode tawie pugeje du kae, mare paga karega, Herodes jemarumode nowu negedurogu bogai tuwo bito
Icare José ure turagojedo, boeco kao rugadu, ure tugeragu nowu negeduroguji, uceji jamedu, icare uture ebo Egito kae
Nonore eragojere jii Herodes bi kae. Boe koduwo Aroe Eimejerare profetadoge egoiaguwo reore: “Imagore itonaregedu bogai Egito piji”. (Os 11.1). Herodes ui boe etore ewidodu

Herodes, tui boe pa magodogei tuie kuri pagadodu jitu dukeje, bire boe kori koia; ure boe etore o joru buture pobe tu tu jewuge eeda kedodo Belém keje, oiei jamedu, cewu tunorai magodogei du tonaji, dukejere ro oino

Kodire Profeta Jeremias makore jiboe ure pudumi rugadu: 18"Rama moto kejere boe emearudure ia makorewu makoji, boe etoragudui boei maidoduji: boekarema, Raquel rabodure akoino toragudu tabo tore ewogai; ia butugugodure kejeboe bokwa, emagigokare kodi” (Jer 31,15). Jesus uo, uce, ei tugirimi apo Egito pijidu

Herodes bi rekodaji, Pao o tupa ure towadudo José jekai unuiao tada, akore ji: 20"Aragojedo, akeragu nowu negeduroguji, nowu uceji, akirimi Israeldoge eno moto kae; mare paga karega, cewu onare awu negedurogu jiwuge ewire”
Kodi icare José ure turagojedo, ure tugeragu nowu negeduroguji, nowu uceji, uture Israeldoge eno moto kae
Boekarema, tumearudui Arquelao jetui Judeia ji tuo Herodes mugato dukeje, pagudugodure tuduwo toro. Tumearudu birigodui tunuiao tada pugeje dukeje, ure turodo paci woje Galiléia moto kae
Aregodure, ure turagojedo Nazaré bakurireu keje, boewo nono profetadoge emagore jiboe reore: - Ema iemode Nazareno. (Is 11,1). 3 João Batista uwadodae
Nowu dukodi, João Batista ure towadudo tumago tabo, tuwadaru tabo, boe matadu keje, Judeia moto keje
Akore: - Tagodorogado tai. Pao o boe pemegarewu puredugodunure
Awu jire profeta Isaia makore, cewu akoi oinodu kodiwu: Ia akorewu akore toro boe makodu tada: Boedo turugadu Aroe Eimejera togi, utawara jetorodo (Is 0,3
João, barege ewiri meture ji, ia iku kogure kajeje. wagere bokokwadogei, okwagere moiawei
Jerusalém ejewuge eiamedu boe, Judeia kejewuge eiamedu boe, Jordão ieiwu boe, etu kigodure ae
Emagore turo pegarewuji biegai, ure etao pego pegodo, nowu Jordão po tada
Mare tuiorudui fariseudoge, saduceudoge etu kigodui to boe etao pegododu kae dukeje, João akore ei: - Awague etumedage, ioguduba ure taeruduwado tawo taginorudo aregodumodewu boe ekorigodae piji?
Boe eerududo tagodorogai tai boe rugaduji
Tamago kaba tadoda: Ceore Abraão rema. Oino. Kode, inagomode tai: Pao roiware tuwo Abraão onaregedudo awu torice
Paro padure urugadu iguru ukwa paru tada; pemegakarewu iguru kadodumode bariguduwo joruto

Ire tagao pegodo pobo tabo uwo nono tagodorogai taidure; mare aregodumode iregodajiwu, emare ro raka remawure ikori, ikare irugadu iwo bure tadawu reko ai. Ema umode tagao pegodo Aroe Pemegarewu tabo, joru tabo
Iedure bakuji tuwo to iro bakujukodo, tuwo to iro tugu tuiato, tuwo iwo barigu joruto, bi bokwarewu joruto. Jesus ui taopegododu
Jesus uture Galiléia moto piji, Jordão kae, João bogai, uwo taopegodo
Icare Joãore turodo duku tuibagi, akore: Itaopegododumode akera tabo, macare ature itae?
Mare Jesus akore: - Nowu inodu piji jao. Parowo nono Pao aidu reore. Kodi icare Joãore turodo duku tuibagi akoinodu keje
Jesus ure tudawuje pobo piji taopegododu rekodaji. Dukejere icare barure tuiado, dukejere jorudure Pao Utaroe ui nono metugu reore duji ui tudawuje tuwugeje duji
Baru piji ia bataru ure turawuje tagoi: - Ica, imearudu kuricigore jiwu itonaregedu reo, kejere ire itaidae pemegarewu jamedu bu
Dukejere Aroe Pemegarewu ure Jesus reko toro boe mataduto Aroe pegarewu wo turokogado jitu bogai
Jesus otorogare pudui meri ikera pudogidure, iwure pudogidure, ikera pudogidure, iwure pudogidure. Dukejere icare uke boi buture keje
Podure jiwu ure tuburedo ji, akore ji: - Aroe Eimejera Onaregedumode aki dukeje, amagodo awu toriguruji tuwo amireudo pudumi
Icare Jesus akore: - Bapera atugo pemegarewu keje atugododure oino: Amireu mitodu tabo karega imedu jere, mare Pao bataru jamedu boe tabo (Deut 8,3
Dukejere icare Aroe pegarewu re Jesus reko bakurireu pemegarewu kae, ure rakojedo Pao uwai oto mitodu keje, akore ji

Aroe Eimejera Onaregedunure aki rugadu dukeje, akaredo moto kae. Paga karega, bapera atugododure oino: “Ure to tupadogedo tudo turugadu ai. Etumode ai tugera tabo, akawo awure okorido ia tori tabo” (Sl 90,1112
Jesus akore: - Jamedu bapera atugododure: “Akaba akimejera Aroe Eimejera matadudo aegai” (Deut 6,16
Dukejere icare Aroe pegarewu re Jesus reko pugeje ia tori raicigorewu ao kae, ure jorududo moto jamedu boeji, motui puduiduji jamedu, akore ji
Imode awu jamedu boe makakai, ai apujodo ii dukeje
Jesus akore bataru jipagi: - Toro aibagi, Satans! Paga karega, atugodure oino jamedu: “Amode apujodo akimejera Aroe Eimejeraji, jire awiapagamode tu rugadu” (Deut 6,13
Du inodu keje, Aroe pegarewu re tugera ra piji, dukejere tupadoge ere tuburedo ji tuwo tuwiapagado ji. Jesui tugirini Galiléia kaedu
Jesus, tumearudui boei tugeragu João jitu kejere icare ure turodo oino Galiléia kae
Tui tugera ra Nazaré jitu kodi, rakojere Cafarnaum keje, ia kuruga kurireu jipa keje, Zabulon, Neftali eno moto keje
Uwo nono Profeta Isaia makore jiboere: 15"Zabulon, Neftali eno moto, puredu pobo maerewu okwa kejewu, Jordão kejewu moto, Galiléia kejewu boe
Nowu boe emedure boeco tadawuge, icare eerudure ia boe urugu kurireu ui boe awadudoduji. Barogwa kododureure nowuge ebo, ewi tugui eidu kajeje” (Is 9,1
Nowu piji mato icare Jesus okituware boei, akore: - Tagodorogado tai. Pao o boe pemegarewu puredugodunure. Jesus makoi kare ecebage ei pobe puibijidu bogai
Jesus, tumerui Galiléia kejewu pobo maerewu jipa jitu dutabo, jorudure boei pobeduji: umana, uwie. Simão duwure iere Pedro, mare uwie André, ei buke barigu poboto duji; icarema kare ecebage rabodu
Akore ei: - Mato iregodaji, iwo uwogure boe remawuge eiwugedo tagi
Ako oinodu kejere, ere tugera ra tuwuge piji, ekodure apo
Tugodui tododai dutabo, jorudure iage ei pobe pugeje duji, umana, uwie pugeje: Tiago, Zebedeu onaregedu, mare uwie João, eeduradure tuo Zebedeu apo, enure tuwuge pemegado. Makore etae
Ere ika pijido, ere tuo pijido, ekodure apo. Jesus ui boe eeruduwado, ui boe makarewuge epemegago
Jesus merure Galiléia oiagi, tui boe eeruduwado dutabo sinagoga keje, tui boe eeruduwado Pao o boe pemegarewuji, ciogoi ekogodae pegarewu jamedu boe, okorireboe, urureboe jitu dutabo etada

Dukodi icare akaru ure tumaedo Síria moto jamedu boe joki, boe eture ae kogodureuge ebo, boe okorire, boe urure jiwuge ebo, Aroe pegarewu re taredo towuge ebo, aora bai baireuge ebo, pogora koborewuge ebo, Ure eiamedu boe epemegago
Kodi icare boere turodo taci apo: Galiléia kejewuge, Decápole kejewuge, Jerusalém kejewuge, Judeia kejewuge, Jordão okwa bakowu kejewuge eiamedu

Jesus, tuiorudui nowu boe emagai jitu dukeje, ruture ia boe aoporu ao kae. Ure tumugudo tu je, dukejere ure joruduwadowuge ere tuburedo ji. 2 Icare makore ei, ure eeruduwado tagoi oino dutabo: 3"Uwabore nono marenarue ewabo reorewuge eiwo aidugirimode, eonare Pao o boe pemegarewuji kodi
Oragudureuge, boe birigodure jiwugere emage, butugugodureboe makudumode etai kodi
Boe okori bokware jiwuge, eiwo aidugirimode, emage enomode motoce
Boe jetororewu boire jiwuge, eiwo aidugirimode, ewudugugodumode kodi
Okudureuge, oiagudureuge, eiwo aidugirimode, okudureboe, oiagudureboe makudumode etai kodi
Uwabo pemegarewuge tuwabo pemega koia, eiwo aidugirimode, eerudumode Pao ji kodi
Ure boe butugugodudowuge, eiwo aidugirimode, ekiemode Pao oreie ure emage kodi
Boe etonare jiwuge, egoi boe jetorogodureboeji dukodiwuge, eiwo aidugirimode, eonare Pao o boe pemegarewu ji kodi
Boe emode taroiaododu pegado dukeje, boe etonamode tai dukeje, boe emode tuwadararodaedo tai dukeje ma, taiwo aidugirimode
Taegaredo tai, tagaidudo tai, more kuricigomode tagai baru tada; kode, oinonore onare profetadoge eiwuge etonare ei, duwugere ekodure tagododai. Sal mare urugureboe, jiwu bakaru
Tagire sal reoreboemode tagi moto keje. Sal rododu okwamode taci piji ma, inoba umode pudae pugeje? Kiogwamodukare pugeje, ure turugadu bariguduwo, boe ewure jowo keje
Tagire moto kejewu boe urugureboere tagi. Ia bakurireu padui torekodu oagejedu boe eroiwamodukare tuwo biado
Jamedu, boe emodukare ia jorugu mugudo aria kuda, mare jorugu mugumode tumuga keje, uruguwo mugure bai tadawuge eiamedu boeji
Oinore tarugureboe awadudo boe eegai; nowu inodu koia umode boe eerududo taro pemegarewuji, ewo aidureudo, ewo gigireudo Tao baru tadawuji. Boe eroiagudu
Tadugu kaba itaregoduie iwo profetadoge ero, ego, ewadaru okwado. Iwo okwado karega, mare iwo uporu kororogo pudui
Ica, boe jokodu jire inagore tai: baru, moto, okwamode mare ia Pao bataru parurogu okwamodukare
Ure Pao bataru biega inodurogu uredugodudowu, umode boe eeruduwado nowu inodu jitu keje, biega torimode baru tada. Mare cewu rore nono Pao bataru reore, umode boe eeruduwadowu, ie kurimode baru tada
Kode, inagomode oino tai: taro jetororewu kurimodukare nowu fariseudoge, escribadoge ero kori ma, tamodukare taremo baruto
Tamearudure mariguduboe eiwu bakaruji: Tagaba boe ewido. Ure boe ewidowuge emagere boe eimejerage erorerumode ei

Mare inagomode oino tai: Kodu kagirire tumana, tuwie jiwu, jiwomode ema remawu boe eimejerage enogituwa koia. Cewu akore: Boe kioga karega ino jiwu, boe eimejerage emode boe pegado ji; akomode: “Aora bai baireu” oino jiwu, jiwomode joruce
Kode, atumode altar jokora kae awo aro pemegarewu maku Pao ai, mare nono awiabutumode ia amana, ia awie ro pegare aiwu keje ma,
nowu akoe jetu nono altar jokorai jao, atudo amana rabodu, awie rabodu ae jao, amagodo ji, butugugoduwo ai; dukejere icare atumode mato awo nowu aro pemegarewu maku
Apemegado onare aiwuji akodui apo boe eimejera ae du tonaji, ukawo amagu boe eimejera ai, boe eimejera ukawo amagu tugoboigare ai, ukawo atugu baicorewuto
Boe jokoduji inagomode ai: amodukare atawuje, akai jamedu boe morido du kae. Jesus akoi boe ero pegarewu jidu
Tamearudure mariguduwuge eiwu bakaruji: Akera keadu kaba ia aredu ji
Mare inagomode tai: cewu aiwore tagemo pegarewu tabo ia aredu jiwu, ure tubegado ji tuwabo tada
Kodi icare, aeku pemegarewu koiamode ure awududo boe pegarewuto ma, tawuje, barigudu jaedo apiji. Ure turugadu ai ia akoerogu bariguduwo apiji mare umode aiamedu boe bariguduwo joruto dure ema karega

Akana pemegarewu koiamode ure awududo boe pegarewuto ma, kado, barigudu jaedo apiji. Ure turugadu ai ia akoerogu bariguduwo apiji, mare aiamedu boe bariguduwo joruto dure ema karega. Jesus akoi boe ei pu barigudu jidu
Awu bakaru reo jamedu: Ure tugera ra tuwire pijiwu, umode bapera maku ai tui tugera ra piji dutabo
Mare inagomode oino tai: Boere tugera maku puai boe jetororewu tabo, dukeje oredu umode toreduje barigu tubiji ma, unure toreduje ro pegado. Cewu mugumode barigudureu aredu apowu, ro pegamode jamedu
Tamearudure mariguduwuge eiboe jituji: Akaba akogwatugu ia pagaboe kori koia, mare amagore Pao ji jiboe boe pemegarewu akaba pijido
Mare oino ingomode tai: Tagaba tagogwatugu rugadu, jamedu baruto karega jamedu, mare paga karega, Pao muganure ema kodi
Jamedu moto keje akaba ino, mare paga karega, nonore ure tuwure bu dukoia. Jamedu, Jerusalém keje karega jamedu, mare paga karega Boe Eimejera kurireu o bakurireu rema kodi
Jamedu, akaba akogwatugu akaora tabo, amodukare ia akao ira corewu kigadudo, amodukare ia akao kigadureu codo
Tamagomode: U!, u! rugadu dukeje. Tamagomode: Boro, boro rugadu dukeje. Kodure nowu koriboe aregodure Aroe pegarewu piji. Jesus makoi boe ero kirimidu jitu
Tamearudure oinoie ure duji: Joku umode tumorido jokuji, o umode tumorido oji
Imirema inagomode oino tai: Tagaba tabewudo tai ia pegare taiboe togi. Mare iaboe umode tugera to akana pemegarewu jaogwaiwu aeji ma, ae mekido pai ae awubowu tabo ji pugeje
Iaboe aidumode akudawu poru kejewuji ma, awiri kejewu maku ai jamedu
Iaboe emode akodudo pudabo kuri iaboe kae ma, ako doku kori inodu otobiji apo
Ia boe enogwamagudumode ai ia ure tu akabo boeji ma, makai rugadu. Ia boe enogwamagudumode ai ia akoroeroguji jao ma, maku jao rugadu. Jesus makoi boe emearudu kuriiagu onare puduiwuge eidu
Tamearudure jaowu kodiwu bakaruji: “Amearudu kurimode ameduiaji, akorimode onare aiwuji”
Imirema inagomode oino tai: Tamearudu kurido onare taiwugei, taro pemegado kodu kagirire taiwugei, tamagodo onare taiwuge, rorerure taiwuge eparu tabo
Nowu inodu tabo, Tao baru tadawu oremode tagi, duwure meri rutudo pegarewuge ewugeje, pemegarewuge ewugeje, ure bubutudo pemegarewuge, pemegakarewuge ewugeje
Tamearudu kurimode mearudu kurire taiwugei ma, kaboba morimode ema? Nowu publicanodoge erokana ino jamedu?
Tamago pemegamode tu tawobei ma, inoba ureu boe kurireuba tare udo? Ao pegokarewuge erokana ino jamedu?
Kode, tabemegado tawo nono Tao baru tadawu pemega magadure
Tagaba taro pemegai boeidu boe eerududo ji. Umodukare ino ma. Tao baru tadawu umodukare morido tagai

Kode, amode akogududo tu ia ameduia apo dukeje, akaba aebogodudo inoduji, ukawo nono sinagoga kejewuge ero magai pui du reore, ere pu kurido tuiegai nowu inodu koia. Boe jokodu, inagomode oino: Mori makudure etai marigudu
Are akogududo ia boe ebo, mare akana koborewu joruduwakado akana pemegarewu ro oinoduji
Nowu inodu tabo, ai akogududo ia boe ebodu biadure, Ao, jorudure biadodureboe jamedu jiwu, umode mori maku akai. Jesus makoi boe emagoi barutodu

Amagomode aparu tabo dukeje, arokaba nono ure boe ee to puiboe reore; emage emagore tubaru tabo turagojei sinagoga keje, boe eeruduwo pudui du bogai. Inagomode boe jokoduji tai: Nowu ure oinowuge mori makudure etai marigudu
Amagomode aparu tabo dukeje, aremo awaito, baiporo mi, amagodo Aoji bia tabo, Ao, jorudure biareboe jiwu, umode morido akai

Tamagomode tabaru keje dukeje, tagaba nowu tamagoi tabaru kejewu kodiwu tawadaru tagaba itodudo nono aopegokarewuge ego reore, emeardaere nowu tuwadaru awadu koiaie boe emearudumode nowu tagoinodu jituji
Tagaba tadugu nowu ero oinoduto; mare paga karega, Tao joruduware kaboba tagaidure bogaiboeji tagogwamagudure bogaidu otodai
Oinore tagagomode tabaru tabo: Pao, rakojere baru tadawu, boe etaidudo akieji
Aeto cei. Boedo nono akaidu reore oino moto keje boe magai baru tadadure
Cege maku cenai, boe jamedu jiwu maku cenai
Awudugugo cei cero pegarewuji, nono cewudugugodu magai ro pegare ceiwuge eidure
Akaba cewududo boe pegarewuto, mare ceginorudo pegareboe piji
Mare tawudugugodumode boei ero pegare taiwu keje ma, Tao baru tadawu butugugodumode tai jamedu
Mare tawudugugodumodukare ro pegare taiwugei dukeje, jamedu Tao baru tadawu butugugodumodukare tai jamedu. Jesus makoi boe etodoroga jitu

Tagodorogamode tai dukeje, tagaba tagiarigo nono ure boe pagado puduiwuge ero magadure, duwuge ere tuie kiarigodudo, boe eeruduwo oinoie todorogare pudui dukoiaie tuie makodure oinono. Boe jokoduji inagomode oino tai: morire etai marigudu
Akodorogamode ai dukeje, roreboe tugu akaoto, ae kabi jamedu

Nowu inodu tabo amodukare nono otorogare puduiboere boe eegai, mare Ao jorudure biadodureboe jiwu, jekai tu rugadu; Aore, jorudure biadodureboe jiwu, dure umode morido akai. Boe enoroe kurireu ema remawu
Tagaba moto kejewu boe enoroe itodudo tagai; mare paga karega, moto keje uruguro borewuge emode pegado, iwogu kigodureuge emode bai porodo, eiwogumode ji
Boe enoroe pemegarewu itodudo tagai baru tada. Torore uruguro borewuge emodukare pegado, iwogu kigodureuge emodukare bai porodo, eiwogumodukare ji
Kode, nowu akoroe pemegarewu jeturewo kejere awabo mugure keje jamedu. Boe erugu
Boe eekure jorugu rema boe etai; aeku pemegamode dukeje, umode aredu jamedu boe urugudo
Jamedu, aeku pemegamodukare ma, aredu jamedu metumode boecorewu tada. Jorugu metui atodadu boeconure emadu ma, inoba boeco comode? Pao baru tadawu mare awu moto kejewu boe enoroe

Boe emodukare tudo puibiji ia cimejeraji, mare kodu kagirimode iaji, mearudu kurimode iaji rabodu, iarema biapagamode iaji, umode ia pijido rabodu. Taroiwamodukare tamearudu kuriwo Pao ji, tamearudu kurii boe enoroeji dutabo

Dukodi icare inagomode oino tai: Tagogea kaba tamode kowuje taewo du bogai, tagogea kaba metumode taiboe bogai. Kode taei tu jedu karega kodure tagogwagemodedu kori? Tagodu, tawiri karega kodure metumode taiboe kori?
Tagaiwodo cebojewu kiege baregei: ekare boe tugu, ekare tugeragu ture tugu boeji, ekare tugu tuiato, mare Tao baru tadawu ure enogwagedo. Tagodukare remawu ekori?
Kakoduwu ia tagiba umode tabewudo tai taragoje raiwo biega tu je du bogai?
Kode, kodiba tagogeare metumode taiboe bogai? Tagado tu okureboe botu ji ka! Emaragodukare, ekare akigu to
Nowu inodu boe oiado, inagomode tai: Ica, Salomão, boe remawu pudumidu inodu tabo, ukare tugudaedo nono awu okureboe reore
Paore igurudo oino, ipogurudo oino, iwaragurudo oino, du boture awuji, barogwato barigudumode joruto. Ica, kode, tagi, ime meartoru bokwarewuge?
Kode, tagiarigodu kaba, tamago kaba: Kaba jiba pagogwagemode, kaba ceba pagudumode, kaboba pamode tugu pai?
Ao pegokarewuge erore gara gara gara nowu inodu jamedu bogai. Aro! Tao baru tadawu joruduware tagogeai nowu inodu bogai duji
Tameardaedo tamuguwo Pao o boe pemegarewu tada du bogai boetoji. Pao o boe jetororewu bogai jamedu; nowuia boerema makudumode tagai jamedu
Kode, tagogea kaba barogwatoboe bogai, barogwatoboe okeamode pudui dukodi. Ia boe etogeare bogaiboe padure tu tu tuwugeje meri kodu uroduji, du ure turugadu
Tadugu kaba boei, boe etugu kawo tai
Mare paga karega, tadugui boei du reore, umode tai jamedu: tai boe remagu du reore taremagudumode jamedu
Kodiba akaiwore nowu boe gigudurogu padui amana, awie, eeku keje duji, macare aerudukare baimogajejewu mugui aeku keje duji?
Mare kodiba akidare akagowo amanaji, awieji: Iwo nowu boegigudurogu rawuje aeku piji, ia baimogajejewu padui aeku kejedu inodu tabo?
Ro biadodureboe, baimogajejewu rawuje aeku piji jao, dukejere amode boegigudurogu rawuje, amana, awie eeku piji

Boe pemegarewu baru tadawu tagaba barigu arigaodoge etae, tagaba tago torikuieje barigu jugorewuge etae, boe jokodukare kare emode tuwure to co co ji, emode tuie kirimi tai tuwo togwado bo bo tawugeje. Boei tumeartorudo Pao jitu
Tagogwamagududo makuduwo tagai; taemarudo boe bogai, taeruduwo ji; tagera to toe toe baiporoji, jadoduwo tagai
Mare paga karega, okwamagudureu, okwamagudure bogaiboe makudumode ai; jemarure boe bogaiwu, jorudumode ji; umode tugera to baiporo jiwu, baiporo jadodumode ai
Ica, kode, kakoduwu ia tagiba umode tori maku tonaregedu ai, okwamagudui amireu bogai dukeje?
Okwamagudumode karo bogai ma, awaguna tamode makai?
Kode, tabegare, mare du inodu tabo tare boe pemegarewu maku tagore etai. Kode ica, Tao baru tadawu ukamodukare boe enogwamagudure bogaiwu boe pemegarewu makudu bokwado etai? Umode maku
Tagaidumode boe erowo taiboe jamedu boe, tarodo ino ei boetoji. Awu bataru keje, boe eroiagudu jamedu boe, mare profetadoge egoino jiboe jamedu boe padure keje. Awarare pobe
Taremo baiporo biegarewuji; mare paga karega, baiporo ja kurireure awara bari kurireure boe ewarigu pegareboeto, makarewuge ere turemo nowu awara ji
Mare baiporo biegarewu, awara bari biegarewure, kodure boe eemodewo kae, nowu awara jiwuge emagagirikare. Profetadoge pegarewuge
Tamearudu awadudo tai profetadoge pegarewugei, emode tuburedo tai barge pemegarewuge ewiri tabo, mare etada, adugodoge emedure
Ero koiare tamode epawuje. Botoguru ikureu tudumodukare figeira kuroduji
Iguru pemegarewu tudu pemegare: i pegarewu tudu pegare
Ia i pemegarewu tudu pegamoduka, jamedu ia i pegarewu tudu pemegamoduka
Iguru tudu pemegakarewu jamedu boe, kadodumode, barigudumode joruto
Kodi icare profetadoge pegarewuge ero koiare tamode epawuje. Umode turemo baru towu
Akore: Ikimejera, Ikimejera, inowuge eiamedu karega etumode baruto, mare rore nono Ioga, rakojere baru tadawu, aidu reorewugere etumode baruto, boe pemegarewuto
Makarewuge emagomode ii nowu meri keje: Cegimejera, cegimejera, cemagokare akie tabo? Akie tabo karega, cere Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu? Akie tabo karega cere boe pemegarewu kurireu makarewu to?
Dukejere imagomode ei: Ioruduwakare tawogai jii je rugadu. Taiaedo ii, maragodu pegare inaiwuge. Baidoge ei pobedu
Ica, kode, cewu mearudure iwadaru jiwu, romode oinono rugadu du, ure nono ia imedu ro jetororewu, dure ure tuwai mugudo tori aogeje
Bubuture ji, pobo kododure ji, bakuru buture ji, nowu inodu jamedu ure tudo ji, mare butukare; mare paga karega, mugure tori aogeje kodi
Mare cewu mearudure iwadaru jiwu, rokare nono iwadaru reoredu, dure ure nono imedu aora bokwarewu, dure ure tuwai mugudo kugaru tada
Bubuture ji, pobo kododure ji, bakuru buture ji, nowu inodu jamedu ure tudo ji, dukeje buture, boe pegarewu kurireu ure tudowuje ji. Jesus ro raka, ako raka
Jesus ui togwa ra tuwadaru piji dukeje, boe eiamedu boe eebogodure bataru ji
Mare paga karega, ure eeruduwado nono boe remawuie pudumi du reore, mare nowu escribadoge ereore karega
Ica, Jesus ui turawuje boe aoporu joki dukeje, ia makarewu boe ekodure apo
Dukejere icare ia moci bare jiwu ure tuburedo ji, ure tubujodo jokorai, tagoi oino dutabo: - Cegimejera, akaidu kejere amode ipemegago
Icare Jesus ure tugera awogado, iera jeture ji, akore ji: - Itaidure. Kode, apemegago! Nowu inodu tonaji kuri je, moci okware nowu imedu piji

Dukodi icare Jesus akore ji: - Amago kaba boe ewiegai, mare toro Pao burejoia ae, jorududo ai, Moisés ure boe eroiagudu jiboe morido, uwo nono jekai apemegagodure oinodu kodiboeji. Jesus ure ia Roma kejewu tugobaigarege eimejera utugare pemegago

Jesus ure turemo nowu bakurireu iei Cafarnaum ceduto, dukeje, ia brae eimejera kodure kuri ae, okwamagudure ji, akore: 6"Cegimejera, ia ierabrarere iiwu mugure iwai keje, padure tuba keje, pogora rakaguraganure, kori rakaguragare ji
Jesus akore: - Itumode toro iwo pemegago
Icare nowu brae eimejera akore ji: - Cegimejera, boe karega ure imi awo aremo iwaito, mare amagomode ia awadaru mito tu je duji, du ure turugadu uwo nowu ierabrarere iiwu pemegago

U! Imi jamedu irojaidodunure. Ieture tugobaigaregei jamedu. Imagomode iaji: Toro. Utumode rugadu. Imagomode iaji: Mato. Utumode mato rugadu. Imagomode ierabrarere iiwuji: Arodo oino, romode oino rugadu
Icare Jesus, tumearudui awu inodu jitu keje, jebogodure, akore oino pudabowugei: - Boe rugadu jire inagomode oino tai: Iorudukare ia Israeldoge emeartorui nono awu meartoru reore
Dukodire inagomode oino tai. Makarewu boe etaregodumode meri rutu piji, meri butu piji, emode tumugudo Pao o boe pemegarewu keje, Moisés, Isaac, Jacó mage ebo
Jeonare Pao o boe pemegarewu jiwugerema, ewarigudumode toro baawadu kae boecorewuto; nono oragudureboe, boe eto to puiboe umode nono
Dukejere ure turodo bai, nowu brae eimejera keje, akore: - Toro, boere nono ameartoru reore. Nowu brae eimejera utugare pemegagodure kuri je. Jesus ure makarewuge epemegago
Dukejere Jesus uture Pedro uwai kae. Boekarema, Pedro ucarugo padure tu tuba keje tuwiri uru tabo
Icare Jesus ure tugeragu ieraji, icare nowu biri uru okware kuri je, ure boe eke bu iraji etai
Nowu meri rekodu tabore, boere Aroe pegarewu meture tadawuge eregodu kuricigodo ae. Tuwadarui mito tu je dutabo, Jesus ure Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu epiji, ure kogodureuge eiamedu boe epemegago
Nowu inodu ure nono profeta Isaias mako reore: “Ure tugeragu pagogodaeji, ure toredudo tabo” (53,45). Iaboe etaidure tugoduwo Jesus rekodaji
Ia meri keje Jesus jorudure turagojei boe etoiakodu tadaduji, icare akore ture joruduwadowugei eiagu turego nowu kuruga kurireu ia jipa kae
Nowu inodu tonaji, ia esciba ure tuburedo ji, akore ji: - Cegimejera, ikodumode akabo, akodurewo jamedu boe kae
Icare Jesus akore ji: - Okwadoge eiarire, kiege barege ewaradurogure, mare Imedu Onaregedu umode taora buwo kejeboe bokwa
Ia pugeje, ia ure joruduwadowu ui mito tu jedu akore ji: - Cegimejera, iwo ioga tugu mototo jao
Mare Jesus akore bataru jipagi: - Ako itabo! Ado bireuge pu bi tugu mototo. Jesus ui bakuru, pobo, butugugodudodu
Jesus ruture ia ika kurireuto ture joruduwadowuge ebo
Kuri je, bakuru kurireu buture ika kurireuji, pobo maerewu pobuto rorire ika kurireu joki; mare nowu inodu tonaji Jesus unudu rabodu
Icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge ere tuburedo ji, ere jetadudo, egore ji: - Cegimejera, ceginorudo, cewogwagodunure
Icare Jesus jetadure, unorare ei: - Kodiba tabagudure? Marenarunure tagi tameartoru bogai. Icare ure turagojedo, makore bakuruji, makore pobo maerewuji, boe butugugodure kuri je rugadu
Dukodi icare nowu boe makarewuge egore tuiebogodu tabo: - Kakoduwu imedubao? Ica, bakuru, pobo maerewu, emeartorure kuri bataru ji! Jesus ure Aroe pegarewu meture tadawuge ei pobedu pemegago
Nowu kuruga kurireu okwa bakowu keje, Gadarenodoge eno moto keje, Aroe pegarewu meture tadawuge ei pobedu, ere tuiebu ia aroe eiao piji togi. Boekori remawunure ei, dukoia boe ekodu ekodukare nono
Icarema enoiogwarigodure, egore: - Inoba aromode cei, Aroe Eimejera Onaregedu? Akaregodure mato awo cemorora amagadudo, boe kodu kimoi mai dukeje?
Ia jugorewuge makarewuge eedure nono puredu, togwage tabo boebutuji
Aror pegarewudoge enogwamagudure Jesus ji, egore ji: - Amode cewarigu dukeje, cewarigu jece, jewu jugorewuge etae
Akore ei: - Toro! Icare ere tuiebu, ere turemo jugorewugeto. Nowu inodu tonaji kuri je, nowu jugorewuge eiamedu boe ere tuwarigu boito joki toro poboto, tuwi pobo tada du kae
Jeture eiwu ime eregodure tureadodui bakurireu tada du kae nowu boere tuiegaiwoji, boere Aroe pegarewu meture tadawuge eiduji jamedu
Dukodi icare boe eture Jesus ae, enogwamagudure ji uwo tugera ra nowu nonowuge eno moto piji
Jesus ure taredo ika kurireuto pugeje, ure pagado tai, kuruga kurireu kajeje, aregodure to bakurireuto

Icarema, ere ia pogora pegarewu imedu cedo ae, padui kamorewu keje dutabo. Icare Jesus tuiorudui nowu boe emeartoru raka inodu jitu keje, akore nowu pogora pegarewuji: - Itonaregedu, akiwa rakado, aro pegarewu jamedu boe ire pijido, iwudugugodure ai
Dukejere, ia escribadoge, tumearudui nowu bataru jitu keje enogiru pegare pu biegai nowu akoino duji, icare egore: - Awu imedu bataru peganure
Icare Jesus, tuiorudui nowu emeardae inodu jitu dukeje, unorare ei: - Kodiba tameardae pegare tawabo tada?
Kakoduwu boe ewadaruba boe egoiwamode cai je: egomode: Iwudugugodure aro pegarewuji oino rabodu, iarema: Aragojedo, amerudo oino rabodu?

Ica kode, kakoduwu kodumode cai pudui? Aro kode, taeruduwawo oinoie Imedu Onaregedu roiwai moto keje tuwudugugoduwo boe ero pegarewuji. (akore nowu pogora pegarewuji:) - Aragojedo, akirimi toro awai kae
Kuri je, cewu imedu ure turagojedo, uture tuwai kae
Nowu boe makarewuge, tuiorudui nowu inoduji dukeje, epagudugodu kuricigore, eegarere Pao ji ui ime ero raka maku etaiduji. Jesus mare Mateus

Icare Jesus uture nowu piji. Dukeje icare jorudure ia imedu iei Mateus ceduji, mugui nowu boere toroe kobo maku maku cimejerage etai kejewu ira keje, icare akore ji: - Ako itabo! Icare nowu imedu ure turagojedo, kodure apo rugadu
Dukeje icare, Jesus, tumugui ira keje togwagewo nowu imedu uwai tada dukeje, publicanodoge, ro pegarewuge emagaredu etaregodure, ere tumugudo apo, ure joruduwadowuge ebo jamedu
Icare fariseudoge, tuiorudui nowu inodu jitu keje, egore ure joruduwadowuge ei: - Kodiba tagimejera okwagere publicanodoge, ro pegarewuge ebo?
Icare Jesus, tumearudui nowu inodu jitu keje, akore: - Boe okorikare jiwuge ewiapagamodukare jorubo kuru epa bogai, mare u kogodureuge

Toro, taeruduwado kodiba awu bakaru kodiboeji: “Itaidure inogudu bogai, mare bitodureboe bogai karega”(Os 6,6). Itaregodure, mare imagowo pemegarewuge ewogai karega, mare pegarewuge ewogai. Jesus makoi boe etodorogai puduiboe jidu
Nowu inodu tonaji, Joãore joruduwadowuge, ere tuburedo Jesus ji, enorare ji: - Kodiba cedorogare cei, fariseudoge etodorogare pudui, are joruduwadowuge ekar oino?

Icare Jesus akore: - Kodiba uwiredodure maiwu metage ekiarigodumode, nowu uwiredodureu rakojei tu oino pudabo de keje? Boe aregodumode nowu uwiredodureu tawujedumode epijiwo kae, dukeje etodorogamode pudui
Boe emodukare aroia maiwu bu aroia codureu poro keje; mare paga karega, nowu aroia maiwu umode aroia codureu bowuje ma, mega kodumode tugori

Jamedu, boe emodukare parera kuru maiwu tugu pori codureuto. Boe eromode ino ma, ia dukeje, pori codureu umode tuwowuje ma, nowu parera kuru umode ceredo, nowu pori pijimode jamedu. Mare boei parera kuru maiwu tugu pori maiwuto, mugu raka raimode tabo. Jesus ure ia aredu pemegago, ia nogwaredurogu jamedu

Jesus makore kimo du tonaji, ia brae eimejera, sinagoga kejewu, aregodure ae, ure tubujodo ji, akore ji: Cegimejera, itonaregedu aredurogu akurure, bokware maigodu. Mare, mato! Amode akera bu keje ma, jemode kuri pugeje
Icare Jesus ure turagojedo, kodure kuri apo, ture joruduwadowuge ekodure apo jamedu
Icarema, joru butu makaguragare arii turopegado jiwu ia aredu ure tuburedo ji kujeto, ure tugera raido ukudae oto kae
Akore oino tudada: Ikera jetumode toe ukudaeji ma, ipemegagodumode
Icare Jesus ure tumegido jice ae, jorudure ji, akore ji: - Akiwa rakado, itonaregedu! Ica, ameartoraere akinorudo. Icare nowu aredu pemegagodure kuri je
Taregodui sinagoga kejewu brae eimejera uwai kae dukeje, Jesus jorudure okwa akore parira jiwuge enogwa akoi parira jituji, makaguragarewuge epadui pugajeje duji jamedu,
Akore ei: - Tagorodo oino! Nogwaredurogu okwa karega ure, mare unudunure. Emagerema enogwarire ji, enure akoinodu perodudo
Icai nowu boe ei tuiebu dukeje, ure turemo, ure tugeragu nowu nogwaredurogu ieraji, du ure turagojedo taci je
Nowu inodu akaru ure tumaedo nowu moto kejewu boe eiamedu boeji. Jesus ure ia joku bokwarewuge ei pobedu pemegago
Icare Jesus uture nowu piji. Awaraji icare ia joku bokwarewuge ei pobedu ekodure jice rekodaji, toiogwari tabo, egore: - Davi Onaregedu, akogududo cedabo
Icare Jesus aregodure ia baito, dukejere cewu joku bokwarewuge ere tuburedo ji. Icare unorare ei: - Tameartorure iroiwamode nowu inodu jituji?. Egore: - U! Cemeartorure
Kodi icare Jesus ure tugera bu eeku keje, akore: - Udo nono tameartoru reore
Nowu inodu tonaji kuri je, eekure tuiado. Icare Jesus okituware ei, akore: - Taerudu rakado, tagaba boe eerududo nowu inoduji
Mare tui tuiebu kuri je dukeje, ere nowu inodu akaru reko nowu moto jameduji. Ia imedu bataru bokwarewu pemegagoduredu
Etu uiageje kuri je, boere ia bataru bokwarewu imedu reko mato ai, Aroe pegarewu metui tada dutabo
Aroe pegarewu barigudure piji dukeje, nowu bataru bokwarewu bataru padure kajeje. Boe etoiakodu jebogodure, emago pemegare, egore: - Boe eerudukare iaboe eroi oino awu Israeldoge etada duji
Mare fariseudoge egore: - Aroe pegarewuge eimejera ro raka koiare ure Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu. Jesus okudui boe ebodu

Jesus merure nowu bakurireu jamedu oiagi ia babuturogu boe oiagi jamedu, tui boe eeruduwado dutabo, sinagoga keje, tui boe eeruduwado Pao o boe pemegarewu akaru pemegarewuji dutabo, tui kogodureuge epemegago dutabo
Tuiorudui nowu boe etoiakodu jitu keje, Jesus okudure ebo, mare paga karega, ekugudugodui, etaguru akedugodui, nono boe eetukare jiwu barege kugure ereore dukodi
Icare akore nowu ture joruduwadowugei: - Tugudureboe kuricigore, mare maragodure jiwuge enowarore tu je
Kode, tamagodo nowu oere oinowuji makowo maragodumode jiwuge ewogai
Jesus ure ture joruduwadowuge ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotowuge eto pui. Ure ero raka maku etai ewo Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu, ewo kogodureuge epemegago tugogodae eiamedu boe piji
Ica, cewuge eie reo: Simão, du iere Pedro oino jamedu; uwie André; Tadeu onaregedu iei Tiago cedu, mare uwie João
Filipe, Bartolomeu, Tomé; cewu publicano iei Mateus cedu; Alfeu onaregedu iei Tiago cedu
Simão Cananeu; mare Judas Iscariote, duwu koiare ure Jesus maku. Apostolodoge emaragodae
Jesus ure nowu ture joruduwadowuge etudo emaragodae kae, tui eeruduwado du rekodaji. Akore ei: - Tadukaba judeukare emawuge ewai kae. Tagaba taremo Samaria mototo jamedu
Tadudo boetoji okware boeto Israeldoge ewai kejewu barege kugure ewogai
Tagodurewo jamedu boe kejere, tamagodo: - Pao o boe pemegarewu puredugodunure
Kogodureuge epmegago, bireuge eewodudo, moci bare jiwuge epemegago, Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu boe epiji. Makudure tagai paga tu jeboe tamode maku paga tu je jamedu
Tagaba meriri ekureu, meriri kigadureu towuje tagabo, diiero jamedu tagaba towuje tabegajejewu tada

Tameru kaba tagodobo tabo jamedu. Tagaba tagudae tugu pugujiagi, tameru kaba tawure tadawu tabo, taiodo tabo karega jamedu. Nowu inodu boe piji. Mare paga karega, maragodureu uke makudumode ai tumaragodae koia
Tamode taremo ia bakurireuto rabodu, ia bakurireuroguto rabodu dukeje, taemarudo iaboe etaidui tuwo tugeragu tai du bogai, taedo nono ebo jii tadumode du kae
Tai taremo ia baito dukeje, tagimadudo nowu boebo, tagagoi: - Boe pemegawo awu baiji, oino
Nowu bai tadawu boe emode tudo turugadu dukeje, nowu tagagoi oinodu butumode ewugeje. Mare umodukare ino dukeje, nowu tagagoi oinodu umode tugirimi tagae
Emodukare tugeragu tai ma, emearudumodukare tawadaru ji ma, tamode taebu nowu bai piji, iarema nowu bakurireu piji dukeje, tamode tawure jukodo tu tawure urugudurogu jameduji ewugeje
Imagomode boe jokoduji tai: - Meri aregodumode mori makudumode kaewu dukeje, Sodoma, Gomorra bakurireuge boe pemegamode ei nowu bakurireu kori. Boe etonai Cristo oge eidu
Imode tarojai nono barege kugure ereore adugodoge etoiado. Kode, tado nono awague ereore, mare jamedu metugue ereore jamedu
Tamearudu awadudo tai imei: Emode tarego tugimejerage etae, emode iwara to tai, to sinagoga keje
Tajedodumode brae eimejerage etae iwugeje. Nowu inodu tabo tamode ro oino taiwuge eeruduwado bakaru pemegarewuji; tamode aopegokarewuge eeruduwado jamedu
Emode tugeragu tai dukeje, tagogea kaba inoba tagagomode du bogai. Nowu inodu keje, tamagomode jiboe butumode tawugeje
Mare paga karega, tagi karega tagagomode, mare Tao baru tadawu koiare umode tawadaru bu tagajeje
Umanarewu umode tuwie maku bitoduwo, uo umode tonaregedu maku. Boe etore emode taredo tuomagei tuwo ewido
Boe eiamedu boe ekodu kagirimode tai ikie koia, mare umode tudurudo jii boe oto kaewu, umode cinorudo
Boe etonamode tai ia bakurireu tada ma, tarego iato pugeje. Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Tamodukare Israel kejewu bakurireuge eiado jii Imedu Onaregedu ui tugirimi du kae
Ia joruduadodureu kodukare ure tuioruduwadowu kori, utugare kodukare tugimejera kori

Ure turugadu joruduwadodureuji tuwo nono ure tuioruduwadowu reore; ure turugadu boe etugareji tuwo nono tugimejera reore jamedu. Boe egore Aroe pegarewu eimejeraie ure boe etuoce, kode, jeture bai tadawuge eina, boe egomodukare ino? Ioguduba ceba pabagudumode
Kode, tabagudu kaba. Ia biadodureboe bokware urugureboe piji, ia podureboe umodukare pudumi boe eeruduwa kawo pudui
Imagore tai boeco tadaboe, tamagodo ji urugureboe tada; tamearudure ji podu tu jeboe, tamagodo ji bai aogajeje
Tabagudu kaba cewu ure boe ekodu, boe ewiri bitowugece, mare emodukare boe etaroe bito. Tabagududo boetoji, roiware tuwo boe ewarigu tugodu, tuwiri, tudaroe tabo jorutowuji
Boe emodukare kiege barege ei pobedu maku emorirogu biega tu jedu morice? Mare iage ewudumodukare moto kae Tao aiduka dukeje
Tagaora towu tagao ira jamedurogu remagudure jamedu
Kode, tabagudu kaba, tagire tagodure kiege barege ekori. Boe ei Cristo ogedo pudumi, iarema ei tuioruduwa bokwado jidu
Kode, cewu mako pemegare ii boe eegaiwu jamedu boe, imi imago pemegamode ei Ioga baru tadawu biegai jamedu
Mare ure tuioruduwa bokwado ii boe eegaiwu, imi jamedu imode ioruduwa bokwado ji Ioga baru tadawu jekai jamedu. Cristo ure boe erugodui puidu arego
Tadugu kaba itaregoduie boe butugugodureu tabo moto kaeduji; itaregodukare boe butugugodureu tabo mare boe erugodui puidu tabore itaregodure
Itaregodure iwo onaregedu okwacedo tuo piji, iwo onaregedu aredu okwacedo tuje piji, iwo urago okwacedo tujarugo piji
Onare imedu jiwugere nowu uwai kejewuge emidodu
Cewu mearudu kurire tuoji, tujeji, ikoriwu, ukare turugadu ii. Cewu mearudu kurire tonaregeduji ikoriwu, ukare turugadu ii
Cewu ukare tugeragu to cruzji itabo ma, ukare turugadu ii
Cewu ure tubewudo pudui tuwi kawowu, bimode rugadu, mare cewu bitodumode iwugejewu, nowu jewodumode pugeje. Boe enogudui puapodu mori
Ure tugeragu taiwu, iire ro oino jamedu. Ure tugeragu iiwu, ure tugeragu ure irojaiwuji jamedu

Ure tugeragu ia profetaji nono profetaie emadu reore ma, ema jamedu morimode ai nono ia profetaie emadu kodiwore. Ure tugeragu ia jetororewuji nono jetorewuie emadu reore ma, ema jamedu morimode ai nono ia jetororewuie emadu kodiwore
Ia ure pobo akureurogu maku awu ia biegarewurogu ai, ia ire joruduwadodureuie emadu koia ma, boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Mori okwamodukare piji
Jesus, tui cewu ture joruduwadowuge ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwureko todu eeruduwado du akedu keje, uture nowu nonowu boe etae, tumagowo ei, tuwo eeruduwado
João Batista mugure baicorewu tada, dutabore mearudure Jesus roji. Icare ure ia ture joruduwadowuge etudo toro bogai enorawo ji
Egore ji: - Akina akagarure akaregoduwo, iarema cekana umode cewudugudo ia bogai?
Jesus akore ei: - Toro, tareadodudo João biegai tamearudure jiboeji, taerudure jiboeji
Joku bokwarewuge etaiwore, pogora koborewuge emerure, moci bare jiwuge etagurugudure, bakaru pemegarewu readudodure marenarue ewiegai
Jiwo aidugirireuge emodukare turo pegado igoia

Icare cewu João Batista ure joruduwadowuge eture nowu piji dukeje, Jesus makore oino João jiboeji, nowu makarewuge ewiegai: - Tadure João togi boe mataduto de keje, kaba bogaiba tadure togi? Taeruduwo bakuru ure amagadudowu kadoji kana?
Taeruduwo imedu ukudae pemegai jitu duji kana? Mare nowu ukudae pemegare ino jiwuge eedure boe eimejerage ewai tada
Kode kodiba tadure toro? Taeruduwo ia profetaji kana? U! Inagomode tai, kodure ia profeta koriwuji
Mare paga karega, João jire atugododure oino: “Imode itugare rojai akododai, uwo akawara pemegado akododai” (Mal 3,1
Inagomode boe jokoduji tai: Areme etorei oinodu ekodukare João Batista kori. Mare du inodu tabo, biegare tu Pao o boe pemegarewu tadawuge etadawu kodure kori
Nowu João Batista rekodajiboe jii oino maigoduboe, tubewu tabowu ure turemo Pao o boe pemegarewuto, tubewu tabowuge emode turemo to
Moisés mare profetadoge emagore jii João kae Pao bataru ji
Kode, tagaidumode tawo inodu pawuje ma, emare Elia rema, dure aregodumode, du reno
Biajarewu mearudumode awu inoduji
Kakoduwuge eiba imode awuge eebato? Ere nono ia boe etore kugurere tumugui tu ba oiadoda, duwugere ekudure tumedage ei, egore
Cenogwa akore pariraji, mare tarerukare; ceroiare mare tagoragudukare
João Batista aregodure, okwagekare, kudukare boece, kodi icare egore: - Aroe pegarewu meture tada

Imedu Onaregedu aregodure, okwagere, kudure, kodire egore: - Okwage kurireu, kudu kurireunure ema. Publicanodoge, ro pegarewuge etumeduianure ema. Mare Pao joruduwareboe ure towadudo turo pemegarewu koia. Meartorukarewu bakurireuge
Dukeje icare Jesus rore ja tuiogi cewu ture turo pemegarewu kurireu makaguragare jiwu bakurireugei, etaidukare tuwo turo pemegado kodi. Akore

Biododumode ai, Corozaim bakurireu! Biododumode ai, Betzaida bakurireu! Mare paga karega, cewu ure tudowuje taiwu boe pemegarewu kurireu, umode nowu Tiroji, nowu Sidoniaji jamedu ma, marigudu etodorogamode pudui tugajejewu bukigu okorireu tabo, jorugudu tabo jamedu. Tagirema takare tagodoragado tai
Kodire inagomode oino tai: Nowu meri aregodumode nowu mori kae dukeje, boe pegamodukare Tiroji, Sidoniaji nono boe pega magai tai du reore

Kode, aki Cafarnaum bakurireu, aki kana acedodumode tu baruto? Boro! Awarigudumode jii toro joruto. Mare Sodoma bakurireu jorudumode boe pemegarewu kurireu ui tudowuje atoda ma, umode kimo jii awu meri kae
Kodire inagomode oino ai: - Nowu mori makudumode jiwu meri ji boe pega jokodumodukare ji nono boe pega magai ai du reore. Tadudo itae tawo tagamudo

Nowu dukodi Jesus akore oino awu tuwadaru ji: - Ioga, iwadaru pemegamode ai, ore baru cewu, ore moto cewu, mare paga karega, are awu inodu biado joruduwarewuge epiji, are awadudo biegarewuge etai kodi
U! Ioga, iwadaru pemegamode ai; mare paga karega, oinore ure akaidu reore kodi
Boe jamedu boe makudure inai Ioga koia. Boe eeruduwakare Onaregeduji mare Uo tu rugadu; jamedu, boe eeruduwakare Uoji, mare tu Onaregedu; Onaregedu koiare umode awadudo ia boei jamedu
Taiamedu boe, kiarigodure motudureboe kudawuge! mato itae, imode boe iwaripodo tai

Tagoredudo inoredure taboboe tabo, taeruduwado inure taeruduwado jiboeji; mare paga karega, imire boekori metukare iwabo tada, inojarokare ii iwabo tada. Nowu inodu kodire taerudumode tai tagamudo duji
Imode tagoredudo taboboe biakare, imodudu barire. l2. Jesus ore Sábado rema jamedu
Jesus unure pagado ia trigo pa kajeje sabadore jiwu meri ji. Ure joruduwadowuge eke boire ei dukoia ere tugeragu ia enariji tuwo kowuje
Dukodi icare fariseudoge tuiorudui nowu inodu jitu keje, egore Jesus ji: - Akaiwodo are joruduwadowuge eroi boe eromodukare ji Sábado jiboeji
Icare Jesus akore ei: -Tamagokare Davi ro padure kejewu bapera atugoji, tuge boire pudui sabadore jiwu meri ji dukeje?
Ure turemo Pao uwaito, ure Pao bataru padure kejewu amireu kowuje. Aró! Ema mare metage emodukare nowu amireu kowuje, nowu amireu jetu otorogare tu Pao burejoiadoge etai
Tamagokare boe eroiagudu padure kejewu bapera atugoji: sabadore jiwu meri ji Pao burejoiadoge emaragodure Pao uwai tada, du inodu tabo inodu pegamodukare ei?
Kode, imode awadudo tai: kodure Pao uwai koriwu rakojere woe
Tamode awu bakaru pawuje: Itaidure okudureboe bogai, mare bitodureboe bogai karega, oino ma, tamodukare ro pegakarewuge eiwodo
Mare paga karega, Imedu Onaregedu onure sabadoce jamedu. Jesus ure ia iera bireu imedu pemegago
Icare Jesus uture nowu piji, ure turemo sinagogato
Nonore ia iera bireu imedu rakojere nono. Iaboe emedure nono jamedu duwuge enoragodure Jesus ji, togiru pegawo jitu bogai, egore: - Boe emodukana ia kogodureu pemegago sabadore jiwu meri ji?
Icare Jesus akore ei: - Ia tagi, tagagu barogorogu umode mitotu tagabo, du butumode ia motoiato sabadore jiwu meri ji ma, tagaiwomodukare bogai tawo tawuje piji?
Kode, imedu kodukare nowu ia barogorogu kori? Kode, boe ero pemegamode sabadore jiwu meri ji jamedu
Dukodi icare akore nowu imedu ji: - Akera raido! Ure tugera raido, du ure nono cewu tumeduia reore
Kodi icare fariseudoge eture nowu piji, emagore pui inoba turomode tuwo Jesus bito du bogai. Pao utugare pemegarewu
Jesus joruduware nowu fariseudoge emeardaeji, dukodire uture nowu eeda piji. Ia boe makarewuge ekodure apo. Ure kogodureuge eiamedu pemegago
Mare makore ei ereadodu kawo inoduji iaboe ewiegai

Nowu inodu uwo nono profeta Isaia makore jaoboe reore: 18"Pao Aroe Eimejera akore: Ica, cewu inogwa kuridodure jiwu reo, jire ire ikeragu, imearudu kurire ji, kejere itaidae pemegarewu jamedu boe bu keje. Imode Itaroe udo tamudo keje. Umode ia moto tuginoiwu kejewuge ewie jetororeboeji
Ema okimodukare, umodukare tumago awogado, boe emearudumodukare makoji ba oiadoda
Umodukare ure tuwowu kado kado, umodukare uredudu kimorewu upea paru bitudo, jii ukai jetororeboedo tumorido du kae
Moto jamedu boe epagamode bogai” (Is 42,14). Jesus mare Aroe pegarewuge eimejera
Dukeje, boe ere ia Aroe pegarewu meture tadawu joku bokwarewu, bataru bokwarewu imedu reko ae. Jesus ure pemegago kuri je, dukoiare makore, aiwore
Kodi icare nowu makarewu boe eebogodure, egore: - Cewu Davi onaregdu karegao?
Mare fariseudoge, tumearudui nowu inodu jitu keje, egore: - Aroe pegarewuge eimejera koiare ure Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu
Mare Jesus, turemodui emeardaeto, akore: - Boe eeda jamedu boe epadui pumekejedu, emode tubegado rugadu. Bakurireu jamedu boe, baidoge eiamedu boe epadui pumekejedu emodukare pugeje jamedu
Aroe pegarewu umode Aroe pegarewu barigu ma, onare pudui jamedu. Kode, inoba romode tuwo turo utudo todobiji?
Kode, ire Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu Aroe pegarewuge eimejera ro tabo ma, kode, ioguduba ro taboba tagore ere ewarigu? Nowu inodu koia emage rugadure emagomode morimode tagaiboeji
Mare Pao Utaroe koiare ire Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu ma, kode, nowu inodu ure Pao o boe pemegarewu aregodui tagaidu awadudo
Iaboe iaboe emodukare turemo ia imedu ro rakarewu uwaito, tukai nowu imedu ro rakarewu kogudo dukeje. Du inodu tabo boe eiwogumode uwaiji
Mugukare itabowu onanure ii; ukare boe ako itabowu, unure boe barigu
Kodire inago oino tai: boe ero pegarewu jamedu boe, boe ewadaru pegarewu jamedu boe, butugugodae aregodumode etae; mare ro ako pegare Aroe Pemegarewu jiwu, butugugodumodukare ji
Bataru pegare Imedu Onaregdu jiwu, butugugodae aregodumode ae, mare bataru pegare Aroe Pemegarewu jiwu butugugodae umodukare, woe moto keje, ia aregodumodewo keje karega jamedu. I tudu
Tamagomode ia i pemegaie, kode, tudu pemegamode jamedu; iarema tamagomode ia i pegaie, kode, tudu pegamode jamedu. Mare paga karega, tudu koiare ure boedo boe pawuje iji
Awague ereorewuge! Tabegare, dukoia, inoba tagagomode boe pemegarewuji? Mare paga arega, boe ewabo okorobadu koia aregodure boe enogwa kae
Ica, imedu pemegarewu ure tugeragu ia toroe pemegarewuji tubiji; mare imedu pegarewu ure tugeragu ia toroe pegarewuji tubiji
Inagomode tai: meri aregodumode mori makudumode kaewo dukeje, ime ewadaru pagawu jamedu boe mori makudumode etai
Padure akajejewu awadaru koia, boe pemegamode ai rakudu, boe pegamode ai rakudu. Boe emagoi ia Jesus ro kurireu bogaidu
Dukejere ia escribadoge, ia fariseudoge egore Jesus ji: - Cegimejera, cedaidure ceeruduwo ai ia aro kurireu towuje duji

Mare Jesus akore ewadaru jipagi: - Awu dukodiwu boe ero pegarewu ego pegarewu, emeartorukarewu, enogwamagudure ia kodiboe bogai. Mare makumodukare iadure iakare pugeje: Mare profeta Jonas o kodiwu umode tudowuje ei tu rugadu

Mare paga karega, ure nono Jonas meture karo kuri tada meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, boeco pobe ma jewu metuia bokware du reorere Imedu Onaregedu metumode moto tada meri pobe ma awu metuia bokware, boeco pobe ma awu metuia bokware jamedu
Mori makudumode jiwu meri ji, Ninivitadoge emode turagojedo nowugei tuwo ewarigu boe pegarewuto; mare paga karega, edorogare pudui Jonas bataru keje. Aró, kode, kodure Jonas koriwu rakojere woe

Mori makudumode jiwu meri ji, Sul jaogwaiwu brae eimejerago umode turagojedo nowugei tuwo ewarigu boe pegarewuto, mare paga karega, jaegiriboe pijire aregodure tumearuduwo Salomão joruduwa rakaguragare jiboeji. Aró, kode, kodure Salomão koriwu rakojere woe. Aroe pegarewui tugirimidu
Ia Aroe pegarewu , tui tudawuje ia imedu pijidu, uture toro boe mataduto, tuiemaru tabo ia tumuga bogai, mare boekimore, jorudukare boeji
Do koiare akore: Kode, iwo ikirimi cewu ire iebu pijiwoto. Tui tugirimi dukeje, aregodure cewu ture tuiebu pijiboe kae pugeje. Aiwore tu je ma, biorore, akurugodure, oroere

Dukejere ure tugirimi ia tumedage emode ikera awubodure ere pobe ikera awubowuto pega jokodure tugoriwuge ewogai, icare eiamedu tabo ere turemo to pugeje, nonore icare emugure nono. Dukoiare ecewu kodure boiwu, pega kodure turewo kori. Du reorere umode awu oinowu boe pegarewugei. Jesus uce mare uwiemage
Jesus mako kimore nowu makaguragarewugei, du tonajire icare uce aregodure uwiemage ebo, ere tuwudugudo baawadu keje tumagowo ji
Icare iage egore Jesus biegai, egore: - Ace, awiemage ere tuwudugudo awogai baawadu keje, etaidure tumagowo ai
Icare Jesus akore: - Ioguduba imugaba? Ioguduba iwiemageba?
Icare, tui ciemagu ture joruduwadowugei dutabo, akore: - Awuge imugare, iwiemagere emage
Nowu rore nono Ioga aidu reorewuge, iwie imedureu, iwie aredureudo, imugare emage
Nowu meri ji Jesus ure tudawuje nowu bai piji, kodure kuri, ure tumugudo kuruga kurireu okwai
Boe makarewuge ere taiado tu apo. Dukodire ure turemo ika kurireuto epiji. Ure tumugudo tada, nowu makarewuge eedui jipa kejedu otoi
Icare uwadodure, makore jiwu bakaru makaguragare
Akore: - Ia imedu ure tudawuje tuwo boe a tugu. Ui boe a tugu dutabo, ia boe a buture awara keje; kiege barege etaregodure ma, ere kowuje
Ia a buture tori pegato, moto kurikarewu keje; boture kuri je, moto okwatorikare ji kodi
Mare meri rutui kuri je dukeje, kidure tugwa bokwa koia
Ia a buture botoguruto; nowu botoguru ricodure, ure okwado tudo
Boe iwa tabo, ia a buture moto pemegarewuto, du ia a botu kurire, ia botu biegare
Aidure tumearuduwowuge emearuduwo. Bakarue kodiboe
Nowu ure joruduwadowuge ere tuburedo ji, egore ji: Kodiba amagore ei nowu bakaru tabo ?
Jesus akore ei: Paga karega, tagaire nowu Pao o boe pemegarewu boe biarewu makudure taeruduwawo ji. Emagarema karega
Mare paga karega, ure apowu, ia makudumode ai pugeje, du itodumode todobiji. Mare boe kimore apowu, ure tu apowurogu arudumode piji
Ica, dukodire imagore ei bakaru tabo, duma, etaiwore ma, eerudukawo; emearudure ma, ewiapaga kawo, ekawo boe pa jamedu
Ica, oinore profeta Isaias makore jiboe ure tudowuje ei: Tamearudumode tawiaja tabo, mare tamodukare pawuje: taerudumode taeku tabo, mare taerudumodukare boeji
Mare paga karega, nowu boe ewabo rire marigudu, ere tuwiaja mi, ere tuioku mi, tuiorudukawo tuioku tabo, tumearudukawo tuwiaja tabo tukawo boe pawuje, ikawo epemegado (Is 6,
Tagirema, jiwo aidugirireuge tagi: taeku jorudure, tawiaja mearudure kodi

Imode boe rikireu awadudo. Makarewu profetadoge, makarewu pemegarewuge etaidure tuioruduwo taerudure jiboeji, mare eerudukare; etaidure tumearuduwo tamearudure jiboeji, mare emearudukare ji. Jesus ui ure boe a tuguwu o bakaru kogadodu
Kode, tawiapagado cewu ure boe a tuguwu imedu o bakaru ji ka
Imedu mearudui Pao o boe pemegarewu o bakaruji tu kai boe pa dutabo, du Aroe pegarewu aregodure ure tugudure uwabo toboe tawuje piji, cewu a buture awara kejewu reoreboe reno
Cewu a buture tori pegatowu ure nono mearudure tuiegare tabo bakaru jiwu reore
Mare raikare, ukwa bokware, ia kiarigodure kejeboe, ia onare nowu bakaru koiawu aregodu keje, ewudumode kuri je
Cewu a buture botoguru towu ure nono mearudu pemegare bakaru jiwu reore. Mare nowu okeare moto kejeboe ro jitu koia, ure okwado tuku, dukoia tudu bokware
Tugudure moto pemegarewu toboe ure nono mearudure bakaru jiwu, ure pawuje, dure tudu pemegare, ia botu kurire pugori pugori. Boebutu pegarewu
Jesus ure ia to bakaru bu pugeje, akore: - Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono ia imedu ui boe a pemegarewu tugu to boepato du reore
Mare boe ei tamudo dukeje, enudure dukeje, onare nowu imedu jiwu aregodure, ure boebutu pegarewu a tugu nowu boe a pemegarewu kao, dukejere uture
Iro pemegarewu ricodure, enari boture, mare boebutu pegarewu padure kajeje jamedu
Dukodi icare nowu imedu pemegarewu utugarege etaregodure, egore ji: - Cegimejera, are boe a pemegarewu tugu ako boepato. Kode, kaiba boebutu pegarewu aregodure?
Akore ei: - Cewu onare iiwu imedu ure ro oino nowu inoduji. Emagore ji pugeje: - Akaidure ceduwo toro kae, cewo tawuje?
Akore: - Boro. Tamode tawuje ma, tamode nowu iro tawuje tabo du umode

Ricodo rugadu jii, pudonaji jii boei tugeragu jitu kae. Kadodumode dukeje, imagomode umode kadowugei: - Boebutu pegarewu kado jao boetoji, upodo kogudo tawo barigu joruto; dukeje tamode tageragu iroji, tamode reko mato tuiato. Mostarda a
Dukejere Jesus ure ia bakaru bu tu pugeje, akore: - Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono ia imedu ui tugeragu mostarda a jitu, icare ure tugu to boepato du reore

Nowu a biega remawure awuia tudugureboerogu boe a kuda, mare boture dukeje, ricodure dukeje, kurire, kodure nowu boeparogu tadaboe jamedu kori. Dukoiare kiege kugure ere tuwaradu bu itura boe keje. Ure amireu barodudoboe

Nowu inodu otobiji pugeje, Jesus akore awu ia bakaruji pugeje, akore: - Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono ia aredu ui amireu barodudoboe tugu trigo kuduto, tuwo kudu jamedu pemegado du reore. Kodiba Jesus mako makore boe jeonare jiboeji
Awu inodu jamedu boere Jesus bakarudo ema boe ewiegai. Oinore ako kigodure boei
Boewo nono profeta makore jiboe reore: - Imode iia barido bakaruji, imode biareboe mariguduwu awadudo boei. Jesus ure boebutu pegarewu jiboe kogado

Dukejere icare Jesus imadure boe ebo, ure etudo. Du inodu otobiji, ure turemo baito pugeje, icare ure joruduwadowuge ere tudo pui ae, egore ji: - Cewie cewu boebutu pegarewu tugudui boepato dukodiboeji
Icare Jesus akore: - Ure boe a pemegarewu tugu ure nono Imedu Onaregedu
Boepare ure nono awu moto reore. Boe a pemegarewu ure nono Pao o boe pemegarewu tadawuge ereore. Boebutu pegarewu ure nono Aroe pegarewu orere
Ure boe a pegarewu tuguwu imedu pegarewu Aroe pegarewu rema. Boe ei tugeragu iro jitudu ure nono awu moto akedumodedu kodiboe reore. Ure iro kadowugere Pao o tupadogere emage
Boebutu pegarewu kadoduredu barigudure jorutodu ure nono awu moto akedumodedu kodiboere
Imedu Onaregedu umode to tupadoge edo boe pegarewu jamedu boe barigu to boe pemegarewu piji, umode edo ro pegarewuge ewarigu piji jamedu
Nono etoragudumode, eto ako kororogodumode pui
Dukejere pemegarewuge erugumode Pao o boe pemegarewu keje nono meri joku urugure. Biajarewu mearududo awu inoduji. Boe enoroe biadodureu

Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono ia boe enoroe motureu pemegarewu biadodui ia boepa tada du reore. Ia imedu jorudure ji, mare ure biado pugeje. Dukeje, tuiegare tabo, ure toroe jamedu boe, toe jamedu boe ure akirodo tabo, tuwo cewu boepa aru. Tori mori kuricigorewu
Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono ia imedu jemarure tuwo akirodo tori motureu jiwu reore
Jorudure jitu du pemegare, mare mori kuricigore. Dukejere ure tuieture jiboe jamedu boe akirodo tabo tuwo cewu tori motureu mori kuricigorewu aru. Buke jiwu bakaru
Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono buke barigudui pobo todu ui tugeragu kare epadui pumekejedu boe jitu reore
Buke okorobadu keje, nowu kare ecebage ere tumugudo keje, karebo, boeki kae tu je; ere tumugudo, icare ere tado karei: kare pemegarewuge ere tugu kodoto, kare pegarewuge ere ewarigu
Oinore awu moto akedu keje boemode. Pao o tupadoge etaregodumode tuwo pegarewuge etawuje pemegarewuge epiji
Emode ewarigu joruto, etoragudu jetui nono du kae, eto akoi pui du kae
Dukejere icare Jesus unorare ture joruduwadowugei: - Tare boe pa awu inodu jameduji?. Egore: - U
Jesus akore: - Awu inodu kodire, ia joruduwarewu joruduwai Pao o boe pemegarewu jiwu ure nono boe etuo magai ui tugeragu ia toroe maiwuji, ia toroe codureuji du reore. Jesus rakojei Nazaré kejedu
Jesus, tui awu bakaru akedudo dukejere icare, uture nowu piji
Ure tugirimi to bakurireuroguto, ure sinagoga kejewuge eeruduwado. Dukodire boe egore tuiebogodu tabo: - Mure, kaiba awu joruduwa rakareboe aregodure bogai?
Kode cewu ira epa onaregedu karegao? Maria, oino karega uce iere? Uwiemage karega Tiago, Jos, Simão, Judasnure emage?
Utuiemage karega ere oino paiogi? Kode, kaiba awu inodu jamedu boe aregodure ae?
Eeruduwakare inoba tagowo jituji. Mare Jesus akore ei: - Tu to moto keje, tuwobe ewai keje, ia profeta barigodudodu kigodure pudui
Emeartoru bokwa koiare ukare turo kurireu towujedu makado nono
Nowu kodiwu kodi brae eimejera Herodes mearudure boe emagoi Jesus jituji
Dukejere akore tuwai tadawu tudugaregei: - U! João Batista jewodure dure ema rugadu. Kodire ure turo kurireu towujedu makaguragado oino
Mare paga karega, Herodes koiare ure boe edo tugeragu João Batistaji, ure edo ieragogudo, ure edo tugu bai corewuto. Mare Herodiade, Filipe oreduje koiare ure nowu inodu jamedu boedo oino Joãoji
Marigudu João akore Herodeji: - Akaba akeragu awie oredujeji akoredujece
Herodes aidure tuwo bito, mare pagudure boece, boe emeartorure ji, profetare ema kodi
Mare Herodes o joru butu keje, Herodiade onaregedu nogwaredurogu rerure nowu Herodes ure utuiagu tuwai kae nowu peta kaewuge etoiadoda, ure Herodes jekaredo
Dukodire Herodes makore ji, tui togwatugu dutabo, akore: - Akogwa magudumode bogaiboe jamedu boe imode makakai rugadu
Dukodi icare nowu nogwaredurogu, tuje bataru rekodajire akore: - Amode João Batista aora makinai awu baku keje
Icare Herodes kiarigodure tu... mare, ure togwatugu dukoia, nowu brae eegai, kodire ure tudugarege edo makai rugadu
Ure edo João itoru kado baicorewu tada
Icare João Batista ao cedodure mato baku keje, ere maku tu nowu nogwaredurogu ai, ema ure maku toro tuje ai
Dukeje nowu Joãore joruduwadowuge etaregodure mato bogai tuwo tugu mototo. Dukejere ere nowu akaru cedo Jesus bogai. Jesus ure makarewu boe enogwagedo

Jesus, tumeradui nowu inodu akaru jitu keje, uture nowu piji, ia ika kurireu tabo, tuwo turodo oino ia boe biorewuto. Mare boe emearudure dukeje, nowu bakurireuge etadawu boe makarewuge eture tuwure tabo rekodaji
Icare Jesus, tui tudawuje nowu ika kurireu piji dukeje, jorudure nowu boe etoiakoduji, okudugodure tu ebo, ure kogodureuge epemegago
Meri rekodu buture tu dukejere, ure joruduwadowuge, tuiedui nono apo dutabore, egore Jesus ji: - Boe matadu tadaboenure woe, boere marigudu. Kode, awu boe etudo, ewo akirodo iaboerogu boeji tugeje
Mare Jesus akore ei: - Umodukare ino.Tagi rugadu tamode enogwagedo
Icare egore ji: - Amireure ikera awubodure tu woe, kare kugurere pobe tu je
Jesus akore: - Mato tabo

Dukejere ure boedo tumugudo boebutu tada, ure tugeragu nowu amireui ikera awubodure tu je duji, mare cewu kare ei pobe tu je duji, ure tuie aogado baruto, makore boe pemegarewuji keje. Ure kado, dure ure maku ture joruduwadowuge etai, emagere icare ere pedo toro boe etai
Eiamedu boe ere kowuje, enogwa amogodure, ekuredure. Kobo jetu kimorewu tabore ure joruduwadowuge ere kododoge ikera pudogidure iwurekoi pobe tu jedu enogorawu
Aró kode, okwagerewu ime ere 5.000 boe kadui areme, boe etore, eremagu dutabo. Jesus merui pobo aojidu
Dukejere icare Jesus ure nowu ture joruduwadowuge edo taredo ika kurireuto ewo pagado jece bakowuto tododai, cimadui nowu makarewu boe ebo du tonaji

Imadure nowu boe ebo dukeje, Jesus ruture tori raireu ao kae nonowo ure togwakurido tuginoigodu boe biaru keje. Boecodure ji toro tuginoigodu. 24 Nowu inodu tonaji, ika kurireu mugu jaegirire pobo maerewu oiadoda, akurugodure jice woje, jice woje pobuto koia, mare bakuru okwace pegare dukoia
Ba aregodu tabore, Jesus aregodure etae tumerui pobo ao jitu tabo
Nowu ure joruduwadowuge, tui boe pa pobo aoji raboduie meruredu jitu tabo, epagudugodure, enoiogwarire tubagudu koia, egore: - Ia aroe boe
Mare Jesus akore kuri ei: - Taedo kiorodo, tabagudu kaba, imire iro oino
Dukodi icare Pedro akore ji: - Cegimejera, aki rugadu dukeje, amagodo ii imeruwo pobo aoji kuri toro akae
Jesus akore ji: Mato! Icare Pedro ure turawuje ika kurireu piji, merure pobo aoji Jesus togi
Mare bakuru ure togwamudu rakado dukeje, pagudugodure, akore: - Ikimejera, ikinorudo
Nowu inodu keje kuri je, Jesus ure tugera raido ae, ure tugeragu ji, akore ji: - Marenarure aki, imedu, ameartoru bogai! Kodiba ameartoru bokware?
Ei taredo ikato du tonajire bakuru butugugodure tu je
Du koiare cewu ika tadawuge ere tubujodo ji, egore: - Boe jokodu radu Pao Onaregedure aki. Jesus ure boe epemegago Genesaré keje
Ere pagado nowu kuruga kajeje, etaregodure Genesaré kae
Nowu jeture nonowuge ere pawuje. Dukodire ere nowu tuieda oieiwu boe eiamedu boe ewie. Dukodi icare ere kogodureuge eiamedu boe erego ae
Enogwamagudure ji uwo edo tugera jetu toi nowu tugudae okwarogu jitu bogai. Iera jeture jiwuge eiamedu boe epemegagodure
Jerusalém kejewu ia fariseudoge, ia escribadoge eture mato Jesus ae, egore ji
Kodiba are joruduwaduwuge emeartorukare jawuge eroiaji? Ekare tugera kabi togwagemodedu otodai
Icare Jesus akore ei: - Kode, kodiba tameartorukare Pao bataru ji taro koia?
Pao akore: “Ado nono iaboere aoji, aceji”!. Akore jamedu: “Ure tuwadaru pegado tuo jiwu, tuje jiwu, bimodedure morimode ema”(Ex 20,12;21,17
Tagirema tagagore: - Cewu akore tuo, tuje jiwu: cewu ire ikerabraredo tai taboboe ire maku Pao ai
Dukodiwu umodukare tugurido pudabo tuoji, tujeji pugeje. Kode ino taro koia, tare Pao bataru barigududo
Ro biadodureuge, tai rugadure profeta Isaias akore: 8”Awu boe emeartorure ii tu togwa tabo, mare ewabo rema mugu jaegirire ii”
Enogwamagudure iwogaidu boe pagawunure ema; mare paga karega, ere boe eeruduwado tu aregodure ime epijiwu ewadaru ji
Dukejere Jesus ure cewu makarewuge edo tudo pui pudae, akore ei
Tamearududo, taeruduwado: Ure turemo boe eiagiboe karega ure boe erorogodudo; mare aregodure boe eiabijiboe koiare ure boe erorogodudo
Dukejere icare cewu ure joruduwadowuge ere tuburedo ji, egore ji: - Aeruduware fariseudoge eerudu pegai awu awadaru jituji?
Jesus akore: - Ioga baru tadawu ukare tuguboe jamedu boe ukwa tawujedumode
Nowuge epijido. Eeku bokware dutabo ere joku bokwarewuge ekoduiagu turegodaji. Kode ia joku bokwarewu kodumode tumeduia joku bokwarewu otodai ma, ewudumode moto oiakoto puapo
Dukodi icare Pedro akore: - Nowu bakaru kogado cewiegai
Jesus akore: - Kode, tagi jamedu tajekare taeruduwawo du bogai?
Ure turemo boe eiagiboe jamedu boe buture boe ekurito, dukeje barigudure toro boe biadoduto
Mare aregodure boe eiabijiboe aregodure boe ewabo piji; nowu koiare ure boe erorogodudo
Mare paga karega, boe ewabo pijire boe emeardae pegarewu, boe eiwogu, boei pu roiaododu, boe ewadaru pegai puidu aregodure kodi
Nowu inodu jamedu koiare ure imedu rorogodudo. Mare boe ekai tugera kabi togwagemodedu otodaidu koia karega ure imedu rorogodudo. Ia moto tuginoiwu pijiwu aredu meartorae
Jesus uture nowu piji, ure tuburedo Tiro, Sidônia eno moto kae
Dukejere ia aredu Canaa kejewudo, ure tuburedo ji, oiogwarire, akore: - Cegimejera Davi onaregedu, akogududo itabo! Itonaregedu aredurogu Aroe pegarewu meture tada, ukare padu kiorodo pudui
Mare Jesus makokare ia tuwadaru boeji ji. Dukodi icare ure joruduwadowuge ere tuburedo ji, enogwamagudure ji, egore: - Awu aredu utudo toro: oiogwari kuricigore paregodaji
Icare Jesus akore: - Irojaidodure mare jeture Israel kejeu barege kugure ewogwai boeto du bogai tu je
Mare cewu aredu kodure kuri ae, ure tubujodo tuku jokorai, akore: - Cegimejera, akerabraredo ii
Jesus akore: - Boe emodukare tore eke barigu arigaodoge etai
Icare nowu aredu akore: - Boe jokodu, mare arigaodoge kugure emode akure pudumiwuge eke gigudurogu boe butui moto kaedu kowuje
Icare Jess akore ji: - Aredu, ameartoru remawunure. Boedo nono akaidu reore. Nowu inodu tonaji kuri je, onaregedu pemegagodure. Jesus ure boe makarewuge epemegago
Icare Jesus ure tudawuje nowu piji, ure tugirimi Galiléia kejewu pobo maerewu puredu tu je, ruture ia boe aoporu ao kae, ure tumugudo nono
Dukejere makarewu boe ere tuburedo ji. Boe karema, bataru bokwarewuge, pogora pegarewuge, ia ure awubowu tujewuge mare ia kogodureuge ebo jamedure ero oino. Ere edo tuburedo bure paru, ure epemegago

Dukodi, nowu inodu koia, boe erore ta... nowu bataru bokwarewuge ewadaru padui ekajeje duji, nowu ure awubowu tujewuge epemegago duji, nowu meru bokwarewuge emerure duji, nowu joku bokwarewuge etaiwore duji. Dukodire icare eegarere Israeldoge eno Aroe Eimejeraji. Jesus ure ime ei 4.000 cedu enogwagedo pugeje

Jesus rema, ure ture joruduwadowuge edo tudo pui, akore ei: - Inogudure awu boe makarewuge ebo. Ica, kode, merire pobe ma jewu metuia bokware eedui itabo dukeje, ia eke bokware ewo kowuje. Imodukare etudo tukai boe ko dutabo dukeje, ewogwa kawo awara keje
Icare ure joruduwadowuge egore ji: - Inoba paromode paemaruwo awu boe matadu tada amireu makamode du bogai pawo awu boe makarewuge enogwagedo?
Jesus akore: - Inoba amireure tagabo? Egore: - Ure ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto, mare ia kare kugure jamedu
Kodi icare Jesus ure boe makarewuge edo tumugudo moto keje

Dukejere ure tugeragu nowu amireuji, nowu kare kugurei, makore ia tuwadaru pemegarewuji ewugeje. Icare ure tugera bu kajeje toku je, ure maku ture joruduwadowuge etai, emagere icare ere maku toro nowu boe makarewuge eiamedu boe ai
Eiamedu boe okwagere ji, enogwa amogodure. Jeture tuiagejewu tabo, ure joruduwadowugere kododoge ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu enogorobadudo
Aró, kode, okwagerewu ime ere 4.000, areme eremagudu ka dutabo, etore eremagudu ka dutabo jamedu
Dukejere icare Jesus ure nowu boe etudo, icare ruture ika kurireuto, ure tugirimi Magadan kejewu boe eeda kae
Ia fariseudoge, ia saduceudoge ere tugirimi Jesus ae, toebatodu pegarewu tabo ji, enogwamagudure ji, egore uiagu baru tadawu ia turo kurireu towuje tuiegai
Kodi icare Jesus akore ewadaru jipagi: - Meri rekodu tabore tagagore: Nonore boe motumode, baru kujagure kodi
Meri togire tagagore: Awujire bubutu pegarewu butumode, baru kujagu tugure kodi

Ro biadodureuge! Taeruduware ure tudo baru tadawu boeji. Kodiba taeruduwakare awu meri jiwu ia koiaboeji? Awu ro, ako, pegarewuge enogwamagudure ia boe kurireu toduwo tuiegai. Ia kodiboe makudumodukare etai, mare cewu ure tudo Jonas kodiboe tu rugadu. Awu tuwadaru rekodajire icare Jesus uture nowu piji. Fariseudoge mare saduceudoge ewadaru
Tui pagado kuruga kurireu okwa bakowuto dukeje, nowu ure joruduwadowuge ewiagodurade amireu piji
Jesus akore ei: - Taeto tai, tamearudu awadudo tai nowu fariseudoge, nowu saduceudoge eno boe barodudoboeji
Emeardaere tu kae amireu to dukodie akoino
Mare Jesus, tuiorudui emeardaeji dukeje, akore ei: - Marenarure ema tumeartoru bogaiwu ime, kodiba tameardaere amireu bokwai dukoiaie inago oino?
Takaradu boe pawuje roga? Tawia jetukare ikera awubodure tu jedu amireuji, tai kododoge enogorao duji?
Tawia jetukare jamedu amireuge ei ikera awubodure ikerakoi pobe ikera awubowuto du mare imei 4.000 ce duji, tai kododoge enogorao duji?
Kodiba takare boe pa amireuji kaegae inago oino tai cewu inagoi tai: Taeto tai, tamearudu awadudo tai nowu fariseudoge, nowu saduceudoge eno fermentoji, oino?
Dukejere ere boe pa nowu inoduji karadega akoino, mare fariseudoge, saduceudoge ewadaru ji raboduie akoino. Pedro meartorae
Etaregodui Filipe o moto iei Cesaria cedu kae dukeje, Jesus unorare nowu ture joruduwadowugei, akore ei: - Nowu boe egoino dukodi, ioguduba Imedu Onaregedu ure ema?
Egore: - Iage egore João Batistaie, iage egore Eliaie, iage egore Jeremiaie, iarema ia profetaie
Icare Jesus akore ei: - Kode, tagi, inoba tagagore ii?
Icare Simão Pedro akore: - Akire Cristore aki. Bi bokwarewu Pao Onaregedure aki
Kodi icare Jesus akore ji: - Aiwo aidugiri pemega remawunure, Simão, Jonas onaregedu, mare paga karega, moto kejeboe koia karega ure akagodo oino, mare Ioga baru tadawu koiare ure akagodo oino
Kode iwo awadudo awiegai. Ica, akire tori rema. Awu tori aogejere imode ino Igreja mugudo. Ica, Aroe pegarewu ro jerimagamodukare ji
Imode Pao o boe pemegarewu o baiporo epa maku akai. Are kogudo woe moto kejeboe jamedu boe, kogudodumode baru tada jamedu; are kiwuje woe moto kejeboe jamedu boe, kiwujedumode baru tada jamedu
Dukeje, makore ture joruduwadowugei, enogwajetukawo boe ewiegai Cristoie ure pudumiduji. Jesus makoi tuwiji, tuiewodu jidu

Kode, nowu piji matore icare Jesus ure nowu ture joruduwadowuge eeruduwado akeie pudui tuduwo Jerusalém kae, tuiwo kuricigomoduie, boe codudoge, baire eimejerage, escribadoge, eigoia; tuwimodeduie, dukeje, merimode pobe ma awu metuia bokware dukejere tuiewodumodeduie
Icare Pedro makore ji: - Aroe Eimejera kaiagu nowu inodudo oino, cegimejera, nowu inodu umodukare tudowuje ai
Mare Jesus ure tugirimi pai ji, akore ji: - Aiaedo ii, Aroe pegarewu , awo iwogwado boetodunure aki. Pao meardaere karega ameardae rema, mare ime emeardae
Inodu otobiji, Jesus akore nowu ture joruduwadowuge ei: - Ia aidure tugoduwo itabowu, umode tuwia ra tubiji, umode tugeragu to cruzji tugoduwo itabo
Mare paga karega, cewu aidure tuwo cinorudo tuwimodedu pijiwu, bimode rugadu; mare cewu ure tuwidodudo inaiwu, jorudumode pudui
Kode, inoba imedu romode toi moto jamedu boe keje, mare tuwo tudaroe okwado? Kode ica, kaboba imedu umode maku tudaroe morice?
Mare paga karega, Imedu Onaregedu aregodumode Tuo reoredu tada dutabo, to tupadoge ebo, dukejere umode boe ero mori maku boe etai
Boe jokodu remawure imode awadudo tai: awu jeture oino woewuge makarewuge eerudumodukare tuwiji, tuiorudukai Imedu Onaregedu ui tugirimi tuguricigo tabo, to boe pemegarewu tabo pugeje du kae
Meri ikera awubodure mito taci ikera awubowuto dukeje Jesus ure Pedro, Tiago, João, ekodudo pudabo, ure eko tuginoi pudabo paci ia tori raireu kae
Dukejere icare ure tudo tuginoi taci. Je urugure nono meri urugure, ukudae kigadu kurukurure eegai
Dukejere icare Moisés, Elias ere tuguo Jesus jaogwai pudogi, tumagoi jitu tabo
Dukodi icare Pedro makore ji, akore: - Cegimejera, pemegare paeduwo woe. Akaidu keje, imode baido pobe ma awu metuia bokware: awaimode ia, Moisés uwaimode ia, Elias uwaimode ia

Akoinodu tonajire, ia boetugu urugureu ure tubodo ebo taci je. Nowu boetugu pijire ia mako padure, akore: - Awure imearudu kurire jiwu itonaregedu rema. Kejere imearudu kuriae jamedu boe bu keje. Tawiapagado bataru ji
Tumearudui nowu inodu bataru jitu kejere, ure joruduwadowuge ewudure, ee jore mototo tuku je, ewire tubagudu koia
Mare Jesus ure tuburedo ei, ure tugera jodo ewugeje, akore ei: - Taragojedo, tabagudu kaba
Etaiwore ceboje, eerudukare boeji, mare Jesus jire eerudure tu je
Tui turawuje nowu tori raireu joki du tonajire, Jesus akore ei: - Tamago kaba boe ewiegai taerudure jiboeji jii Imedu Onaregedu jewodui bireuge epiji du kae
Du inodu otobiji, nowu ure joruduwadowuge enoragodure ji, egore: - Kodiba escribadoge egore Elia aregodumoduie boetoji?
Jesus akore ei: - Boe jokodure Elias aregodumode rugadu tuwo boe jamedu boe udo turugadu
Mare inagomode tai: Elias aregodure mare boe emeartorukare ji, mare ere barigodudo pudui taidu reore. Nowu inodu reorere erorerumode Imedu Onaregeduji
Kode, nowu ure joruduwadowuge ere boe pawuje João Batista ji raboduie akoino duji. Jesus ui ia iparedu pemegagodu
Ei tudo pui ia boe makarewuge ebo pugeje dukejere icare ia imedu ure tuburedo Jesus ji, ure tubujodo jokorai, akore ji
Ikimejera, akogududo itonaregedu apo, meardae bokware du ure ro pega remawunure ji, iadure buture joruto, iadure buture poboto; oinore ure
Ica, iture mato apo nowu are joruduwadowuge etae, mare eroiwakare tuwo pemegago
Jesus akore: - Mure, tameartoru bokwa remawunure! Tabega remawunure! Jii inoba dukejeba ikiwa rakamode tagabo? Mato apo
Icare Jesus makore Aroe pegarewu ji du ure tudawuje nowu negedurogu piji, dukodiwu tonaji pemegagodure kuri je
Dukodire nowu ure joruduwadowuge enoragodure ji: - Kodiba ceroiwakare cewo cewu Aroe pegarewu barigu?

Jesus akore ei: - Tameartoru bokwa koia. Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Tameartorurogu umode nono mostarda i arogu reore tu je ma, tamagomode awu tori raireuji: Akorodo oino toro!, oino dukeje, romode ino rugadu, iaboe iaboe upewumodukare pudui tagai pugeje
Awu ure oinowu Aroe pegarewu barigudumode, mare boe enogwamagudui Pao ji, boe etodorogai pudui dutabo tu rugadu. Jesus makoi tuwiji, tuiewoduji pugejedu
Jesus merunure Galiléia oiagi, du tonajire makore nowu ture joruduwadowugei, akore: - Imedu Onaregedu makududodumode ime ekera kai
Emode bito, mare meri pobe ma awu metuia bokware dukejere jewodumode. Nowu inodu kejere icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge erore toku je, ekiarigodu kuricigore. Imposto makudui Pao uwai kaedu
Etaregodui Cafarnaum kae dukeje, ia imposto epage ere tuburedo Pedroji, enoragodure ji: - Ure taeruduwadowu umodukare imposto morido?

Pedro akore ei: - U! Umode morido. Mare etaregodui tuwai kae dukeje, Jesus ure tuwu taci otogajeje tagoi oino dutabo: - Simão, inoba ure aegai? Moto kejewu brae eimejerage, ioguduba umode imposto morido etai: etore na? iarema ia tuginoiwuge na? Pedro akore: - Ia boe tuginoiwuge
Dukodi icare Jesus akore pugeje: - Kode, ore emodukare morido

Mare pemegamodukare boewo eeruduwa pegado. Kodi icare, toro pobo maerewuto, amode akeragu jiwu boetojiwu karo, amode ja barido, nono aerudumode meriri mito tu je duji, akeragu ji, maku etai pagai. 18 Kurireboe ema emawu
Dukeje kuri je, nowu Jesus ure joruduwadowuge ere tuburedo ji, enorare ji: - Kakoduwuba kuri remawure Pao o boe pemegarewu tada?
Jesus makore ia negedurogu ae, ure rakojedo tu etoiadoda,
Akore: - Boe rugadu jire inagomode oino tai: tamodukare tado nono boe etore kugure ereore ma, tamodukare taremo Pao o boe pemegarewuto rugadu
Cewu ure tuwiegado nono awu boe etonaregedurogu reorewure kurimode Pao o boe pemegarewu keje
Ia ure tugeragu ia negeduroguji ikie tabodu, dure ii rugadure ure tugeragu. Boe ewarigududodui Pao Aroe Eimejera pijidu
Mare iaboe umode awu ia negedurogu meartorui iidu ro pegado ma, ema remawu umode boewo ia tori kurireu bararedo ruwoji ewo barigu tabo pobo maerewuto du rema
Boei joruduwa bokwarewuge eeruduwado boe pegarewu jitu koia, moto jiwomode boe ebo. Boe emodukare tuwo awu inodu bokwado, mare ia imedu romode akomode inowu jiwomode

Kode ica, akera, awure, koiare umode awududo aro pegarewuto ma, kode, kado, barigudu jaedo apiji. Ema remawure atumode baruto apogorai awubowu tu je dutabo, akanai awubowu tu je dutabo du rema, mare awarigudumode joru pegarewuto apogorai pudogi dutabo du rema, ema karega

Aeku koiare umode aro pegado ma, kode, tawuje, barigudu jaedo apiji. Ema remawure atumode baruto aekui mito tu je dutabo du rema, mare awarigudumode joru pegarewuto aekui pudogi dutabo du rema, ema karega. Ovelha okwai boetodu
Tamearudu awadudo tai, tagaba awu biegarewuge kugure ewarigududo pudui, mare paga karega, inagomode oino tai: eno tupadoge etaiwonure Ioga jeto baru tada jii je
Ica, Imedu Onaregedu aregodure tuwo okware boetowuge einorudo du bogai
Inoba ure taegai? Ia imedu aku ovelhadoge emode 100, duwugere ia okwamode boeto mito ma, inoba romode? Umode iage eedo toro tori aogeje, turegoduwo cewu okware boetorogu bogai
Jorudumoderoguji ma, jekare kodumode tugori cewu okwakare boetowuge ei 99 cedu koia du kori
Oinore Tao baru tadawu aidure awu ia biegarewuge ewogwa kawo boeto. Boe enogituwai tumeduia jidu
Amana ro pegamode ai ma, amagodo ji, aki, ema, tu rugadu. Meartorumode awadaru ji ma, aiwo aidugirire amanaji

Biapagamodukare ai ma, akeragu iaboe ei mito rakudu, pobe rakudu, dukejewo cewu tagorigodaere tubemegado nowu pobe tu je du rabodu, iarema boei pobe ma jewu metuia bokware tu je du rabodu ewadaru koia
Kiarimode tuwiapagawo ma, kode, amagodo Igrejaji. Kiarimode tuwiapagawo Igrejaji jamedu ma, aopegokare emawu reorewu umode ema, ro pegarewunure ema. Jesus ui ture joruduwadowuge ero raka maku etaidu
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: tare kogudo woe moto kejeboe jamedu boe, kogudodumode baru tada jamedu. Tare kiwuje woe moto kejeboe jamedu boe, kiwujedumode baru tada jamedu
Inagomode tai awu inoduji kimo: ia tagi tamode tado pobe tu tagogwamagudu tabo iaboe boe bogai ma, Ioga baru tadawu umode maku tagai
Mare paga karega, iaboe emode tudo pobe tu je rakudu, pobe ma awu metuia bokware rakudu ikie tabo ma, nono iragojemode ebo. Boe etugare pegarewu
Dukodi icare, Pedro ure tuburedo ji, akore ji: - Cegimejera, inoba iwudugugodumode imana ro pegai iiwu keje? Jii ikera awubodure pobe taci ikea awubowuto du reore na?
Jesus akore: - Imagomodukare tu oinono tu rugaduie, mare jii je rugadu
Mare paga karega, Pao o boe pemegarewu remagudure moto kejewu ia brae eimejera ui tuiagu tudugarege edo mori maku pudai du reore
Nowu ui turoiagu inodu jitu kejere, boe etaregodure ia umode morido diiero makaguragarewuji du apo
Mare umode morido tu emaboe bokware apo, dukoia nowu brae eimejera akore makuduiagu toreduje apo, tore ebo, toroe jamedu tabo, dutabowo ure nowu umode moridoboe morido
Dukodi icare nowu utugare ure tubujodo moto keje jokorai, okwamagudure ji, akore: - Awudugugo ii jao, dukejere imode jamedu boe morido akai
Nowu brae eimejera, togudu kuricigoi apo dutabore, akore ji: Atudo! Boe jamedu boe moridodure

Kuri tudui piji dukejere, nowu utugare jorudure ia tumeduia umode morido biega tu pudaiwuji, ure tugera kogudo ruwo kajeje, boce kodi umodukare okwado ake koia, akore ji: - Cewu amode morido inaiboe makinai
Nowuia buture bure paru, okwamagudure ji, akore: - Ado oino ia jao tu je. Imode jamedu boe morido akai
