Mare biapagakare akoinoduji. Ure boedo cewu tumeduia barigu baicorewuto jii ui nowu tumode maku pudaiboe morido du kae
Metage, tuiorudui nowu inodu jitu keje, ekiarigodu kuricigore, icare eture nowu cimejera ae ereadodure biegai nowu inoduji
Icare cewu eimejera makore bogai, akore ji: - Itugare pegarewu! Iwudugugodure ai, akogwamagudure ii dukoia
Kodiba awudugugodukare nowu ameduiaji nono iwudugugodu magai ai du reore?
Kodire nowu brae eimejera korigodure, ure maku rorerure boeiwuge etai jii, ui nowu tumode moridoboe jamedu boe maku pudai du kae
Oinore Ioga baru tadawu romode tai, tawudugugodu kai tamanaji, tawieji, tawabo jamedu boe tabo dukeje
Jesus, tumagoi nowu bataru jitu rekodaji, uture Galiléia piji, Judeia kae, Jordão kujebiji
Ia boe makarewuge ekodure apo, ure kogodureuge emedui etodadu epemegago
Ia fariseudoge ekodure ae tunorawo ji, tui tagokogado jitu tabo, egore ji: - Umode turugadu ia imedu ji tuwo toreduje barigu tubiji iaboe boe koia?
Jesus akore ewadaru jipagi: - Taeruduwakare bapera atugo inoduji: Ure boe jamedu boe towujewu boe paruto ure imedu towuje, ure aredu towuje,
Akore: Kodire imedu umode tugera ra tuo piji, tuje piji, mugumode toreduje apo, icare ei pobedu emode nono tui mito tu je dukodiwore?
Nowu inodu tabo ekare pobe pugeje, mare ere mito tu je. Kode, imedu umodukare Paore mugudo puapowuge ewarigu pubiji
Icare Fariseudoge egore: - Kode, kodiboe Moisés ure boedo bapera maku barigudureu aredu ai, barigudumodedu otodai?
Jesus akore ei: - Mare paga karega, ewabo pegarewu koiare Moisés rore oino. Mare boe paru keje, ukare ino
Boe jokodu jire imode inodu awadudo tai: cewu ure tuwire ewariguwuge, ei tugoge pemegado du rekodaji, tumuguwo iarodo apo pugejewuge eiamedu boe, ero peganure
Nowu ure joruduwadowuge egore ji: - Oinono umode imedu ji, aredu ji ma, kode, inodu keje, pemegamode emugukawo puapo
Icare Jesus akore: - Boe eiamedu karega emode awu bakaru kodiboe pawuje, mare makudure aiwuge tu rugadu

Mare paga karega, iage eroiwakare tuwirewo turedu koia, iagere ino mare ia etumedage eigoia, iagerema, ere tudo oinono taidu koia, Pao o boe pemegarewu koia. Roiware tuwo pawujewuge emode pawuje. Jesus mare boe etore kugure
Boe ere ia boe etore kugure ecedo ae uwo tugera bu ewugeje, okwamaguduwo eparu tabo, mare ure joruduwadowuge ere erodo boku ji
Icare Jesus akore ei: - Boro! Ekugure etudo itae, tagaba erodo boku ii, mare paga karega, Pao o boe pemegarewu jetumode tu ure tudo nono awuge kugure ereorewuge ebo tu je
Dukejere ure tugera bu ewugeje. Dukeje uture nowu piji. Iparedu oroe kurireu
Ia boe kajeje, ia iparedu ure tuburedo Jesus ji, unoragodure ji, akore: - Ikimejera, kakoduwu boe pemegarewu jiba ikodumode, ikoduwo baruto?
Jesus akore ji: - Kodiba anorare ii boe pemegarewu bogai? Paore pemegare tu je. Akaidumode akoduwo baruto dukeje arodo nono Pao Aroe Eimejera ui boe eroiagudu reore
Akore: - Inoba? Kakoduwuba? Jesus akore: - Amodukare boe ewido, akera keadu kaba, akiwogu kaba, akaba boe ewadaraodo
Ameartorudo aoji, aceji, amearudu kurimode amedagei areore
Icare nowu iparedu akore: - Irore ino nowu jamedu boeji jii je. Kaboba okwa kimore inai?

Jesus akore: -Akaidumode apemega remawuwo dukeje, toro, akirodo akoroe jamedu boe tabo, maku marenarue etai, nowu inodu koia boe pemegarewu kurireu mugumode atogi baru tada. Dukejere, mato itabo! Tumearudui nowu inodu jitu keje, nowu iparedu uture tugiarigodu kuricigo tabo, mare paga karega, oroe kuricigore kodi
Nowu inodu keje, Jesus akore nowu ture joruduwadowugei: - Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Raka remawunure ia oroe kurireu uwo turemo baruto
Inagomode tai pugeje: ure turugadu ia camelo tuwo tuie bu meriricira pororogu kajeje, mare ia oroe kurireu rema uwo turemo baruto dure, ema karega
Awu bakaru keje, nowu ure joruduwadowuge erore toku, epagudugodure, dutabore enoragodure: - Kode, ioguduba umode cinorudo?
Jesus aiwore ei tu je, akore: - Nowu inodu ime eroiwamodukare ji; mare Paorema ia roiwamodukare jiboe bokwa
Dukejere Pedro akore: - U! Kode, cere cegera ra boe jamedu boe piji. Kaboba morimode ema cenai?

Jesus akore: - Boe jokodu jire imode awadudo tai: Ia kodiwu maiwu pemegarewu keje, Imedu Onaregedu umode tumugudo tumuga pemegarewu keje, dukeje, tagire tagodure itabodu, tamode tamugudo ikera pudogidure pobe taci ikera awubowutowu boe emuga keje, tawo tagogado ure nono ikera pudogidure ikerako umode pobe turegodajiwu reorewu Israeldoge etuwobei
Cewu tumearudu kuri koia iiwuge emode tugera ra tumanamage, tuwiemage, tuo, tuje, tore, epiji, tuwai pijiwuge, duwuge nowu inodu makudumode etai pugeje du makaguragamode, eemode jii je jamedu
Boetojiwu makaguragarewuge ekodumode boi; boiwu makaguragarewuge ekodumode boetoji
Jesus akore pugeje: - Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono ia boe etuo utui barogwa kododu tabo, tuioruduwo iaboei ma, tumagowo ei etuwo to boepa kae du reore
Akore tumoduie morido diieroji mito tu tu meri ji, ure etudo to boepato
Meri akurui gu baruto dukeje, uture pugeje, dutabore jorudure iaboe eedui ba oiagi paga tu je duji
Akore ei: Tadudo ino boepato jamedu, imode mori pemegado tagai
Eture rugadu. Meri jetui baru oia keje dukeje, uture pugeje. Meri jogodu tabo pugeje, rore nono turomagai iagei du reore
Boekarema, meri rekodugodu tabo, jorudure iagei ba oiagi pugeje, unoragodure ei: - Kodiba taedu pagare jii meri ji taro kai ia taroji dutabo?
Egore: - Mare paga karega, boe emagokare cei kodi. Kodi icare akore ei: - Tadudo ino boepato jamedu
Icai meri buture dukeje, cewu ore boepa cewu akore ture jetu boepa jiwuji: - Amagodo maragodureuge ewogai, awo mori maku etai, paru bu kodure boiwuge ewugeje jii boetojiwuge etae
Cewu meri butu kejewuge etaregodure; eiamedu boe enore diiero mito tu tu pureore
Aregodure cewu boetojiwuge etae dukeje, emeardaere mori kurimoduie pudaiduji. Mare eno diierore mito tu tu pureore jamedu
Makudui etai dukeje, emago pegare nowu ore boepacewuji tagoi
Boigoduwuge emaragodaerogu biegare tu je, macare enore nono pago reore; pagire pabewure pai meri ji boe eruji jii je
Dukodi icare eimejera makore ia ei: - Imeduia, ikarega ure aekuri pagado. Imagokare imoduie morido diiero mito tu tu je duji?
Makudure akaiwu, toro tabo. Imire itaidure iwo kodure boigoduwu odo nono ako reore,
kode, iromodukare nono itaidu reore inoroeji? Kode, akaiwomode ii aeku pegarewu tabo ipemega bogai?

Nowu inodu reore, kodure boiwuge boetojiwugemode emage, boetojiwuge boiwugemode emage. Pao makore bogaiwuge emagaguragare, mare ure tugeragu jiwuge enowarore tu je. Jesus makoi tuwiji, tujewoduji, metuia bokware pugejedu
Erudunure Jerusalém kae du tonajire icare Jesus ure tugeragu ture joruduwadowugei paci woje pudabo, akore ei
Icare parudunure Jerusalém kae. Nono Imedu Onaregedu makudumode baire eimejerage etai, escribadoge etai, emode boedo bito

Emode maku ao pegokarewuge etai ewadaru keadu pegawo ji, ewo pogurudo, ewo barigodudo, ewo redugodudo pudui, ewo boe to ji, ewo bu i padui pugajejedu keje. Mare meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje, jewodumode. Zebedeu ore
Nowu inodu keje, Zebedeu ore etuje ure tuburedo tu tore ebo, ure tubujodo tuku Jesus jokorai togwamaguduwo ji

Icare Jesus unoragdure ji: - Kaba jiba akaidure? dutabore nowu aredu akore. - Awo awu itore ei pobedu edo tumugudo ako boe pemegarewu keje akabo: ia mugudo akana pemegarewu jaogwai, ia mugudo akana koborewu jaogwai
Jesus akore ji: - Taeruduwakare kaboba bogaiba tagogwamagudure. Tagudumode ikudumode ce calice to boece? Egore: - U
Akore: - Boe jokodu, tagudumode ino calice to rugadu. Mare tamugui ikana pemegarewu jaogwai, iarema ikana koborewu jaogwai, nowu inodu imi karega; nowu boe emugare tu Ioga ure jeonaiagu jiwuge ewogai
Ia ure joruduwadowuge ei ikera pudogidure emearudure nowu inodu jamedu boeji, dukoia ekorigodure nowu tumedage ei pobeduji
Mare Jesus makore eiamedu bogai, akore ei: - Taeruduware awu moto kejewu brae eimejerage emugui tudugarege ewugejeduji, kurireuge ei tumugudo ewugeje turo rakarewu tabo duji
Mare tagaba oino pudada. Mare paci oino: cewu aidure tuwo tugurido, u rumode boe etugaredo pudumi
Aidure tuwo boetojiwudo pudumi tadodawu, umode tadugaregedo pudumi
Oinore Imedu Onaregedu rore: aregodure, mare tudugaregewo boece karega, mare boe etugarewo pudumi. Jamedu tuwo tumagu tuwo makarewuge einorudo. Jesus ui ia joku bukwarewu ime ei pobedu pemegagodu
Jesus unure tudawuje ia bakurireu iei Jericó cedu piji, du tonajire icare ia boe makarewuge ekodure apo
Du tabore ia joku bokwarewuge ere pobe tu tumugui awara okwai, tumearudui Jesus kodui nono dukeje, ekudugodure, egore: - Cegimejera, Davi onaregedu, akogududo cedabo
Mare nowu boe makarewuge emago okorire ei emago kaiagu. dutabore icare ere tugudu raka remawudo: - Cegimejera, Davi Onaregedu, akogududo cedabo
Icare Jesu ure tuwuredo, makore etae, unoragodure ei, akore: - Kaboba tagaidure irowo ji tagai?
Egore: - Cegimejera, ceeku uwo tuiado du bogai
Icare Jesus okudure ebo, ure tugera jetudo eeku kajeje. Du inodu tonaji kuri je, eeku ure tuiado poku, dukejere ekodure apo

Jesus ure tuburedo Jerusalemji nowu ture joruduwadowuge ebo. Icai taregodui babuturogu iei Betfajé mugui Oliveira kejewu aoporu puredu tu je du kae dukeje, Jesus makore ia ture joruduwadoge ei pobe tu je duji, akore ei
Tadudo bakurireurogu mugui tu padogi du kae. Nono taerudumode ia jumentorogu okwa iku kogui tu nono duji, onaregedurogu rakojere tu apo. Okwa iku kiwuje, mato ebo itae
Iaboe emagomode tai dukeje, tamagodo ei: - Cegimejera aidure ei jao; raimodukare umode emagu tu tuibagi pugeje
Oino dutabore boe kodure profeta bataru reore: 5"Tamagomode Sião tadawu aredu ji: Ica, icare akimejera aregodumode akae tubemega tabo, tumugui ia jumentorogu, jumenta onaregedu keje dutabo” (Zaq 9,9
Cewu Jesus ure joruduwadowuge eture, erore nono ui turoiagudu reore rugadu
Etaregodure jumenta apo, onaregedurogu apo, ere tugudae bu bukeje, ere Jesus udo tumugudo keje
Dukodi icare makarewu boe ere tugudae baado awara ji otodai, ere ipo, iwara, itura boe kado, ere roto ja ja awara ji jamedu
Cewu boe makarewuge ekodure otodaiwuge, ekodure rekodajiwuge enoiogwarire, egore: -Hosanado Davi Onaregeduji, cewu akaru meririreu aregodui Pao ie tabodu, paegarewo ji toro baruto
Jesus ui turemo Jerusalém to dukeje, nowu bakurireu tadawuge erore toku, ekodo jice, ekodo woje, tunora tabo pui: - Kakoduwubao?
Makarewuge egore: - Jesus reno! Galiléia kejewu bakurireurogu iei Nazaré cedu pijiwu profeta reno. Jesus ui ure akirodo Pao uwai tadawuge ewarigu baawadu kaedu
Jesus ure turemo Pao uwai kurireuto, dukejere jeture pa! boe eroi akiró tabo puai Pao uwai tada duji. Kodi icare ure ewarigu baawadu kae; kodi icare ure nowu ro oinowuge emuga ira boe butudo
Akore ei: - Bapera atugo batarure oino tabaru tabodu: “Iwaire boe enogwamagudu epa rema, dure icare tare arodureuge, okwarigudureuge eiarido ema“ (Jer 7,11
Dukeje icare, joku bokwarewuge, pogora meiorewuge etaregodure ae, ure epemegago

Du tabore icare baire eimejerage, escribadoge, ekorigodu kuricigore, taiwoi nowu ro pemegarewu kurireu boeji, tumearudui boe etore enoiogwarii Pao uwai tada eegoi: “Paegarewo Davi Onaregeduji” inoduji dutabo

Icare egore Jesus ji: - Amearudure egoinoduji? Jesus akore: - U! Imearudu pemegare. Tamago tamagokare bapera atugo akoi: “Nege kugure, boe etore kugure eedui tujemage etodojiwuge eiabijiwuge eigoiare ere akurido” (Sl 8,3) inodu jituji?
Nowu inodu kjere icare uture epiji, uture bakurireu piji, turagojewo ia bakurireurogu iei Betânia cedu keje. Jesus jorudui ia figueira i jidu
Barogwato, meri togi, tui tugirimi bakurireuto pugeje dukeje, Jesus uke boire ji
Tuiorudui ia figueira iji awara okwai dukeje, ure tuburedo ji, mare jorudukare tuduji: aru rugadure ure tu je. Dukodi icare akore nowu figueira iji: - Atudumodukare jii rugadu
Kuri je, nowu figueira i bire. Tuiorudui nowu inodu jitu keje, ure joruduwadowuge epagudugodure, egore: - U! Icare awu figueira bire taci je

Icare Jesus akore: - Boe jokodu jire imode awadudo tai: Tameartoru remawumode ma, taromodukare awu inoduji tu je, mare jamedu tagagomode awu toriraireuji: akorodo oino toro pobo maerewuto, dukejere nowu inodu umode ino rugadu
Tagogwamagudumode dukeje, tagogwamagudure bogaiboe jamedu boe makudumode tagai. Jesus ro raka

Jesus uture jice Pao uwai kae pugeje. Tui boe eeruduwado nowu Pao uwai tada du tonaji, baire eimejerage, boe kuridoge, codudoge, ere tuburedo ji, egore ji: - Kakoduboe koiaba ure arodo ino? Ioguduba koiaba ure aroiagu ino?
Jesus akore ei: - Inorawo tai jamedu ka: Tamode tagogiegi ji ma, dukejere imode tawie kakoduboe koiaba ure irojino

Tamagodo ii: Kaba ro raka koiaba João Batista ure boe etaopegodo? Pao Aroe Eimejera ro raka koia kana? Iarema ime ero raka koia na? Dukejere ere tumeardae kado kado boeji, egore: - Pamagomode Pao Aroe Eimejera ro raka koiaie, ino ma, akomode: Kode kodiba tameartorukare ji?
Pagagomode ime eigoiaie, ino ma, pabagudumode boe makarewugece, mare paga karega, boe eiamedu boere emeartorure profetaie ure Joãoce duji
Du icare egore Jesus ji: - Ceeruduwakare! Icare Jesus akore: - Kode, imi jamedu imodukare tawie kaba koiaba ure irodo inoduji jamedu. Boe etore ei pobedu
Dukodi icare Jesus akore ei pugeje: - Inoba tameardaemode? Ia imedu orere pobe. Tumagoi boetojiwu ae dutabo, akore ji: Imedu, toro, amaragoduwo ino boepa tada awuji
Du tabore cewu onaregedu akore ji: Boro. Itaiduka. Mare kuri je inodu korire ji, kodi icare uture rugadu, tumaragoduwo tuo boepa tada
Du tabore icare cewu ipare etuo makore ia tonaregedu ae, akore ji nono tago magai ia jitu reore. Icare nowu onaregedu rekodajiwu akore: U, ioga. Mare utukare rugadu
Kakoduwu ia emageba rore nono tuo aidu reore?. Egore: - Boetojiwu. Icare Jesus akore ei: - Boe remawu jire inagomode oino tai: Ropegarewuge, ropegarewu areme etaregodumode baruto tagoda piji

Paga karega, João aregodure tagae awara jetororewu tabo, mare tameartorukare ji. Mare ro pegarewuge, ropegarewu areme emeartorure ji. Tagi taerudure inoduji, mare takare tabemegado tameartoruwo ji. ,,Boepa tadawu ime pegarewuge

Jesus akore ei pugeje: - Tawiapagado ia bakaruji pugeje ka: ia boe etuo ure ia boepa bu, ure tori aiado tabo, ure ia pobo aia mugudo tada, ure ia bairaireu towuje keje. Tui maku ia jetumode jiwuge etai, dukejere, uture nowu moto piji
Icai boe aregodui boewo tugeragu nowu boepa tadaboe jitu dukeje, ure ia tudugarege etudo toro nowu jeture boepa jiwuge etae, ewo tugeragu nowu boepa tadaboeji
Mare nowu jeture nowu boepa jiwuge, ere tubodo nowu utugarege ebo, ere boe to iato, ere ia bito, iage ere tori to ei
Boekare, ure iage emagodo toro cewuge ekori pugeje. Erore nono turo magai cewuiage ei du reore jamedu
Icarema, tonaregedu remawure icare ure utudo toro pugeje, tagoi: Awu itonaregedu jire eromodukare ia turo
Mare nowu jeture nowu boepa jiwuge, tuiorudui onaregedu jitu keje, egore pui: Ica, awu aire uo oe makudumode ai; pawo bito, pagiwo pagoere nowu oemode emaboece
Icare ere tubodo apo, ere tawuje boepa piji, icare ere bito
Kode, nowu ore nowu boepa cewu, ui tugirimi dukeje, inoba romode nowu jeture nowu boepa jiwugei?
Egore: - Umode nowu meridoge Aroe pegarewuge ewidodudo togudu bokwa tabo, dukeje umode iage eto ji pugeje, duwuge emode nowu boepa tadaboe makai boe aregodui pudae dukeje
Icare Jesus akore ei: - Tamagokare bapera atugo akoi: “Ure bai mugudo tori tabowuge ere pijidowu tori icare ema remawure ema pugeje. Pagimejera maragodae rema du jire paebogodure ji”?
Dukodire imagomode oino tai: boe pemegarewu baru tadawu arududodumode tabiji, makudumode iaboe etai, nowuge eigoiare emode kurodureboe tawuje piji pugeje dukoia
Buture awu tori kejewu romode ja... rito nowu ri buture kejewu begugwamode ri kuda
Baire eimejerage, fariseudoge emearudure nowu inoduji, ere boe pawuje pudui raboduie Jesus akoinoduji
Eemarure tuwo tugeragu ji, mare epagudure boece, emearudure profetaie ema kodi
Jesus makore boei pugeje ia bakaru tabo pugeje, akore
Boe pemegarewu kejeboe ure nono ia brae eimejera awu moto kejewu ui tonaregedu uwiredo du reore
Du makore tudugaregei emagowo ture bakarudo jiwuge ewogai. Mare etaidukare tuduwo bataru jipagi
Dukejere, ure iage etudo pugeje, tagoi ei oino dutabo: Tamagodo ire bakarudo jiwugei: inagu tapiradoge, inagu jugorewuge ewararu kuricigoi dure ire ewido. Boe jamedu boere turugadu, mato peta kae
Mare boekare, ekare tuwiapagado nowu akoinoduji. Iage eture to boepato, iage eture ia turo kae
Iage ere tubodo nowu utugarege ebo, emago pegare ei, etokire ei, ere ewido
Nowu brae eimejera, tumearudui nowu inodu jitu keje, korigodu kuricigore, ure to tugobaigarege etudo toro ewo cewu pegarewuge ewido, ewo joru tugu nowu eno bakurireuto
Dukejere makore nowu tudugaregei, akore: Petare turugadu, mare ire bakarudo jiwuge ekare turugadu ji
Tadudo awara padui pugajejedu boe kae, bakarudo tu tu taerudumode jiwuge eiameduji etuwo mato peta kae
Ere taodo toro awara boeji, ere tuiorudure jiwuge eiamedu boe ere tudo pui, pegarewuge, pemegarewuge. Dukodi icare boe enogwagemode tadawu bai kurireu okorobadure bakarudodure jiwuge ebo
Nowu brae eimejera ure turemo tuioruduwo ei. dutabore icare jorudure ia imedu ukai tugudae pemegarewu tugu pudui duji
Icare unoragodure ji: Imedu, kodiba are aremo woe akadui peta kejewu akudae tugu ai dutabo? Boekare, nowu imedu akokare ia tago
Icare nowu brae eimejera makore tudugaregei, akore ei: Tageragu ji, buregogudo, ieragogudo, barigu toro baawadu kae, boecorewuto, nono boe eto akomode do do do do do pui nono
Mare paga karega, bakarudodure jiwuge emagaguragare, mare tawujedure epijiwuge enowarore tu je. Boe enoroe mori makudui César aidu
Dukejere icare fariseudoge ere tudo pui emagore pui inoba turomode tuwo tugeragu Jesus ji jepaga inoduji ia bataru boe keje

Dukejere icare ere ture joruduwadowuge etudo toro, Herodes jaogwaiwuge ebo, enorawo Jesus ji, emagowo ji: - Cegimejera, ceeruduware akie amagore boe rikireuji, akie are boe eeruduwado Pao aewu awara ji boe jokodu, boe remawu tabo, apagudu kai boece dutabo. Mare paga karega, akaiwokare boe eeji dukodi
Kode, amagodo cei ka: Inoba ure aegai: umode turugadu boewo toroe mori maku César ai, iarema umodukare turugadu?
Icare Jesus, tui emeardae pawuje dukeje, akore: - Kodiba tagago kogadodure ii, ro biadodureuge?
Iorududo tare maku maku César aiwu meririji ka! Icare ere iado mito tu je ai
Icare Jesus unorare ei: - Ioguduba padure awu meriri keje, awu tuwadaru tabo?
Egore: - César reno! Dukodi icare Jesus akore ei: - Kode, César jeonare jiboe maku César ai. Pao jeonare jiboe maku Pao ai jamedu
Eebogodure nowu akoinoduji, ekare tagokogado ji pugeje, eture piji. Boe enorai Jesus ji boe eewodu jiboe jitu
Nowu meri mitoduji, saduceudoge, duwugere egore boe eewodumodukae, enoragodure Jesus ji
Egore: - Cegimejera, Moisés akore: “Ia imedu bimode tore bokwa tabo dukeje, oreduje mugumode uwie apo, oinodu tabo oremode” (Deut 25,5
Aro! Umanamagere ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu reore. Boetojiwu uwiredodure, icarema bokware. Mare ore bokware, ure toreduje muguiagu tuwie apo
Rekodajiwu ure ino jamedu; ia rekodajiwu ure ino pugeje jamedu. Oinore ure ino jii eiamedu boeji
Dukejere icare cewu aredu bokware jamedu
Ica, eewodu keje, kakoduwuba oredujemode cewu aredu? Mare paga karega, eiamedu mugure apo
Jesus akore ei: - Tawogware boeto, takare bapera atugo pawuje. Takare Pao ro raka pawuje jamedu
Ica: Boe eewodu keje, ime etuwiremoduka, areme etugogemodukare jamedu, mare erumode nono Pao o tupadoge pemegarewugere baru tada

Kode, nowu boe eewodumodedu, tamagokare bapera atugoji: 32”Abração aiwu Aroe Eimejeranure imi, Isaac aiwu Aroe Eimejeranure imi, Jacó aiwu Aroe Eimejeranure imi” (Ex 3,6)? Aró, kode, bireuge etaiwu Aroe Eimejera karega, mare jerewuge etaiwu Aroe Eimejeranure ema
Tumearudui awu bataru jitu keje, boe eebogodu kuricigore. Boe eroiagudu ema remawu
Fariseudog ei boe pa Jesus ui saduceudoge ekeru kadodu jitu keje, ere tudo pui
Dukejere ia emage ia joruduwarewu unoragodure Jesus ji toebato dutabo ji, akore
Cegimejera, Kakoduwu Pao o boe eroiagudu ema remawu rema?
Jesus akore: - Amearudu kurido Pao Aroe Eimejeraji awabo jamedu tabo, akaroe jamedu tabo, ameardae jamedu tabo” (Deut 6,5
Awure Pao o boe eroiagudu ema remawu boetojiwu rema
Rekodajiwu ure nono boetojiwu reore: “Amearudu kurimode ameduiaji nono amearudu kuri magai ai du reore” (Lev 19,18
Awu Pao batarui pobe oinodu boe eroiagudu jamedu boe ure to pui nono. Jesus unorai boei Messias jiboe jitu
Fariseudoge ere tudo pui. Dukejere icare Jesus unoragodure ei, akore ei
Inoba tameardaere Messiasji? Ioguduba onaregeduba? Egore: - Davi Onaregedu

Jesus makore pugeje, akore: - Kode, kodiba Davi, tumagoi Aroe Pemegarewu koia, akore: 44”Pagimejera akore ikimejeraji: Amugudo ikana pemegerewu jaogwai jii, ii onare aiwuge ewu awure kuda du kae” (Sl 109,1)?
Kode, Davi akore tugimejeraie, kode, kodiba icare onaregedumode ema?
Ia emagokare ia pubiji ia pubiji. Nowu inodu piji pugejere icare ekidakare tumagowo ji pugeje
Jesus ure turodo pai nowu boe makarewuge mare nowu ture joruduwadowuge ewugeje, dukejere akore
Escribadoge, fariseudoge ere tumugudo Moisés muga keje tuwo boe eroiagudu kogado du bogai
Tarodo nono ewadaru jamedu reore; mare taro kaba nono ero magadu reore; mare paga karega, emagore mare erokare ino
Ere boe motudureu udo turugadu tuwo bu ime eporu keje, mare emagerema etaidukare tuwo tugera amagadudo nowu motudureboeji
Ere turodo tagodo boe eeruduwo du bogai, ere aroia arudugodureu kuru kurureu bu tuwugeje ia raire, ia boa kurire tugajeje
Etaidure boe emuga boetojiwuji boe enogwage keje, Sinagoga keje jamedu
Etaidure boewo tugurido pudui ba oiagi. Etaidure boe egowo tugimejeraie ure pudumi
Mare tagi, tagaba boe egodo tugimejeraie ure tagi; mare paga karega, tagimejerare mito tu je; tamanamage, tawiemagenure puje
Tagaba taomagedo iaboece iaboece woe moto keje, mare paga karega, taore mito tu je: cewu mugure baru tadawu
Jamedu, tagaba boe egodo tugimejeraie ure tagi, mare paga karega, tagimejerare mito tu je, dure Cristo rema
Cewu kurire tadodawu, romode duku tumedage ekuda
Cewu ure tuwiegatoridowu, kurimode tumedage ekori
Escribadoge, fariseudoge, ro biadodureuge, tajeba pado tadogi. Tare baru tadawu boe pemegarewu baiporo mi ime etai, tagi rugadure tamodukare taremo to

Escribadoge, fariseudoge, ro biadodureuge, tajeba pado tadogi. Tagire tare ukoge okware pijiwuge enoroe akedudo, tai tagogwa kuridodu raicigodo taiaki dutabo, kodire awu taro mori pega kuricigomode tagai
Escribadoge, fariseudoge, ro biadodureuge, tajeba pado tadogi. Tare tagaiwodo moto ji, pobo maerewuji, tawo ia boe etaru tagai du bogai, dukejere tare jeonare joru jiwudo ema pobe tagori

Joku bokwarewuge etododaiwuge, tajeba pado tadogi. Tagagore: Iaboe emode togwa tugu Pao uwai ie tabo ma, nowu inodu boe karega, mare umode togwatugu Pao uwai tadaboe tabo ma, nowu akoinowu romode ino rugadu
Matadure turo towuge, joku bokwarewuge! Kode, kakoduwuba ema remawu: meriri ekureuna? iarema Pao uwai, koiare ure meriri ekureu motududo pudui du rema?
Tagagore jamedu: - Iaboe emode togwatugu altar ie tabo, nowu inodu boe karega, mare iaboe emode togwatugu ia mori padui keje dutabo ma, romode ino rugadu
Joku bokwarewuge! Kode, kakoduwuba emaremawu rema: boei mori makudu na? iarema altar koiare ure mori motududo pudui du rema?
Cewu ure togwatugu altar ie tabowu, jamedu unure togwatugu padure bukajejeboe jamedu boe tabo jamedu
Cewu ure togwatugu Pao uwai ie tabowu, unure togwatugu nowu mugure tadaboe ie tabo jamedu
Cewu ure togwatugu baru towu, unure togwatugu Pao muga kae, mugure kejeboeji jamedu

Escribadoge, fariseudoge, ro biadodureuge, tajeba pado tadogi. Tanure tawiapagado barigodureu bakaruji, mare tanure bakaru kurireu barigududo pudui du jire taro oino. Boe jetororewu, boe enogudureu, boe eroi tuwadaru jitudu, oinore taromode boetoji, mare takai nowu ia barigududo pudui dutabo
Kodure joku bokwarewuge etododaiwuge, tare migimigidoge ewarigu tagogwa piji, icarema tawo camelo remo rabodu
Escribadoge, fariseudoge, ro biadodureuge, tajeba pado tadogi. Tare ariarogu uporu kabi, tare prato uporu kabi, tagirema tagogorobadure tagiwogae tabo, tagarodudae tabo, tagogwarigodae tabo
Fariseu joku bokwarewu, aria, prato oto kabi boetoji duwo uporu kabidure jamedu

Escribadoge, fariseudoge, ro biadodureuge, tajeba padure tadogi. Tare nono bireboe eiaro uporu kigadu reore. Uporu moture mare toro tada korobadure boe era tabo, boe ewi tabo, boe padui pumekejedu boe tabo
Oinore tare jamedu. Tabemegarewu padure tu tawiri uporu keje boe eegai mare tadoda tagogorobadure tai boe pagadodudo tagi dutabo, tabegarewu tabo
Escribadoge, fariseudoge, ro biadodureuge, tajeba padure tadogi. Tare profetadoge eiari to, tare jetororewuge eiaro motudo
Tagagore: - Paeia tu paomage etonaji, pamodukare pagera rorogodudo profetadoge eku tabo nono ereore
Nowu inodu tabo tanure tagogiegi tai tagaobiji tagagoi nowu ure biodo profetadoge eiwuge etoreie ure tagiduji
Kode, tagogorawo taomage ero reore dutabo
Okorireu awague etore. Inoba taromode tawo taginorudo joru piji?
Tagado, imode profetadoge, joruduarewuge etarego tawogai. Tamode ewido. Tamode iage ewu i keje, tamode boe to iagei tago sinagoga keje. Tabadumode ewugeje jice woje jice woje bakurireu boe kao
Kodire bitodure paga tu jewu boe eku butumode tawugeje, paru padure Abel ku keje jii Barakia onaregedu iei Zacaria cedu kae, cewu tare bito Pao uwai, altar enoiei
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: nowu boe pegarewu jamedu boe aregodumode awu boe etuwoboe oinowuto. Jesus mearudu kurii Jerusalém jitu

Dukejere Jesus akore: - Jerusalém tadawuge, Jerusalém tadawuge! Tagire tare profetadoge ewido, tagimogudure tori tabo cewu rojaidodure tagaewugei. Itaidu maeia iwo tado pui itabo, nono kogariga magai tore kugure eto pui cigodu kuda du reore, mare tagaidukare
Kode, ica, taeda bioromode tawogai
Mare paga karega, taerudumodukare ii pugeje jii tamagoi ii: Aregodure Pao ie tabowu akaru pemegawo! oino du kae
Jesus ure tuiebu Pao uwai piji, dukejere icare ure joruduwadowuge ere tuburedo ji, ere jorududo cewu bai kurireuge emoduji
Mare Jesus akore ei: - Taerudure awu baikurireugei. Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: woe awu tori padumodukare puaogeje; boe jamedu boe pegadodumode. Boe ekori, boe etonai puidu

Dukejere kodure jii tui tumugudo ia torekodu iei Oliveira cedu aogeje du kae; nowu ure joruduwadowuge ekodure ae, ere tuburedo ji, icai tuiedui tuginoigodu apo dukeje, enoragodure ji, egore ji: - Inoba boemodedu kejeba awu inodu umode tudowuje? Inoba boemode ai akirimi dukeje, boe akedu keje?
Dukejere Jesus akore: - Taerududo. Tagaba boedo taekuri pagado
Makarewuge etaregodumode tagoi: “Imire Cristore imi”, oino dutabo, dutabore emode makarewuge eekuri pagado
Tamearudumode boe erugodui puiduji. Tamearudu awadudo tai, nowu inodu ukawo tabagududo. Mare oto padumodukare roga

Boe eeda, moto padui boe ebodu, onagodumode pui, rugodumode puidu umode towadudo. Nowu inodu tonaji, boe eke boimode boei, jorubo pegarewu umode jamedu, boe pega kuricigomode makaguragarewu boe eeda joki
Nowu inodu jamedu boe, boe ekori paru reno
Icare tamagudumode boe pegarewu jamedu kai, tawidodumode, kodu kagirire iiwuge ekodu kagirimode tai ikie koia, moto jamedu boe joki
Makarewuge ewudumode, emode pu butudo, ekodu kagirimode pui jamedu
Emode profetadogedo pudumi paga tu je, dutabo emode makaguragarewuge eekuri pagado
Boe pegarewu umode taredo tao kae, dukoia makarewuge enogudu eiagudu biegamode tu je
Mare nowu inodu tabo, cewu ure tudo tuku pudui jii oto kaewuge emode cinorudo

Ica, Pao o boe pemegarewu jiwu bakaru maiwu kuodumode moto jamedu boe joki uwo turugadu boe jokoduie pudumidu reore boe eiamedu jekai. Nowu inodu keje, boe aregodumode todo pa kae. Boe ekori kuricigorewu
Jesus akore pugeje: - Taerudumode cewu profeta Daniel makore jiwu boe pegarewu ui tumugudo Pao uwai tada dukeje, makore awu bapera atugo jiwugere edo pawuje
Nowu inodu keje, mugure Judeia kejewuge eregodumode tori raireuto
Jeture bairaireuge etao gejewuge, ekaba turawuje tuwaito ia toroe boe bogai
Rakojere toro boe tadawuge etu kaba bato tuwo tugeragu ia tugudae boeji
Cewu kuiarureu areme, nowu ure tore enogwagiridowuge nowu kodiboe keje, marenarumode emage
Tamagodo tabaru keje, nowu inodu ukawo tudowuje butao kao, biaku kao, sabadore jiwu meri ji ukawo jamedu
Mare paga karega, nowu kodiwu boe ecebae pegarewu kuricigomodedu boe eerudukare ji marigudu, boe etowujedu paru piji jii oino. Boe eerudumodukare inoduji pugeje
Nowu inodu umodukare tudowuje kuri je ma, boe emodukare cinorudo, mare pemegarewuge eigoia, inodu umode tudowuje kuri je rugadu
Nowu kodiwu kodi iage egomode tai: - Ema reo! Cristo reo! iarema: - Ema rice! Ma, tameartoru kaba

Mare paga karega, ia boe pegarewuge emode Cristodo pudumi paga tu je, emode profetadoge pagawugedo pudumi, du, emode turo kurireu towuje, tuwo makarewuge eekuri pagado, pemegarewuge jamedu, nowu inodu umode turugadu dukeje
Tamearudu awadudo tai, inure tawie ji, umode tudowujedu otodai
Kode, iaboe egomode: - Mato! Rakojere woje boe matadu tada. Mare tagaba tagorodo oino. Iarema egomode: - Rakojere jice tuwai keje. Mare tameartoru kaba
Mare paga karega, boe jeragudu magai meri rutu piji du urugu jomode boe jameduto jii meri butu kae, du reorere Imedu Onaregedu umode taregodu tabo
Cewu iaboe bi padurewo keje pobureuge emode tudo pui. Imedu Onaregedu aregodumodedu
Kuri nowu boe ekori pegarewu akedumode dukeje, meri joku comode, ari urugudumodukare, kuiejedoge ewudumode baru piji, baru tadawu ro rakareboe ewudumode jamedu

Icare Imedu Onaregedu aregodumodedu kodiboe umode towadudo. Boe eiamedu boe emode tugera to tumororaji. Eerudumode baru pijiwu boetugu aogeje Imedu Onaregedu aregodui turugu kuricigorewu tabo, turo rakaguragarewu tabo duji
Umode to tupadoge etarego togwa akoi meriri iworewu jitu tabo. Emode Pao Aroe Eimejera oge pemegarewuge edo tudo pui baru paru jamedu boe piji. Figueira i jiwu bakaru
Tawo boe pa awu inoduji, tagado ji kae: Awu figueira itura ricodu magai taru aka tabodu, ure tado boe pa butao oto puredugoduie ure duji
Du reorere taerudumode nowu inodu jamedu boe jitu kejere, taeruduwamode Imedu Onaregedu puredugoduie ure baiporo kae duji
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Oinowu boe ewimodukare awu inodu koda piji
Baru, moto, akedumode, mare iwadarurema, okwamodukare. Imedu Onaregedu aregodumode boe epagakai bogai dukeje
Jesus akore ei jamedu: Boe eeruduwakare nowu inodu umode tudowuje kejeboeji. Baru tadawu tupadoge eeruduwakare ji jamedu, mare tu Pao joruduware ji mito tu je
Nono cewu Noé rakoje kimo tabodu reore, du reorere Imedu Onaregedu aregodumodedu kodiboe umode
Cewu butao maemodedu otodai, brae enogwagere, ekudure, ere tugogedo, ere tuwiredo, jii Noé ui turemo ika kurireuto du kae
Ime ekare pawuje jii nowu butao maerewu aregodu kae, dukoia ure eiamedu reko. Du reorere Imedu Onaregedu umode tugirimi kejewu kodiboe umode
Ia ime emode pobe boe tada ma, metuia rekodumode piji, metuia mugumode
Aremei pobedu tumaragodae kejedu, boe emode tugeragu iarodoji, iarodo pijidodumode
Tamearudu awadudo tai, mare paga karega, taeruduwakare inoba boemodedu kejeba Tagimejera aregodumode
Taeruduwado awu inoduji: Ia boe etuo joruduwamode ia iwogu kigodureu aregodumoduie tuwai kae jiwu boecoji ma, oebatodumode tukawo udo tuwai rawuje
Kodire, tagi jamedu, tado tarugadu, mare paga karega, Imedu Onaregedu aregodumode tameardaekare jiwu kodiboe keje. Boe etugare pegarewu mare ia pemegarewu
Jesus akore jamedu: - Kode, kakoduwuba jetorogodumode tugumode turojiwu ia boe etugare, cewu tugimejerare jetudo ia tudugarege eidu tuwo enogwagedo togwagere tu tu jewo keje?
Jiwo aidugirimode cewu boe etugare romode nono tugimejerai turoiagudu reore jii ui tugirimi du kae
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: umode rakojedo toroe pemegarewu jamedu boe keje
Mare ia utugare pegarewu akomode tudada: 49”Ikimejera aregodumodukare kuri je” dutabore umode boe to tumedagei, okwagemode, kudumode ure kuru tugu jetu puduiwuge ebo ma,
nowu utugare eimejera aregodumode upagakare tuwogai jiwu meri ji jepadumode taci je
Icare umode kado dogo dogo je, umode jebato ro biadodureuge ereore. Nono oragudureboemode, o akore do do do do do puiboe umode nono
Kode, baru tadawu boe pemegarewu umode nono nogware kugure ei ikera pudogidu reore, duwuge eridui mugumode tumedago apowu togi jorugu tabo du reore
Ure ikera awubodu reorewuge ekera kiarire, ikera awubodu reorewuge emedure tudada
Tui tugeragu jorugu ja jitu keje, nowu iera kiarireuge ekare jorugu kaguru reko pudabo
Cewu ure todogido puduiwuge ere jorugu kaguru ja towuje jorugu kaguru tabo to joru ja bogai
Nowu eridure togiwu aregodukai kuri je dukoiare, nore kori butu onare eiamedu jokuto, boekarema, enudure rugadu
Mare boeco oia keje emearudure iaboe enoiogwariji: Inoie cewu uwiremodewu koduie jeto, kode toro togi
Nowu nogware eiamedure ere tugera pemegado cewu to joruguji
Cewu iera kiarireuge egore cewu meture tudadawugei, egore: Ia tago jorugu kaguru maku cenai, ceno jorugu bitugodu
Nowu meture tudadawuge egore: Boro! Umodukare turugadu cenai, tagai jamedu; kodire tadudo ure akirodo tabowuge etae tawo ia aru tagai
U! Kode, etui bogai dukejere uwiredodumodewu aregodure. Cewu ure tudo turugadowuge ere turemo apo petamodewo kae, baiporo mitodure eperagajeje
Gu rakatorure icare cewu iage etaregodure, egore: Cegimejera, cegimejera, baiporo jado cenai
Mare uwiredodureu akore: Boe rugadu jire inagore oino tai: ioruduwakare tai
Kode, tadugudo tai, taeruduwakare kakoduwu meri jiba, kakoduwu ia kodiboe jiba. Boe etugarege ei pobe ma jewu metuia bokwaredu
Jamedu, Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono ia imedu ui tuduiagu ia toro du otodai, ure tudugarege eto pui, ure toroe maku etai
Ia mitodu ai ure diierodo ikera awubodure, ia ai ure udo pobe, ia ai ure udo mito, eeruduwa reore. Dukejere icare uture
Icare nowu ore ikera awubodureu ure akirodo kuri je, ure oroe oto tawuje gu todobiji ikera awubowuto pugeje
Du inodu reorere ore pobewu rore jamedu, ure ui pobedu oto tawuje gu iai pobe du kae pugeje
Mare cewu ore mito tu jewu uwaigodure mototo, ure cewu tugimejera o diiero biado mototo
Boe raicigore dukejere, cewu utugarege eimejera ure tugirimi, dukejere makore ei emaragodaemode du bogai

Cewu ore ikera awubodu reorewu ure tuburedo ji, ure jorududo ia ikera awubodu reorewu pugejewuji, akore: Ikimejera, ameartorure ii ikera awubodu reoreduji. Ica, ia ire ikeragu jiwu ikera awubodu reorewu pugejedu reo
Nowu imejera akore ji: Ema remawu itugare pemegarewunure aki, jetorogodureunure aki. Aedorogodure nowu biegarewu inodu tabo, kode imeartoru kurimode ai rugadu. Mato aegarewo akimejera apo
Dukejere, cewu ore pobe tu jewu ure tudaru gu ae, akore: Ikimejera, ameartorure ii pobe tu je duji. Ica, iage ei pobedu reo, dure ire itodudo gu pugeje
Imejera akore ji: Ema rugadu, itugare pemegarewu, jetororewu; aedorogodure nowu biega inodu tabo. Imeartoru kurimode ai. Mato, aegarewo akimejera apo
Du inodu rekodaji, cewu ore mito tu jewu aregodure, akore: Ikimejera, ioruduware apewuie rugadu duji, are akeragu boeji akai boe tugu dutabo, are akeragu boeji, akai a roto ja ja je dutabo
Kodire ipagudure, ire cewu are maku inaiwurogu mito tu jedu ire biado mototo. Emareo, awure aenare ji
Imejera akore ji: Itugare pegarewu, iera kiarireu, aeruduware ie ikeragu boeji, ikare boe tuguwo keje, ie ikeragu boeji ikare boe a roto ja ja jewo keje duji
Aia rumode ino diiero jetu diiero jeta keje, duma, ii ikirimi dukeje, nowu ino diiero makudumode inai ia padumode tu keje dutabo. Dukejere icare akore ia tudugaregei
Awu o diiero aru piji, maku cewu ore ikera pudogiduredu reorewu ai
Mare paga karega, cewu ore makarewu, ia makudumode ai pugeje, nowu inodu tabo, oroe kuricigomode. Mare cewu oroe bokwarewu, jamedu meardaere uie tu pudaboboe jitu arudumode piji jamedu
Awu itugare boe kimo jokodure jiwu, tamode barigu toro baawadu kae boecorewuto. Nono boe etoragudumode, boe eto akomode do do do do do pui nono. Jesus aregodumode tuwo tugogado boe eiamedu boei
Nowu dukodiwu keje, Imedu Onaregedu ui tugirimi tumedui turugu tada to tupadoge ebo dutabo dukeje, umode tumugudo tumuga pemegarewu keje, boe eimejerai pudumi dutabo
Moto padui boe ebodu jamedu boe emode tudo pui jokorai, umode boe etawuje pubiji nono cewu akure cabritodoge, akure ovelhadoge umagai etawuje pubiji du reore
Umode ovelhadoge enogwacedo tugana pemegerewu jaogwai, umode cabritodoge enogwacedo tugana koborewu jaogwai
Dukejere eimejera akomode oino okwacere tugana pemegarewu jaogwaiwugei: Mato, Ioga bataru pemegare jiwuge, taeduwo boe pemegarewu jetu otorogare tawogai jii boe parui towujedu kodiwu keje
Mare paga karega, ike boire ii, tare ikuno; pobo boire ii, tare ikududo; awararere imi, tare tageragu ii
Iwiri kedore, tare aroia tugu ii: ikogodure, tare tagado tu tu iwogai; iragojere baicorewu tada, tadure iwogai jamedu

Dukodi icare, nowu pemegarewuge enoragodumode ji, egomode: Cegimejera, inoba boere dukejeba ceerudure ake boi aiduji, dukodi cere akogwagedo? Inoba boere dukejeba ceerudure pobo boi aiduji dukejeba cere akududo?
Inoba boere dukejeba ceerudure awararei akiduji, dukejere cere cegeragu ai? Kakoduwu kejeba ceerudure awiri kedoji dukeje cere aroia tugu ai?
Inoba boere dukejeba ceerudure akogoduji, ceerudure amedui baicorewu tadaduji, dukejere cedure tu tu awogai?
Icare eimejera akomode: Boe jokodu jire imode boe awadudo tagai: Taroi tu tu oino awu iwiemage biegarewuge kugurei dukeje, dure nono iie taro oinodu kodiwore
Dukeje umode tugirimi pai tugana koborewu jaogwaiwugei, akomode ei: Tagorodo oino ipiji, pegarewuge! Toro, joru akedu bokwarewu ure turugadu Aroe pegarewu mare metage ewogaiwuto
Mare paga karega, ike boire ii, takare inogwagedo, pobo boire ii, takare ikududo
Awararere imi, takare tageragu ii; iwiri kedore, takare aroia tugu ii; ikogodure, imedure baicorewu tada, tagaiwokare tu tu iwogai

Awuge jamedu enoragodumode ji: Cegimejera, inoba boeredu kejeba ceerudure ake boi ai duji, pobo boi ai duji, awararei aki duji, awiri kedoji, akogodui, amedui baicorewu tada duji, cedaokare ai, cewiapagakare ai?
Eimejera akomode oino ei: Boe jokodu jire imode boe awadudo tai: Taro kadui ino awu iwiemage biegarewuge eidu jamedu reorere, ure nono ii taro oino dukodiwore
Duwugere etumode mori pegarewu akedu bokwarewuto jamedu
Tui awu bakaru jamedu boe akedudo dukeje, Jesus akore ture joruduwadowugei
Taeruduware merimode pobe tu je dukeje Pascoamode duji. Imedu Onaregedu makudumode tubaduwo i padui pugajejedu keje
Baire eimejerage, boe codureuge, ere tudo pui ekodure tumedage ekoriwu sacerdote iei Kaifás cedu uwai kae
Dukejere egore pui inoba turomode tuwo tugeragu Jesus ji, je paga inoduji, du bogai, tuwo bito du bogai
Egore turo kaiagu ino jii petamodedu tonaji. Boe jokodukare kare boe ekorigodumoduie inodu koia du moduie. Jesus rakojei ia bakurireurogu iei Betânia cedu kejedu
Jesus rakojere Betânia keje, Simão, moci bare jiwu, uwai tada
Mugui ira keje du kaere ia aredu ure tuburedo ji ia meriri kuru okorobadui roreboe mori kuricigorewu tabo dutabo. Ure redo Jesus aoto
Icare ure joruduwadowuge, tuiorudui inodu jitu keje, ekorigodure, egore: - Kodiba ure barigudu pagado?
Nowu roreboe makuduia umode tumori kurireu tabo, dutabo ia umode nowu diiero maku marenarue etai
Jesus mearudure egoino duji, akore ei: - Kodiba tare awu aredu pogurudo? Turo pemegarewu jire ro oino ii
Marenaru reoreboe emode tagabo jii je, mare imi imodukare tagabo jii jokodu
Tui awu roreboe reko iiogidu ure nono tuie ure redo iiogi imedui iiaro tadadu kodiwore
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Bakaru Pemegarewu kuodumode kejewu moto jamedu boe, awu ro oinodu kogadodumode boe ewiabutui keje dutabo. Judas ui Jesus maku sacerdotedoge eimejerage etaidu
Dukodi icare ure joruduwadowuge iai mito tu jedu, uture sacerdotedoge eimejerage etae
Unoragodure ei: - Kaba tamode makinai, imode maku tagai dukeje? Icare ere diierodo trinta ae
Nowu inodu piji, jemarure turoiwamode tuwo Jesus maku etai jiwu meri bogai. Jesus ure Páscoa towuje
Judeudoge enogwagere okokare jiwu amireu jiwu boetojiwu meri ji, nowu ure joruduwadowuge ere tuburedo Jesus ji, enoragodure ji: - Kaiba akaidumode cewo pagogwagemode jiwu Páscoa pemegado?
Jesus akore ei: - Tadudo bakurireuto, ia imedu uwai kae, tagagodo ji: Ure ceeruduwadowu akore cemagoiagu ai: Boe puredugodunure ii, awai kejere imode Pascoado awu ire joruduwadowuge ebo
Nowu ure joruduwadowuge erore nono Jesus turoiagudu reore, ere tugera pemegado Pascoaji
Meri rekodu tabore, Jesus aregodure, ure tumugudo ira keje togwagewo Pascoaji nowu ture joruduwadowuge ebo
Nowu togwage tonaji, akore: - Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: ia tagi tamode imagu
Tugiarigodu tabore icare enoragodure ji: - Imi kana, cegimejera?
Du akore: - Cewu ure tugera tugu pratoto itabowu, duwu koiare umode imagu
Imedu Onaregedu utumode, bapera atugoi pudui du reore. Mare nowu ure Imedu Onaregedu makuwu imedu jiwomode. Ema remawure nowu imedu butumodukare du rema
Judas, koiare umode makuwu, makogodure jamedu, unorare ji: - Cegimejera, imi kana? Jesus akore ji: - U! Aki rugadu. Jesus ure tumagu boe ewugeje
Nowu togwage inodu tonaji, Jesus ure tugeragu amireuji, ure kado dogo dogo je, ure maku nowu ture joruduwadowuge etai, tagoi oino dutabo: - Emareo, kowuje, ikodu reo
Dukeje ure tugeragu parera kuru jaji, rore oino tu baruto Tuo ae, ure nowu parera kuru maku ture joruduwadowuge etai, tagoi oino dutabo
Ca, tagu ce, taiamedu tabo: iku reo, bakaru maiwu jiwu iku reo; redodumode tuwo makarewuge ero pegarewu okwado
Inagomode tai: Ikudumodukare awu kurureboece pugeje jii meri aregodumode ikudumode ce tagabo Ioga o boe pemegarewu keje du kae
Turai ia tugeroia jitu kejere icare, eture Oliveira tadawu torekodu kae. Jesus ui Pedro bie

Dukejere Jesus akore ei: - Awu boeco jire tawudumode igoia. Mare paga karega, bapera atugore oino kodi: “Imedu jeture ovelhadoge eidu okorido, dukejere icare nowu ovelhadoge emode tado tuieda piji” (Zac 13,7
Mare iewodu rekodaji itumode tagododai Galiléia moto kae
Icare Pedro akore ji: - Eiamedu boe ewudumode aigoia ma, mare imi iwudumodukare tu rugadu. Imodukare apijido
Jesus akore ji: - Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino ai: Awu boeco mitoduji rugadure amode aeruduwa bokwado ii pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, kogariga akogodumodedu otodai

Pedro akore akoi pudui duji: - Iwidodumode akabo rugadu, mare imodukare iioruduwa bokwado ai. Dukodire icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge eiamedu boe egore nono ako magadure. Jesus makoi Tuoji iturarogu iei Getsmani cedu kejedu
Jesus ure tudaru ebo ia boe eeda iei Getsmani cedu kae. Taregodui toro dukejere, akore ei: - Tamugudo tu woe jao, ikodui kuri woje imagowo Pao ji jao
Dukeje, tui tugera kogudo Pedro iera ra paru kajeje, mare Zebedeu ore ei pobedu jamedu, ure erego pudabo. Dukejere kiarigodu okwari buture keje
Akore: - Itaroe kiarigodu kuricigore jii iwimode du kae. Taedo woe itabo
Dukejere ure tudaru gu epiji, ure tuie jodo moto to, akore oino Tuoji: - Ioga, umode turugadu dukeje, amode awu kuru jirireboe roto oino ipiji. Mare umodukare itaidu reore, mare akaidu reorere umode
Icare ure turagojedo, uture ture joruduwadowuge etai, boekarema enu padu bi rabodu. Icare akore Pedroji: - Kode, taetu karade itabo
Tadugudo tai, tamagodo Pao ji tarokawo domi domi je. Boe etaroe ure turugadu, mare boe ekodu rakakare
Ure tudaru gu epiji pugeje, makore Tuoji pugeje, akore: - Ioga, umodukai turugadu awo awu kuru jirireboe roto oino ipiji, ikudukai ce dukeje, kode udo akaidu reore
Ure tugirimi etae pugeje, jeture pa enu padu biji pugeje, mare paga karega, nore kori remawunure eekuji kodi
Uture epiji pugeje, pobe ma jewu metuia bokware pugeje, togwa kodui mitodu jitu tabo
Dukejere, ure tugirimi ture joruduwadowuge etae pugeje, akore ei: - Ica, tanududo oino, tagamudo. Ica, boe aregodure pudae. Imedu Onaregedu makudumode ropegarewuge ekera kai
Taragojedo, marigu! Cewu umode imaguwu rakoje puredure woe. Brae ere tugeragu Jesus ji
Jesus makore kimo, cewu Judas, cewu ia ure joruduwadowu aregodu keje, apowuge emagare tugedui toriga bigodu jitu tabo, tugedui ipo jitu tabo, nono baire eimejerage, boe codudoge ei turoiagudu reore
Cewu umode makuwu ure bakarudo turugadu ei: - Emare cewu imode inogwabi jiwu rema. Tageragu ji
Icare ure tuburedo Jesus ji, akore ji: - Itaregodu, ikimejera. Icare ure togwabi ji
Jesus akore ji: - Imeduia, nowu inodu bogaiba aro oino woe? Du inodu kejere ere tuburedo Jesus ji, ere tugera raido ae tuwo tugeragu ji
Mare ia Jesus metuia, ure toriga tawuje tuia piji, ure baire eimejera kurireu ia utugare okorido tui bia kado dutabo
Mare Jesus akore ji: - Atoriga tugu tuiato, cewu ure tumedage etogorido toriga tabowuge ewimode toriga tabo jamedu
Ameartorukare imagomode Ioga bogai ma, umodukare Tupadoge makarewuge etudo iwogai duji?
Kode inoba umode ukai nono bapera atugo reore dukeje?

Dukejere ure tuie kirimi pai nowu ro oino puduiwugei, akore ei: - Tadure mato toriga tabo, ipo tabo, tawo tageragu ii du bogai. Tanure tarodo nono iro pega kurie, imago pega kurie dukodie taro oino iwogai dukodiwore. Mare du inodu boe tada, boe jamedu boere imugure tadoda ii taeruduwado dutabo Pao uwai tada, mare takare tageragu ii

Mare au inodu jamedu boere tudowuje uwo nono profetadoge ewadaru reore. Nowu inodu keje, ure joruduwadowuge eiamedu boe ere pijido, eregodure piji. Jesus rakojei judeudoge eimejerage ei tudo puidu eegoraidu
Ure tugeragu Jesus jiwuge ere reko baire eimejera iei Caifás cedu ae. Escribadoge, codureu boe eedui apo du kae
Pedro kodure rekodaji, mare ukare tuiedu puredu ji, jii baire eimejera uwororo kae. Ure turemo, ure tumugudo nowu utugarege ebo, tuioruduwo inoba nowu inodu akedumode duji
Nowu inodu tonaji, baire eimejerage eemarunure tuwo Jesus roiaodo ma, tuwo reko bitoduwo
Emode roiaodo jiboe, emode batararodo jiboe makaguragare duwugere towadudo eegai, mare eroiwakare, egoiwakare
Nowu inodu oto kejere, iage ei pobedu egore: - Awu imedu akore: Imode Pao uwai pegado mare meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje imode towuje pugeje
Icare nowu baire eimejera ure turagojedo taci je, unorare Jesus ji, akore ji: - Ia amagore jiboe bokware awu emago pegare aidu jipagi?
Mare Jesus makokare. Dukodi icare nowu baire eimejera makore ji, akore: - Pao Aroe Eimejera ie tabo imode amagodo: Pao Onaregedu iei Cristo cedunure aki?

Jesus akore: - U! Imi rugadu. Boe jokodu jire inagomode tai jamedu: Ia meri keje taerudumode Imedu Onaregedu mugui Pao ro rakarewu ako rakarewu kana pemegarewu jaogwai duji, tui turawuje baru tadawu boetugu aogeje dutabo
Nowu bataru keje, nowu baire eimejera ure tugudae rugadu bowuje toiogwari tabo: - U! Pawiapagamode iaboe bogai kimo? Ica, maigodure tamearudure mako pegai oinoduji
Inoba umode taegai? Egore: - Bitodu rumode nowu inodu morice
Du ere todoguru to jeto, ere tugimori to ji, ere tugera to jeji, tagoi oino dutabo
Cristo, ure tugera to aiwu pawuje. Pedro ure tuioruduwa bokwado Jesus ji
Nowu inodu otoi, Pedro mugure toro ewororo keje. Ia maragodure nonowu aredu, ure tuburedo ji, akore ji: - Aki jamedu aragojere Jesus Galiléia kejewu apo
Mare ure tuioruduwa bokwado ji boe oinodu oiado, tagoi oino dutabo: - Ioruduwakare akagoino jiboeji
Dukejere kodure kuri baiporo kae tuwo tuiebu du bogai. Nowu inodu otoi, nowu maragodure nonowu ia aredu pugeje jorudure ji, akore jeture nonowugei: - Awu imedu rakojere jamedu Jesus Nazaré kejewu apo
Ia pugeje Pedrore tuioruduwa bokwa jokodudo ji, akore: - Ioruduwakare nowu imedu ji
Du je dukejere nowu jeture nonowuge ere tuburedo jice Pedroji, egore: - U! Ecewuge ia akireo. Amago tabo cere apawuje
Kode, dukejere icare Pedro makore tugorigodu tabo tuirduwakae nowu imedu ji. Nowu inodu tonaji kogariga akogodure
Pedro biabuture Jesus akore puduiwo keje: - Kogariga akogodumodedu otodai, amode aeruduwa bokwado ii pobe ma jewu metuia bokware. Dukejere Pedro uture nowu piji, toragudu kuricigo tabo
Ba aregodu tabore baire eimejerage, codureu boe ere tudo pui tumago tabo tuwadaru tabo tuwo Jesus maku tuwidodu kae
Ere kogudo, ere reko brae eimejera Pilato ae. Judas biredu

Judas, cewu ure makuwu, tuiorudui Jesus makudui tuwi kae dukeje, tori buture jagi, pagudugodure, uture nowu baire eimejerage, nowu codureuge etae, ure cewu diiero ui trinta cedu maku etai pugeje, tagoi oino dutabo
Iro pegare ii imedu pemegarewu ku maku dutabo. Egore ji: - Cedaomodukare nowu inoduji, akabore nowu inodu padure
Du, nowu inodu keje, ure nowu diiero barigu toro Pao uwaito. Ure tuiebu, uture toro tuwo tuwido, tui bukigu kogudo turuwo kajeje du kae
Baire eimejerage ere tugeragu nowu diieroji, egore: - Pamodukare jetu Pao uwai tadawu boe enoroe pemegarewu tabo, mare paga karega, kureboe mori rema kodi
Cewu tui batarudo puidu akedu keje, ere maragodure motori jiwu o boepa aru cewu diiero tabo, uwo moto tuginoiwu pijiwuge eno aroe eiao rema
Du koiare iere oino: “Boe eku jeta boepa”, jii oino kimo rugadu
Awu inodu ure nono profeta Jeremia makore jiboe reore: - Meririre trinta makudure etai, Israeldoge emeardae reore,
Ere maku nowu maragodure motori jiwu o boepa morice, nono ikimejera uiagudu reore. Jesus rakojei Pilato jokoraidu
Ere Jesus reko brae eimejera ae, du unoragodure ji, akore: - Akina judeudoge eimejera kurireu ure aki? Jesus akore: - U
Mare nowu baire eimejerage, boe codudoge emagoi pudui dukeje, makokare ei
Icare Pilato unoragodure ji pugeje: - Amearudukare boei aroiaodo boeji?
Mare nowu brae ime1,jera je rore ta..., makokai ia tuwadaru jipagiduji. Jesus bitodumodedu
Boekarema, Páscoa jiwu meri keje tu tu tu, nowu brae eimejerare nowu mugure baicorewu tadawuge epijiwu ia imedu tawuje tawuje, boe enogwamagudui dukeje
Ica, nowu dukodi, ia akaru pegarewu imedu iei Barrabás cedu meture baicorewu tada
Icare Pilato akore nowu ure tudo pui nonowugei, akore: - Kakoduwu tagaidure iwo inorudo? Barrabás na? Iarema Jesus iei Cristo cedu na? 18(Joruduware emagere Jesus maku tugorii jitu tabo
Mugui brae eimejera tumuga keje tuwo tugogado boei du kaere oredujere boe egoiagu ji: - Arokaba ia aro nowu imedu pemegarewuji. Irore tuku inuiao tada jiboe koia
Mare baire eimejerage, boe codudoge, ere boedo togwamaguduwo ji uwo Barrabás inorudo, uwo Jesus bito
Dukodi icare nowu brae eimejera makore ei, akore: - Kakoduwu ia ei pobedu imode inorudo tagai? Egore: - Barrabás
Icare Pilato unoragodure ei pugeje, akore: - Kode, inoba iromode Jesus iei Cristo ceduji? Icare egore tuiamedu tabo: - Padu rumode i padui pugajeje dukeje
Icare brae eimejera unoragodure ei kimo, akore: - Kode, inoba ropegarewure? Ere tumago rakado rugadu pugeje, egore: - Padudodu rumode i padui pugajejedu keje

Pilato jorudure boe kimo rabuduie ure rugadu, mare eie tumago toiogwari awogado rugadu, icare makore pobo bogai, ure tugera kabi nowu brae eegai, akore: - Imire itagurugodure, igoia karega awu imedu bitodumode: nowu inodu tagi toro
Icare boe eiamedu boe egore: - Ku butuwo ceiamedu bukeje, cedore ewugeje
Du icare ure Barrabás inorudo, ure tudugarege edo iku oto meririreu to to Jesus ji, dukejere ure maku bitodudoduwo i padui pugajejedu keje. Torigaraidogere turo tago amado Jesus ji
Brae eimejera o tugobaigarege ere Jesus reko nowu tugimejera uwai iei Pretório cedu kae, eiamedure ere taiado Jesus apo
Ere Jesus kudae rugadu tawuje taci, ere aroia kujagureu tugu ji
Dukeje, ere boto ikureu enado ere oreado, ere to co aorato, ere ia iwara bu iera keje. Dukejere ere tubujodo jokorai, egore ji: - Kode, judeudoge eimejera kurireunure aki
Ere todoguru to jeto, ere tugeragu cewu ture bu iera kejewu iwaraji, ere to pa, aoraji
Cewu turo tago amado ji du rekodaji, ere cewu aroia kujagureu tawuje piji, ere ukudae remawu maku ai. Dukejere ere reko toro, tuwo bu i padui pugajejedu keje. Jesus padui cruz kejedu
Tudui nowu tuieda piji dukeje, eerudure ia Cirene pijiwu imedu iei Simão ceduji, du ere udo tudugu Jesus o i padui pugajeje duji arobi
Etaregodure ia eeda iei Gólgota cedu kae, du inodu jire boe egore Boe etaora ra jeta, ino
Dukejere ere kududo boe eku kuru tugudui parera kuruto duce. Ure togwa pagado tu ji, mare kudukare ce

Ere bu i padui pugajejedu keje, dukeje ere ukudae pedo pui, tui tuiwo aidugirimodedu bu keje dutabo. Nowu inodu kodure profeta bataru reore: “Ere ikudae pedo pui, ikudae kejere ere tuiwo aidugiriredu bu” (Sl21,19
Icare ere tumugudo toebatodu tabo
Aora bukejere ere ia ira atugo bararedo turoi jitu kodiboe tabo: “Jesus reo, Judeudoge eimejera kurireu”
Nowu inodu tonaji, ere iwogu kigodureuge ei pobedu ewu i padui pugajejedu keje apo. Ia okwacere kana pemegarewu jaogwai, ia okwacere kana koborewu jaogwai
Kodure nono koriwuge ewadaru pegare ji, ere tao ra roto bai bai, tagoi oino dutabo
Akagore amoduie Pao uwai butudo, amoduie ia towuje meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje taci je. Kode, akinorudo akaobiji. Pao Aroe Eimejera Onaregedu aki rugadu dukeje, arawuje nowu i piji
Baire eimejerage, boe codudoge ewadaru pegare ji jamedu, egore
Ure iage einorudo, mare oino, ukare cinorudo taobiji. Kode, Israeldoge eimejeramode ema rugadu dukeje, udo turawuje i piji, nowu inodu keje cemeartorumode ji
Meartorure Aroe Eimejeraji, kode, Aroe Eimejera mearudu kurimode ji dukeje, umode inorudo. Mare paga karega, akore: - Pao Aroe Eimejera Onaregedunure imi
Nowu iwogu kigodureuge epadui i keje apodu emago pegare ji jamedu. Jesus biredu
Meri jetui brae etoiadoda dupiji jii meri jogodu kae, boecore turorido moto jamedu boe joki
Meri jogodu kejere Jesus kudu rakarewu padure boe kajeje, akore: - Eli, Eli, lamma sabactani. Du inodu jire akore: - Ioga, Ioga, kodiba are ipijido? oino
Awu bataru keje, ia jeture nonowuge egore: - Makonure Elias bogai
Kuri je ia emage ure tugeragu ia pobo meture tadaboeji, ure tugu ia kuru jirireboeto, ure bu ia ipo oto keje, ure raido toro ae, kuduwo ce
Iage egore: -Piji! Pawo pagado tu Eliamode tugerabraredo jitu bogai
Icare Jesus oiogwari rakarewu padure boe kajeje pugeje, nonore icare akurure
Inodu kejere, Pao uwai kejewu aroia kurireu ure tuwowuje oiagi, moto amagadure, toridoge ere tuiado
Aroe eiaodoge ere tuiado, ia pemegarewuge makarewuge eewodure tuwi piji
Duwuge ere tuiebu tuiao piji, icare eture nowu bakurireu pemegarewuto, Jesus jewodu rekodaji

Toebatodure Jesus jiwu tugobaigarege mare nowu eimejera tuiorudui moto amagadui mare nowu ure tudo boe jamedu boe jitu keje, emagore pui, tubagudu rakaguragarewu tabo, egore: - Boe jokodu rugadu awu imedu Aroe Eimejera Onaregedu reno. Jesus tugudui tori todu
Ia areme eedure nono jamedu, taiwo tabo: cewu kodure Jesus apo Galiléia pijiwuge tuwo tugerabraredo ji
Duwuge etada, Maria Madalena meture, Tiago more José etuje meture jamedu, Zebedeu ore etuje jamedu
Meri rekodu tabo, ia imedu iei José cedu, oroe kurireu, ia Jesus ure joruduwadowu,
jeemarure Pilato bogai, okwamagudure ji Jesus akurui marigudu du bogai. Icare Pilato ure makai
Icare José ure tugeragu ji, ure aroia kigadureu upodo apo
Ure tugu ture tudugarege edo pemegado maigodu, tuiaromode ema tuwimodedu keje dukejewuto. Dukeje, ure ia tori kurireu roto kororo jekai, ure bu je keje, dupijire uture
Maria Madalena mare ia metago Maria, emugure nono puredu tu ji. Boe eetui Jesus meturewo jidu
Barogwatore icare, cewu ere tugera pemegado pudui peta paru kaedu kejere, nowu baire eimejerage mare escribadoge ere tudo pui Pilato uwai kae
Egore ji: - Cegimejera, cewiabuture cewu batararodu barikarewu je kimo tabowu bataru keje. Akore: - Meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje iewodumode

Kode, ia boe eetudo nowu meturewoji jii meri pobe ma awu metuia bokware du kae. Boe jokodu kare kare, ure joruduwadowuge eiwogumode ji ma, egomode jewoduie bireuge epiji, oinore egomode boe ewiegai du umode, awu batararodaereboe umode pugeje ma, kodumode nowu boetojiwu kori tubega tabo
Icare Pilato akore ewadaru jipagi: - Tago tugobaigaregere, tare eetudo ji tameardae reore
Eture rugadu, ekedure nowu meturewoji, ere kruca bu nowu tori keje ere tugobaigarege eedo keje
Nowu Sábado rekodaji nowu semana boetojiwu meri ji, Maria Madalena, mare metago Maria, eture toro meturewo kae
Boekarema, moto amagadu rakaguragare dutabore icare Pao o tupare turawuje baru piji ure nowu tori roto nowu meturewo je piji, ure tumugudo tu aogeje
Jere nono boe jeragudu reore, ukudae kigadure nono pobo akirireu kigadure
Cewu tugobaigarege, tuiorudui nowu inodu jitu keje emeardaere tuwimoduie tubagudu koia
Nowu tuparema, akore nowu aremei: - Tabagudu kaba! Ioruduware taemaruie ure padure i padui pugajejedu kejewu Jesus bogai duji
Mugukare woe: jewodure cewu tagoi du reore. Mato, taeruduwo ure tamudowoji
Tamara tabo toro, ure joruduwadowuge ewogai, tagagodo ei jewoduie bireuge epiji. Kodumoduie tagododai Galiléia kae. Torore taerudumode ji pugeje. Oinore inagore tu tai
Icare eture meturewo piji tugimai dugu je dutabo, mare tuiegare tabo jamedu, eregodure ure joruduwadowuge etae nowu bakaru maiwu pemegarewu tabo
Nowu inodu keje kuri je, Jesus ure towadudo eegai, akore oino ei: - Itaregodu. Ere tuburedo ji, ere tubujodo taci jokorai, tui togwabi bureto dutabo
Icare Jesus akore ei: - Tabagudu kaba. Toro, tamagodo iwiemagei etuwo Galiléia kae, torore eerudumode ii. Jeture Jesus meturewo jiwuge ewadararodu
Nowu areme ekodui toro du tonaji, ia oebatodure jiwu ime eradu marigudu toro bakurireuto tuwo baire eimejerage ewie inoba boereduji
Awugere icare ere tudo pui nowu boe codudoge ebo. Ere meriri maka inodu maku nowu tugobaigarege etai, egore oino ei
Tamagomode oino boei ure joruduwadowugeie etaregodure bogai boecoji tuwo reko tanudu tonaji
Brae eimejera mearudumode nowu inodu jitu keje, cemode butugudo, cemode taginorudo ia boe pegamode tai dupiji

Icare nowu tugobaigarege ere tugeragu cewu makudure pudaiwu diieroji, eture toro tagowo nono tagoiagudu reore. Nowu batararodae ure taodo judeudoge ekao jii oino. Jesus ui towadudo ture joruduwadowuge eegaidu
Nowu ure joruduwadowuge ei ikera pudogidure mito taci ikera awubowutowu, eture toro Galiléia kae, nowu Jesus akore tuduiagu kaewu tori raireu kae
Tuiorudui jitu keje, ere tubujodo ji, du inodu tada iage emeartoru jokodukare
Mare Jesus ure tuburedo ei, akore ei: - Ica: ro rakareboe mako rakareboe makudure inai baru tada, moto keje jamedu
Kode tadudo toro moto jamedu boeji tai boe eeruduwado dutabo, tamode etao pegodo Uo, Onaregedu, Aroe Pemegarewu ie tabo
Eeruduwado turowo nono imagore tai du reore. Ica! Iragojemode tagabo meri jameduji jii boe jameduji jii je. MA
Pao baru tadawu Onaregedu Jesus Cristo o bakaru maiwu pemegarewu paru. Profeta Isaias o bapera keje atugododure oino: 2"Ica, inure ino tupa utudo akododai, emare umode akawara pemegado
Iaboe mako padure boe matadu kajeje, akore: Pagimejera utawara jetorodo, moto aoporu boe kororogodudo” (Mal 3,1; Is 40,3
Kodi icare João Batista je padure boe matadu kajeje tokituwai boei ewo tao pegodo ma, epemegawo, ero pegarewu pijidoduwo
Dukodi icare, Judeia kejewuge eiamedu boe, Jerusalém kejewuge eiamedu boe etu eture ae tumagowo ji; emagore turo pegarewuji, dukejere ure etao pegodo Jordão po tada
João merure camelo biri metui pudui dutabo, ia kogure kajeje, okwagere bokokuadogei, moiawoei jamedu
Icare uwadodure, akore: - Ia kodu remawure ikoriwu imedu aregodumode iregodaji, duwu otoji icekare iwo bure tadawu iku kiwuje
Ire tagao pegodo pobo tabo, emarema, umode tagao pegodo Aroe Pemegarewu tabo. João Batistare Jesus ao pegodo
Boekimorema, nowu ia meri keje Jesus aregodure padure Galiléia kejewu bakurireu iei Nazaré cedu piji. Icare ao pegododure João koia, Jordão po tada
Icare ui tudawuje pobo piji du tonajire icare jorudure barui tuiado, Aroe Pemegarewu ui turawuje tui nono metugu reore dutabo bukeje duji
Boe emearudure ia boe mako aregodui baru piji duji, akore: - Akire imearudu kurire jiwu itonaregedure aki: Awugejere ire imearudu kuriae jamedu boe bu
Awu inodu otobiji, Aroere utudo toro boe mataduto
Merire ikera pudogidure, iwure pudogidure, ikera pudogidure, iwure pudogidure ji nono, Aroe pegarewu podure ji nono, barege eedure apo, tupadoge eedure ji. Jesus uwadodae
Icare braere João tugu baicorewuto, du rekodajire icare Jesus uture Galiléia kae. Ure Pao o bakaru maiwu pemegarewu kuo, tagoi
Icare boe aregodure pudae, Pao o boe pemegarewu aregodunure, icare tagodorogado tai, tameartorudo Pao o bakaru maiwu pemegarewuji. Jesus ure joruduwadowu boetojiwuge ei pobe puibijidu
Tumerui Galiléia kejewu kuruga kurireu okwai dutabore icare, jorudure Simãoji, uwie Andréji, ei buke barigu poboto duji, boekarema, kare ecebage rabodure emage
Icare Jesus akore ei: - Tago itabo! Iwo tuwugerurudo imeiwugedo tagi
Kuri je ere tugera ra tuwuge piji, ekodure apo
Ekodure gu... je dukeje, jorudure Tiago, Zebedeu onaregeduji, uwie Joãoji, eedui ia ika tada duji, enure tugare pemegado tuwugeji
Makore kuri etai. Eture tuo Zebedeu mugui tudugarege ebodu piji, ekodure apo. Jesus ui Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu ia imedu pijidu
Ere turemo Cafarnaum bakurireuto, icare, Sábado okwabiji, Jesus ure turemo sinagogato. Kejere ure boe eeruduwado
Eerudu moture nowu uwadodaeji, paga karega, ure eeruduwado nono ia boe eimejerare boe eeruduwadodu reore, mare escribadoge ereore karega
Ica, nowu sinagoga tada ia Aroe pegarewu pegarewu metui tadawu imedu rakojere nono, du oiogwarire,
akore: - Inoba aromode cei, Jesus Nazaré kejewu? Akaregodure awo cewarigu boeto? Ioruduware ai: Aroe Eimejera o imedu pemegarewunure aki
Mare Jesus akore ji: - Amago urugadu, atawuje nowu imedu piji
Aror pegarewure nowu imedu amagadudodu kuricigodo, tui toiogwari rakaguragado, tui tudawuje piji dutabo

Boe eiamedu boe erore ta... je, enorare jice woje, jice woje pui, egore: - Kabobao? Uwadodure boe maiwuji tui nono boe eimejerai pudumidu reore! Roiware tuwo Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu jamedu, duwugere emeartorure bataru ji
Kuri je, akarure taodo moto jamedu boe kao, Galiléia oiei. Jesus ui Pedro ucarugo pemegagodu
Ure tudawuje nowu sinagoga piji dukeje, uture Tiago apo, João apo, nowu Simão, André mage ewai kae
Nowu Simão ucarugo padure tuba kamorewu keje tuwiri uru tabo. Icare emagore kuri ji inoba ure duji
Ure tuburedo gu jice ji, ure tugeragu ieraji, ure tuera awogado iera tabo. Nowu inodu tonaji, biri uru akedure pi tuku je, dukejere ure enogwagedo. Jesus ui ia kogodureuge epemegagodu
Meri rekodu tabo, meri butu rekodaji, ere kogodureuge eiamedu boe, Aroe pegarewuge emedure tadawuge eiamedu boe, eto pui ae
Nowu bakurireu tadawuge eiamedu boe ere tudo pui nowu baiporo kae

Ure makarewuge epemegago tugogodae jamedu boe piji, ure Aroe pegarewuge ewarigudu makaguragado: ukare egodo ia tago, eeruduware ji kodi. Barogwatore icare jetadure barogwa kododumodedu otodai, icare ure tuiebu, uture boe makodureuto, nonore icare ure togwa kurido
Du tonajire icare Simão jemarure bogai tumedage ebo
Eerudure ji dukejere icare, egore ji: - Boe eiamedu boe eemarure awogai
Icare akore ei: - Paduwo bakurireurogudoge etae, bakurireu padu puredureuge etae, iwadoduwo toro jamedu; paga karega, nowu inodu bogaire itaregodure
Kodure toro rugadu, uwadodure eno sinagogadoge etada, nowu Galiléia jamedu boe kao, tui Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu dutabo. Jesus ure ia moci bare jiwu imedu pemegago
Ia moci bare jiwu imedu uture ae, ure tubujodo ji, togwamagudui jitu dutabo, akore: - Akaidu keje, amode ikabi
Jesus okudure apo, ure tugera raido jice ae, ure tugera bu keje, akore ji: - Itaidure. Kode, apemegago
Nowu akoinodu tonaji kuri je, moci okware pi tuku je. Akurugudure taci je
Jesus imadure kuri apo, akore ji tumago okori tabo
Amago kaba boe ewiegai, mare, toro! Sacerdote jorududo ai, ia akomearogu maku apemegagodu morice, Moisés bataru reore, apemegagodu koiaboe reore

Mare nowu imedu uture kuri je, ure nowu inodu boedo taodo, dukodi icare Jesus roiwakare tuwo turemo tui towadudo dutabo bakurireuto. Rakojere bakujei, boe eragojekarewo keje. Boe eiamedu etu eture ae tu tu tubiji
Dukejere icare, Jesus ure turemo Cafarnaum bakurireuto pugeje, icare boe eeruduware mugui tuwai kejeduji
Kodi icare boe ere tudo pui du makaguragare ae, kodi icare boe eroiwakare pu kujiagi nowu baiporoto. Icare uwadodure ewiegai
Icare boere ia meru bokwarewu imedu arego nono ae, oredure apowu ime ere pobe puibiji
Mare eroiwakare boe ekujiagi apo jice ae. Boekarema ere ia tugoda pawuje jice bai aoji, Jesus bukajeje. Ere bai ao jado, du poro jire ere nowu kogodureu pa kamorewu rawuje apo baito
Icare Jesus, tuiorudui nowu emeartorae rakarewu jitu keje, makore nowu pogora bokwarewuji, akore: - Itonaregedu, iwudugugodure ai aro pegarewu jamedu boeji
Boekarema, ia escribadoge emugure nonodu egore pui
Kodiba awu imedu akomode oino? Mako peganure! Ioguduba umode boe ero pegarewu okwado? Pao baru tadawu tu je karega?
Mare Jesus, tui emeardae pawuje dukeje, akore ei: - Kodiba tameardaere oino tawabo tada?
Inoba ureuba biamodukare: imagowo awu pogora pegarewuji: Iwudugugodure aro pegarewu jamedu boeji, oino ji, iarema inagowo ji: Aragojedo, akeragu apa komorewuji, amerudo, oino ji?
Aro, kode, taeruduwawo Imedu Onaregedu ro rakarewu makudui aiduji (akore nowu pogora pegarewuji
Imire inago oino: Aragojedo! Akeragu apa kamorewuji, toro awai kae

Icare ure turagojedo kuri je, ure tugeragu tuba kamorewuji, uture boe eegai rugadu. Nowu boe eiamedu boe eebogodure, ere Pao akaru kurido tuiegare tabo, tagoi oino dutabo: - Paerudu kigodukare awu inodu reoreboeji. Jesus mare Levi
Icare uture pugeje pobo maerewu okwa kae pugeje. Nowu boe makarewuge ere tudo pui ae, ure eeruduwado
Boekarema, tumerui nono dutabore icere jorudure Levi, Alfeu onaregedu, mugui braei toe moridodu ja ira kejeduji. Icare akore ji: - Ako itabo! Icare ure turagojedo taci je, kodure apo

Dukejere icare, ia meri keje, Jesus ure tumugudo togwagewo nowu Levi uwai tada. Boere toe mori maku aiwu makarewuge, mare ro pegarewuge makarewuge ere tumugudo apo, mugui nowu tudugarege ebodu apo, paga karega, kodure pudabowuge emagaguragare

Icare fariseudoge eno escribadoge, tuiorudui okwagei ro pegarewuge ebo, ure tugeragu brae emori jiwuge ebo duji dukeje, egore ure joruduwadowuge ei: - Kodi icare, okwagenure ropegarewuge ebo, publicanodoge ebo

Icare Jesus tumerudui egoinodu jitu dukeje, akore: - Pemegarewuge ewiapagakare jorubo kuru epa bogai mare kogodureuge u. Paga karega, itaregodure, mare imagowo pemegarewuge ewogai karega, mare pegarewuge ewogai

Ia meri keje pugeje, João ure joruduwadowuge mare fariseudoge etodoroganure pudui. Dukodire boe etaregodure ae tunorawo ji, egore: - Kodiba João ure joruduwadowuge mare fariseudoge etodorogare pudui, are joruduwadowuge rema, etodorogakare pudui?
Icare Jesus akore ei: - Kode, kodiba bakaru makudure aiwuge etodorogamode pudui, tugodui nowu iera makudure toreduje aiwu apo du tonaji? Nowu tugodui apo du tonaji etodorogamodukare pudui
Ia meri aregodumode nowu tawujedumode epiji du kae, dukeje etodorogamode pudui
Boe emodukare aroia maiwu kobo bu aroia codureu poro keje; paga karega, aroia kobo maiwu umode aroia codureu ia okwa rawuje piji, dukeje nowu mega pega jokodumode
Boe emodukare parera kuru maiwu tugu pori codureuto. Boe eromode ino ma, nowu kuru umode nowu pori bowuje ma, rugadu okwamode. Mare parera kuru maiwu jamode pori maiwuce. Jesus ore Sábado rema
Sabadore jiwu meri ji, Pagimejera merunure boepadoge ekao, dutabore, kodure apowu ure joruduwadowuge ere tugeragu ia trigo enari boeji
Icare fariseudoge egore ji: - Akaiwodo! Kodiba erore oinono sabadore jiwu meri ji, boe eromodukare ino jiwu meri ji?
Jesus akore ewadaru jipagi: - Tamagokare Davi jiwu bapera atugoji, cewu tuge boire puduidu kodiboe keje, ema mare nowu metage?
Kode, ure turemo Pao uwaito, Pao bure joiage eimejera iei Abiatar cedu kodiwu keje, ure enogwa kuridodure tabowu amireu kowuje, du tu Pao burejoiage emode kowuje, ure maku tumedage etai jamedu?
Icare akore ei pugeje: - Dukodire Imedu Onaregedu ore Sábado rema jamedu
Ia kodiboe keje pugeje, Jesus ure turemo sinagogato pugeje; nonore ia imedu iera bireu muguradu nono
Icare (onare jiwuge) enoebatodure ji tuioruduwo iogomode ji sabadore jiwu meri keje du bogai, togiru pegawo jitu bogai
Icare akore nowu iera bireuji: - Mato boiado
Icare unoragodure ei, akore: - Boe ero pemegamodukana, iarema boe ero pegamodukana sabadore jiwu meri keje? Boekana umode pu inorudo, iarema boekana umode pu bito? Mare emagokare
Du koiare ure tuioku okorido jice eiogi, kiarigodure tuiorudui ewabo kugudukaduji, dukeje icare akore nowu imedu ji: - Akera inogido. Ure tugera inogido, du tonaji, iera pemegagodure
Icare fariseudoge ere tudawuje nowu piji tumagowo herodianodogoei inoba turomode tuwo bito. Jesus uwadodui ika tadadu pijidu
Jesus ure tudawuje ture joruduwadowuge ebo nowu kuruga kae. Ia boe makarewuge etaregodui Galiléia pijidu ekodure apo
Judeia piji, Jerusalém piji, Idumeia piji, Jordão okwa bakoboe piji, Tiro, Sidão oieiboe piji, ia boe makarewuge etaregodure ae, tumearudui roboe jitu koia
Icare ure nowu ture joruduwadowuge eiagu ika kurireu udo turugadu, nowu boe makarewuge eiokawo tu tuwugeje
Ure iage epemegagodu makaguragado, dukodire kogodureuge eiamedu boe ere tuburedo jice ji, tugera jetuwo ji
Aror pegarewudoge eerudui jitu dukeje ere tubujodo jokorai toiogwari tabo: - Aroe Eimejera Onaregedunure aki
Mako maere ei tumago okori tabo, ekawo boedo boe pa pudui. Jesus ui tugeragu ture joruduwadowuge ei pagera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekoto duji pudaedu
Dukejere Jesus ruture ia torekodu ao kae, makore taidure jiwuge ewogai. Eture ae
Ure togiegi etoiado jetumode pudabowugei, du ere ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekoto
Umode etudo boe etae, ewadoduwo boei, tui ero raka maku etai ewo Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu du bogai
Ure togiegi awugei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotowugei: Simão iei Pedro cedu
Nowu Zebedeu onaregedu iei Tiago cedu, mare uwie João, duwugere ure eiedo Boiaruru Ore oino ei
André, Filipe, Bartolomeu, Mateus, Tiago nowu Alfeu onaregedu, Tadeu, Simão Aiworewu
Mare Judas Iscariote, duwu koiare ure maku
Dukejere, ere tuiodo tuwugeje taci tuwai kae. Du kaere ia boe makarewuge ere tudo pui ae pugeje, dukoiare eroiwakare tuwo boe kowuje jamedu
Icare uwobe emearudui nowu inoduji dukeje, eture jice ae, tuwo tugeragu ji, paga karega, egore: - Aora bai bainure
Jamedu, cewu ure turawuje Jerusalém pijiwu escribadoge egore: - Aroe pegarewu meture tada. Aroe pegarewuge eimejera koiare ure Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu
Jesus rema, ure edo tudo pui puae, icare makore ei awu bakaru tabo: - Inoba Aroe pegarewu romode tuwo Aroe pegarewu barigu?
Kode, ia jeture to moto kejewuge emode tudo tuginoi ma, eragoje raimodukare
Jamedu, ia boe etuwobe emode tudo tuginoi ma, umode tudo pubiji, eragoje raimodukare jamedu
Aror pegarewu umode tawogado pudui ma, umode tudo puibiji, du utumodukare todobiji, mare akedu rumode
Iaboe iaboe eroiwamodukare tuwo turemo ia ro rakare imedu uwaito ciwoguwo ia oroeji tukai kogudo dukeje. Mare tui kogudo dukejere, eiwogumode oroeji uwai piji
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Ime ero pegarewu jamedu boe butugugodaemode, jamedu ewadaru pegarewu jamedu boe jamedu
Mare cewu bataru pegare Aroe Pemegarewu jiwuge, butugugodaemodukare ji jii je, mare nowu ero pegarewu okwamodukare epiji jii je
Jesus akore oino, mare paga tu je karega, egore: - Aroe pegarewu meture tada. oino ji, dukoiare akoino. Jesus uwobe remawuge
Uce aregodure uwiemage ebo, eedure toro baawadu keje, dupijire ere boe emagodo bogai
Boekarema, boe makarewuge eedure nono tumago tabo oiei du egore ji: - Ace rakojere nono baawadu keje awiemage ebo, eemarunure awogai
Icare akore ei: - Ioguduba imuga rema, ioguduba mageba iwiemagere emage?
Icare tui tuioku maedo nowu jeture pudabowuge eiogi dukeje, akore: - Imuga reo, iwiemage reo
Cewu rore nono Pao aidu reorewu, nowu iwienure ema, ituienure ema, imuganure ema

Jesus ure boe eeruduwado pugeje kuruga kurireu jipa keje. Boe makarewuge ere tudo pui apo pugeje, dukoia ure taredo ika kurireuto, nowu pobo maerewu tada. Nowu boe makarewuge eiamedu boe eedure nono moto keje pobo okwai
Ure kogado ewiegaiboe kuricigo, bakaru tabo
Akore: - Tawiapagado. Ure boe a tuguwu uture to boepato tuwu boe a tugu
Ui boe a tugu du tonaji, ia boe a buture awara okwai; kiege barege etaregodure, ere kowuje
Ia a buture toripegato, moto okwatorukarewu keje. Du a boture kuri je, paga karega, moto okwatorukare jitu kodi
Mare meri joku aregodure kuri je, kowudure, kidure kuri je ukwa bokware dukodi
Ia a buture botoguru, du botoguruto boture, ure cewu a boturedu bito, du enari bokware
Ia a buture moto pemegarewuto. Ricodure, ure turugadu, enari boture, du ia aregodure trinta kae, ia aregodure sessenta kae, ia aregodure cem kae
Icare akore: - Biajarewu, mearudumode
Dukeje icare, tuiedui tuginoi dukeje, nowu jeture oieiwuge, mare ure joruduwadowuge enoragodure ji inoba nowu bakaru jiba akoino
Icare akore ei: - Taire boe biarewu Pao o boe pemegarewu kogadodure, mare okwacere awu inodu pijiwuge eire boe emagore awu inodu jameduji bakaru tabo
Awu inodu tabo, etaiwore tuioruduka dutabo, emearudure tukai pawuje dutabo, tukai tubemegado, dukoiare ero pegarewu butugugodae bokware
Icare akore ei pugeje: - Takare awu bakaru pawuje?
Ure boe a tuguwu ure nono ure Pao bataru aododureu rema
Cewu ia a buture awara kejedu ure nono cewu mearudure Pao bataru jiwu, mare mearudui jitu keje kuri je, Aroe pegarewu aregodure, ure tawuje piji
Iage ere nono cewu a buture toripegatowu reore, tumearudui jitu keje ere tugeragu ji tuiegare tabo
Mare ukwa bokware dukoia, ukwa rekare kao dukoiare, eroiwakare pudabo, icare ia boe pegarewu, boe etonare puiwu aregodure nowu bakaru koia ma, erore domi domi je
Iage pugeje, a makudure etai botoguru tada: emearudure Pao bataru ji
Mare awu moto kejewu boe ero boe ego boe, boe ewiapagai toroe kurireu bogaidu, boe emeardae pegarewu boe, ure inodu okwadu, dukoia otojiwu boe pemegarewu bokware
Cewu a buture moto pemegarewu kejewu ure nono mearudure bataru jiwuge, ere tugeragu ji, duwu otojiwu boe pemegarewu ure trinta, ure sessenta, ure cem tubemega tabo. Jorugu jiwu bakaru
Akore ei jamedu: - Boe emodukana jorugu mugudo ruwobo kuda, iarema kamorewu kuda? Kode mugudodumodukare jorugu tumuga keje karega?
Ia jetu biadodureu jamedu boe, jetu biadodumodukare. Nowu boe enogwa podure jiboe jamedu boe, awadudodumode jamedu
Biajarewu mearudumode
Akore pugeje: - Tamearudu awadudo tai nowu tamearudure jiboeji. Tago boe remagudu reorere taremagudodumode jamedu, du kodumode gu tugori
Oroerewu, ia makudumode pemega ai pugeje; ia boekare apowu, ure tu apoboe arudumode piji. Boe a boturedu jiwu bakaru
Akore jamedu: - Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono cewu imedu magai boe a roto ja ja toro moto joki reore
Boecodure, undure, barogwa kododu tabore ure turagojedo. Nowu inodu tonaji, cewu ure tuguboe boture, ukadui boe pa dutabo
Paga karega moto taobiji rugadure ure botudo, ure ira botudo, du a makaguragare cirato
Icare, kidure dukeje, ure jepara to ji, mare paga karega, boe aregodure boewo tugeragu ji du kae dukodi. Mostarda a jiwu bakaru
Akore jamedu: Kakoduwuba pamode remagu Pao o boe pemegarewuji? Iarema kakoduwu bakaruba pamode jebato nowu inoduji?
Ure nono mostarda a biega reore du, tugudure dukeje, a biegarogu remawure areboe jamedu boe kori
Mare a tugudu rekodaji, ricodure, kurire nowu tugudure nono boe jamedu boe kori, iturare tumaedo, du inodu koia, kiege barege ere tamudo utugu tada
Ure Pao bataru kogado ei makarewu bakaru tabo, awuge ekodaji rugadu, uwo nono eroiwa reore bogai
Makore ei, mare tu bakaru tabo. Mare nowu ture joruduwadowuge ei, ure jamedu boe kogadu tu tuginoi. Jesus ure pobo bakuru maerewu butugugo
Nowu meri rekodu tabo, akore ei: - Pawo pagado toro bakowuto
Boe eedui nono dupiji ere Jesus kodudo pudabo, nono tumagai du reorere, ika kurireu tada. Ia ikadoge ekodure meji
Nowu inodu tonaji, ia boe pegarewu ure tudowuje. Dukodiwu koia ure pobo barigu ika kurireuto, dukoia okorobadugodure pobo tabo
Jesusrema padure ika kurireu opo jaogwai, tunu tabo, tao kudawu keje. Ere jetadudo, egore ji: - Cegimejera, aromodukare gara gara cai pawogwagodure duji?
Icare ure turagojedo, makore bakuruji, makore pobo maerewuji, akore: - Ieripo! Urugadu! Icare bakuru akedure, boe motureunure pugeje
Icare akore ei: Mure, tabagudu remawu radure. Tameartoru bokwa kimo rabodu
Enogorobadure tubagudu koia, egore jice woje pui: - Kakoduwu imedubao? Duwu bakuru, pobo maerewu emeartorure bataru ji?
Ere pagado kuruga okwa bakowu kae, Gerasa kejewuge eno moto kae
Ei turawuje ika kurireu piji dukeje kuri je, ia imedu Aroe pegarewu metui tadadu ure tuiebu bireuge eiao piji, kodure jice Jesus togi
Mugu mugure aroe eiao kao, boe eroiwakare tuwo ieragogudo, jamedu meriri iku tabo karega jamedu
Ica, boe erore ino ji, mare ure rugadu kado kado, iaboe iaboe eroiwakare ji
Boe jameduji, meri jameduji meru merure bireuge eiao kao, tori raireu boe kao, toiogwari tabo, tui togorido tori boe tabo
Boekarema, tuiorudui Jesus ji jaegiri dukeje, rekodure jice togi, ure tubujodo ji, makore ji toiogwari rakarewu tabo
Akore: - Kaba jiba akaidure ii, Jesus, Aroe Eimejera baru tadawu Onaregedu? Inogwamagudunure ai Pao ie tabo, arokaba ia aro ii
Paga karega, Jesus akore ji: - Aroe pegarewu pegarewu, atawuje nowu imedu piji
Dukejere Jesus unoragodure ji: - Inoba akiere? Akore: - Ikiere makarewuge, oinodu rema, cemagaguragare kodi
Enogwamagudure ji ukawo tuwarigu nowu tumugurewo piji
Boekarema, jugorewuge enogwagere nono torekodu parugajeje
Icare nowu Aroe pegarewuge emagore ji, enogwamagudure ji, egore: - Cedudo jewu jugorewuge etae, cewo cedugu eto
Jesus udo ino rugadu. Kodire Aroe pegarewuge ere tudawuje, ere tudugu jugorewuge eto. Nowu makarewuge ei 2.000 cedu, ere tuwarigu pobo maerewuto, ewogware poboto, ewire
Icare cewu jeture nowu jugorewuge eiwuge, eregodure, ereadodure nowu boerewoji nowu bakurireu tada, oiei jamedu

Icare ere tuburedo jice Jesus ji, eerudure cewu Aroe pegarewu meture tadawu mugui tu, ukudawu aroia padui kejeduji, du kioroi tu je duji, emaia cewu Aroe pegarewu makarewuge emedure tada. Icare epagudugodu ure tubodo ebo
Jorudureuge enogwa jeture nowu Aroe pegarewu meture tadawu jiboeji, nowu jugorewuge eiboeji jamedu
Kodi icare nowu boe enogwamagudure ji uwo turodo oino nowu eno moto piji
Ui taredo ika kurireuto du tonaji, cewu ure Aroe pegarewuge etawuje pijiwu imedu aregodure mato ae, togwamaguduwo ji umode tugodudo apo du bogai
Mare Jesus akore ji: - Umodukare ino. Atumode awai kae, toro awobe etae, areadoduwo Pao ro pemegarewu kurireuji, inoba okudure akabo duji ewiegai
Kodi icare uture, icare readodure nowu bakurireuge etada Jesus ro pemegare puduiboe jamedu boeji. Kodi icare nowu boe erore ta... je. Jairo okwamagudae
Jesus ure pagado bakowu kae pugeje, dukeje boe makerewuge ere tudo pui ae pugeje
Mugure pobo maerewu okwai, dukeje, sinagoga kejewuge ia eimejera iei Jairo cedu, kodure ae, ure tuwarigu jice bure paru
Okwamagudure ji, akore: - Itonaregedu aredu okwa puredugodu. Mato, awo akera bu keje ma, bi kawo, mare jewo pugeje
Jesus kodure apo, boe makarewuge ekodure apo tuioi tu keje dutabo
Kode, arire turopegado ia aredu jitu, jorui ikera pudogidure iwurekoto pobe taci jedu, muguradu nono
Jiwo kuricigore jorubokuru epage brae ekera keje, tui toroe jamedu maku etai dutabo, tuiorudukai tu tugiwaripomodedu bogai, mare tubegagodui gu gu je duji
Tumearudui Jesus akaru jitu keje, kodure jice rekodaji, boe makarewuge ekao, icare iera jeture ukudaeji
Akore pudui taobiji: - Ikera jetumode ukudae okwaroguji ma, ipemegagodumode
Nowu inodu tonaji kuri je, nowu epae akedure taci je, ure boe pa tuie turugadu duji
Du tabore icare Jesus ure boe pawuje kuri ia turo rakarewuie tudawuje tubiji duji. Ure tuie kirimi nowu boei, akore: - Ioguduba iera jeture ikudaeji?
Nowu ure joruduwadowuge egore ji: - Aerudunure oino awu boe makarewuge eioi tu awugeje duji, mare du inodu tabo anorare: - Ioguduba iera jeture ii?
Icare ure tuiemaedo toiei tuioruduwo ioguduba ro oinodu bogai
Kode, nowu aredu tamagadui tubagudu koia dutabore, joruduware inoba boeie pudui duji, ure tuwarigu jice bure paru kae, icare readodure biegai boe jokoduboe remawu jameduji
Icare Jesus akore ji: -Itonaregedu, ameartoraere akinorudo. Toro boe pemegai ai dutabo. Akogodae jamedu boere tuwuredo
Mako kimo oinodu otoi, ia aregodure sinagoga kejewuge eimejera uwai piji, tagoi: - Akonaregedu nogwaredurogu bire; kode kodiba amagomode pagimejeraji kimo?
Jesus, tumearudui inodu jitu keje, makore sinagoga kejewuge eimejeraji, akore: - Apagudu kaba, mare ameartorudo tu je
Ukare iaboe iaboe ekodudo pudabo, mare Pedro, Tiago, uwie João, tu je
