Ia tapira maiwu bararureu reko mato, bito jamedu: pawo kowuje, paegarewo
Mare paga karega, awu itonaregedurogu bire, icare jewodure; okware boeto, icare paerudure ji pugeje. Nonore icare ere tudo pui tureruwo, togwagewo tuiegare tabo
Nowu inodu tonaji, onaregedu codureu rakojere to boepa tada. Tui tugirimi dutabo, tuburedugodui baito dutabo, mearudure nowu enogwa akoji, ererui tuiegare tabo duji
Dukejere icare makore ia tudugareji, unorare ji inoba rakuduie boere
Du ure bie: Awiere tugirimi, aore tudugaregedo ia tapira bararureu bito, mare paga karega, jorudure ji pugeje, kogodukare, pemegare kodi
Onaregedu codureu korigodure tu je. Aidukare tuwo turemo. Mare uore tuiebu ae, akore uiagu turemo

Kodi icare nowu iparedu akore oino ji: Joru makaguragare imaragodui akabo duji, ikare imeartoru bokwado ia amagore jiboeji jii je du kare; du inodu tabo, akare ia barogorogu makinai iwo ia boe enogwage parudo imedage ebo dukare
Macare oinore icare awu akonaregedu ure tugirimi, tui akoroe jamedu barigu ro pegarewu areme ebo du rekodaji, dukeje kuri je are atugaregedo tapira bararureu bito ai
Icare uore joruduwado, akore ji: Itonaregedu, amugure jii itabo, inoroere emaboe jamedu boe akoroe rema jamedu
Kode, ure turugadu pawo boe enogwage parudo paegare tabo, mare paga karega, awu awie binure, macare jewodure; okwanure boeto, macare paerudure ji pugeje kodi
Jesus akore jamedu nowu ture joruduwadowugei: - Ia dukodi ia imedu oroe kuricigorewu ure ia imedu jetudo nowu toroeji pudae. Duwu rokare turugadu nowu oroe tabo. Dukodi icare imejera biedure ji
Kodi icare nowu imejera makore bogai, akore ji: Inoba arore? Imearudure aro boeji. Akogado ai awo inoroe makudure akaiboe makinai; mare paga karega, aetumodukare inoroeji pugeje kodi

Kodi icare nowu imedu ure tumeardae tugu nowu inoduto, akore pudui taobiji: Inoba iromode? Iorudunure oino ikimejerai itawuje awu toroe piji duji. Iwo boepa bu? Mare iroiwamoduka. Inogwamagudu kigoduwo? Mare ipogurure ce
Ioruduware inoba iromode boewo tugeragu ii tuwai kae du bogai, itui imaragodae piji dukeje
Kodi icare makore mito mito ukare toroe mori akedudo cimejera aiwugei. Unoragodure boetojiwuji: Inoba amode maku ikimejera aidu ure kimo?
Akore: Boekaguru jamode 100. Icare akore ji: Amara tabo, amugudo awo amode maku kimoboe tabo bapera atugodo: 50, oino ji
Dukejere icare makore iaji pugeje: Aki pugeje, inoba amode maku kimo boemode? Akore: Trigo jamode 100. Nowu jeture cimejera oroe jiwu akore: Akeragu ako baperaji, atugodo 80, oino ji
Nowu ukimejera je rore ta... ji, joruduwa monorewuji. Dukoiare Jesus akore: - Awu moto kejewuge eeruduware inoba tuwo tudo duji, jorugu tadawuge ekori, turoi tumedage ei duji
Inagomode tai: tagogududo boebo awu moto kejewu tagoroe tabo ma, Paowo tugeragu tai tuwai akedumodukarewuto
Pemegare biegareboe jiwu imedu pemegamode kurireboeji jamedu. Jamedu, pegare biegareboe jiwu pegamode kurireboeji jamedu
Kode, tabemegamodukare awu moto kejeboeji dukeje, ioguduba umode tumeartorudo tai Pao o boe pemegarewu tabo?
Jamedu, tabemegamodukare ia boe enoroeboeji ma, ioguduba umode tumeartorudo tai tagoroe boe tabo

Ia boe etugare umodukare tudo puibiji ia cimejeraji. Iadukare kodu kagirimode iaji, tumearudu kuriwo metuiaji, iarema umode tumagu boetojiwu ai, tui boe redugodudo metuia jitu tabo. Tamearudu kurimodukare Pao ji tamearudu kurii moto kejeboe jitu tabo. Jesus makoi ia bakarurogudogei pugejedu
Aró, kode, nowu fariseudoge, enogwakidu ierikadu, tumearudui akoinodu jitu keje, ere jarodo ji, ere boe eredugodudo ji
Icare Jesus akore ei: - Tagi tare taedorogodudo tai ime eegai. Mare Pao jorudure tawaboji. Mare paga karega, cewu ure turugadu ime eegaiboe, barigudureboere, jaroreboere ema Pao jekai
Boe eroiagudu, profetadoge ewadaru, ekodure jii João ae. Du inodu piji mato Pao o boe pemegarewu jiwu bakaru pemegarewu awadudodure. Ime eiamedu boe ere tubewudo pudui tuwo tugeragu ji
Du inodu tabo, awu moto, awu baru akedumode, mare boe eroiagudu jiwu ia bapera atugorogu okwamodukare mito tu je

Cewu ure tugera ra toreduje pijiwuge eiamedu boe tuwo tugeragu ia aredu ji pugeje, ero peganure; cewu ure tumugudo aredu barigudodureudo apowu, ro peganure jamedu. Oroe kurireu imedu mare Lázaro marenaru
Jesus akore pugeje: - Ia imedu oroe kuricigorewu, ukudae kurukurureu, kujagureu, kigadureu, okwagere tuge pemegarewuji meri jameduji, ocaro amogodure inodu tabo
Ia okwamagudu kigodureu ia marenaru ure jamedu, du padure nowu oroe kuricigorewu uwai poro okwai, moci kuricigore joki
Du akemore tuwo nowu oroe kurireu uke gigudurogu butui moto kaedu kowuje tuge boi koia. Arigaodoge enogwabidure nowu epaeji jamedu
Boekarema, nowu marenaru bire, cedodure tupadoge eigoia toro Abraão ae. Nowu oroe kurireu bire jamedu, icare tugududodure joruto
Tumedui tujebae pegarewu kurireu tada, joru tada, dutabo, aiwore baruto ma, jorudure Lázaro mugui Abraão apo duji

Du koiare oiogwarire, akore: Ioga Abraão, akogududo itabo, Lazarodo tugerako otorogu to co poboto, uwo ia butudo mato ikeru keje, uwo ikeru akodudo, mare paga karega, awu icebae roreru kuricigore ii awu joru tada

Mare Abraão akore: Itonaregedu, awiajetu moto kejewu boe pemegarewu jamedu boe makudui akai duji; mare Lázaro rema, boe pegarewu makudure ai. Dukoia jekarere, aidure woe, akirema amedure acebae pegarewu tada
Jamedu boe oiako raicigorewu kodure pagoiagi, dukodire ia woewuge etaidumode tuwo pagado toro tagae ma, eroiwamodukare; torowuge eroiwamodukare tuwo pagado mato jamedu
Nowu oroe kurireu akore: Kodi icare, ioga, inogwamaguduwo ai, awo Lázaro utudo ioga uwai kae, mare paga karega, iwiemagere ikera awubodure
Makowo ei ma, egurukawo iaogwai awu boe pegarewu jeta kae
Abração akore: Moisés, profetadoge, ewadaru padui bapera kejedu padure toro ebo, ewiapagamode ji
Nowu oroe kurireu akore pugeje: Boro, ioga Abraão, mare ia bireuge etumode etae tuwo ewie ma, emode tubemegado
Abração akore ji: Ewiapagamodukare Moisés, profetadoge, ewadaru ji ma, jamedu ia bireu jewodumode, mare emeartorumodukare rugadu
Jesus akore nowu ture joruduwadowugei jamedu: - Iaboe ekigodure boe erego turo pegarewuto rugadu, mare cewu ro rore oinowuge, boe korimode ei
Ure turugadu boewo ia tori motudu kurireu kogudo nowuge eidoru kajeje, ewariguduwo toro pobo maerewuto, mare tuwo awu ia pitorirogu reko boe pegarewuto dure ema karega
Tagi, taeto tai: awie ro pegamode ma, amagodo ji. Umode tuiedorodo ma, awudugugo ji

Ro pegamode ai ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto, meri jameduji, du aregodumode akae ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto meri jameduji jamedu, tagoi oino dutabo: Ire iro pegarewu pijido oino ma, awudugugodumode ji. Boe emeartorae
Apostolodoge emagore pagimejeraji: - Cegimejera cemeartoru ko tao kae
Pagimejra akore: - Tameartoru umode nono ia mostarda arogu biega tu je du reore ma, tamagomode awu oko iji: Atawuje toro pobo maerewuto. Ema meartorumode tawadaru ji rugadu. Ia boe etugare romodedu

Jesus akore awu bakaruji ei jamedu: - Ia imedu utugarere ia, du ure jetudo to boepaji tagu tapiradogei jamedu. Meri rekodu tabo, nowu utugare ui tugirimi tapiradoge epiji dukeje, ukimejera makokare kuri ji: Mato, awo amugudo ira keje
Mare paci oino, akomode ji: Ike mugudo ira keje inai, inogwagewo, ikuduwo jao; dukejere akogwagemode, akudumode. Oino ji
Cewu utugare pagamodukare iaboe iaboe bogai pugeje nowu inodu morice

Awu inodu reorere tamode jamedu: tai taroiagudu jamedu boe akedudo dukeje, tagagomode: Cerore nono boe etugarege ereore. Ceroro nono ceroiagudu reore tu je. Jesus ui ia moci bare jiwuge ei ikera pudogiduredu pemegago
Tumeru kimoi Jerusalém kae dutabo, Jesus kodure Samaria, Galiléia enogwa joi pugajejedu oiagi
Tuioi ia baboturoguto dukeje, ia moci bare jiwuge ei ikera pudogiduredu etaregodure togi, ere tuwuredo du jaedo ji, enoiogwarire mato, tagoi oino dutabo
Cegimejera Jesus, akogududo cedabo
Jesus jorudure ei, akore ei: - Toro! Tawo sacerdote jorududo tai. Ekodui toro du tonaji, epemegagodure
Icare ia mito tu jedu, tuiorudui tubemegagodu jitu keje, ure tugirimi, tui tumago rakado, tuiegarei Pao jitu tabo
Ure tubujodo Jesus bure paru tui tuie bu moto keje dutabo, tuiegarei jitu tabo. Boekarema, ia Samaria pijiwu imedu rabodu
Jesus akore ji: - Pemegagodureuge ekare ikera pudogidure? Kaiba nowu amedage ei ikera pudogidure awogai mitotu epijidu ekodure?
Awu ia moto tuginoiwu pijiwu ure tugirimi mito tu je, tuwo Pao akaru kurido?
Dukodi icare Jesus akore ji: - Aragojedo! Toro! Ameartoraere akinorudo. Pao o boe pemegarewu aregodu
Fariseudoge enoragodure Jesus ji: - Inoba boemode dukejeba Pao o boe pemegarewu aregodumode? Jesus akore ei: - Pao o boe pemegarewu aregodumodukare nono ia boe eerudure jiboe reore
Boe egomodukare: Emareo, emarice, inodu umodukare, mare paga karega, Pao o boe pemegarewu mugure tadoda marigudu
Ia boi pugeje, ure inodu kogado nowu ture joruduwadowuge ewiegai: - Boe aregodumode tagaidumode taeruduwo Imedu Onaregedu o meri ji, mare taerudumodukare ji
Dukejere boe egomode: Emareo, emarice. Tagaba taebu. Jamedu tadu kaba eregodaji
Mare paga karega, boe jeragudu ro magai boe jamedu boeto du reorere Imedu Onaregedu o meri jiwu umode jamedu
Mare boetoji jiwo kuricigomode, barigududodumode pudui awu boe eigoia
Imedu Onaregedu aregodu umode nono Noé upagai pobo maerewu bogai du reore
Boe enogwagere, ekudure, ere tuwiredo, ere tugogedo jii Noé ui turemo to ika kurireuto du kae. Dukejere butao maerewu aregodure du pore eeda kedodo
Lot kodiwu kejedu kodiboe reore jamedu: Ime eegarere pudui, ere akirodo boeji, ere akirodo boe tabo, ere boe a tugu, ere baidoge emugudo jamedu
Lot utui Sodoma piji jiwu meri ji, joru mare enxofre buture baru piji, ure boe eiamedu boe eeda kedodo
Du reorere Imedu Onaregedu umode towadudo jiwu meri umode

Nowu meri keje, ia boe eedumode tuwai boarewu aogeje, enoroe pemegarewu jetumode ewai tada ma, emodukare turemo tuwaito tuwo tugeragu ji; rakojere to boepa tadawuge emodukare tugirimi tuwai kae jamedu
Tawiabutudo boere Lot oreduje jitu kae
Meardaere tu puduiwuge ewogwamode, mare biagodure tubijiwugerema, Pao umode edo cinorudo
Inagomode tai: Nowu boe kodiwu boecoji, iage emode pobe tuba keje: ia tawujedumode, ia pijidodumode
Areme emode pobe tugaiborigodu tabo: iarodo tawujedumode, iarodo pijidodumode
Ime emode pobe boepa tada: ia tawujedumode, ia pijidodumode
Nowu ure joruduwadowuge enoragodure ji: - Cegimejera, kaiba nowu inodu umode tudowuje? Akore ei: - Ia bireu padumodewo keje, pobureuge emode tudo pui ae
Jesus ure ia bakarudo oino, tuwo ture joruduwadowuge eeruduwado enogwamaguduwo tu tu tubaru tabo, ekawo nowu inodu pijido
Ia bakurireu tada ia brae eimejera rakojere, du pagudukare Paoce, meartorukare iaboeji iaboeji jamedu
Nowu bakurireu mitodu tada, ia aredu oredu bokware pijiwudo rakojere jamedu, duwudo aregodu kigodure kuri kuri ae tagowo oino jitu bogai: Aeto ii onare iiwu piji
Mare boe raire aidukai tuwiapagawo akoi pudui duji; du inodu oto keje ure tumeardae tugu nowu inoduto, akore: Ipagudukare Aroe Eimejerace, imeartorukare imei
Mare awu aredu re maere itae, dukoia iwiapagamode ji; umodukare ino ma, umodukare togwa ra turoi itae dupiji
Pagimejera akore jamedu: - Tamearudure awu brae eimejera akoi oino duji?
Aró, kode, Pao biapagamodukare toge enogwamagudu maei puduiwugei? Umodukana tugerabraredo ei kuri je?
Inagomode oino tai: Pao umode tugerabraredo ei kuri je rugadu. Mare Imedu Onaregedu aregodumode dukeje, jorudumodukana boe emeartoraeji awu moto keje? Fariseu mare publicano
Jesus makore ia bakaruji pugeje. Awu tagoino dutabo makomode cewu ure tojarodo pudui tubemegaiedu jiwuge, ei turodo tuwo ia boe ewarigodudo pudui du bogai,
Akore: - Ia ime ei pobedu erudure Pao uwai kae tumagowo baruto. Fariseure ia, publicanore ia

Fariseu makore Pao ji turagoje tabo, akore oino tudada: Inure tukutaido ai, Ioga, mare paga karega, ikare nono ia ime ereore kodi, duwugere iwogu kigodureuge, jetorokare pudumiwuge, jerebari kigodureugere; jamedu ikare nono jewu mugure oinowu publicano reore jamedu
Itodorogare pobe semanaji; ire inoroe jamedu boe mori bu tuwugeje ikera pudogidu reore tu tu je
Publicanorema, rakoje jaere woje du, kidakare tuwo tuie awogado baruto, mare ure tugera to tumoji, akore: Ikimejera Aroe Eimejera, akogududo itabo, mare paga karega, ro pegarewunure imi?

Inagomode tai: Awu imedu ure tugirimi tuwai kae tubemegare dutabo, mare cewu metuia karega. Mare paga karega, cewu ure tuguridowuge eiamedu boe, ewiega toridodumode. Mare cewu ure tuwiegado tu jewuge ekuridodumode. Jesus mare boe etore kugure
Dukejere icare iaboe etaregodure mato Jesus ae boe etore kugure ebo, iera jetuwo ei du bogai. Mare ure joruduwadowuge, tuiorudui nowu inodu jitu keje, ekorigodure ei
Mare Jesus makore etae, akore: - Boe etore kugure etudo itae rugadu, tagaba etu bokwado itae. Mare paga karega, aidure Pao orewo pudumiwuge, emode tudo nono awu boe etore kugure ereore
Boe jokodu jire imode awu inodu awadudo tawiegai: meartorukare nono boe etore kugure emeartoru reorewuge, emodukare turemo Pao o boe pemegarewuto. Imedu oroe kurireu
Dukodi icare ia imedu, kodure tumedage ekoriwu ia judeu, makore Jesus ji, akore: - Cegimejera pemegarewu, inoba iromode iragojewo jii Pao o boe pemegarewu tada du bogai?
Jesus akore ji: - Kodiba akagore ipemegaie? Iaboe iaboe epemegakare mare tu Aroe Eimejera rugadu
Aeruduware boe eroiaguduji: - Aerebarimodukare, amodukare boe ewido, akiwogumodukare, amodukare boe ewadaraodo, amearudu kurimode aoji, aceji
Nowu imedu akore: - Nowu inodu jamedu boe irore ino ikodui mai dutabo jii oino

Nowu bataru keje, Jesus akore ji: - Iaboe okwa kimore mito tu je akai kimo: akirodo akoroe jamedu boe tabo, maku marenarue etai, nowu inodu keje akoroe pemegarewu mugumode baru tada. Dukeje, mato itabo
Tumearudui nowu inodu jitu keje, nowu imedu kiarigodu kuricigore, mare paga karega, oroe kuricigore dukodi
Tuiorudui kiarigodu jitu keje, Jesus akore: - Oinoia oroe kurireuge bia remawure etai ewo turemo Pao o boe pemegarewuto
Camelo uwo turemo meriricira pororoguto du biare; mare bia remawure ia oroe kuricigorewu uwo turemo Pao o boe pemegarewuto du rema
Nowu biapagarewuge enoragodure ji: - Kode, ioguduba umode cinorudo?
Jesus akore ei: - Ime eroiwakare jiboe, Pao roiware ji
Kodi icare Pedro akore: - Akaiwodo, cere boe jamedu boe pijido cegoduwo akabo
Jesus akore: - Inagomode tai: Cewu ure tuwai, toreduje, tuwiemage, tumanamage, tuomage, tore, epijido, tumearudu kuri koia Pao jiwuge eiamedu boe,
makudu kurimode etai woe awu moto keje, dukeje, baru tada, boe pemegarewu akedu bokwarewu makudumode e
tai jamedu. Jesus makore tuwimode, tuiewodumode pugeje duji

Du inodu otobiji, Jesus ure tugeragu ure ikera pudogidure pobe taci ikera awubowutowuge, akore ei: - Icare parudumode Jerusalém bakurireuto dukejere profetadoge ere bapera atugodo Imedu Onaregedu jiboe jamedu boe umode tudowuje rugadu
Makudumode pegarewuge etai, erorerumode ji, egorerumode ji, emode barigududo pudui
Emode iwara to ji, emode bito. Mare merimode pobe ma wu metuia bokware dukeje jewodumode
Mare ure joruduwadowuge ekare awu inodu jamedu boe pawuje. Nowu bataru ure nono boe emodukare pawujeboe reore eegai, du nowu bataru kodiboe eroiwakare tuwo pawuje rugadu. Jericó kejewu joku bokwaru
Jesus ure tuburedo ia bakurireu iei Jericó cedu kae. Ia joku boekwarewu mugure awara okwai togwamagudu tabodu,
tumearudui boe makarewuge ekudururu kodui nono dukeje, unoragodure inoba raboduie boere
Egore ji: - Jesus, Nazaré pijiwu, kodure oino
Dukodi icare nowu joku bokwarewu oiogwarire, akore: - Jesus, Davi Onaregedu, akogududo itabo
Kodure otodaiwuge ere tumago okorido ji, egore mako kaiagu. Mare oiogwarire nowu egoi puduidu ao kae: - Davi Onaregedu, akogududo itabo
Jesus ure tuwuredo ca je, akore eiagu cedo mato pudae. Aregodui pudae dukeje, Jesus unoragodure ji,
Akore: - Inoba akaidure irowo ai? Akore: - Ikimejera, iokuwo tuiado
Jesus akore ji: - Aerududo. Apemegagodure ameartoru kodi
Nowu inodu tonaji kuri je, nowu imedu jorudure. Kodi icare kodure Jesus apo, tuiegarei Pao jitu tabo. Tuiorudui nowu inodu jitu keje, boe eiamedu boe ewadaru jerebarire Pao apo
Jesus ure turemo Jericó bakurireuto. Padui nowu bakurireu kajeje dukeje,
ia imedu oroe kuricigorewu iei Zaqueu cedu, mugure nono; boere tumuga toroe mori maku makai boe eimejeranure ema
Aidure tuioruduwo ioguduba Jesus rema. Mare roiwakare, boe enowarokare kodi, mare paga karega, rico koborigodure kodi
Dukodi icare rekodure boe makarewuge etododai, ruture ia ito tuioruduwo ji nono, kodui nono dukeje
Jesus taregodui nono dukeje, ure tuie awogado ma, jorudure ji, akore ji: - Zaqueu, arawuje, amara tabo, awuji ure turugadu imuguwo awai keje
Zaqueu ure turawuje tui tumara tabo dutabo, icare ure tugeragu Jesus ji tuwaito tuiegare tabo
Jorudure nowu inodu jiwuge eiamedu boe ewadaru pegare, egore: - Awu imedu ure tagurudo ro pegarewuge ewai keje

Nowu inodu boe oiado, Zaqueu ure turagojedo Pagimejera jokorai, akore: - Ikimejera, awu inodu otobiji, imode ikera bu taci inoroe pemegarewu oiado marenarue etai. Jamedu, ire iaboe enoroe roto u je dukeje, imode makudu kurido pobe puibiji etai pugeje
Jesus akore ji: Awuji Pao ure awu bai tadawuge ero pegarewu okwado, mare paga karega, emeartorure jamedu kodi
Awurema karega, Imedu Onaregedu aregodure tuiemaruwo okware boetowuge ewogai, tuwo einorudo
Tuiedu puredui Jerusalém kaedu keje, biapagare akoinodu jiwuge emeardaere Pao o boe pemegarewu umoduie towadudo kuri je duji. Dukodi icare Jesus ure awu bakaru oto tawuje pugeje
Ia boe kurire emawu ia imedu uture boe eeda moto jaerewu kae boe eimejera kurireuwo pudumi du bogai, dukejere tuwo tugirimi pugeje
Makore ia tudugarege ei pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, ure diierodo ikera pudogidure etai, tagoi oino ei dutabo: Akirodo boe tabo jii ii ikirimi du kae
Nowu ia boe eeda kejewu ime ekodu kagirire ji. Ere ia ime etudo pudae egowo: Cedaidukare cegimejerawo ema
Nowu boe eimejerai pudumi dukeje, ure tugirimi, makore cewu ture diiero makaiwu tudugarege ewogai, tuioruduwo inoba ere itodudo nowu inodu otobiji du bogai
Boetojiwu aregodure, akore: Ikimejera, ako diiero itodure ikera pudogidure pugeje
Akore ji: Pemega remawunure, itugare pemegarewu, aedorogodure boe biegarewu dukoiare, boe eimejeramode akidu makudumode akai, aetuwo bakurireuge ei ikera pudogidu reore duji
Rekodajiwu aregodure, akore. Ikimejera, ako diiero itodure ikera awubodure tu todobiji
Akore awuji: Aki jamedu, aetumode bakurireuge ei ikera awubodure duji
Ia aregodure pugeje, akore: Ikimejera, ako diiero meture woe, ire jetu otorogado aroiarogu tada
Mare paga karega, ipagudure ace, boe kori barikare ai kodi, are akeragu akare bu nono boeji, are akeragu akare tugu boeji
Akore bataru jipagi: Itugare pegarewu, awadaru koia irorerumode ai; aeruduware boe kori barikai ii duji, iie ikeragu ikare bu nono boe jituji, iie ikeragu ikare tugu boe jituji
Kode, kodiba akare ino diiero jetu diiero jeta keje? Ii ikirimi dutabo makududodumode inai cidodu tabo
Dukeje makore nowu jeture nonowugei, akore: O diiero aru piji, maku ore ikera pudogidureu ai
Egore ji: Cegimejera, awu ore ikera pudogidure marigudu, kodiba makudumode ai pugeje?
Cewu eimejera akore: Cewu orewuge eiamedu boe, ia makudumode etai pugeje, cewu ure tu eboboerogu jamedu boe arudumode epiji jamedu
Akore jamedu: Cewu kodu kagirire iiwuge eiamedu boe, aidukare boe eimejerawo imiwuge, erego mato, boe peagirido ekujiagi iegai. Jesus ui turemo Jerusalém todu
Nowu tuwadaru rekodaji, Jesus uture etododai Jerusalém kaewu awara ji
Tuburedugodui Betfajé Betânia kae dukeje, puredu tu torekodu iei Oliveira tadawu torekudu cedu jitu keje, Jesus ure ia ture joruduwadowuge ei pobe tu je du erojai, akore ei
Tadudo jewu bakurireurogu padui tadogidu kae. Tai taremo to dukeje, aerudumode ia jumentorogu okwa iku kogui nono duji, du iaboe iaboe ekare tumugudo keje roga; okwa iku kiwuje, reko mato itae
Iaboe egomode kodiba rakuduie tare okwa iku kiwuje ma, tagagomode oino ei: Cegimejera aidure ji kodi
Cewu ure joruduwadowuge ei pobe tu jedu eture toro rugadu, eerudure Jesus akore tuiorudumoduie jiboe jameduji rugadu
Ei tugeragu nowu jumentorogu jitu keje, aku remawuge enoragodure ei: - Kodiba taro oino?
Egore: - Cegimejera aidure ji kodi
Ere nowu jumento rugu arego mato Jesus ae tu je. Du aogejere ere tugudae aroia bu, ere Jesusdo tumugudo keje
Boe ere aroia baado Jesus kodumodewo awara ji otodai

Icai tuburedugodui torekodu iei Oliveira cedu, mugu puredui tu bakurireu jitu keje, nowu ure joruduwadowuge makarewuge ekodure apo, ere iogwarido Pao ji tuiegare kuricigorewu tabo, tuiorudui boe pemegarewu kurireu jitu koia
Egore: - Akaru pemegado Boe Eimejera aregodui Pao ie tabo; boe eegaredo baru tada, boe ewadaru ocarodo Pao ji
Nowu inodu tonaji kuri je ia fariseudoge enoragodure Jesus ji nowu boe makarewuge etoiado, egore: - Cegimejera, amago korido are joruduwadowugei emago kawo
Jesus akore: - Inagomode tai: Awuge emagomodukare ma, toridogere enoiogwarimode. Jesus oragudure Jerusalém joki
Jesus, tui tuburedo Jerusalemji pugeje dukeje, aiwore tu... okudure apo toragudu tabo dutabo, akore
Jerusalém, Jerusalém, itaidure aeruduwawo umode akinorudodu boeji. Macare aerudumodukare ji
Ia kodiboe keje, onare aiwuge emode bakuredo ai, emode taiado akabo, tui tubodo akabo jice woje jice woje dutabo

Emode apegado, emode akore eedui atadadu rugadu eeda kedodo, emodukare ia tori mugudo puaogeje du umodukare. Mare paga karega, akare boe pa Pao aregodui tuwo akinorudo du bogai duji. Jesus rakojei Pao uwai tadadu
Dukeje icare Jesus ure turemo Pao uwaito, ure boe kado ure boe akirodo toroe tabowugei
Akore: - Bapera atugododure oino: Iwaire boe emagowo iidu epare iwai rema. Mare tare udo nono arodureuge, okwarigudureuge eiaore
Meri jameduji Jesus ure boe eeruduwado Pao uwai tada. Mare sacerdotedoge eimejerage, escribadoge, boe eiemejerage eemarure tuwo bito
Mare eroiwakare inoba turowo ji, mare paga karega, boe eiamedu boe erore ta... tumearudui mako jitu keje kodi
Nuwuia meri ji, Jesus ure boe eeruduwado Pao uwai tada, ure boe ewie bakaru maiwu pemegarewuji. Dukejere sacerdotedoge eimejerage, escribadoge, boe codudoge etaregodure
Egore ji: - Amagodo cei kakoduwu ia ro rakarewu koiaba ure arodo ino? Ioguduba ure aro rakarewu makakai?
Jesus akore ei: - Inoramode tai iaboeji jamedu
Tamagodo ii: João Batista o boe etao pegododu, Pao pijiboe na? iarema ime enoe na?
Emagore jice woje pui: - Inoba pamagomode ji? Pagagomode Pao pijie ma, akomode: Kode, kodiba tameartorukare ji?
Mare pamagomode ime enoeie ma, boe eiamedu boe emode tori to pai; mare paga karega, emeartorure profetaie ure Joãoce rugadu
Dukodi icare egore: - Ceeruduwakare kakoduwuge epijiboeba
Jesus akore ei: - Jamedu, imodukare inogiegi kakoduwu ro rakarewu koiaba ure irodo ino. Boepa epage pegarewuge
Dukodi icare Jesus ure awu bakaru bu oino ei, akore: - Ia imedu ure boepa bu, ure ia ime eetudo ji, uture piji ia boe eeda jaegiriwu kae; boe raicigore ji toro

Boe aregodui pudae tuwo kado dukeje, ure ia tudugare rojai toro ture jetudo boepa jiwuge ewogai, ewo ture tugeragu jiboe ia maku tuwogai. Mare jeture boepa jiwuge erugodure ji, ere okorido ji, ere udo tugirimi tugera kedo tabo
Icare ure ia tudugare utudo toro pugeje. Ere nowu okorido jamedu, erorerure ji, ere udo tugirimi tugera kedo tabo jamedu
Ure ia utudo toro pugeje: Ere nowu okorido jamedu, ere utudo
Kodi icare nowu ore boepa cewu akore: Inoba iromode? Imode imearudu kurire jiwu itnaregedu utudo toro; emodukare tugera amagadudo ji
Mare nowu boepa epage, tuiorudui jitu keje, emagore pui: Awure jeonamode tuo oroe jamedu boeji. Kode, pawo bito, pagoroewo nowu oroece
Ere barigu boepa piji, ere bito. Kode, inoba awu ore boepa cewu romode ei?
Aregodumode, umode jeture nowu boepa jiwuge ewido. Umode maku iage etai pugeje. Tumearudui awu bakaru jitu keje egore: - Pao koiare ukado ino
Mare Jesus, tui tuioku kidudo tu ei dutabo, akore ei: - Bapera atugo akore: Ure bai mugudowuge ere pijidowu torire icare ema remawu rema
Buture nowu tori kejewu boe eiamedu boe, epeagiridodumode; nowu tori buture kejewuge, epeagiridodumode jamedu. Boe enoragodui boe enoroe mori jiboeji
Nowu inodu keje kuri je, sacerdotedoge eimejerage, escribadoge, eemarure tuwo tugeragu ji, mare epagudure boece, ere boe pa pudui raboduie akoinoduji, akoi nowu bakaru jitu keje
Dukodi icare enoebatodure ji, tui tudo nono tubemegaiedu kodiwore, tuwo tugeragu Jesus ji ia bataru boeji ma, tuwo maku brae eimejera ae
Nowu ime enoragodure ji: - Cegimejera, ceeruduware amago jetoroie duji, aie ure boe eeruduwa jetorogodudo duji, aie ure boe eeruduwado Pao aewu awara ji, akai boe etawuje pubiji dutabo
Amagodo cei: cemodukana boe mori maku brae eimejera ai, iarema boro kana?
Jesus, tui boe pa emeardae pegarewu jitu keje, akore ei
Iorududo ia diiero mito tu je duji ka. Ioguduba padure awu diiero meriri keje awu atugoreboe tabo? Egore: - César oroe reno
Kodi icare akore ei: - Kode, César oere emaboe maku César ai; Pao oere emaboe maku Pao ai jamedu
Nowu inodu tabo eroiwakare tuwo tugeragu Jesus ji ia bataru boe keje, boe eegai. Mare erore ta... makore jiboe jitu koia. Eroiwakare tumagowo pugeje
Ia judeudoge emedage epadui pumekejedu eiei saduceudoge cedu, emeartorukare bireuge ewodumode duji, du ia emage ere tuburedo Jesus ji, enoragodure ji
Cegimejera, Moisés ure bapera atugodo cenai awu inoduji: Ia uwirerewu imedu bimode toreduje piji, tukai toredo ai dutabo ma, uwie mugumode oreduje apo, duwuwo orere tumana bireu mugato
Aró, kode, umanamage ere ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto, du boetojiwu mugure ia aredu apo, mare bire piji ore bokwa tabo
Rekodajiwu mugure apo pugeje, mare bire piji pugeje, tore bokwa tabo
Dukeje icare pobe ma jewu metuia bokwaredu mugure apo pugeje. Du oinore icare ere puregodaji rugadu, duwuge ewire piji, tukai ia tonaregedu botudo ai dupiji
Inodu otobiji, nowu aredu bire jamedu
Kode boe eewodu keje, kakoduwuba oreduje umode ema? Mare paga karega, ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu etoredujere ema
Jesus akore: - Awu moto kejewu ime ere tuwiredo, areme ere tugogedo
Mare cewu Paore jewodudowuge, umode tugeragu ei baru towuge duwugere etuwiremodukare, etugogemodukare toro
Mare paga karega, ere nono tupadoge ereore, du ewimodukare tu pugeje. Pao orenure emage, Paore ewodudo kodi
Moisés ure bireuge eewodumodedu awadudo, makore botoguru mugui turugu tabo duji dukeje, ure awu inodu bu bapera keje tagoi: Abraão o Aroe Eimejera, Isaac o Aroe Eimejera, Jacó o Aroe Eimejera
Awu inodu ure pado boe pa, jerewuge enore Aroe Eimejera rema, bierewuge eno Aroe Eimejera karega. Mare paga karega, eiamedu boe eere Pao Aroe Eimejera ai
Dukodire ia escribadoge egore: - Cegimejera, amago pemegare rugadu
Kodi icare erigikare tunora kigoduwo ji pugeje. Jesus unoragodui boeidu
Dukejere icare Jesus unoragodure ei: - Inoba ure dukoiaba boe egomode Davi onaregeduie Cristo, cewu Pao umode rojaiwu?
Mare paga karega, Davi mitodu, nowu Salomão o bapera keje akore: Cegimejera akore ikimejeraji: Amugudo ikana pemegarewu jaogwai
Jii ii onare aiwuge ewu awure kuda du kae
Davi akore tugimejeraie ema, kodiba onaregedu umode ema? Jesus mare escribadoge
Boe eiamedu boe emearudure Jesus akoinoduji. Dukejere akore ture joruduwadowugei

Tamearudu awadudo tai escribadogei. Duwuge etaidure tumeruwo tugudae raireu tabo, boe eeruduwo pudui, etaidure boe ekimaduwo pudui ba oiagi, etaidure tumuguwo sinagoga tadawu boe emuga pemegarewu keje, boe emuga boetojiwu keje boe enogwagerewo keje
Duwugere ukoge bire pijiwu areme enoroe akedudo, tui tumago raicigodo baruto tuiaki dutabo. Dukodi icare Pao umode eiwo pega kuricigodo ei
Tui tuioku awagado dutabo, Jesus jorudure oroe kurireu boe ei ia toroe jetu Pao uwai tadawu diiero ja tada duji
Jorudure jamedu ia marenaru oredu bokwarewu aredu ui diiero meriri biegarewu ui pobe tu jedurogu tugu to jamedu duji
Kodi icare akore: - Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Awu marenaru aredu ukoge bokwarewudo ure bu torowu kodure nowu iage ekori
Mare paga karega, eiamedu boe ere toroe gigudu bu toro Pao ai, mare awudorema ure turoiwamode tu tabo pudaiboe jamedu boe maku toro. Jesus akore Pao uwai pegadodumode duji
Boe egoi aiwoiagu Pao uwai todui tori motureu tabo duji, ia boe enoroe motureu mori kurireu taboduji, dukeje Jesus akore
Ia meri aregodumode dukejere awu tagaiwore oino jiboe ia ri mugumodukare puaogeje; jamedu boe butudodumode . Boe ekorii boeidu, boe etonai boeidu
Kodi icare enoragodure ji: - Cegimejera, inoba boemode dukejeba nowu inodu umode tudowuje? Inoba boe emode tudo nowu inodu umode tudowuje du kae?
Jesus akore: - Tamearudu awadudo tai, taekuri pagadodu kawo. Makarewuge etaregodumode ikie tabo, tagoi: Imireo, iarema: Boe puredugodunure. Mare tadu kaba eregodaji
Tamearudumode boe emagoi boe erugodumode pui duji, boei tudo puapo duji dukeje, tabagudugodu kaba. Mare paga karega, nowu inodu umode ino jao, mare moto akedumodedu aregodukare kuri je
Akore ei jamedu: - Moto padui boe ebo tu tu jedu erugodumode pui
Moto amagadumodedu rakaguragarewu umode jice woje, jice woje; boe eke boimode boei; jorubo pegarewu umode boei. Ia boe epagudae emode tudowuje baru kajeje
Mare nowu inodu otodai, emode tugeragu tai, erorerumode tai, tui tadugu baicorewuto, tui tarego brae eimejerage etae iwugeje dutabo
Nowu inodu umode tudowuje taroiwawo tawo bakaru pemegarewu kogado du bogai
Awu inodu metu rakado tadoda tamorora amagadu kawo tagagomode tabaru tabo dukeje
Mare paga karega, imode ia iwadaru ro rakarewu maku tagai, du onare taiwuge ero rakamodukare ji
Ica, kode, taomage, tamanamage, tawobe, tamedage emode ia tawido du makaguragado
Boe eiamedu boe ekodu kagirimode tai iwugeje
Mare nowu inodu jamedu boe tabo, ia tagao ira okwamodukare tagaora piji
Nowu tabewui tai dukoia tagaregodumode tai taginorudo du kae. Jesus akore Jerusalém pegamode duji
Icai taerudumode utorigaraidoge ei bakuredo Jerusalém tabo dukeje, taeruduwado boe pegarewu puredugoduie ure duji
Nowu inodu boe keje, Judeia kejewuge eregodumode tori raireu boeto; jeture bakurireu tadawuge emode turodo oino piji; jeture boepa tadawuge ekaba turemo bakurireuto
Mare paga karega, boe ero pegarewu koiawu kodiwo meri reno, oinonowo jamedu boere bapera atugo du reore

Nowu kodiwu meri keje, cewu kuiarureu areme, tore enogwagiri kimorewu areme, eerudumode boe okori kuricigoji. Mare paga karega boe epagudugodu kuricigorewu umode tudowuje moto keje. Pao umode eiwo pega kuricigodo awu boei

Makarewuge ewimode toriga raireu tabo, iage eregodudodumode boe etugarei pudumi dutabo moto padui tu tu boe etai du reore du kae. Ia moto kejewuge ewure jomode Jerusalém keje jii boe aregodui boeidu kae. Imedu Onaregedu aregodumode

Jesus akore kimo: - Ia boe tuginoiwu padumode pugajeje meri joku keje, ari joku keje, kuiejedoge eeku keje. Woe moto keje boe ekiarigodae, boe epagudugodae umode tubodo moto jamedu boe tabo, pobo maerewu o pobuto jaruru koia
Ime emode nono tagedugoduiedu kodiwore tubagudugodu koia. Boe pegarewu, boe monorewu jogodui moto jamedu boe keje dukoia, baru romode toku je jamedu
Kode, dukejere icare boe eerudumode Imedu Onaregedu ui turawuje boetugu aogeje turo rakarewu tabo duji
Nowu inodu jamedu boe umode tubaru towuje dukeje, tadugu tado tagaora aogado, mare paga karega, Pao umode taginorudo kuri je. Figueira i
Ure awu bu oto keje pugeje, jeonawo nowu inoduji: - Tagaiwodo figueira iji, ia igurudogei jamedu
Nowu iguru aru aka botu keje tamode boe pa butao puredugoduie ure duji
Oino jamedu, taerudumode nowu inodu ui tudowujedu jitu keje, taeruduwado Pao o boe pemegarewu remawu puredugoduie ure duji
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Awu boe oinowuge ewogwamodukare awu inodu jamedu boe ukai tudowuje du otodai
Baru, moto, akedumode, mare iwadarurema akedumodukare. Boe emearudu awaduiagu puduidu
Tagire tamode tamearudu awadudo tai tamorora amagadu kawo tagogwage kuri koia, taeku bai bai okori koia, awu moto kejewu tamaragodae koia, duma nowu meri ukawo tugeragu tai tae paga inoduji
Nowu meri aregodumode nono bukigu barigudu magai moto jamedu kejewuge etaoto du reore
Kode, tagoebatodudo, tamagodo baruto meri jamedu boeji, duma tawo taginorudo nowu boe pegarewu jamedu boemode dupiji, taragojewo tabagudu bokwa tabo Imedu Onaregedu jekai
Merijire Jesus ure boe eeruduwado tu tu Pao uwai tada; boeco tabo utu uture torekodu iei Oliveira cedu kae, nonore padu padure nono jii barogwa kododu kae
Ba aregodu jamedu boe ereore, boe eiamedu boe etu eture Pao uwaito tumearuduwo Jesus bataru ji
Nowu amireu barigodu kejewu peta iei Páscoa cedu puredugodunure
Dukejere icare sacerdotedoge eimejerage, escribadoge, eemarure tuwo Jesus bito du bogai, mare epagudunure boece. Judas ui Jesus maku
Mare nowu inodu tonaji, Aroe pegarewure taredo ia iei Judas Iscariote cedu, cewu ure joruduwadowuge ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu ia mitoduto
Judas jemarure sacerdotedoge eimejerage, torigaraidoge eimejerage ewogai, tunorawo ei inoba turomode tuwo tugeragu Jesus ji tuwo maku etai du bogai
Eegarere nowu inoduji, egore diieroie tumode makai
Ema jamedu akore uie, kode nono rugaduie turomode rugadu. Dukodi icare jemarure inoba turomode tuwo maku du bogai, tukai boedo boe pa dutabo. Ei tugera pemegado Páscoa jidu
Nowu barodureboe metukare tadawu amireu o meri aregodure. Nowu meri keje judeudoge emode cordeiro bito tuwo kowuje Páscoa keje
Dukodi icare Jesus ure Pedro mare João erojai, tagoi oino ei dutabo: - Toro, tagera pemegado page Pascoaji
Enoragodure ji: - Kaiba akaidure cewo cegera pemegado ji?
Akore ei: - Tai taremo bakurireuto dukeje, taerudumode ia imedu ui pobo reko pori tabo duji. Tago apo jii umode turemo towu bai kae
Tagagomode nowu uwaire nowu baicewuji: Cegimejera unorare awogai: kaiba bai tadaba imode Páscoa ko ire joruduwadowuge ebo?
Umode taerududo ia toe meture tadawu puaogajejewu bai boarewuji. Nonore tamode boedu turugadu
Dukodi icare eture, eerudure Jesus akore umoduiedu reore duji. Nonore icare ere tugera pemegado Pascoaji. Páscoa kejewu boe enogwage
Boe aregodui pudae dukejere icare, Jesus ure tumugudo tu ira keje, nowu ture joruduwadowuge ebo
Icare akore ei: - Itaidu rakaguragare iwo awu Páscoa kowuje tagabo, iwomodedu otodai
Mare paga karega, inagomode tai: imodukare awu inodu kowuje pugeje, jii ui tudo turugadu Pao o muga keje du kae
Tui tugeragu parera kuru ja porigaborogu jitu dutabo, ure togwa kurido, dukejere akore: - Tageragu ji, pedo toro pui
Mare paga karega, inagomode tai: ikudumodukare parera kuruce pugeje jii Pao o boe pemegarewu aregodumode du kae
Dukejere icare ure tugeragu amireuji, ure togwa kurido pugeje, dukeje ure amireu kado, ure maku etai tagoi oino dutabo: - Ikodu reo, dure makudumode tawugeje. Oinore taromode tawiabutuwo iwugeje

Du reorere, tui kowuje ebo du rekodaji, ure tugeragu parera kuru jaroguji, ure maku etai, tagoi oino dutabo: - Pao ro maiwu ime etaidu kodiwu iku reo. Paore turo maiwu krucado iku tabo du redodumode tabaru tabo. Jesus akore ia ture joruduwadowu umoduie tumagu duji
Aró, kode, ieramode imaguwu mugunure ira keje itabo
Imedu Onaregedu utumode, uwo nono Pao uiagu du reore, mare marenarunure nowu umode imaguwu
Kodi icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge enorare jice woje pui ioguduba umode maku du bogai. Kakoduwuba boe ema remawu rema
Dukeje icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge enogwakorire pui kakoduwu ia pudumiba tugodumode tumedage ekori
Jesus akore ei: - Ao pegokarewu boe eimejerage erore nono boe eimejeragei pudumidu ero reore. Kodi icare boe eimejerage egore pudumie ro pemegarewugere pudumi
Du tagaba udo ino tadoda, mare cewu kurire tadodawu, umode tugo boi. Jamedu cewu ure boe eroiagududowu, umode nono boe enogwa kuridodaeie pudumi du reore
Mare paga karega: kakoduwu kurire: cewu mugure ira keje karega? Iarema cewu ure boe eke pedo boe eiwu kana? dutabo, iragojere tadoda nono cewu ure boe eke pedo boeiwu reore
Icá, tagire taedu kigodure itabo icebae boe keje
Dukodi icare Ioga magai ure boe eimejarodo imi du reorere, imode boe eimejeragedo tagi du maku tagai
Tagogwagemode, tagudumode ira keje itabo, tamugumode boe eimejerage emuga keje tawo tagogado Israeldoge ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu jiwugei. Jesus ure Pedro bie
Jesus akore oino jamedu: - Simão, Simão, awiapaga pemegado iwadaru ji: Ica, Aroe pegarewu okwamagudure tuwo bakujukodo tai boe magai bakujukodo trigo jitu reore
Mare imagore aparu tabo duma ameartoru bokwa kawo. Kode, ai akirimi iwogai dukeje, are aiodo awiemage ewugeje, ekidawo pudui du bogai
Pedro akore: - Ikimejera, ire ido irugadu ituwo baicorewuto akabo, iarema iwimode akabo jamedu
Jesus akore ji: - Pedro, inagomode ai: Kogariga akogodumodedu otodai, amode aeruduwa bokwado ii pobe ma jewu metuia bokware. Jesus ure ture joruduwadowuge ewie
Dukejere unoragodure ei: - Cewu ii tarojai tagodorabo bokwa tabo, tamijigu bokwa tabo, tawurekia kejewu bokwa tabo dukodi, iaboe boe okware tagai? Egore: - Boro
Akore ei: - Mare oino, cewu umijigorewu, akeragu ji, ukodoraborewu, umode tugeragu ji jamedu; cewu utoriga raireu bokwarewu, udo tugudawu bubutu epa maku uwo ia toriga raireu aru
Mare paga karega, inagomode tai: ure turugadu profetadoge emagore jiboe uwo pudumi kimo ii rugadu: Boe egore ia ro pegarewuie ure ema. Kode, cewu jeonare iiboe puredugodunure tuwo tudowuje
Emagore ji: - Cegimejera, ica, toriga raidoge ere pobe woe. Akore ei: - Urugadu. Jesus rakojei Oliveira kejewu torekodu kejedu
Cewu turoia reore, ure tudawuje turagoja piji, uture toro Oliveira kejewu torekodu kae. Nowu ure joruduwadowuge ekodure apo
Taregodui nowu kae dukeje akore ei: - Tamagodo tabaru tabo tawudu kawo Aroe pegarewu jaogwai boeto
Dukejere ure tudaru epiji boe magai ia tori barigu jece du oto pa du reore; ure tubujodo, makore baruto
Akore: - Ioga, umode turugadu akaidu reore dukeje, awo boe ekori iidu barigu ipiji; mare umodukare itaidu reore, mare udo akaidu reore rugadu
Dukodi icare, ia tupa aregodure baru piji tuwo mearudu awadudo pudui du bogai
Tugiarigodu kuricigo tabo, mako kimore baruto tubewui pudui dutabo. Biri akurure nono boe ekure joki moto kae
Nowu tumagoi baruto du akedu keje, ure turagojedo, uture nowu ture joruduwadowuge etae pugeje, boe karema, jeture pa ei enudui tugiarigodu kori koia duji
Akore ei: - Kodiba tanudure? Taragojedo. Tamagodo baruto, tawudu kawo Aroe pegarewu o boe pegarewuto. Boei tugeragu Jesus jitu
Emarema, mako kimore du kaere ia boe makarewuge etaregodure. Boekarema, eimejerare cewu ure joruduwadowu, du iere Judas cedu, aregodure Jesus ae tuwo togwabi jeto
Jesus akore ji: - Judas, kodiba akaidure awo imagu akogwabidui ii dutabo?
Nowu jeture oieiwuge, tuiorudui nowu inodu jitu dukeje, enoragodure: - Cegimejera, cemodukana cedaredo ei toriga raireu tabo?

Ia emage ui mito tu jedu, ure sacerdotedoge eimejera ia utugare okorido tui kana pemegarewu jaogwaiwu bia paru kado toriga rairewu tabo dutabo. 51. Kodi icare Jesus akore: - Urugadu. Aro kaba ino. Icare, tui tugera bu nowu imedu biaja keje dutabo, ure pemegago

Tui tuiekirimi bai sacerdotedoge eimejeragei, jeture Pao uwai tadawugei, boe codudogei, duwugere etaregodure icai tonagodui jitu kae du, akore ei: - Tagire tare tarodo nono tawo tageragu iwogu kigodureu imedu ji taroi toriga raireu tabo, ipo tabo, tawo tageragu jitu reore, mato itae
Kode, iragojere Pao uwai tada boe jameduji tagabo, mare tagare tageragu ii. Mare awu makudure tagaiwu meri reo; awu Aroe pegarewu o meri reo tarowo ino ii. Pedro ure tuioruduwa bokwado Jesus jitu
Dukeje ere tugeragu tu ji, ere reko sacerdotedoge eimejera uwai kae. Pedro kodure rekodaji, mare ure tuiedu jaedo ji
Boe ere jorugo nowu uwai bororo keje, ere taiado, ere tumugudo uru okwai. Pedro kodure etae, ure tumugudo nono ebo
Ia boe etugareredo ure pawuje mugui nono joru okwai duji, ure tuie puredo tu ji, akore: - Awu imedu rakojere Jesus apo jamedu
Mare Pedro ure tuioruduwa bokwado bogai, tagoi oino dutabo: - Aredu, ioruduwakare ji
Inodu rekodaji, ia imedu jorudure ji pugeje, akore ji: - Ia emage akireo jamedu. Pedro akore: - Boro. Imi karega
Du pugeje, ia aregodure pugeje, akore: - Boe jokodu, awu imedu rakojere apo jamedu, mare paga karega, Galiléia kejewunure ema jamedu
Mare Pedro akore: - Imedu, ioruduwakare akagoino jiboeji. Mako kimo inodu tonaji, kogariga akogodure

Pagimejera, tui tuiekirimi pai je dutabo, aiwore tu Pedroji. Dukejere Pedro biabuture Pagimejera bataru keje: - Awuji, kogariga akogodumodedu otodai, amode aeruduwa bokwado ii pobe ma jewu metuia bokwa reore
Dukodi icare Pedro uture nowu piji, oragudu kuricigore. Tugobaigarege ere boe to Jesus ji
Nowu inodu jamedu boe tada, jeture Jesus jiwu ime ewadarurerure ji, ere tugera to ji
Ere boe bu je keje, egore ji: - Akogiegi ure tugera to aiboei
Erorerure ji taidu reore pugeje. Jesus rakojei judeudoge eimejerage eegoraidu
Barogwa kododu tabore, boe codudoge, sacerdotedoge eimejerage, escribadoge, ere tudo pui, ere Jesus reko jice ture tudo puiwo kae
Enoragodure ji: - Amagodo cei: Cewu Cristonure aki? Akore ei: - Imagomode tawiegai ma, tameartorumodukare
Jamedu, inoramode tai iaboeji jamedu ma, tamodukare iwie jamedu, tamodukare itudo jamedu
Mare awu inodu otobiji, Imedu Onaregedu mugumode Pao ro rakarewu kana pemegarewu keje
Kodi icare eiamedu boe enoragodure ji: - Kode, Pao Onaregedunure aki? Akore ei: -U! Imi rugadu
Kodi icare ere tumago rakado, egore: - Panoramode iage ei pugeje? Kode pamearudunure oino jabiji
Icare emagoi puidu akedu kejere icare, ere Jesus reko Pilato ae
Ereadodu pegare biegai ji, tagoi oino dutabo: - Ceerudure awu imedu ui tuiagu boe erugo pui duji, ukai tuiagu boedo mori maku César ai duji, tagoi pudumie Cristore boe eimejeraie pudumi duji
Kodi icare Pilato unoragodure ji: - Akina judeudoge eimejera kurireunure aki? Jesus akore: - U
Dukodi icare Pilato akore sacerdotedoge eiemejeragei, nowu boe makarewugei: - Iorudukare awu imedu ia ro ako pegarewuji
Mare ere tuiodo keje tubeu tabo rugadu pugeje, tagoi oino dutabo: - Ure boe erugo pui, tui boe eeruduwado Judeia jamedu keje dutabo, jii Galiléia piji woe. Jesus rakojei Herodes jokoraidu
Tumearudui nowu ewadaru jitu keje, Pilato unoragodure nowu boei Galiléia kejewu umode ema du bogai
Kodi icare, tuioruduwai Herodes jeture jiwuge ia raboduie dukeje, ure edo reko toro Herodes ae. Boekarema, nowu meri keje rakoje rabodu nowu Jerusalém keje
Herodes jekare kuricigore tuiorudui Jesus jitu keje. Marigudu aidure tuioruduwo ji rugadu, tumearudu makaguragai ro raka jitu koia: upagare bogai tuioruduwo ia ro kurireu toduwo tuiegai duji
Unorare ji bogaiboe makaguragare. Mare Jesus makokare
Nono, sacerdotedoge eimejerage, escribadoge eedure nonodu, ere roiaododu kuricigodo tugorigodu tabo
Kodi icare Herodes ure tuwadaru pega kuricigodo ji, ure barigodudo pudui, utugarege erore ino jamedu. Ure boedo aroia kigadureu tugu ji, ure edo reko Pilato ae pugeje
Pilato mare Herodes epemegakare pui, du karega, ere tubemegado pui nowu meri ji pugeje. Jesus bitodu rumode
Dukodi icare Pilato ure sacerdotedoge eimejerage edo tudo pui, akore ei
Tare awu imedu reko itae, tagagoi koiaie ure boe erokowo pui dutabo. Mare inoragodure ji taegai, mare iorudukare nowu tagagore ro ako pegaie kodiboeji
Jamedu Herodes, jorudukarerogu biegaji jamedu. Mare paga karega, ure boedo reko mato pagae pugeje. Nowu inodu jamedu boe koia, bitodumode koiawo ia ro ako bokwa
Du koia imode edo barogo biri to jitu rekodaji, imode utudo
Boekarema, eroiare Páscoa jiwu meri keje, ure ia meture baicorewu tadawu tawuje etai
Dukodi icare boe eiamedu boe enoiogwarire tuiamedu tabo: - Awu bito. Barrabás tawuje baicorewu piji cenai
Marigudu ere awu imedu tugu baicorewuto, ui boe erugo pui, ure ia bito dukoia
Mare Pilato aidure tuwo Jesus inorudo. Dukodi icare makore ei pugeje
Mare enoiogwarire pugeje: - Bu i keje, bu i keje
Pobe ma awu metuia bokware Pilato makore ei pugeje: - Kode inoba ro pegarewure? Iorudukare bitodumode koiawu ia ro ako boeji. Dukoiare imode edo barogo biri to ji, dukeje imode utudo
Mare ere tubewudo tumago rakarewu tabo pugeje, padudoduwo i padui pugajejedu keje rugadu. Enoiogwari itodu remawure pugeje
Kodi icare Pilato aidure etaidu reore
Ure cewu emagore jiwu metui baicorewu tadawu ui boe erugo puiwu, ui ia bitodu koiawu iere Barrabás cedu, tawuje etai; ure Jesus maku tu etai, etaidu reore. Jesus padui i padui pugajejedu keje

Dukeje icare tugobaigarege ere Jesus reko. Tugodui apo du tonaji, eerudure ia imedu iei Simão cedu, Cirene moto kejewu, aregodui boepa piji duji. Ere tugeragu ji, ere i padui pugajejedu bu keje, oreduwo tabo Jesus rekodaji
Boe makarewuge ekodure apo, areme makarewuge ekodure apo tui tugera to tumoji, toragudui joki dutabo
Jesus, tui tuiekirimi tu ei dutabo, akore ei: - Jerusalém kejewuge areme, tagoragudu kaba iiogi, mare tagoragududo taiogi, tagore eiogi. Mare paga karega, boe pega kuricigomode tai kodi
Ica, meri aregodumode, boe egomode: Ore bokwarewu areme eiwa pemegare, ukare boe enogwagiridowu areme eiwa aidugirire jamedu
Meri aregodumode boe egomode toridogei: Tawududo cewugeje. Emagomode boe aoporudoge ei: Tarorido ceiogi
Mare paga karega, taerudunure eroi oino ii duji, kode, tagirema, inoba eromode tai?
Ere ia ro pegarewuge iwogu kigodureuge ei pobedu reko Jesus apo, ewidoduwo apo jamedu

Etaregodure ia egore Calvário ino jiboe kae dukeje, ere Jesus bu i keje nono. Jamedu ere nowu iwogu kigodureuge ere ewu i keje, ere ia okwacedo Jesus kana pemegarewu jaogwai, ere ia okwacedo kana koborewu jaogwai

Dukeje icare Jesus akore: - Ioga, awudugugo ei, eeruduwakare turo oino jiboeji. Tugobaigarege ere Jesus ukudae pedo pui. Ere cewu ewoadu ewoadure tabowu ira koborogu atugo atugoredu ere barigu, tuioruduwo kakoduwuba ukudae umode cewu Jesus ukudaece du bogai. Boe makarewuge eedure nono taiwo tabo. Sacerdotedoge eiemejerage ere tuwadaru pegado Jesus ji, tagoi oino dutabo
Ure iage einorudo. Kode, Cristo, Paore tugeragu ji pudaiwu rema dukeje, umode cinorudo taobiji
Du reorere tugobaigarege egore ji jamedu tui togwa amado jitu tabo. Ere tuburedo ji, ere ia pobo pagodureu makai,
tagoi oino dutabo: - Judeudoge eimejera aki dukeje, kode, akinorudo akaobiji
Aora bukejere ere awu bapera atugo bararedo: “Judeudoge eimejera kurireu”

Cewu iwogu kigodureuge ei pobedudoge ewararedui nono i padui pugajejedu jitu, ia mitodu, ure tuie tugu tuwadaru pegarewu boeto, akore ji: - Cristomode aki rugadu dukeje, akinorudo akobiji, ceginorudo jamedu
Mare metuia akore oino ji: - Apagudu bokwa remawunure Aroe Eimejerace, aki aiwore nono jiwo reore?
Pagai, awu inodu ure turugadu, paro pegarewu mori makudunure pagai; mare awu rema, ia ro pegarewu bokwa
Ure oto tawuje pugeje, akore: - Jesus, awia jeto ii, akaregodui aetumode jiboe kae dukeje
Icare Jesus akore ji: - Boe jokodu jire inagomode ai: Awuji rugadure aragojemode itabo baru tada. Jesus bi
Meri aregodu puregodure baru oia kae dukeje, boeco rorire moto jamedu boe joki jii meri jogodu kae
Meri joku core. Pao uwai tada aroia boa kurireu ure tuwowuje oiagi
Kodi icare Jesus mako rakarewu padure kajeje, akore: - Ioga, akera kejere ire itaroe bu. Tagoi oino dutabo, akurure
Tugobaigarege eimejera, tuiorudui nowu inodu jitu keje, ure Pao ie kurido tumago pemegai jitu tabo, tagoi oino dutabo: - Boe jokodu rugadu radu, awu imedu pemegare rugadu rabodu
Nowu boe makarewuge eiamedu boe eedure nono taiwo tabodu, eerudure nowu inodu jamedu boeji, dukejere eture tui tugera to tumo jitu tabo
Jesus metage mare ia areme ekodure apo Galiléia pijiwuge, eedu jaere taiwo tabo, toebatodu tabo nowu inodu jamedu boei tudowuje du kae. Jesus tugudui moto todu
Ia imedu jetororewu, pemegarewu, iei José cedu, judeudoge eimejerage ia mitodu
Jokare tumedage emeardae keje, jokare erore jiboe keje, Arimatia kejewu, Judeia kejewunure ema, du upagare Pao o boe pemegarewu bogai
Awu imedu pemegarewu, uture Pilato ae, okwamagudure ji tuwo Jesus rawuje i padui pugajejedu piji
Ure rawuje piji, ure ia aroia kigadureu upodo apo ure tugu ia ture porodowu torito, du boe emedukare tada kimo roga
Sexta feira meri rekodu tabo, sabadore tuiagu turemo dutabo, awu inodu ure tudowuje
Kodure Galiléia piji Jesus apowuge areme, ekodure José apo, eerudure Jesus meture tadawu toriji
Dukejere icare ere tugirimi tuwai kae, ere tugera pemegado ia roreboeji, ia boekaguru rorewuji. Mare sabadore jiwu meri ji ere tamudo, judeudoge eroiagudu reore
Semana jiwu boetojiwu meri ji, kuri boeco kimoto, Maria Madalena mare metage eture Jesus meturewo kae, cewu ture pemegadowu to roreboe tabo
Eerudure cewu tori padure je kejewu padukai je keje duji
Ere turemo to, mare eerudukare Pagimejera Jesus bi padui tada duji
Eeruduwakare inoba tumeardaewo. Du tonajire ia boe ei pobedu ere towadudo eegai tugudae kigadu kurukurureu tabo
Dukejere areme epagudugodure, ere tuie jodo mototo. Dukodi icare cewu boe ei pobedu eegore ei: - Kodiba taemarure bireuge ekao cewu jerewu bogai?
Padukare woe; jewodure. Tawia jetudo cewu akore tai, taragojei Galiléia tadadu kodiwoji
Imedu Onaregedu makududodumode pegarewuge ekera kae, padumode i keje, mare jewodumode meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje
Dukodire ewia jeture nowu Jesus bataru ji
Ere tugirimi nowu meturewo piji, ereadodure Apostolodoge ewiegai, ia boe eiamedu ewiegai, inodu jamedu boeji
Cewu ereadodure inoduji Apostolodoge ewiegaiwu areme reo: Maria Madalena, Joana, Tiago uce Maria, ia metage jamedu
Mare nowu ereadodaere ure nono ia aora bai baireuge ereadodaere eegai. Kodire emeartorukare

Mare Pedro rekodure toro meturewo kae, icare tui tuie jodo taiwo tabo, jorudure tu aroia kigadureuji moto keje. Du rekodajire ure turodo oino, uture tuwai kae tuieroi ta... nowu inodu jamedu boe ui tudo oinono duji. Emaús kaewu awara
Nowu meri mitoduji, ia ure joruduwadowuge ei pobe tu je du, eture ia bakurireurogu iei Emas cedu padu puredure Jerusalém bakurireu jitu du kae
Emagore pui nowu ure tudoboe jamedu boe
Emagoi pui nowu inodu jitu tonaji, Jesus mitodu ure tuburedo jice ei, kodure ebo
Eerudure ji, mare ukare edo boe pa pudui
Kodi icare unoragodure ei: - Kaba jiba tagagoino tagodui? Kodiba tagiarigodure?
Ia emage iei Cleofas cedu, akore ji: - Ia moto tuginoiwu kejewu mitodu aki kanao? Dukodi kana aeruduwakare boei maigodu Jerusalém tada duji?
Unoragodure ei: - Inoba? Egore: - Jesus Nazaré pijiwu jiboe. Cewu profeta ro rakarewu turo tuwadaru tabowu Pao jore keje, boe eiore keje jamedu du
Ceno sacerdotedoge eiemejerage, boe eimejerage ere maku bitoduwo, du ere bu i keje
Cegi cebagare emamode umode Israeldoge einorudo du bogai. Macare merire pobe ma awu metuia bokware nowu inodu jamedu boe rekodaji
Mare inodu tabo, ia pamedage areme ere cebagududo, mare paga karega, eture toro meturewo kae, meri rutumodedu otodai,
tuiorudukai bi metui nonodu jitu koia, ere tugirimi tagoi boe jokodu jitu tabo, tuioruduie tupadogei, duwuge egoe jeie
Ia cemedage eture toro meturewo kae, eerudure nono areme egore uie du reore, mare remawuji eerudukare ji
Kodi icare Jesus akore ei: - Tawabo raka remawunure tameartoruwo profetadoge emagore jiboe jamedu beoji
Ica, Cristo epaemode nowu tujebaere emaboe jamedu boece rugadu ma Aroe Eimejare uwo kurido
Dukodi icare ure Moisés makore jiboe, profetadoge eiamedu emagore jiboe jamedu boe padui bapera kejedu kogado ewiegai
Ei tuburedo nowu baboturogu ekodumode kaewu jitu keje, ure turodo nono taidui tugoduwo gu pugeje
Mare ere tubewudo ji, ere buredo, tagoi oino dutabo: - Aragoje rugadu cedabo. Meri rekodunure, boecodunure. Dukodi icare ure turemo ebo
Boekarema, tumugui ira keje ebo dutabo, ure tugeragu amireuji, imadure Pao ji, ure nowu amireu kado, ure pedo toro ei
Inodu kejere eekure tuiado, ere pawuje emaraboduie. Mare ema okware pi tuku je
Kodi icare emagore pui: - Dukodia nowu akoino awara jiboere pawabo jekaredo, tagoi pawiegai bapera atugo pemegarewu jituji
Dukeje kuri je, ere turagojedo, ere tugirimi Jerusalém kae. Nono eerudure Apostolodoge enogwa padui nono duji, cewu jeture ebowuge eedui nono jamedu duji
Eiamedu boe egore oino: Boe jokoduji rugadure Pagimejera jewodure, ure towadudo Simão jekai
Kodi icare emage ereadodure boere tuiegai awara jiwoji, jamedu tuie boe pa ji ui amireu pedo dukeje duji. Jesus ui towadudo ture jordwuadowuge eegaidu
Emago kimoi nowu jitu tonaji, Jesus ure towadudo etoiadoda, akore ei: - Boe butugureu jetuwo tagabo
Erore poku, epagudugodure emeardaere tuioruduie ure ia aroe jitu dukoia
Mare akore ei: - Kodiba tarore poku je? Kodiba tagidakare tawabo tada?
Tagaiwodo ikeraji, tagaiwodo iwureji. Cewu imireo. Tagera pagado ii, tagaiwodo ii: Aroe kodu bokwa, ra bokwa. Imirema, tearudunure ii oinoduji
Tagoi oino dutabo, ure eerududo tugeraji, tuwureji
Mare emeartorukare roga, egurure tuiegare kurireu jaogwai. Dukodi icare Jesus unoragodure: - Ia tagerogure nono tagabo iwo kowuje?
Dukeje icare ere ia karo kobo barigudui joradu ao kejedu makai, ia moiawe ewori kobo tabo
Kodi icare ure tugeragu ji, ure kowuje eegai

Dukejere akore ei: - Marigudu iragojei kimo tagabo dutabo, imagore tai: cewu padure Moisés o bapera kejedu, cewu padure profetadoge eno bapea kejedu, cewu padure salmodoge etadadu ii boe jamedu boe umoduie ino rugadu
Dukejere ure edo pawuje bapera atugo pemegarewuji
Akore ei: - Cewu padure bapera kejedu reo: Cristo jiwomoduie, mare meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje jewodumoduie bireuge epiji
Ie taboie boe enogituwamode boei tuwo tumeradae kirimi Pao ai, Pao butugugoduwo ei tui boe ero pegarewu okwado duji, Jerusalém keje boetoji, du rekodaji moto padui pumekejedu jamedu boe keje
Tagire tamode awu inodu jamedu kogado boe ewiegai
Imode cewu ioga akore tuiagu maku tawogaiwu rojai tawogai. Nowu inodu tonaji, tawudugudo jao bakurireu tada, jii baru tadawu ro rakareboe umode turawuje tawugeje du kae. Jesus rutui baru todu
Dukejere Jesus ure erego bakurireu piji, ia bakurireurogu iei Betânia cedu kae, ure tugera aogado ewugeje, ure tuwadaru pemegarewu bu ewugeje
Tui tuwadaru pemegarewu bu ewugeje dukeje, ure turodo oino taci epiji, ruture gu gu gu baruto
Ere tubujodo ji, dukejere ere tugirimi Jerusalém kae, tuiegare kuricigorewu tabo
Eedure jii nono Pao uwai tada, tumago pemegai Pao jitu tabo. J

Rakojere moto keje, koiare ure awu moto towuje, mare awu moto joruduwakare ji

João makore ji awu tagoino dutabo: - Awu jire inagore oino: cewu aregodumode iregodajiwu, emare kuri remawunure ikori, ema ure marigudu ikoda piji kodi
O boe pemegarewu makudure paiamedu ai, o boe pemegarewu joi puregodajitu
Paga karega, Moisesre boe eroiagudu maku boe etai, mare boe pemegarewu, boe rikireu aregodure mato Jesus Cristo koia

Awu inodu jire João akore, cewu judeudoge ei sacerdotedoge, levitadoge erojai Jerusalém piji enorawo ji: - Ioguduba akibao?

Akore ei: - Imire cewu mako padure boe makodu kajejeure imi: “Pagimejera utawara jetorodo” profeta Isaias ako magadu reore. (Is 40,3
Fariseudoge eigoiare erojaidodure
Enora kimore ji, egore: - Kode, kodiba are boe etao pegodo? Cristo karega ure aki, Elias karega ure aki, profeta karega ure aki, kode, kodiba aro aro oino?

Dure cewu aregodumode iregodajiwu rema, duwure icekare iwo bure tadawu okwa iku kiwuje
Awu inodure ure tudowuje Betânia keje, Jordao okwa bakowu keje, cewu Joãore boe etao pegodowo keje. Pao Aroe Eimejera o Cordeiro
Nowu meri rekodajiwu meri ji, João jorudure Jesus kodui pudae duji, akore: - Cewu Pao o Cordeiro reo, duwu koiare ure awu moto kejewu boe ero pegarewu okwado
Duwu jire inago inago oino: -Iregodajire ia kurire ikoriwu aregodumode, ure marigudu ikoda piji kodi
Ioruduwakare ji mare itaregodure woe iwo boe etao pegodo, duma awu Israeldoge eeruduwawo ji
Joãore awu inodu awadudo: - Iorudure Aroe Pemegarewuji, ure nono metugu reoredure, ui turawuje baru piji bukeje duji
Ioruduwakare ioguduba ure ema duji, mare cewu ure ido boe etao pegodo pobo tabowu akore ii: Cewu aerudumode Aroei tagurudo bukejewu, emare umode boe etao pegodo Aroe Pemegarewu tabo

Nowu meri rekodajiwu meri ji, João rakojere nono pugeje ia ture joruduwadowuge ei pobedu apo
Tuiorudui Jesus kodui nono dukeje, akore: - Cewu Pao Aroe Eimejera o Cordeiro reo
Nowu ure joruduwadowuge ei pobedu, emearudure akoino duji, kodi icare ekodure kuri Jesus rekodaji
Icare Jesus ure tuiekirimi pai ei, unoragodure ei: - Kaboba bogaiba taemarure? Egore ji: - Rabi (Cegimejera, oinodu jire egoino), kaiba amugure?
Akore ei: - Mato taerududo. Ekodure apo eerudure kaiba mugure, eedure apo nowu meri ji. Meri rekodugodu tabo rabodu
Nowuge ei pobedu, emearudure João bataru jidu, ekodure Jesus apodu, ia André rema, cewu Simão Pedro uwie
Duwure icare jeemarure kuri tumana bogai, akore ji: - Ceerudure Messiasji (Cristo, oinodu jire boe egoino
Icare uture apo Jesus ae. Jesus aiwore tu ji dutabore akore ji: - Jonas onaregedu Simão aki reo. Akiemode Cefas (Tori, oinodu jire boe egoino

Filipe buture Betsaida keje, cewu André, Pedro eno bakurireu keje
Icare Filipe jorudure Natanaelji, akore ji: - Ceerudure cewu Moisere bapera atugodo jiwuji, profetadoge emagore akaru jiwuji: cewu Nazaré pijiwu Jesus, cewu José onaregedure emawu
Icare Natanael akore ji: Kode, ia boe pemegarewu aregodumodukana Nazaré piji? Icare Filipe akore ji: - Mato, aeruduwo

Icare Natanael akore: - Kaiba are ipawuje? Jesus akore ji: - Filipe makomode ai du koda piji iorudure ai marigudu, cewu amugui figuiera i kuda dukodiwu kodi
Icare Natanael akore: - Cegimejera, Pao Onaregedu akireo, Israeldoge eimejera akireo
Icare Jesus akore ji: -Inagore ioruduie ai figueira i kuda dukoia ameartorure ii. Mare aerudumode kurire nowu kori pugejeboeji
Icare akore pugeje: - Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Taerudumode barui tuiado, Pao o tupadoge erudui, ei turawuje Imedu Onaregedu bukeje duji
Meri pobe ma jewu metia bokware dukeje, ia braere tugera maku puai, Galiléia kejewu Caná keje. Boekarema, Jesus uce rakoje radu nono
Emagore Jesus bogai, ure joruduwadowuge ewogai jamedu
Parera kuru ma akedu rabodu. Dukodire Jesus uce makore ji, akore: - Awuge eke parera kuru akedure
Icare Jesus akore ji: - Imuga, inoba akaidure irowo? Boekare turugadu ii roga
Dukejere icare uce makore nowu ure boe pedowugei, akore: - Tarodo nono ui taroiagudu reore
Aró, kode, pori toricedu mugure nono, ere ikera awubodure mito taci ikera awubowuto, judeudoge ekera kabidaece, ee kabidaece, boe remagudui tadawu pobo makare
Icare Jesus akore ei: - Awu poridoge enogorobadudo pobo tabo. Ere eiamedu boe enogorobadudo jii okwa kae
Icare Jesus akore ei: - Tawuje pugeje, reko jice ure boe pedowuge eimejera ae. Ere reko rugadu

Nowu ure boe pedowuge eimejera, tui togwapagado nowu poboi parera kurudo pudumidu jitu keje, tuioruduwakai kaibawu parera kuruba (mare nowu ure boe pedowuge eeruduware, pobore ere tawuje kodi), dukeje, makore cewu uwiredodureu ae, akore ji
Boe eroiare boei parera kuru pemegarewu maku boetoji du rema; icai jetugodui boei dukeje, boere beregadureu maku tu pugeje. Macare are parera kuru pemegarewu jetu otorogado jii oino
Awure Jesus ro kurireu boetojiwu rema. Ure towuje Galiléia tadawu bakurireu iei Caná cedu keje. Ure turo raka awadudo, dukodi icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge emeartorure ji
Inodu rekodajire icare ure turawuje Cafarnaum bakurireu kae, tuje apo, tuwiemage ebo, ture joruduwadowuge ebo. Nonore meri awarore tu ei. Jesus ui ure akirodo Pao uwai tadawuge ewarigu pijidu
Judeudoge eno Páscoa puredugodure, du icare Jeus ruture Jerusalém kae
Jorudure Pao uwai tada boei akirodo tapiradoge, ovelhadoge, metugoe ebo duji, jorudure ure akiró maku puibagiwuge eno iradogei jamedu
Icare ure bukigu iku opodo puapo, ure nowu barege ewarigu Pao uwai piji, ure cewu ure akirodowuge eno akiró roto ja toro moto joki, ure iradoge ewududo
Akore nowu ure akirodo metugue ebowugei: - Awu inoboe tawuje awu piji, tagaba akiró epage ewaido Ioga uwaice
Dukodire icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge ewiabuture cewu bapera atugore dukeje: - “Imearudu kurii awai jitu ure ikowu” (Sl 68,10
Icare judeudoge enoragodure ji :- Kaboba jiba amode ceerududo awu aro oinodu koia?
Jesus akore ei: - Awu Pao uwai butudo. Imode rakojedo pugeje meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje
Icare judeudoge egore ji: - Jorure 46 boewo awu Pao uwai towuje; akirema amode rakojedo meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje?
Makore Pao uwaiji, mare puduire akoino
Cewu jewodui bireuge epijidu rekodaji, nowu ure joruduwadowuge ewiabuture nowu bataru keje, icare emeartorure bapera atugore jiboeji, Jesus bataru ji jamedu. Jesus joruduware boe eiamedu boei
Jesus rakojei Jerusalém tada dukeje, Páscoa kodiwu keje, makarewuge emeartorure ji, tuiorudui ro kurireu makarewu jitu dukoia
Mare Jesus meartorukare ei, joruduware eiamedu jitu koia
Okeakare iaboe iaboe ewo tuwie ime eiboeji, paga karega, joruduware meture ime etadaboeji
Ia imedu iei Nicodemo cedu, fariseudoge etadadu, judeudoge eimejeranure emadu,

uture Jesus bogai boecoji, akore ji: - Cegimejera, ceeruduware akaregodui Pao Aroe Eimejera piji, awo ceeruduwado du bogai duji. Iaboe iaboe eroiwamodukare turowo nono aro reore, Pao rakoje kai ebo dukeje
Jesus akore ji: - Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino ai: cewu butukare pugejewu, jorudumodukare Pao o boe pemegarewuji
Icare Nicodemo unoragodure ji: -Kode, inoba imedu kuridogeduredu butumode pugeje? Umodukana turemo tujeto tuwoduwo pugeje?
Jesus akore ji: - Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino ai: cewu butukare pobo pijiwu, cewu butukare Aroe Pemegarewu pijiwu, roiwamodukare tuwo turemo Pao o boe pemegarewuto
Cewu buture imedu pijiwu, imedunure ema, mare boture Aroe pijiwu, aroenure ema jamedu
Ae ro kaba ta... je, awu inagore oino ai jiboeji: Ema remawu tawidumode pugejedu rema
Bakuru okwamudumode taidure jaogwai. Amearudure jaruruji, mare aeruduwakare kaiba aregodure, kaiba kodure jamedu. Nowu inodu reorere cewu buture Aroe Pemegarewu pijiwure
Icare Nicodemo akore ji pugeje: - Inoba boe eromode turowo oinono?
Jesus akore ji: - Akire joruduwa rakarewure aki Israeldoge etada, icare aeruduwa bokware awu inoduji?
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino ai: cemagore ceeruduware jiboeji, cere ceerudure jiboe kodiboe maku tagai, mare takare tageragu ji
Imagoi awu moto kejeboe jitu keje, tameartorukare. Kode, kodiba tameartorumode imagoi tai baru tadaboe jituji?
Iaboe iaboe erudukare baruto, tu nowu ure turawuje baru pijiwu Imedu Onaregedu, du rakojere baru tada
Moisés magai awagu aogado boe makodu tada du reorere, Imedu Onaregedu aogadodumode jamedu
Du koiawo meartorure jiwuge eiamedu boe ewi kawo
Paga karega, Pao Aroe Eimejera tumearudu kurii awu moto jitu koia, ure tonaregedu ui mito tu jedu maku, dukoiawo cewu meartorure jiwuge eiamedu boe ewikare, mare ure boe eedo jii jeboe makuduwo etai
Awurema karega, Pao ure tonaregedu utudo moto kae, mare uwo moto akedudo du bogai karega, mare koiawo ure motodo cinorudo
Meartorumode jiwuge ewudumodukare boe pegarewuto, mare meartorukare jiwuge, ewudure boe pegarewuto marigudu, paga karega, emeartorukare Pao Onaregedu ui mitotu jedu jitu koia
Aro kode, boe pegarewu reo: urugureboe aregodure moto kae, mare ime emearudu kurire boeco tadaboeji urugureboe kori, ero pegare dukoia
Paga karega, ro pegarewuge eiamedu boe ekodu kagirire joruguji, etukare urugu kae, boe eerudukawo ero pegarewuji
Mare ro pemegarewuge ere tugirimi urugureboe kae, nowu inodu tabo boe emode boe pawuje erore jiboe uie nono Pao aidu reore duji. Jesus mare João Batista
Nowu inodu otobiji, Jesus uture nowu ture joruduwadowuge ebo Judeia moto kae, nonore rakojere ebo, tui boe etao pegodo dutabo
Joãore boe etao pegodo jamedu Enon keje, puredu tu Salimji, paga karega, nono pobo kuricigore kodi. Makarewu boe etaregodure, etao pegododure jmedu
Nowu dukodi João barigudukare roga baicorewuto kodi
Boekarema, nowu Joãore joruduwadowuge mare ia judeudoge ewadaru pega pegare pui, nowu boe etao pegododu kodiboe koia
Icare eture João ae, emagore ji: -Cegimejera, cewu rakojere akabo Jordão okwa bakowu kejewu, cewu akagore boe jokoduie emawu, ica, unure boe etao pegodo, boe eiamedu boe etunure ae
Icare João akore ei: - Iaboe iaboe emodukare tugeragu ia turomode jiboeji pudae, makudukai baru piji dukeje
Tagi rugadure tamearudure inago oinoduji. Inagore: Cristo karega ure imi, mare imire irojaidodure otodai
Cewu oredu jerewu, oredunure ema, mare metuia imedu, rakojere nonodu, mearudure jidu, jekare kuricigore tumearudui oredu mako jitu keje. Imi jamedu iegare kuricigore awu inodu ui tudowuje dukeje
Ure turugadu imi iwiegawo, ema rema kuriwo
Aregodure cebojeboe pijiwu, emare kodure boe eiamedu boe ekori. Aregodure moto pijiwu, motonure ema, makore moto kejeboeji
Aregodure baru pijiwu, makore tuiorudure jiboeji, tumearudure jiboeji, mare iaboe iaboe emeartorukare ji
Meartorure jiwu ure boe jokodudo Paoie boe rikireure ema duji
Paga karega, Cewu Paore rojaiwu makonure Pao bataru remawuji. Paga karega, Paore Aroe Pemegarewu maku boe etai remagudu kadu tabo kodi
Pao mearudu kurire tonaregeduji, ure boe jamedu bu iera keje
Meartorure Onaregedu jiwu, jere jii jeboe umode apo. Mare meartorukare Onaregedu jiwu, jere jii jeboe umodukare apo, mare Pao okorigodae mugumode keje

Jesus joruduware fariseudoge emearudui boe egoe emaie ure boedo tudo pui, emaie ure boe etao pegododu maka remawudo João kori. 2(Mare ema karega ure boe etao pegodo, mare nowu ure joruduwadowuge emagere boe etao pegodo, kodi karega
Dukodi icare uture Judeia piji tuibagi Galiléia kae
Mare kodu rumode Samaria moto kajeje toro Galiléia kae
Dukodi icare aregodure ia Samaria moto kejewu bakurireu kae iei Sicar cedu kae, nowu Jacó ure maku tonaregedu José aiwu moto puredu tu je du kae
Nonore Jacó o motoia pobo kaiwu mugure. Icare Jesus tumedugodui tumeru raicigore dukoia, ure tumugudo tu, nowu motoia okwa keje, meri jetui baru oiadoda dutabo
Du kaere Samaria kejewu ia aredu aregodure tuwo tugeragu poboji. Icare Jesus okwamagudure ji, akore: - Ikududo ia poboce
Nowu ture joruduwadowuge eture marigudu toro bakurireuto tuwo akirodo iaboe boeji tugeje
Icare nowu Samaria kejewudo akore ji: - Judeunure aki, macare akogwamagudunure Samaria kejewudo ii, iwo akududo. Kodiba umode ino? (Paga karega, Judeudoge mare Samaria kejewuge epemegakare pui
Icare Jesus akore ji: - Aeruduwamode Pao o boe pemegarewuji, aeruduwamode ioguduba okwamagudure ai pobo bogai duji ma, aki akaobiji akogwamagudumode ji, umode pobo jerewu maku akai
Icare nowu aredu akore ji: - Cegimejera, are pobo tawuje taboboe bokwa, awu motoia raicigo jamedu, kode, kaiba amode akeragu nowu pobo jerewuji?

dure awu motoia po maku cenai, du kudure awu poce, ore ekudure ce, akuiee ekudure ce jamedu?

Icare nowu aredu okwamagudure ji, akore: - Ikimejera, nowu akagoino jiwu ia pobo makinai, pobo boi kawo ii pugeje, itukawo mato iwo ikeragu awu poji pugeje
Jesus akore ji: - Toro, amagodo akoredu bogai, akirimi mato
Icare aredu akore ji: - Ikoge bokwa. Icare Jesus akore ji: - Boe rugadu jire akagoino akoge bokwaie duji
Akogere ikera awubodure, awu mugure oino akabowu, akoredu karega, kodire amagore boe rikireuji. Icare nowu aredu akore: - Cegimejera, icare iorudure profetaie ure aki duji
Ceomage emagore Pao ji awu torekodu aogeje, mare tagagore Jerusalém kejeie boe emagomode Pao ji
Jesus akore: - Aredu, amearutorudo ii, boe puredugodunure boe emago kawo Pao ji ceboje, boe emago kawo ji awu torekodu aogeje, iarema Jerusalém keje du kae
Tare tabujodo cewu taeruduwakare jiwuji, cere cebujodo ceeruduware jiwuji; paga karega, Judeia kejewuge epijire umode boe einorudoboe aregodumode dukodi
Mare nowu kodiboe aregodumode, du aregodure, dukejewo upojó kigodureu ema remawuge emode tubujodo Pao ji tudaroe tada, boe rikireu tada. Paga karega, Pao aidure nowu upujó kigodureuge ei
Aroenure Paoce, dukodi icare upujó kigodure jiwuge emode tubujodo ji tudaroe tada, boe rikireu tada
Icare nowu aredu akore ji: - Iordiware Messias aregodumode duji (cewu iere Cristo cedu). Kode, aregodumode dukeje, umode ceeruduwado boe jamedu boeji
Icare Jesus akore ji: - Cewu akagoino jiwu imi reo, du imire inagore oino imago tabo ai

Nowu inodu tonaji, nowu ure joruduwadowuge etaregodure, erore ta... tuiorudui akoi tumago tabo ia aredu ji tuji. Mare ia emage egokare ji: - Kaba jiba anorare ji? Iarema: - Kaba jiba amagore ji? Inodukare. 28. Cewu aredu uture tubori piji nono, uture bakurireuto, makore nowu tadawu imei
Akore: - Mato taeruduwo ia imedu ji, du readodure iwiagai iro jamedu boeji. Cewu Cristo, ino jiwu, umodukana?
Eture bakurireu piji Jesus ae
Du inodu tada nowu ure joruduwadowuge enogwamagudure ji: - Cegimejera, akogwagedo
Mare akore ei: - Ia ikere, mare taeruduwakare ji
Icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge enorare jice woje pui, egore: - Ia boe kana ukerogu arego mato bogai?
Icare Jesus Akore ei: - Ikere iromode nono ure irojaiwu aidu reore du rema, iwo maragodae poru kororogo tu je du rema
Tagagokare arimoduie pobe puibiji dukejeie boe emode tugeragu boepa tadaboeji? Icá, kode inagomode oino tai: Tae aogado, tagaiwodo boepadogei: tadaboe kidunure, ure turugadu kadoduwo
Cewu ure boepa tadaboe kadowu mori makudumode ai, du umode boepa tadaboe to pui jere jii je boe kae. dutabore ure boe a tuguwu, ure kadowu, eegaremode puapo
Du ure nono boe egore: ure boe tuguwu ure tuginoi, ure kadowu ure tuginoi
Ire tarojai tawo boe kado iage emaragodure mariguduwo keje; iage emaragodure, tare taremo emaragodaeto mariguduwo keje; iage emaragodure, tare taremo emaragodaeto
Nowu aredu bataru koiare makarewu Samaria kejewuge emeartorure, cewu makoi ei dukodi: Makore ii iro jamedu boeji
Dukodi icare Samaria kejewuge eture ae, enogwamagudure ji rakojewo pudabo. Kodi icare rakojere ebo meri pobe
Kodi icare iage pugeje makarewuge emeartorure ji makore ewiegai boe koia

Icare emago emagore nowu aredu ji: - Ica, mare awadaru koia karega cemeartorure, cegi rugadure cemearudure ji ceeruduware moto inorudodu epaie ure ema duji. Jesus ure ia brae eimejera kurireu utugare onaregedu pemegago
Meri pobe dukeje, Jesus uture nowu piji Galiléia kae
Ema mitodu akore marigudu, boe emeartorukae profetadogei eno moto keje

Dukodi icare, aregodui Galiléia kae dukeje, nowu Galiléia kejewuge ere tugeragu ji tudada, mare paga karega, eerudure ro jamedu boeji toro Jerusalém tada, peta keje. Eturadu nowu peta kae jamedu dukodi
Ure tugirimi Galiléia tadawu Caná baboturogu kae, cewu ture parera kurudo pobo cewo kae. Nowu dukodi, brae eimejera kurireu ia utugare onaregedu kogodure, du rakojere Cafarnaum keje
Nowu brae eimejera utugare tumearudui Jesus utui Jerusalém piji Galiléia kaedu jitu keje, uture ae, okwamagudure ji uwo tonaregedu pemegago puredugodure tuwiwo kodi
Icare Jesus akore ji: - Taerudumodukare boe kodiboeji, boe ero kurireuji dukeje, tameartorumodukare
Mare nowu brae eimejera utugare okwamagudure ji: - Cegimejera, arawuje toro, itonaegedurogu bimodedu otodai
Icare Jesus akore ji: - Toro, akonaregedu pemegagodure marigudu. Nowu imedu meartorure Jesus bataru ji, uture taci je
Utugarege eridure togi awara ji, egore ji: - Akonaregedu pemegagodure
Kodi icare unoragodure ei inobadu kejeba pemegagodure. Egore ji: - Jawuji, meri roi goroci je dukeje biri uru ure tugera ra piji

Icare nowu uo ure boe pa Jesus akore: - Akonaregedu pemegagodure marigudu oino pudui dukejeie tonaregedu pemegagodure kuri je duji. Dukodi icare meartorure Pao ji, nowu uwobe eiamedu boe emeartorure jamedu
Jesus ure awu turo kurireu towuje dure pobedu rema, tui tugirimi Judeia piji Galiléia kaedu rekodaji
Dukeje icare judeudogere tuiagu ia peta towuje, dukodi icare Jesus ruture Jerusalém kae
Nono Jerusalém keje, ia pobo aia mugu puredure tu Ovelhadoge ewaiporoji, hebreudoge ewadaru tabo iere Betesda cedu, uwaiporodogere ikera awubodure
Nowu baiporodoge ekuda, makarewu kogodureuge emugure: joku bokwarewuge, pogora pegarewuge, pogora bireuge, tubaga tabo pobo amagadodumode du bogai

Paga karega, ia kodiboe keje tu tu je Pao o tupa ure turawuje nowu pobo aia kae dukejere pobore tamagadudo. Cewu ure tuiodo ca boetoji nowu pobo aiato, pobo amagadu rekodajiwu, pemegagodure kuri, ia tugogodae boe piji
Ia kogodureu imedu mugure nono, jorure ji nono ikera pudogidure, iwure pudogidure ikera awubodure pobe ma awu metuia bokware taci je du mugure nono. (38 anos
Icare Jesus tuiorudui padui nono, tuioruduwai mariguduie padure nonodu jitu keje, unorare ji: - Akaidure apemegagoduwo kuri je?
Nowu kogodureu akore ji: -Ikimejera, ia ure iwu pobo aiato, pobo amagadu keje, boe bokwa, dukodire ikodu kimoi mai to dukeje, iare marigudu ikoda piji
Icare Jesus akore ji: - Aragojedo, akeragu apaji, toro tabo
Nowu inodu tonaji kuri je, nowu imedu pemegagodure, ure tugeragu tubaji, uture tabo. Aro kode, nowu meri sabadore jiwu meri
Judeudoge rema emagore nowu imedu pemegagodureuji, egore: - Amodukare nowu apa rekodudo awu meri ji
Akore ei: - Cewu ure ipemegagowu akore ii: Akeragu apaji, amerudo
Egore ji: - Kakoduwu ia imeduba akoino ai: Akeragu apaji, amerudo ino?
Mare cewu pemegagodureu imedu joruduwakare iogudubaba, mare paga karega, Jesus ure tadawuje nowu boe makarewuge eedui nonodu piji kodi
Inodu rekodaji raka dugu je, Jesus jorudure ji Pao uwai tada, akore ji: - Icare apemegagodure. Aro pega kaba pugeje, ia boe pegarewu remawu ukawo ai pugeje du bogai
Dukeje icare nowu imedu readodure Jesus koiaie ure tubemegago duji
Nowu inodu koia judeudoge etonare Jesus ji, paga karega, ure awu turo kurireu towuje sabadore jiwu meri jitu koia
Mare Jesus akore ei: - Ioga maragodure jii oino rugadu; imi jamedu, imaragodunure jamedu

Nowu inodu koia judeudoge etagemo raka remawure tuwo bito, paga karega, ukare Sábado pegado tu rugadu, mare akore tuoie Pao rema; ica, nowu inodu tabo unure tudo nono Pao reore dukoia. Pao Onaregedu ro raka

Jesus akore pugeje: - Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Onaregedureboe tui mito tu jedu roiwakare iaboeji iaboeji. Romode tuiorudure tuo rore jiboeji tu je. Tuo rore jiboe jamedu boeji, onaregedu romode ino jamedu
Mare paga karega, Uo mearudu kurire Tonaregeduji, ure jorududo turore jiboe jamedu boeji; umode jorududo ia turo kurireu remawuji kimo, duma taebogodu kuriwo
Mare paga karega, Uo magai bireuge ewodudo, ure jereboe maku etai, du reorere Onaregedu umode jereboe maku taidure jiwuge etai jamedu
Nowu inodu reorere, Uo umodukare tugogado iaboei iaboei, mare ure boei tugogadodu jamedu boe mugudo Tonaregedu apo
Du tabowo boe emeartorumode Onaregeduji tumeartoru magai Uo jitu reore. cewu meartorukare Onaregedu jiwu, Uo koiare ure rojaidu, kode meartorukare Uoji jamedu
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Mearudure iwadaru jiwu, meartorure ure irojaiwu jiwu, boe ewi bokwarewu ure apo, utumodukare boe pegarewuto, mare jepadure tuwi piji tuierewo kae
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Icare boe aregodumode pudae, puredugodunure, icai bireuge emearudumode Pao mako jitu kae. Mearudureuge eemode
Mare paga karega, nono Uo o magai jereboece tu taobiji, ure maku tonaregedu ai owo jereboece taobiji jamedu
Ure ro raka maku tonaregedu ai uwo tugogado boei, mare paga karega, Imedu Onareedu rema kodi
Taro kaba ta... je awu inago oino jiboeji. Boe aregodumode dukeje meture tuiao tadawuge eiamedu boe emearudumode Imedu Onaregedu makoji, emode tuiebu mako padui boe kajeje du kae
Ro pemegarewuge eewodumode tuiwo pemegarewu kae. Ro pegarewuge eewodumode mare tuiwo pega remawureu kae
Imi itaobiji ikare iaboe iaboe to. Imeardae tugudure imearudure jiboe reore. Itugure jiboe boe jokodunure ema. Mare paga karega, iemarukare irowo nono itaidu reore, mare cewu ure irojaiwu aidu reore
Imagomode imi rugaduie iro oino ma, imagoi oinodu umodukare turugadu
Iare tagoi imi rugaduie iro oino, ioruduware cewu akoino boe jokodu rugaduie duji
Tare iaboe erojai João ae, makore boe jokoduji boe ewiegai
Iomodukare iaboe iaboe ewugeje. Imagore oino, mare taginorudoduwo du bogaire inago oino
Jorugu ja ururireu urugureunure Joãoce. Tagire tagaidure taegarewo biegatu je nowu urugu tabo
Mare imirema ia iore kejewure du kodure João kori. Paga karega, Iogare iroiagudu jire iro oino, dutabore boere boe pa Iogai irojai duji
Ioga, koiare ure irojaiwu, bataru jore iwugeje jamedu. Tagire tamearudu kigodukare makoji, taerudu kigodukare jeji
Bataru metukare tawabo tada, tameartorukare cewu ure rojaiwu jitu kodi
Tare taeku tugu bapera atugoto, tadugu tado taerudumode boe ewi boekwarewu jitu bogai. Kode ica, nowu bapera mitodure makore ii
Mare tagi tagaidukare taduwo itae, taewo du bogai
Ipaga kare imewo inojorodo du bogai
Imire ioruduware tai. Pao mearudu kuriae metukare tadoda
Itaregodure Ioga ie tabo, mare tagare tageragu ii. Mare ia aregodumode cie tabo ma, tamode tageragu ji
Inobadu taboba tameartorumode? Tagi taemarure pui puwo tugurido du bogai, mare taemarukare tawo Pao Aroe Eimejera mitotu jewu akaru kurido du bogai
Tadugu kaba imago pegamode tai Ioga biegai duji. Okirure taiboere Moisés rema, duwu kejere tare tabagaredu bu
Mare tameartorumode Moisesji ma, boe jokodu jire tameartorumode ii jamedu, ure bapera atugodo iiboe jitu kodi
Mare tameartorukare o bapera atugoji ma, kode, inoba taboba tameartorumode iwadaru ji?
Dukeje icare Jesus ure pagado Galiléia kejewu kuruga bakowu kae (Tiberades kejewu kuruga
Boe makarewuge ekodure rekodaji, eerudure ro kurireui kogodureuge eidu jitu koia
Icare Jesus ruture ia torekodu ao kae; nono ure tumugudo ture joruduwadowuge ebo
Boe puredugodure judeudoge eno peta iei Páscoa cedu kae
Jesus ure tuie aogado nowu kodure pudaewu boe makarewuge ei, akore Filipeji: - Kaiba pamode akirodo amireuji awuge eiamedu boe ewo kowuje?
Akore oinono tui turokagado ji dutabo, mare joruduware inoba turomode duji
Icare Filipe akore ji: - Diiero umode 200 ma, umodukare turugadu eiamedu boe ekewo ia koboroguce
Icare ia nowu ure joruduwadowuge, iere André cedu, Simão Pedro uwie, akore ji
Ia negedurogu rakojere woe, du o amireure ikera awubodure tu je, kare kugurere pobe tu je, mare inoba nowu inodurogu umode awu boe emaga inodu ai?
Icare Jesus akore: - Edo tumugudo. Boekarema, boebutu kuricigore nono du imere cinco mil cedu ere tumugudo nono
Icare Jesus ure tugeragu nowu amireuroguji, makore baruto keje, dukejere ure pedo nowu mugure nonowu boe etai. Du reorere rore cewu kare kugurei pobe tu jeduji, ure maku nowu boe etai etaidu reore
Icare ekuredure. Dukejere icare akore nowu ture joruduwadowugei, akore: - Nowu kobo jetu onarewu to pui, tawo jetu otorogado ma, ia okwa kawo

Ere to pui. Ica, cewu iro amireurogui ikera awubodure tu jedu kobo jetu kimoi tuiagejedu, eiamedu boe enogwage akedu rekodaji, ere kododoge ikera awubodure pobe taci ikare awubowutodu enogorobadudo tabo
Tuiorudui nowu Jesus ro kurireu jitu keje, nowu boe egore: - Awure cewu aregodumode awu moto kaewu profeta remawu rema
Icare Jesus tui boe pawuje ei tuiagu tugeragu pudui, tuwo boe eimejerado pudumi, dukeje, ure tudawuje epiji pugeje tuginoigodu ia torekodu ao kae. Jesus merui pobo ao jitu
Meri rekodure dutabore nowu ure joruduwadowuge ere turawuje kuruga kurireu jipa kae
Tui taredo ia ika kuireuto dukeje, ere pagado nowu kuruga kurireu kajeje nowu Cafarnaum bakurireu kae. Icare boecodure Jesus aregodukai etae dukeje
Du tonajire icare pobo maerewu amagadure, ia bakuru rakarewu buture dukoia
Icare ere turaiga jodo keje jii je, dukejere icare ere boe pa Jesus ui tuburedo nowu ika kurireu jituji, tumerui pobo aoji dutabo. Dukejere icare epagudugodure
Mare Jesus akore ei: - Imire iro oino. Tabagudu kaba
Etaidure tuwo tugeragu ji nowu ika kurireuto, mare ika aregodure kuri taregodumodewo kae. Boe eemarui Jesus bogaidu
Nowu meri rekodajiwu meri ji, jeture bakowu kejewu boe makarewuge ere boe pa Jesus mitotu jedu ukai taredo nowu ika kurireuto nowu ture joruduwadowuge ebo, mare awuge etuie tuginoiduji
Icare ia ika kurireuge etaregodure Tiberade bakurireu piji, puredu tu cewu enogwagere amireuji, cewu Pagimejerare tuwadaru pemegarewu bu keje du kae

Du karega icare, nowu boe makarewuge tui boe pa Jesus mare ure joruduwadowuge edukai nonoduji, dukoiare icare ere taredo nowu ika kurireuge eto, kodure tai Cafarnaum kae tuiemaru tabo bogai. Ure boe eedowu boe eke Jesus rema
Eerudure ji nowu bakowu keje, icare egore ji: - Cegimejera, inoba boere dukejeba akaregodure woe?
Jesus akore ei: - Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: taemarure iwogai mare taerudure cewu iro kurireu jitu koia, tare amireu kowuje, tagoredure tabo dukoia
Tamaragodudo, mare boe eke akedure kuri jewu koia karega, mare ure boe eedo jii boe ewi bokwarewu kaewu boe eke koia, du Imedu Onaregedu umode maku tagai. Paga karega, Uore to kruca bu keje kodi
Icare enoragodure ji: - Inoba ceromode cerowo nono Pao aidu reore
Jesus akore ei: - Pao aidure jiboe reo: Tameartoruwo cewu ure rojaiwuji
