Icare enoragodure ji: - Kakoduwu aro kurireumodedu jiba ceerudumode dukoiawo cemeartorumode ai? Kaboba amode towuje?
Ica, ceomagere maná kowuje toro boe makodu tada, nono bapera atugo reore: “Aregodure baru pijiwu amireu ure maku etai enogwagewo ji“ (Sl 77,24
Icare Jesus akore ei:- Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Moisés ukare baru pijiwu amireu maku tagai, mare Ioga koiare ure baru pijiwu boe jokoduwu remawu amireu maku tagai
Paga karega, Pao o amireu, cewu ure turawuje baru pijiwu amireu rema, koiare ure awu moto keje boe eedo
Icare egore ji: - Cegimejera, nowu amireu maku jii je cenai
Jesus akore ei: - Imire ure boe eedowu amireure imi. Cewu utumode itaewu uke boimodukare pudui jii pugeje, cewu meartorure iiwu, pobo boimodukare ji jii je pugeje
Mare imagomode tai: taerudure ii mare tameartorukare ii
Cewu Iogare maku inai boe jamedu boe utumode itae, cewu utumode itaewu imodukare barigu
Paga karega, ire irawuje baru piji, mare irowo nono itaidu reore karega, mare irowo nono ure irojaiwu aidu reore
Mare cewu ure irojaiwu aidure jiboe reo: ikaiagu cewu ture maku inaiboe iarogu okwadodudo, mare iiagu jewodudo boigoduwu meri ji
U! Oinore Ioga aidure. Cewu jorudure Onaregeduji, meartorure jiwuge eiamedu boe, boe ewi bokwarewuwo etai; imode eewodudo boigoduwu meri ji
Dukodi icare judeudoge ewadaru pega kuricigore ji, awu akoinodu koia: - Imire amireu aregodui baru piji dure imi
Egore: - Iarema cewu Jesus kanao? Kode, kodiba icare akore. Ire irawuje baru piji oino?
Jesus akore: - Tawadaru pega kaba tadoda
Iaboe iaboe etumodukare itae, ure irojaiwu Ioga ukai utudo itae dukeje. Duwuge imode eewodudo boigoduwu meri ji

Profetadogere inodu bu bapera keje: “Eiamedu boe joruduwadodumode Pao Aroe Eimejera koia” (Is 54,13). Dukodire cewu mearudure Pao bataru jiwuge eiamedu boe, joruduwadodure Pao koiawuge eiamedu boe, etumode itae
Mare boe eerudukarega ure Pao ji kodi karega, mare cewu aregodure Pao pijiwu jorudure tu Pao ji
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: meartorure iiwuge eiamedu boe, ewi bokwarewu makodure etai
Boe eedoduwowu amireu imireo
Taomage enogwagere manaji boe makodu tada, mare ewire
Ure turawuje baru pijiwu amireu awureo, umode kowujewuge eiamedu boe ewi kawo
Aregodure baru pijiwu amireu jerewu imireo. Umode awu amireu kowujewuge eemaemode jii je. Imode makuwu amireu ikodu rema, awu moto kejewuge einorudoduwo
Awu bataru keje, judeudoge enorare jice woje, jice woje pui: - Inoba awu imedu romode tuwo pagogwagedo tugoduji?
Kodi icare Jesus akore ei: - Boe jokodu jire inagomde oino tai: Tamodukare Imedu Onaregedu kodu kowuje, tagudumodukare kuce ma, taemodukare tadoda
Cewu ure ikodu kowujewu, kudure iku cewuge eiamedu boe jemaere jii jeboe jetunure ebo. Imode eewodudo boigoduwu meri ji
Paga karega, boe eke jokoduwure ikodu rema, boe ekudure ceboe jokodu remawureu iku rema
Cewu okwagere ikodu jiwuge, kudure iku cewuge eiamedu boe, emedure itada, imedure etada jamedu
Ure irojaiwu Ioga jemagadu reorere, iere koia jamedu, du reorere ure ikowujewu jemode igoia jamedu
Awure ure turawuje baru pijiwu amireu rema. Cewu taomagere kowujewu maná inodu karega, ere kowuje mare ewire, du inodu karega. Umode awu amireu kowujewu jemode jii je
Awu inodu jire Jesus ure boe eeruduwado sinagoga tada, Cafarnaum bakurireu keje
Nowu ure joruduwadowuge ia makarewuge, tumearudui ji tu keje, egore: - Nowu inodu raka remawunure. Ioguduba aidumode nowu inoduji?
Jesus joruduware nowu ture joruduwadowuge ekorigodui nowu inodu koia duji, icare unoragodure ei: - Nowu inodu jetu pegare tai
Kode, inoba umode taerudumode Imedu Onaregedu rutui turagojere kejewu turagoja kae dukeje?
Aroe koiare ure boe eedo, boe karega boe ekodu rema. Imagore tai jiwu iwadaru emare aroe rema, boe eerewu rema
Mare ia tagi tameartorukare. Mare paga karega, kuri boe paruto Jesus joruduware kakoduwuba emeartoru bokware duji, cewu umode tumaguwuji jamedu
Makore kimo pugeje, akore: - Dukodire inagore iaboe iaboe etumodukae itae Ioga aiduka dukeje
Kuri je nowu kodiwu piji makarewu ia ure joruduwadowuge ere tuiaedo ji, du emerukare apo pugeje
Dukodi icare Jesus unoragodure nuwu ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwureko towugei, akore ei: -Tagi jamedu tagaidure tawo taiaedo ii jamedu?
Icare Simão Pedro akore ji: - Cegimejera, kode ioguduba ae cedumode? Boe ewi bokwarewure awadaru rema
Cegi cemeartorure, ceeruduware akie Pao Aroe Eimejera o Imedu Pemegarewuie akiduji
Jesus akore pugeje: - Ikare tado ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwureko todu ire tadawuje tamedage epiji? Mare Aroe pegarewure ia tagi kodi karega
Judas Iscariote jire akoino, cewu Simão Iscariote onaregedu, emare umode maku kodi. Ica, nowu ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwureko todu ianure ema kodi karega
Nowu inodu rekodaji, Jesus kodure jice woje, jice woje Galiléia kao, aidukare tumeruwo Judeia keje, judeudoge ere tuiagu bito dukoia
Judeudoge eno peta puredugodunure du iere Tabernáculos (boe ewadaru ure oino: Aroia baidoge jiwu peta
Icare Jesus uwiemage eegore ji: - Atudo awu piji Judeia kae, nowu are joruduwadowuge eeruduwo aro boeji
Paga karega, cewu aidure boe eeruduwawo puduiwu rokare ia turo jiboe podu tu je. Kode arore oino dukodi, akowadudo awu moto kejewuge eegai
Mare uwiemage emeartorukare ji jamedu
Icare Jesus akore ei: - Boe aregodukare pudae ii roga. Mare tagairema boere turugadu tu tu tagai boe jameduji
Awu moto kodu kagirimodukare tai, mare iire kodu kagirire, imire ireadodure ro pegarewuji kodi
Toro, taru toro peta kae, mare imirema, ikodumodukare, boe aregodukare pudae ii roga kodi
Tagoi oino dukeje, rakojere Galiléia keje. Jesus rutui Aroiabaidoge eiwu peta kaedu
Mare uwiemage erudui toro dukeje, ruture jamedu nowu peta kae, mare tui boe eerududo pudui dutabo karega, mare podu tabo
Judeudoge eemarure bogai nowu peta keje; enorare bogai, egore: - Kaiba rakojere?
Nowu boe makarewuge etada boe emagonure tu ji rugadu. Iage egore: - Imedu pemegarewu reno. Dukejewuge egore: - Boro, ukare ino, ure boe eekuri pagado
Mare du inodu tabo, boe emago awadukare ji, tubagudu koia judeudogece
Nowu peta oia bukejere icare Jesus ruture Pao uwaito tui boe eeruduwado dutabo
Judeudoge erore ta... je, egore: - Awu imedu joruduwadodukare. Kode, kaiba awu joruduware bapera atugo jitu aregodure?
Icare Jesus akore ei: - Awu ioruduware oino jiboe, inoe karega, mare ure irojaiwu oe
Iaboe etaidumode turowo nono Pao aidu reore ma, eeruduwamode imagore jiboe aregoduie Pao piji duji, iarema ipijie aregodure duji
Makore taobijiwu jemarunure tuguriwo boe eegai du bogai, mare cewu jemarure tuwo ure rojaiwu kurido du bogaiwu, ure turugadu boe emeartoruwo ji, boe ekuri pagadodureu ukare apo
Kode, Moisés koia karega ure boe eroiagudu maku tagai? Du inodu tabo ia tagi ia tagi tagodukare ui boe eroiaguduji
Kodiba tagaidre tawo iwido? Nowu boe egore ji: - Ia Aroe pegarewu mugure akabo! Ioguduba aidure tuwo awido?
Jesus akore ei pugeje: - Ia irore jiboere mito tu je. Ica, taiamedu boe jorudu pegare inoduji
Moisés ure kruca maku tagai (mare Moisés oe karega, mare uomage kurireuge enoe), tare kruca bu boe ewugeje jii sabadore jiwu meri ji jamedu

Aró, kode, Moisésre boe eroiagudu kadodu kawore kruca padumode ia imedu keje sabadore jiwu meri ji ma, kode, kodiba tagorigodure ii ire ia imedu uredu jamedu boe pemegago sabadore jiwu meri ji dukoia?
Tadugu kaba ure tudo boe eegaiboe rekodaji, mare tadugudo boe jetororewu rekodaji tu rugadu. Judeudoge emeardaei Jesus jitu
Jerusalém kejewuge ia boe egore: - Awu karega cewu eemarure bogai tuwo bito?
Kode, emare akore tumago tabo boe etoiabiji oinono, mare boe emagokare ji. Kode, boe eimejerage kana ere boe pa Cristoie ure ema duji? Mare ceeruduware kaiba awu imedu buture duji
Mare Cristo aregodumode dukeje, iaboe iaboe eeruduwamodukare kaiba aregodure duji

Jesus, tui boe eeruduwado Pao uwai tada dutabo, akore: - Taeruduware ii kaiba itaregodure duji. Ipiji karega itaregodure. Mare cewu ure irojaiwure, boe jokoduwu jamedu boere apo, mare taeruduwakare ji
Imirema ioruduware ji, itaregodure piji kodi, emare ure irojai jamedu kodi
Icare eemarure tuwo tugeragu ji, mare iaboe iaboe ekare tugera puredudo ji, boe aregodukare pudae ji roga kodi
Mare nowu inodu jamedu boe tada, makarewu boe emeartorure ji, enorare jice woje, jice woje pui: -Kode, Cristo aregodumode dukeje, ro pemegarewu kurireu kodumode awu ro kori?
Fariseudogere boe pa boe egoi Jesus jiboe jituji, dukodi icare ere mare sacerdotedoge eimejerage ere torigaraidoge etudo bogai ewo tugeragu ji
Jesus akore: - Iragojemode tagabo biega tu je kimo, dukeje itumode ure irojaiwu ae
Taemarumode iwogai, mare taerudumodukare ii, taroiwamodukare taduwo ikodumodewo kae
Icare judeudoge enoragodure pui: - Kaiba kodumode paerudukawo pudui? Iarema utu kana umode cewu rakojere gregodoge etadawu judeudoge etae, tuwo nowu moto tuginoiwu kejewuge eeruduwado?
Inobadu jiba akore oino pai: Taemarumode iwogai mare taerudumodukare ii, taroiwamodukare taduwo ikodumodewo kae oino? Ure boe eedowu pobojari
Nowu peta jiwu boigoduwu meri ji, kodure tumedage ekoriwu meri ji, Jesus mako rakare turagojei, akore: - Ia tagi pobo boimode tai ma, mato itae, taguduwo
Cewu meartorure iiwu, ure nono cewu bapera atugo ako magadu reore: “Pobojari jerewuge emode tudawuje piji” (Za 14,8; ls 8,11

Makore awu inoduji, tui inodu jeonado Aroe Pemegarewu jitu tabo, du makudumode meartorumode puduiwuge etai, du jire akoino. Mare Aroe Pemegarewu makudukare roga, Jesus aregodukare tugurimodewo kae roga kodi
Nowu boe makarewuge, iage, tumearudui nowu bataru inodu jitu keje, egore: - Boe jokodu remawu profeta reo
Iage egore: - Awure Cristo remawure ema. Mare iage egore nowu egoinodu me keje tu oino: - Kode, Galiléia kejewu bai piji kana Cristo aregodumode?
Kode, bapera atugo akore oino: Davi rekodajiwuge epijire Cristo aregodumode, cewu babuturogu iei Belém cedu piji, Davi o moto piji. Oino karega?
Kodire boe ewadaru pegare pui jice woje, jice woje, Jesus koia
Iaboe etaidure tuwo tugeragu ji, mare ekare tugera puredudo ji. Judeudoge eimejerage emeartorukare
Torigaraidoge ere tugirimi sacerdotedoge eimejerage, fariseudoge etai tuibagi pugeje, duwuge enoragodure ei, egore: - Kodiba takare arego?
Torigaraidoge egore ei: - Ia imedu boe makokare awu imedu mako reore
Icare fariseudoge egore ei: - Kode, boe kana ure tawogado boeto jamedu?
Iarema ia boe eimejerage, ia fariseudoge emeartorure ji?
Mare awu boe onawuge, eeruduwakare boe eroiagudu jitu, boe pegarewugenure emage
Mare ia emage, iei Nicodemo cedu, cewu jemarure bogai boecojiwu, akore ei
Ceroiagudu umode ia imedu barigu boe pegarewuto tumearudui, tuiorudui ro boe jitu otodai?
Egore ji: - Iarema galileu kana ure aki jamedu? Aeruduwa pemegado aeruduwo ia profeta aregodumodukai Galiléia pijiduji
Dukejere ere tugirimi tu tu tuwai kae
Jesus kodure Oliveira tadawu torekodu kae
Barogwa kododu tabore ure tugirimi Pao uwaito; boe eiamedu boere tudo pui ae. Ure tumugudo tu je, dutabore icare ure eeruduwado
Icare escribadoge, fariseudoge ere ia boe eerudure ro okeadui aredu reko mto ae
Ere rakojedo tu nowu boe makarewuge etoiadoda, egore Jesus ji: - Cegimejera, maigodu boe ere tugeragu awu aredu ji ro keadu tonaji
Moisesre bapera atugodo ceiagu tori to awu rore oinowu areme eiduji. Inoba akagomode awu inoduji?
Ere tunorado ji tuiaki turoiwawo tuwo tugeragu ji ia bataru keje du bogai, tagowo, onoie akore. Jesusrema, ure tuie jodo mototo, ure moto atugodo tugerako tabo
Enora kimo jitu koiare, ure taogado taci je, akore ei: - Ia ro pegakarewu ia tagi umode tori to ca boetoji ji
Ure tuie jodo gu moto kae pugeje, ure moto atugodo tugerako tabo pugeje

Awu bataru keje, tui boe pa pudumiraboduie tuwogware boetodu jitu koia, ere tudawuje, ere tudo mito taci jii boigoduwu ae, tui paru bu codureuge ewugeje dupiji. Dukodire Jesus mugure tuginoigodu, cewu aredu rakojere nono jamedu

Dukejere icare ure taogado taci je. Boekarema, tuiorudui cewu aredu ui mito tu jedu jitu keje, unoragodure ji, akore: - Aredu, kaiba cewu akoino aiwuge ekodure? Iaboe iaboe ekare awarigu boe pegarewuto?
Akore: Ikimejera, boe bokwa. Kodi icare Jesus akore ji: - U! Imi jamedu imodukare awarigu boe pegarewuto. Toro! Akaba akirimi aro pegarewuto pugeje. Moto kejewu urugureboenure Jesusce
Jesus akore ei pugeje: - Imire moto kejewu urugureboere imi. Cewu kodure itabowu, merumodukare boeco tada, mare jereboe urugumode ji
Nonore icare fariseudoge egore ji: - Akire amagore aiboeji, nowu akagoi aidu ukare turugadu boe emeartoruwo ji

Jesus akore ei: - Imire inagomode ii rugadu ma, imagore jiboere turugadu boe emeartoraeji. Paga karega, ioruduware kaiba itaregodure duji, kaiba ikodumode duji jamedu. Mare tagi taeruduwakare kaiba pijiba itaregodure, kaiba ikodumode duji jamedu
Tare tagogado ure taegaiboeji. Imi ikare ikogado iaboei iaboei
Imode ikogado boei ma, ire ikogado jiboe jetorogodumode jamedu, paga karega, ikare ikinoi tu je dukodi, Ioga mugure itabo jamedu kodi
Ica, taroiagudu akore: “Boei pobe tu jedu eioi puwugejedu ure turugadu boe emeartoruwo ji” (Deut 19, 15
Imi imagore ii itaobiji rugadu, mare ure irojaiwu Ioga jore iwugeje jamedu
Icare enoragodure ji: - Kaiba Ao rakojere? Jesus akore: - Taeruduwakare ii, taeruduwakare Iogaji jamedu. Taeruduwamode ii ma, taeruduwamode Iogaji jamedu
Makore awu tuwadaru ji tui boe eeruduwado Pao uwai tada dukeje, puredu tu boere to mearogu tugu towu iraji. Mare iaboe iaboe ekare tugeragu ji, boe aregodukare pudae roga kodi
Jesus akore ei kimo: -Itumode dukeje, taemarumode iwogai, mare tawimode taro pegarewu tada, paga karega, taroiwamodukare tagoduwo ikodumodewo kae
Icare judeudoge egore: - Ukana umode tuwido? Akore: Taroiwamodukare tagoduwo ikodumodewo kae. Kodiba akoino?
Icare akore ei: - Woje comoroiwuge tagireo; cebojewu imireo. Awu moto kejewugenure tagi, mare imi karega
Inagore tai tawimoduie taro pegarewu tadaduji, mare paga karega, tameartorumodukare imie rugadu ma, tawimode taro pegarewu tada
Dukodi icare enoragodure ji: -Ioguduba akibao? Jesus akore ei: Cewu inagore tai boe paru toboenure imi
Imagowo taiboe, iwo ikogado taiboe makaguragare. Mare ure irojaiwu boe rikireunure ema; imearudure ji pijiboe imagore ji moto kejewugei
Mare ekare boe pa makoi Tuo jiboeji
Dukodi icare Jesus akore ei: - Tamode Imedu Onaregedu aogado dukeje, taeruduwamode ioguduba imiba; taeruduwamode irore jiboe ukae itaobiji, mare imagoi nono Iogare ioruduwado jiboe reore duji
Cewu ure irojaiwu ure itabo; ukare ido ikinoi tu je, paga karega, irore nono aidu magai du reore jii je dukodi
Nowu akoi oinono dukeje, makarewuge emeartorure ji. Jesus mare Abraão
Jesus akore nowu meartorure puduiwu judeudogei: - Taedumode iwadaru keje ma, ire joruduwadowu boe jokoduwuge rumodedo tagi
Taeruduwamode boe rikireuji, boe rikireu umode taginorudo
Egore ji: - Abraão orenure cegi, boe etugarege karega ure cegi jii je, kodiba icare akagore: Taginorudodumode ino cei?
Jesus akore ei: - Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Ure tumagu turo pegarewu kaiwu ime eiamedu boe, ere turo pegarewu utugaregenure emage
Aró, kode, boe etugare mugumodukare boe etuo uwai keje, mare tu onaregedu mugumode uwai keje jii je
Dukodi icare Onaregedu umode taginorudo ma, boe etugarege emodukare tagi rugadu
Ioruduwa pemeganure Abraão oreie tagiduji, mare tagaidure tawo iwido, mare iwadaru remodukare tadoda dukoia
Imire imagore iorudure Ioga apo boeji. Tagirema, tarore nono tamearudure tao okwabiji boeji
Egore ji: - Ceore Abraão rema. Jesus akore ei: - Abraão ore rumode tagi dukeje, taromode nono Abraão rore jiboeji
Imire imagore tai boe jokodure ema boeji imearudui Pao piji duji, macare tagaidure tawo iwido. Abraão rokare ino
Tarore tao roiaji. Egore ji: - Boe ekera keadu koia kerega ure cedowuje: ceore ia ceoce, dure Pao Aroe Eimejera rema
Jesus akore: - Taomode Aroe Eimejera ma, tamearudu kurimode ii, paga karega, Aroe Eimejera pijire itawujedure, pijire itaregodure. Ipiji karega itaregodure, mare koiare ure irojai
Kodiba takare iwadaru pawuje? Taroiwakare tamearuduwo iwadaru jitu kodi

Taore Aroe pegarewu rema, tagaidure tarowo tao aidure jiboe reore. Boe paru tore boe ewidodu epa rema; rakojekare boe rikireu tabo, boe rikireu bokware apo kodi. Tagoi tuwadararodae jitu keje, pudui rugadure akoino, paga karega, batararodu barikare kodi, emare boe ewadararodae uo rema
Mare imi imagore boe rikireu jitu koia, tameartorukare iwadaru ji
Kakoduwu tagiba tamode ikiegi iro pegarewu tabo?
Pao ore emawuge emearudure bataru ji, tagirema tamearudukare ji orekare tagi kodi
Nonore icare judeudoge egore ji: - Kode cemagokare boe jokoduji akie samaritanore aki, atadaie Aroe pegarewu meture?
Jesus akore ei: - Aroe pegarewu metukare itada, mare ire Ioga kurido. Tagirema, tare iwarigududo
Iemarukare ikuriwo du bogai; mare iare ikurido, du umode tugogado boei
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Iaboe umode iwadaru jetu otorogado ma, bimodukare jii je
Judeudoge egore ji: - Icare ceerudure Aroe pegarewu metui atoda duji. Abraão bire, profetadoge ewire jamedu. Icare akagore umoduie awadaru jetu otorogadowu bimodukae jii je?
Kode, akina akodure paedoga Abraão kori? Ema bire, profetadoge ewire jamedu kaboba ameardaere uwo aki?
Jesus akore ei: - Imode boe kurireudo imi itaobiji ma, boe kurireu imidu boe karega. Iogare ure ikurido. Cewu tagagore tago Aroe Eimejeraie emawu
Mare taeruduwakare ji. Imagomode ioruduwakae ji ma, iwadararodumode nono tawadararodu reore. Mare ioruduware ji, irore nono bataru reore jamedu
Taedoga Abraão jekarere tumearudui tuiorudumode ino meri jituji. Jorudure ji, icare jekare kuricigore
Icare judeudoge egore ji: - Ako joru ukare 50 ce roga, mare icare aerudure Abraãoji?
Jesus akore ei: - Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Abraão butumodedu otodai, ire marigudu
Nowu akoinodu kejere icare, ere tugeragu toriji tuwo tori to ji. Mare Jesus ure tuwogwado pi tuku je, ure tudawuje nowu Pao uwai piji
Icare Jesus, tugodui ia tugodu kae dukeje, jorudure ia buture tuioku bokwa tabowu imedu ji
Icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge enoragodure ji: - Cegimejera, ioguduba ro pegare dukoiaba awu imedu buture tuioku bokwa tabo? Ema kana, iarema uomage kana?
Jesus akore ei: - Awu ro pegarewu koia karega, uomage eigoia karega jamedu, mare Pao uwo turo pemegarewu kurireu awadudo ji du bogai
Meri jetu kimo tabore, ure turugadu iwo ure irojaiwu ro pemegarewu kurireuge eiado. Boeco aregodumode dukeje boe emaragodumodukare pugeje
Dukodire, iragojei moto keje du tonaji, urugure moto jiboenure imi
Tagoinodu tabore, ure todoguru to co mototo, ure moto gurugurudo todoguru tabo, dukejere icare ure nowu moto gurugururogu reko nowu joku bokwarewu jokuji
Dukejere akore ji: - Toro, akabi boe etaimoda iei Zilo cedu keje (boe ewadaru tabo iere Roiaidodureboe oino). Icare nowu joku bokwarewu uture toro rugadu, icare ure tugirimi taiwo tabo
Kodi icare cewu puredure jiwuge, jorudure okwamagudui tu tu jedu jiwuge, enorare pui, egore: - Cewu okwamagudu kigodure tu tu tumugu tabowu karegao?
Iage egore: - U! Ema. Iagerema egore: - Ema karega, mare reorewu. Emarema akore: - Imi rugadu
Kodi icare enoragodure ji: - Inoba taboba aekure tuiado?
Akore ei: - Cewu iere Jesus cewu imedu ure moto gurugurudo, ure reko iokuji, akore ii: Toro aia iei Zilo cedu kae, awo kabi. Iture rugadu, ire ikabi, ica, oino itaiwore
Icare enoragodure ji: - Kaiba nowu imedu rakojere? Akore: - Ioruduwa bokwa
Dukodi icare ere cewu joku bokwarewu reko fariseudoge etae. Fariseudoge enorai joku bokwarewu jidu
Aró kode, sabadore jiwu meri ji Jesus ure moto guruguru towuje, ur nowu imedu jokudo tuiado
Dukodi icare fariseudoge enorare ji pugeje inoba rakuduie aiwore. Akore ei: Ure moto guruguru maedo ioku joki, dukeje icare ire ikabi, ica, oino itaiwore

Ia fariseudoge egore: - Pao koia karega ure nowu imedu rojai, mare paga karega, maragodure sabadore jiwu meri ji. Iage egore: - Inobadu kodiba ro pegarewu imedu umode cewu turo kurireu kuo? Enora korire pui jice woje, jice woje
Enoragodure kimo nowu joku bokwarewuji, egore: - Inoba ameardaere nowu ure aekudo tuiadowuji? Akore ei: - Ia profetanure ema
Mare judeudoge emeartorukare nowu imedu joku bokwaie duji, du kaegae icare jokuie duji, icare emago jokodure uomage ewogai
Enoragodure ei: - Tagonaregedu nao? Tagagomode boe jokoduie buture tuioku bokwa tabo? Macare inobadu taboba aiwore oino?
Uomage egore: - Ceeruduware awuie cedonaregedu rema duji, butuie tuioku bokwa tabo duji
Mare ceeruduwakare inobadu tabore aiwore oino. Tanorado ji nowu inoduji. O joru butu makare du je. Ema rugadure umode kogado tawiegai
Uomage egore oino tubagudu koia judeudogece, mare paga karega, cewu meartorure Cristoie Jesus cedu jiwuge eiamedu boe eire judeudoge egore tumoduie etawuje sinagoga piji tugorigodui ei dutabo
Dukodire uomage egore. O joru butu makare, tanorado ji nowu inoduji, oino
Icare emagore nowu joku bokwarewu bogai kimo pugeje, egore ji: - Pao kurido. Ceeruduware ro pegarewuie nowu imeduce duji
Akore ei: - Ioruduwakare ro pegarewu rakuduie, ioruduware tu jiboe reo: Ioku bokware, du karega icare iokure oino
Icare enoragodu pemegare ji pugeje; - Inoba ure turodo ai? Inoba rore tuwo aeku jado?
Akore: - Ire tawie marigudu, mare takare tawiapagado iwadaru ji, kodiba tagaidure tamearuduwo pugeje? Iarema tagaidukana ure nowu ure joruduwadowuge ia etumedagewo tagi?
Nonore icare ere tuwadaru pegarewu rorido joki, egore ji: - Akire ia ure joruduwadowure aki, cegire Moisesre joruduwadowugere cegi
Ceeruduware Pao makoi Moisés jituji, mare awu ceeruduwakare kaibawuba ure ema
Icare cewu imedu akore: - Ie rore ta... taeruduwakai kaibawuba ure ema duji. Mare du inodu tabo ure iokudo tuiado
Jamedu ceeruduware Pao biapagakai ro pegarewuge eiduji, mare biapagae okwamagudure puduiwugei, rore nono taidu reorewuge eiduji
Iaboe iaboe emearudukare tu iaboei ia boture tuioku bokwa tabowu joku jado duji
Pao omodukare awu imeduce ma, romodukare ia turo
Egore ji: - Awudure aro pegarewu rorii aiogi dutabo, macare are ceeruduwado? Dukejere ere barigu tubiji
Jesus joruduware ei barigu duji, icare tuiorudui jitu keje, unoragodure ji: - Ameartorure Imedu Onaregeduji?
Akore: - Ioguduba ure ema, ikimejera, imeartoruwo ji?
Jesus akore ji: - Aerudure ji, emare makore oino ai
Akore: Imeartorure, Ikimejera. Icare ure tubujodo ji, ure boe kurireudo ema
Dukodi icre Jesus akore: - Itaregodure awu moto kae iwo boe ewu tuwugeje: iwo jorudukarewuge eerududo, jorudureuge ewo tuioku bokwado
Ia fariseudoge eedure apodu emearudure akoinoduji, egore ji: - Cegi jamedu kana ceeku bokware?
Jesus akore ei: - Taeku bokwamode ma, taro pegamodukare, macare tameardaere taeruduie duji, dukodi icare taro pegarewu uture todobiji
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: cewu ukare turemo ovelhadoge ewaiporoji eeda towu, mare ure turemo to boekare turemowo jitu keje, iwogu kigodureunure ema, boe ewidodu epanure ema
Mare cewu ure turemo baiporo jiwu, jeture ovelhadoge eiwunure ema
Duwure baiporo epare baiporo jado ai, ovelhadoge emearudumode makoji, makomode etae eie tabo, umode ecedo enogwagemodewo kae
Tui ovelhadoge eiamedu boedo tuiebu dukeje, kodumode etododai, nowu ovelhadoge ekodumode rekodaji, eeruduware makoji kodi
Mare etumodukare ia tuioruduwakare jiboe rekodaji, mare eregodu rumode piji, eeruduwakare tuioruduwakare jiwuge emagoji kodi
Jesus makore ei awu bakaruji mare ekare boe pa kaba jiba aidure tumagowo nowu tagoino dutabo
Icare Jesus makore ei pugeje, akore: - Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Imire ovelhadoge ewaiporore imi
Cewu kodure itododai boetojiwuge eiamedu boere iwogu kigodureugere emage, boe ewidodu epagere emage
Imire baiporore imi, iaboe umode turemo ii ma, umode cinorudo: umode turemo, umode tuiebu, jorudumode togwagemodewoji
Iwogu kigodureuge etaregodumode ma, cioguwo du bogai, tuwo boe ewidodu bogai, tuwo boe pegadodu bogai tu je. Mare itaregodure ovelhadoge eewo du bogai, jereboe kuriwo ebo du bogai
Imire jeture ovalhadoge eiwu pemegarewure imi. Jeture ovelhadoge eiwu pemegarewu ure tumagu ewugeje
Mare maragodure mori bogaiwu, jeture ovelhadogei karega ure emawu, jorudumode rie aregoduji ma, umode ovelhadoge epijido, rekodumode, icare nowu rie rugodumode nowu ovelhadogei, umode edo taodo
Paga karega, maragodure tu mori bogai, dukodi icare biapagakare ovelhadogei
Imire jeture ovalhadogeiwu pemegarewunure imi. Ioruduware inagu ovelhadogei, inagu ovelhadoge eeruduware ii jamedu
Nono Ioga joruduwa magai ii du reorere, ioruduware Iogaji jamedu. Imode imagu inagu ovelhadoge ewugeje
Ia inagu ovalhadoge ere kimo jamedu, duwugere eedukare awu ovelhadoge eeda tada. Ieturumode ei jamedu, emearudumode imagoji, dukejere icere emode mitogodo tu je, jeture eiwu umode mitotu jamedu
Ioga mearudu kurire ii, paga karega, imode imagu, mare iewoduwo pugeje, kodi
Iaboe iaboe umodukare itawuje, mare imode imagu itaobiji. Iroiware iwo imagu, iroiware iwo ikeragu ii pugeje. Awu iroiagudu rema, dure Iogare maku inai
Nowu inodu bataru koia judeudoge ewadaru okorireu padure boe kajeje pugeje
Ia emage makarewuge egore: - Aroe pegarewu metunure tada, makonure taora bai bai tabo. Kodiba tawiapagare bataru ji?
Iage egore: - Awu bataru ukare nono Aroe pegarewu meture tadawuge ewadarure. Kode Aroe pegarewu umodukana ia joku bokwarewu joku jado? Pao Aroe Eimejera Onaregedu Jesus rema
Jerusalém kejewuge enure petado ture makuboeji, biaku buture dukodiwu keje
Jesus boadunure Pao uwai kejewu Salomão o bororo oiagi
Icare judeudoge ere taiado apo, enoragodure ji: - Jii inobadu kejeba amode cebagado? Cristonure aki rugadu dukeje, cewiedu awadudo taci je
Jesus akore ei: - Imagore tai, mare tameartorukare. Ioga ie tabowu iro jamedu boe makore itagaruji
Mare tameartorukare, paga karega, inagu ovelhadoge ia emage karega ure tagi kodi
Inagu ovelhadoge emearudure imagoji, ioruduware ei, ekodure itabo
Imode jere jii jeboe maku etai, etagedumodukare tu rugadu, iaboe iaboe eiwogumodukare ei ikera piji
Ioga, koiare ure emagu inaiwu, ro rakare boe eiamedu boe ekori, iaboe iaboe emodukare etaru Ioga iera piji
Imi, Ioga, cere mito tu je
Icare judeudoge ere tugeragu toriji tuwo tori to ji pugeje
Icare Jesus akore ei: - Ire taerududo Ioga ie tabowu iro pemegarewu makarewuji. Kode kakoduwu ia koiaba tare taiagu tori to ii?
Judeudoge egore ji: - Ia aro pemegarewu koia karega cere ceiagu tori to ai, mare awadaru pegarewu koia. Paga karega, imedui aki dutabo are Aroe Eimejerado aki
Jesus akore ei pugeje: - Taroiagudu padure kejewu bapera keje atugododukare oino: “Tagire Aroe Eimejeragere tagi” (Sl 81,6), du karega?
Kode, nowu taroiagudu padui bapera kejedu keje cewu Paore tuwadaru maku aiwuge eiere Aroe Eimejerage ma, (mare bapera atugo pemegarewu barigududodumodukare pudui),
Kodiba icare tagagore mako pegareboe iure ema cewu Paore boe pemegarewudo emawu, ure utudo moto kaewuji, mare inagore Aroe Eimejera Onaregedunure imi oino dukoia?
Iromodukare Ioga iroiaguduji ma, tameartorukaba ii
Mare iromode ino ma, tagaidukare tameartoruwo ii ma, tameartorudo iro oino jiboeji, dukejewo taeruduware, tameartorure Ioga metui itada duji, imudui Ioga tada duji jamedu
Icare ere tuiagu tugeragu ji pugeje, mare ure cinorudo ekera piji
Icare ure turawuje Jordão po okwa bakowu kae pugeje, cewu Joãore boe etao pegododu paru tugu kudawo kae, torore icare rakojere
Makarewuge eture ae, egore: - Joãokare ia turo kurireu kuo rugadu
Mare João makore awu jiboe jamedu boe boe jokodu rugadu. Makarewuge emeartorure ji
Lázaro kogodure Betânia keje, Maria mare tuduie Marta rakojerewo keje
Maria, koiare ure roreboe tugu Pagimejerato, ure bure kidudo taga tabo. Lázaro, kogoduredu, uwuri rema
Uwiemage areme ere boe egoiagu oino Jesus ji: - Cegimejera, cewu amearudu kurire jiwu kogodure
Jesus akore awu ewadaru jipagi: - Nowu kogodae umodukare bito, mare ure turugadu Pao kuriwo du bogai. Dukoiare Pao Onaregedu kuridodumode jamedu
Jesus mearudu kuricigore Martaji, uwie Mariaji, Lazaroji jamedu
Mare tumearudui nowu kogoduiedu jitu inodu tabo, ure turodo toi meri pobe nono kimo
Dukejere icare makore nowu ture joruduwadowugei, akore: - Pawo pagirimi Judeia kae
Egore: - Cegimejera, maigodure judeudogere tuiagu tori to ai, macare amode akirimi toro?
Jesus akore: - Meri jiwu horadoge ekare ikera pudogidure pobe taci ikera awubowuto? Merure meri jiwu romodukare cara cara tuwuduwo, paga karega, jorudure meri uruguji kodi
Mare merure boeco jiwu romode cara cara je, urugure jiboe bokware kodi
Nowu tuwadaru rekodaji, ure oto tawuje pugeje, akore: - Pameduia Lázaro unudure, mare imode jetadudo
Icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge egore ji:-Cegimejera, unuduradure dukeje, pemegagodumode
Mare Jesus makonure bireduji, emagerema emeardaere boe enuduji rugadu rakuduie akoino
Kodi icare Jesusre inodu awadudo taci rugadu, akore: - Lázaro bire
Iegarere taigoia, mare paga karega, paedukare toro kodi, duma tameartoruwo. Mare paduwo bogai
Awu inodu keje, Tomé, iei Dídimo cedu, akore tumedage ei: - Pagoduwo jamedu, pawiwo apo
Mare Jesus aregodu keje, merire pobe puibiji Lázaro metui moto tadadu keje
Betânia padure puredu tu Jerusalemji
Dukodire makarewu judeudoge eture Marta ae, Maria ae, tuwo boe motududo ei etuwuri bokwaredu ji
Kuri tumearudui Jesus aregodumode duji dukeje, Marta riture togi, Maria rugadure mugure tuwai tada
Icare Marta akore Jesus ji: - Ikimejera, aragojemode woe ma, iwuri bokwamodukare kodi karega
Mare ioruduware akogwamagudumode Pao ji bogaiboe jamedu boe, Pao umode jamedu boe maku akai
Icare Jesus akore ji: - Awuri jewodumode
Marta akore: - Ioruduware jewodumoduie boe eewodumode boigoduwu meri jituji
Jesus akore ji: - Imire jewodureboe, jereboere imi. Cewu meartorure iiwu, bimode, mare du inodu tabo jemode
Cewu jere itadawuge, cewu meartorure iiwuge eiamedu boe ewimodukare jii je. Ameartorure nowu inoduji?
Akore: - U! Imeartorure akie Cristore aki duji. Pao Onaregeduie aki duji, cewu aregodumode moto kaewuie ure aki duji
Awu tuwadaru akedu keje, rekodure tuwie bogai, makore ji tumago podu tabo: - Pagimejera rakojere nono, makore awogai
Tumearudui kuri je dukeje, ure turagojedo, riture togi. 30(Mare paga karega, Jesus aregodukare roga nowu babuturoguto, mare rakoje kimore cewu Marta jorudure puduiwo keje

Jeture Maria uwai kejewu judeudoge, eridure aedu tuwo boe motududo jitu bogai, tuiorudui ui turagojedo taci ake tabo, ui tuiebu dukeje, ekodure rekodaji, tumeardae tabo utuie ure tuwuri meturewo kae ma, toraguduwo nono du bogai rakuduie ro oinoduji
Maria rema, turegodui Jesus rakojerewo kae dukeje, tuiorudui jitu keje, ure tubujodo jice bure paru, akore ji: - Ikimejera, aragojemode woe ma, iwuri bokwamodukare, kodi karega
Icare Jesus tuiorudui oragudui oino dukeje, nowu kodure apowu judeudoge etoragudui jamedu dukeje, kiarigodu kuricigore tudaroe tada, tugiarigodu kuricigo koia
Icare akore: - Kaiba tare bu? Egore:- Cegimejera, mato, aeruduwo
Icare Jesus oragudure
Dukodire icare judeudoge egore: - Tagaiwodo inoba mearudu kuricigore jituji
Mare ia emage egore: - Kode, ure joku bokwarewu jokudo tuiado, kode, kodiba roiwamodukare tuwo awu bi kado?
Tugiarigodu kuricigo tabo pugeje, Jesus uture nowu meturewo kae. Ia tori padui je kejedu tadare meture
Icare Jesus akore boei: - Tori roto oino. Icare Marta, nowu bireu uwie, akore ji: - Ikimejera, jerimaga pega remawunure, merire pobe puibiji metui woe dukeje
Mare Jesus akore ji: - Kode imagokare ai: Ameartorumode dukeje, aerudumode Pao Aroe Eimejera o boe kurireuji? Dukejere icare ere nowu tori roto oino
Icare Jesus, tui tuioku awogado baruto dukeje, akore: - Ioga, iegare kuricigore ai, amearudure iwadaru ji kodi
Ioruduware boe jamedu jie amearudure iwadaru jituji, mare imagore awu boe etoiai woe dukoia, duma emeartoruwo aigoiaie are irojaiduji
Nowu tuwadaru rekodaji, ure tumago rakado, akore: - Lázaro, aebu mato
Boekarema, nowu bireu ure tuiebu aroia opoi tuwure, tugera tabo kimo dutabo. Dukodi icare Jesus akore: - Nowu aroia kiwuje piji, merudo. Judeudoge etaidure tuwo Jesus bito
Cewu uture Maria aewu judeudoge, duwugere eerudure Jesus roji, ia emage emeartorure ji
Mare iage eture fariseudoge etae, ereadodure ewiegai Jesus ro boeji
Icare sacerdotedoge eimejerage mare fariseudoge ere boe eimejerage eiagu tudo pui, egore: - Inoba paromode? Awu imedu unure turo kurireu todudo gu gu je
Pamode roto oino rugadu ma, boe eiamedu boe emeartorumode ji, dukeje icare Roma bakurireu kejewuge etaregodumode ma, emode pago bakurireu, pago moto jamedu boe pegado
Mare ia etumeduia iei Caifas cedu, sacerdotedoge eiemejera kurireui ema dutabo nowu joru jitu, akore: - Takare boe pa iaboeji iaboeji
Taeruduwakare ema remawuie tagai, ia imedu bitoduwo mito, boe eiamedu boe etai, duma boe eiamedu bitodu kawo?
Mare taobiji karega akoino, mare sacerdotedoge eimejera kurireu ema nowu joruji, dukoiare ure Jesus bitodumoduie boe eiamedu boe etaidu awadudo
Mare nowu moto kejewuge eiamedu ai mito tu je karega, mare ure taodo jice woje jice wojewu Pao ore eiamedu boe etoduwo pui du bogaire akoino
Dukodi icare, nowu dukodiwu piji, eemarure tuwo bito

Nowu inodu koiare Jesus meru awadukare judeudoge ekao pugeje. Ure tudawuje taci ia boe eeda iei Efrém cedu, padu puredui tu boe eedukare kejewu moto jitu kae. Nonore icare rakoje raire nowu ture joruduwadowuge ebo
Judeudoge eno Páscoa puredugodunure. Makarewu boe erudure Jerusalém kae, Páscoa otodai, tuwo tubemegado
Eemarunure Jesus bogai. Tuiedui Pao uwai tada dutabore egore pui: - Inoba tameardaere, kodiba aregodukare peta kae?
Mare sacerdotedoge eiemejerage, fariseudoge ere jorudumode jiwuge eiamedu boe ereadoduiagu rakojerewoji, tuwo tugeragu ji
Meri ikera awubodure mito taci ikera awubowuto Páscoa otodai dukejere, Jesus uture Betânia kae, cewu ture jewodudowu iei Lázaro cedu kae
Nono ere ia boe enogwage towuje tui Jesus kurido du bogai. Marta unure boe eke maku boe etai, Lázaro okwagere nono nowu ira keje jamedu
Icare Mariare tugeragu ia roreboe kaguru jaji, ia okureboe ro rakaguragarewu metui tadadu, ure maedo Jesus bure joki, du ure kidudo taga tabo. Nowu bai okorobadure nowu roreboe ro tabo
Macare Judas Iscariote, nowu ure joruduwadowuge ia mito tu jedu, cewu umode makuwu, akore
Kodiba tagare akirodo nowu roreboe tabo diieromode 300 ce duji, tuwo maku marenarue etai?
Akore oino, mare tuwiapagai marenarue eidu koia karega, mare tugiwogu kigodu koia. Apore diiero ja mugure, iwogu kigodure nowu boere tugu nonowu boeji, dukoiare akoino
Icare Jesus akore: - Tagagokaba oino ji. Ure awu roreboe jetu otorogado imedumode moto tadadu paru kae
Marenarue emode tagabo jii je, mare imi, imodukare jii tagabo
Ia judeudoge makarewuge eeruduware Jesus rakojei torodu, etaregodure, mare tuioruduwo Jesus ji tu je du bogai karega, mare tuioruduwo nowu Lazaroji, du bogaire ero oino jamedu
Mare sacerdotedoge eimejerage ere tumeardae bu tugajeje tuwo Lázaro bito jamedu
Paga karega, makarewu judeudoge ere turodo oino epiji, tumeartorui Jesus jitu koia. Jesus ui turemo Jerusalém todu
Nowu meri rekodajiwu meri ji ia boe makarewuge etaregodure Jerusalém kae peta kaedu, emearudure Jesuie ure tuburedo duji
Icare eridure togi kodoro tabo, toiogwari kuricigo tabo, egore: - Akaru pemegarewu aregodui Pagimejera ie tabodu, Israeldoge eimejera aregodu

Jesus tuiorudui ia jumentorogu jitu keje, ure tumugudo keje, uwo nono bakaru padui bapera kejedu reore: 15"Apagudu kaba Sion bakurireu kejewu aredu. Ica, akimejera aregodu tumugui ia jumenta naregedu keje dutabo” (Zac 9,9
Nowu ure joruduwadowuge ekare boe pawuje nowu inoduji boe paruji, mare Jesus kuridodu kejere icare ewiabuture oinoie bapera atugore, oinoie boe erore jituji
Cewu boe makarewuge eedui apo cewu makoi Lázaro bogai meturewoto, ure jewodudo eegaiwuge ere iogwarido ji tuiegare tabo
Dukodire boe eridure togi, mare paga karega, emearudure Jesus ui cewu turo kurireu kuo dukodi
Mare fariseudoge egore oino pui: -Tagaiwodo, paroiwa bokwa radure. Boe eiamedu boe eregodunure rekodaji
Ia gregodoge emugure nowu ruture tumagowo baruto peta kejewuge etada
Duwuge ere tuburedo Filipeji (cewu Galiléia tadawu Betsaida kejewu), enogwamagudure ji, egore: - Cegimejera, cedagemonure ceeruduwo Jesus ji
Icare Filipe kodure André ae, ure bie. Icare Filipe mare André, ere Pagimejera bie
Jesus akore ei: - Icare boe aregodure pudae Imedu Onaregedu kuridodumodedu kae
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: ia trigo a butui moto todu, mare bimodukare dukeje, umode mitotu nono rugadu, mare bimode dukeje, a makaguragamode
Cewu mearudu kurire puduiwu, umode tuwarigu boeto, mare cewu kodu kagirire puduiwu, ikarurunure pudui jere jii jeboe kae
Iaboe eromode nono itaidu reore dukeje, ekodumode iregodaji. Cewu iragojemodewo keje, itugare rakojemode nono jamedu. Iaboe itugaremode ma, Ioga umode kuridodudo
Oino, itaroe kiarigodunure. Inoba inagomode? Ioga, ikinorudo awu dukodiboe piji. Mare awu inodu koia rugadure itaregodure tu oino
Ioga, akie kurido. Nowu inodu keje kuri je, ia boe emago aregodure baru piji, akore: - Ire kurido marigudu, imode kurido pugeje
Aró, kode, nowu boe makarewuge eedure nonodu, tumearudui nowu inodu jitu keje, egore boiarurugoduie. Iage egore: - Ia tupare akoino ji
Icare Jesus akore: - Awu makore oinoboe igoia karega akoino, mare taigoia
Ure tugogado awu moto jiboe aregodure; icare awu moto ukimejera barigudumode
Mare icai itaogado moto piji dukeje, imode imugudo ime eiamedu boe keje itae
Akore oino, mare tuwo boe eeruduwado inoba tuwimode du jire akoino
Icare egore: - Cemearudure Pao o bakaru akoi Cristo jemode jii je duji. Kodiba icare akore: Ure turugadu Imedu Onaregeduwo taogado? Kakoduwuba nowu Imedu Onaregedu rema?
Jesus akore: - Urugureboe mugumode tagabo kimo biega tu je. Tamerudo urugu kimodu otoi, boeco ukawo taroiwa bokwado. Cewu merure boeco kaowu jorudukare kaiba tugodumode
Urugureboei tagabo kimodu otoi, tameartorudo ji, duma urugureboe orewo tagi. Awu tuwadaru rekodaji, Jesus ure tudawuje nowu piji, ure tuwiado epiji. Judeudoge emeartorukare
Ure turo kurireu kuo du makado, mare du inodu tabo emeartorukare ji
Oinore nowu inodu jia profeta Isaias akore: - Cegimejera, ioguduba meartorure cereadodure jiboeji? Ioguduba biegaiba Pagimejera ro rakarewu kogadodure?

Mare eroiwakare tumeartoruwo, paga karega, ia dukodi, profeta Isaias akore pugeje: 40"Ure eeku mi, ure ewabo rakado, duma eerudukawo tuioku tabo, eeruduwa kawo tuwabo tada, ekawo tubemegado, ikawo epemegado” (Is 6,
Oinore Isaias akore tuiorudui o boe pemegarewu kurireu jitu keje
Mare ia judeudoge eiemejerage makarewuge emeartorure ji, mare fariseudoge eigoia ekare towadudo, duma tuwarigudu kawo sinagoga piji
Paga karega, etaidure boewo tugurido duji, mare tuguridodu aregodui baru piji duji karega
Dukodi icare Jesus ure tumago rakado, akore: - Cewu meartorure iiwu, ii karega meartorure, mare ure irojaiwu jire meartorure
Jorudure iiwu, ure irojaiwu jire jorudure
Itaregodure nono urugureboe aregodui moto kaedu reore, nowu inodu tabo, cewu meartorure iiwu rakojemodukare boecorewu tada

Iaboe emearudumode iwadaru ji, mare eromodukare nono iwadaru reore ma, imodukare ikogado ji, paga karega, itaregodure moto kae, mare iwo ikogado boei du bogai karega, mare iwo boe einorudodu bogaire itaregodure
Cewu ure iwarigududowu, ukare tugeragu iwadaru jiwu, iaboe emode tugogado ji: Ire awadudowu iwadaru umode tugogado ji boigoduwu meri ji
Paga karega, itaobiji karega inago oino, mare ure irojaiwu Ioga, ure inagomodedudo, ure imode boe eeruduwadodudo jamedu
Ioruduware: ure boe eroiagudu boe ewi bokwarewu rema. Kode, Iogare inagoiagu jiboe, jire inago oino
Páscoa jiwu petamodedu otodai, Jesus tuioruduai icai boe aregodui pudae, icai tudumode Tuo ae awu moto piji duji, mearudu kurire awu moto kejewu tuwobei, mearudu kurire jii ei rugadu
Enogwagei ira keje du tonaji, Aroe pegarewuma urade Judas, cewu Simão Iscariote onaregedu, meardae pegarewu barigu uwaboto, uwo Jesus maku onare jiwuge etai
Icare Jesus, tuioruduwai Tuoie boe jamedu boe bu tugera keje, Pao pijie taregodure, du tumoduie tugirimi Pao ae pugeje,
Ure turagojedo taci ira piji, ure tugudae aroia boarewu tawuje, icare tui tugeragu ia aroia koboji, ure kogudo tu tubeagajeje
Icare ure pobo tugu ia ruwoboto, icare ure nowu ture joruduwadowuge ewure kabi, ure ewure kidudo nowu ture kogudo tubeagajejewu aroia tabo
Aregodure tu Simão Pedro ae, mare Pedro akore ji: - Ikimejera, arumode iwure kabi?
Jesus akore ji: - Awu irore oino jiboe amodukare pawuje roga, mare dukeje kuri je, amode pawuje
Pedro akore ji: Amodukare iwure kabi rugadu. Icare Jesus akore ji: - Imodukare akabi ma, aragojemodukare itabo
Kodi icare Simão Pedro akore: - Ikimejera, kode, iwure tu rugadu karega, ikera jamedu, itaora jamedu, amode kabi
Jesus akore ji: -Cewu ure taimo mariguduu biapagamodukare tuwo tugabi du bogai pugeje; ema jamedu boe kabidure kodi. Aró, kode, tagi tagabidure, mare taiamedu karega
Joruduware ioguduba umode tumagu tujebage etai duji, dukodire akoino: - Taiamedu karega kabidure
Tui ewure kabidu akedu keje, ure tugeragu tugudaeji, ure tugu tu pudui pugeje, icare ure tumugudo tu ira keje. Dukejere icare makore ture joruduwadowugei, akore: -Taerudure iro oino jiboeji?
Tagagore ure taeruduwadowuie ure imi, tagagore tagimejeraie ure imi. Tagagoi oinodu pemegare, cewu imi rugadu kodi
Kodi icare imire tagimejerare imi, ure taeruduwadowure imi, mare du inodu tabo ire tawure kabi. Kode ica, tamode pu bure kabi jamedu
Taerudunure iroi oinoduji, du reorere taromode pui jamedu
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Boe etugare emawu kurikare tugimejera kori; jamedu cewu rojaidodureu kodukare cewu ure rojaiwu kori
Tamode awu inodu boe pawuje ma, boe pemegarewu jetumode tagabo, mare tamode inodu towuje dukeje

Taiamedu boeji karega inago oino. Ioruduware cewu ire tawuje tumedage epijigugei. Mare umode turugadu boewo nono bapera atugo reore: -“Cewu ure amireu kowuje itabowu unure tuwureadu awagado ii” (Sl 40,10
Imagonure awu inoduji oino, nowu inodu umode tudo du otodai, duma umode tudowuje ma tameartoruwo, taeruduwawo ioguduba ure imi duji
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: - Ure tugeragu cewu ure irojaiwu jiwu, ii rugadure ure tugeragu, cewu ure tugeragu iiwu, ure irojaiwu jiwu jire ure tugeragu jamedu
Tagoi oinodu rekodaji, Jesus utaroe kiarigodu kuricigore, dutabore akore: - Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Ia tagi tamode imagu icebage etai
Nowu ure joruduwadowuge etaiwore jice woje pui, eeruduwakare kakoduwu ia puduiba akomode inoduji
Nowu ure joruduwadowuge ia mito tu jedu, Jesus mearudu kuricigore jiwu, mugure ira keje mekiwu, ure taora bu Jesus mo keje
Simão Pedro ure tuiebirigido ji tunora tabo ji: - Ioguduba jiba akoino?
Nowu mitodu, taora padui Jesus mo keje dutabore, unoragodure ji: - Cegimejera, ioguduba?
Jesus akore: - Cewu imode amireu pegodu du imode maku aiwu. Dukeje icare ure amireu pegodo, ure maku Simão Iscariote onaregedu Judas ai
Ui nowu amireu remo dukeje kuri je, Aroe pegarewure taredo to. Kodi icare Jesus akore ji: - Amode towujeboe todu marigudo ii
Mare nowu jeture ira kejewuge, ia emage ia emage eeruduwakare kodiba akoino ji
Paga karega, Judas apore akirododu epa ja mugure, dukoiare ia emage emeardaere akoe oino ji: - Akirodo ia okwamode pagai peta epa boeji. Iarema, ia maku marenarue etai
Tui cewu amireu kobo ko du rekodaji, ure akedo pudui tuwo tuiebu. Boekarema, boecoradure marigudu
Judas ui tuiebu dukeje, Jesus akore: - Oinore icare Imedu Onaregedu kuridodure, Paore tugurireu towuje tada
Kode Paore tugurireu towuje tada dukeje, Pao umode kurireudo ema tudada, umode kurireudo ema kuri je

Itore kugure, biegatu kimo iragojei oino tagabo. Taemarumode iwogai, mare imago magai judeudoge eidu reorere, inagomode oino tai jamedu: Taroiwamodukare tagoduwo ikodumodewo kae. 1 Boe eroiagudu maiwu
Iwo boe eroiagudu maiwu maku tagai. Tamearudu kurido tu pui. Oino imearudu kuri magai tai du reorere tamearudu kurimode pui jamedu
Tamearudu kurimode pui ma, boe eeruduwamode inoge ire joruduwadowugeie ure tagiduji
Icare Simão Pedro unoragodure ji: - Cegimejera, kaiba akodumode? Jesus akore ji: - Ikodumodewo kae, akodumodukare oino roga, mare ia boi pugejere akodumode itabo
Pedro unoragodure ji pugeje: - Cegimejera, kodiba ikodumodukare akabo oino? Imode imagu awugeje
Icare Jesus akore ji: - Amode amagu iwugeje? Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino ai: Kogariga akogodumodedu otodai, amode aeruduwa bokwado ii pobe ma jewu metuia bokware
Tawabo pagudugodu kaba. Tameartorure Pao ji, kode tameartorudo ii jamedu
Boe eeda makaguragare Ioga uwai tada; umodukare ino ma, imagomode tai marigudu. Ica, itumode toro iwo taeda pemegado
Itumode toro, imode taeda pemegado dukeje, imode ikirimi, imode ikeragu tai itabo, duma, taeduwo iragojemodewo keje
Taeruduware kakoduwu awaraba umode boe arego ikodumodewo kaeduji
Icare Tomé akore ji: - Cegimejera, ceeruduwakare kaiba akodumode duji. Kode, inobadu taboba ceeruduwamode nowu awara ji?
Icare Jesus akore ji: - Imire Awarare imi, Boe Rikireunure mi, ure boe eedowunure imi, iaboe iaboe etaregodumodukare Ioga ae ipiji dukeje
Taeruduwamode ii ma, taeruduwamode Iogaji jamedu. Oino taeruduware ji, paga karega, taerudure ji marigudu kodi
Filipe akore: - Cegimejera, ceeruduwado Pao ji. Nowu inodu umode turugadu cei
Jesus akore: - Mariigudu iragojere tagabo, macare aeruduwakare ii, Felipe? Cewu jorudure iiwu, jorudure Iogaji jamedu. Kodiba icare akagore oinono: Ceeruduwado Pao ji, oino?
Ameartorukare imedui Ioga tada duji, Ioga metui itoda duji? Imagore ji taiboe, itaobiji karega inago oino, mare Iogare, meture itadadu, ure turore jiboe boe towuje
Tameartorudo ii. Imedure Ioga tada, Ioga meture itada. Tameartorudo awu inodu boeji, awu roboe koia
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: cewu meartorure iiwu, romode nono irore jiboeji, mare ro kodumode awu iro oino jiboe kori. Mare paga karega, itumode Ioga ae kodi
Ica, tagogwamagudumode Pao ji ikie tabo bogaiboe jamedu boe, iromode ino tagai, duma Uo kuridoduwo tonaregedu tada
Tagogwamagudumode ii, ikie taboboe jamedu boe, iromode ino tagai. Jesus akore tumoduie Aroe Pemegarewu arego
Tamearudu kurimode ii ma, taromode nono ii taroiagudu reore
Icare inogwamagudumode Pao ji, du umode ia Tagimejera Pemegarewu maku tagai muguwo tagabo boe jameduji jii je

Duwure boe jokoduwu remawu Aroe rema, duwure awu moto umodukare tugeragu ji, paga karega, roiwakare tuioruduwo ji kodi. Tagirema, taeruduware ji, paga karega, rakojemode tagabo, metumode tadoda dukodi
Imodukare marenarudo tagi ii ikera ra tabiji dutabo. Imode ikirimi tawogai pugeje
Biegatu kimo, awu moto jorudumodukare ii. Mare tagirema, taerudumode ii pugeje, iere kodi, tagi jamedu taemode jamedu kodi
Nowu meri ji taeruduwamode iragojei Ioga tada duji, taedui itada duji, imedui tadoda duji jamedu
Cewu jedure ino boe eroiagudu jiwu, romode ino ma, nowure mearudu kurire ii. Cewu mearudu kurire iiwu, Ioga mearudu kurimode ji jamedu, imearudu kurimode ji, imode itowadudo jekai
Icare Judas unoragodure ji, mare cewu Iscariote karega, akore: - Cegimejera, kodiba amode akowadudo ceegai, mare amodukare akowadudo awu moto jekai?
Jesus akore ji: - Cewu mearudu kurire iiwu, remode nono ii boe eroiagudu reore, dukejere icare Ioga mearudu kurimode ji jamedu, dukejere cedumode mato ae, icare cemode ceeda bu tada
Cewu mearudu kurikare iiwu, romodukare nono ii boe eroiagudu reore. Tamearudure jiwu iwadaru ji, mare iwadaru karega, mare ure irojaiwu Ioga bataru
Inagore awu inodu boeji iragojei kimo tagabodu otoi
Mare ure boe ewudugugowu Aroe Pemegarewu, dure Ioga umode rojai ikie tabodu, umode taeruduwado boe jamedu boeji, umode tawia jetu imagore jiboe jamedu boeji
Inure boe butugureu mugudo tagabo, inure ino boe butugureu maku tagai. Mare imodukare maku tagai nono awu moto kejewuge magai maku du reore. Tawabo kiarigodu kaba, tawabo pagudu kaba jamedu

Tamearudure imagoi awu inodu jituji: Itumode, mare imode ikirimi tagae pugeje. Tamearudu kurimode ii ma, boe jokodure taegare kuricigomode itui Ioga ae duji, mare paga karega, Iogare kuri remawure ikori
Inagore awu inoduji oino tai, nowu inodu umode tudowujedu koda piji, duma inodu ui tudowuje dukeje, tameartoruwo
Imago kuri jokodumodukare tai pugeje, mare paga karega, awu moto ukimejera aregodunure kodi, mare ro rakamodukare iaboeji iaboeji ii
Mare awu moto joruduwamode imearudu kurii Ioga jituji, iroi nono Ioga iroiagudu reore duji. Taragojedo, paduwo awu piji
Imire boe jokoduwu parera ikure imi; Iogare parera iguru epa rema
Enari botukarewu jetara kuguri jamedu boe umode kado; enari botureu jamedu boe umode jetara kugurirogu kado piji, duma enari makawo
Tagire tagabidure (jetara boe kabidure tabiji) imagore jiwu iwadaru koia
Tamugudo itabo, imi jamedu imugumode tagabo. Enari boe botumodukare taobiji jetukai cito dutabo. Oinore tare jamedu: taro pemegarewu umodukare tamugukai itabo dukeje
Imire parera ikure imi, tagire jetaragurure tagi. Mugure itabowu, imugure apowu, ro pemegarewu kuricigomode, paga karega, itabo karega dukeje, taroiwamodukare iaboeji iaboeji
Cewu mugukare itadawuge eiamedu boe, barigudumode toro baawadu kae, cewu enari botukare jetara boe reore. Du kidumode, boe emode ako, bariguduwo joruto, kowuduwo
Tamugumode itabo ma, iwadaru metumode tagabo ma, tagogwamagudumode tagaidure jiboe jamedu boe bogai, du umode ino rugadu
Ioga akaru kuridodunure, tai taro pemegarewu makado dutabo, tai ire joruduwadowugedo tagi dutabo
Nono Ioga mearudu kuri magai ii du reorere, imearudu kurire tai jamedu. Tamugudo imearudu kuriae tada
Taromode nono ii taroiagudu reore ma, tamugumode imearudu kuriae tada. Nono iro magai Iogai iroiagudu reore dukoiare imugure mearudu kuriae tada du reore
Inagore tai awu inodu boeji du ma iegareae metuwo tadoda, taegareae kororogoduwo. Boe emearudu kurii puidu
Awu ino boe eroiagudu reo: Tamearudu kurido pui, imearudu kuri magai tai du reore
Iaboe iaboe emearudu kuriae kodukare cewu ure tumagu tuwidoduwo tumearudu kurire jiwuge etai du kori
Imedagenure tagi taromode nono ii taroiagudu reore dukeje
Imagomodukare itugaregeie ure tagi pugeje, mare paga karega, ire taeruduwado imearudure ji Ioga pijiboe jamedu boeji
Tagire tamagokare iwogai, mare imire imagore tawogai. Ire tarojai toro taro pemegarewuwo tudowuje, nowu taro pemerewuwo jii je, du ma, tagogwamagudumode Iogaji ikie taboboe jamedu boe makuduwo tagai
Ire taroiagu jiboe reo: Tamearudu kuriwo pui jice woje. Awu moto kejewu boe etonamode Jesus apawugei
Awu moto kodu kagirimode tai ma, taeruduwado iie kodu kagirire tagodobiji
Moto omode tagi ma, moto mearudu kurimode tai, toi tagi dukoia. Mare moto o karega ure tagi dukeje, ire ikeragu tai piji dukodi, dukodire moto kodu kagirire tai
Tawia jetu imagore tai jiwu iwadaru ji: Boe etugare kodukare tugimejera kori. Erorerure ii, kode, erorerumode tai jamedu. Eromode nono iwadaru reore ma, kode eromode nono tawadaru reore jamedu
Mare eromode nowu inodu jamedu boeji ikie koia tai, mare paga karega, eeruduwakare cewu ure irojaiwu jitu koia
Mare itaregodumodukare, imagomodukare ma, ero pegamodukare rabodu. Mare oino ego okwacerewu bokwa turo pegarewuji
Cewu kodu kagirire iiwu, kodu kagirimode Iogaji jamedu
Iro kurireu umodukare etada, nono ia rokare nono iro reore, ma, ero pegamodukaradu. Macare eerudure iroji, mare ekodu kagirire ii, ekodu kagirire Iogaji
Mare uwo nono bataru padui eno bapera kejedu reore: “Ekodu kagirire ii paga tu je” (Sl 34,19; 68,5
Cewu mako kigodure boe eparu kejewu, imode rojai Ioga ie tabowu, cewu ore boe rikireu Aroe Pemegarewu, ure tudawuje Ioga pijidu, aregodumode dukeje, jomode iwugeje
Tagi jamedu, taiomode iwugeje, mare paga karega, tagi taedure itabo jii boe paruto dukoia
Inagore oino tai, tawo tabewudo tai, tawudu kawo boe pegarewuto
Tawarigudumode sinagogadoge epiji. Boe aregodumode pudae dukeje cewu ure tawidowuge eiamedu boe emeardaemode tuie ure Pao kurido duji
Eromode oino, mare paga karega, eerudukare Iogaji, eerudukare ii jamedu kodi

Mare inagore oino tai awu iwadaru ji, duma, boe aregodumode pudae dukeje, tawia jetuwo inagoi tai marigudu duji. Mare ikare tawie nowu inoduji boe paruto, iragoje kimore tagabo kodi. Aroe Pemegarewu maragodae
Icare itumode cewu ure irojaiwu ae, macare ia tagi ia tagi tanorakare ii: - Kaiba akodumode?
Mare awu inago oinodu ure tagiarigodaedo tumaedo tawabo tada
Mare du inodu tabo imagomode tai boe jokoduji: Pemegare tai ituwo tabiji, paga karega, itumodukare ma, cewu makomode tawugejewu aregodumodukare tagae. Mare itumode dukeje, imode rojai tawogai
Aregodumode dukodiboe keje, awu moto umode boe pa boe ero pegarewuji, boe jetororewuji, boei tugogado boeiboeji
Umode awu motodo boe pa boe ero pegarewuji, emeartorukare ii kodi
Umode udo boe pa boe jetotorewuji, mare paga karega, itumode Pao ae, du rekodajire icare taerudumode ii pugeje
Umode udo boe pa boei tugogado boeiboeji, mare paga karega, boere tugogado awu moto kejeboe eimejeraji marigudu
Imagomode ji taiboe makaguragare kimo, mare tugiwa rakamodukare ji oino

Mare makomode tawugejewu, cewu boe rikireu Aroe Pemegarewu aregodumode dukeje, umode taeruduwado boe rikireu jamedu boeji, mare paga karega, taobiji karega makomode, mare makomode tumearudure jiboeji; umode tawie aregodumodeboeji jamedu
Ema umode ikurido, mare paga karega, inoe makudumode ai dukodi, umode tawie ji jamedu
Ure Ioga apoboe jamedu boe inonure ema jamedu. Dukodire inagore tai: Inoe makudumode ai, umode kogado tawiegai jamedu. Boe ekiarimode, mare boe eegaremode pugeje, Cristo koia
Biegatu kimo, tearudumodukare ii, mare biegatu pugeje, taerudumode ii pugeje, mare paga karega, itumode Pao ae imuguwo apo kodi

Nowu inodu koia, nowu ia ure joruduwadowuge enorare pui jice woje, jice woje, egore: - Kaboba jiba akore oino pai. Biegatu kimo taerudumodukare ii, biegatu kimo pugeje, dukeje taerudumode ii pugeje? Inobadu jiba akomode oino: Itumode Pao ae?
Dukeje egore: - Inobadu jiba akore: Biegatu kimo? Paeruduwakare kaboba jiba aidure tagoi oinono

Jesus ure boe pa ei tunoragoduiagu iaboe bogai duji, dukodi icare akore: - Tanorare pui jice woje, jice woje, cewu imagore jiboeji, inagoi biegatu kimo, dukeje tearudumodukare ii pugeje, du ia biegatu pugeje dukeje taerudumode ii pugeje duji
Boe jokodu jire imagomode oino tai: Tagi tagoragudumode, tamode maido, mare awu moto kejewu boe eegaremode. Tagiarigodumode, mare tagiarigodae umode taegareaedo pudumi
Aredu tui tuguri butuiagu dukeje, kiarigodure, boe aregodure pudae ji dukoia, mare tuguri butu rekodaji, bia puredukare cewu tugiarigodaeji pugeje, tuiegare koia, ia imedurogu buture kodi
Du reorere tagi tagiarigodure oino jamedu, mare iorudumode tai pugeje, nono tawabo jekaremode pugeje, iaboe iaboe emodukare taegareae barigu tabiji

Nowu meri ji tanoramodukare ii iaboe iaboe bogai pugeje. Boe enogwamaguduwo Jesus ie tabo. - Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: Tagogwamagudumode Pao ji ikie tabo bogaiboe jamedu boe, umode maku tagai
Jii oino tagogwamagudukare iaboe iaboe bogai ikie tabo roga. Tagogwamagududo du makudumode tagai, duma taegareae kororogoduwo

Ire iwadaru jeonado ia bakaruji dutabore inagore tai, mare boe aregodumode pudae ikai iwadaru jeonado jice woje, jice woje ia bakaru boeji tai, du umodukare pugeje, mare imago awadumode tai Pao jiboeji
Nowu dukodiwu keje tagogwamagudumode ikie tabo dukeje, inogwamagudukare Pao ji tagai pugeje
Mare paga karega, Pao mearudu kuricigore tai, tamearudu kuricigore ii, tameartorure itaregodui Pao piji kodi
Ire itawuje Pao piji ituwo mato moto kae. Ica, oinore icare imode moto pijido, ituwo Pao ae pugeje. Jesus ure joruduwadowuge emeartorae
Nowu ure joruduwadowuge emagore ji: Ica, oinore icare are awadaru awadudo rugadu, akarega ure awadaru jeonado iaboeji pugeje
Ica, oinore icare cere boe pa aeruduwai boe jamedu boe jituji, akogeamodukai iaboe iaboe enorawo ai pugeje duji. Nowu inodu koiare cemeartorure akaregodui Pao piji duji rugadu
Jesus akore ei: - Oinore icare tameartorure?
Ica, boe aregodumode, boe aregodure marigudu, dukejere tamode tagaodo tagogwacemodewo jaogwai, tamode ipijido, tamode ido mito tu je. Mare ikare mito tu je. Ioga mugure itabo
Inagore awu inoduji tai, duma boe pemegarewuwo, boe butugureuwo tai igoia. Awu moto keje taiwomode. Mare tabewudo tai. Imire ire imorido awu moto ji
Jesus ure tuioku awogado baruto, dutabore akore: - Ioga, icare boe aregodure pudae; akonaregedu kurido, duma, akonaregedu uwo akurido jamedu
Are ro rakarewu makai, are boe jamedu maku iera kai, uwo jere jii jeboe maku cewu are maku aiwuge eiamedu boe etai
Mare jere jii jeboe reo: Boe eeruduwawo ai ure mitotu jewu boe jokoduwu Aroe Eimejeraji, mare boe eeruduwawo are rojaiwu Jesus Cristoji jamedu
Ire akurido awu moto keje. Ire are iroiagudu jiwu imaragodae iado
Kodi icare, oino, Ioga, ikurido akabo, amagai ikurido akabo moto todudumodedu otodai
Imagore akieji are maku inaiwu moto kejewu ime ewiegai, akogere emage du are emagu inai, duwuge erore nono awadaru rekodaji
Icare oino ere boe pa are maku inaiboe jamedu boe apijie aregodure duji
Mare paga karega, ara maku inaiwu awadaru ire maku etai, ere tugeragu ji, ere boe pa boe jokoduie ure apijie itawujedure, emeartorure ai irojai duji
Nowuge etaire inogwamagudure ai. Inogwamagudukare moto paru tabo, mare cewu are maku inaiwuge eparu tabo inogwamagudure ai, akogere emage kodi
Inore emaboe jamedu boe akore ema jamedu, akore emaboe jamedu boe inore ema. Eigoiare itagaru kuridodure
Iragojemodukare moto keje pugeje, emagerema eragojemode moto keje. Imire itumode akae. Ioga pemegarewu, eedu otorogado akie tabo, cewu are maku inaiwu akie tabo, ewo mitogodu tu pureore
Iragoje kimoi ebo dutabo, ieture ei cewu are maku inaiwu akie tabo. Ieture cewu are maku inaiwugei ia emage ewogwakare, mare tu cewu ure tuwarigu pegareboeto tu rugadu, uwo nono bapera atugo reore
Mare oino itumode akae. Ire awu inogwamagudae towuje iragojei moto keje du tonaji, duma iegareae jamedu boe metuwo ebo
Ire awadaru maku etai, mare moto kodu kagirire ei, mare paga karega, moto kejewugekare emage kodi, imagai moto kejewukare imidu reore
Inogwamagudukare ai awo etawuje moto piji, mare awo einorudo boe pegarewu piji
Moto kejewugekare emaga imagai moto kejewukare imi jamedu
Boe pemegarewugedo emage boe rikireu tabo; awadarure boe rikireu rema
Amagai irojai moto kae du reorere imode erojai moto kae jamedu
Imire ipemegado etai, duma ewo tubemegado boe rikireu tabo jamedu
Inogwamagudukare tu etai rugadu, mare inogwamagudure cewu meartorumode ii ewadaru koiawuge etai jamedu
Duma eiamedu boewo mito tu je. Ioga, amedu magai itada, imedu magai atada du reorere emeduwo padoda jamedu, dutabowo moto meartorure aigoiaie are irojai duji
Are irugu kurireu maku inaidu, ire maku etai jamedu, duma ewo mitotu, pamagai mito tu je du reore
Imi etada, aki itada, duma ewo turugadu tui mito tu je dutabo, duma moto meartoruwo akie are irojai duji, amearudu kurie ei amearudu kuri magai ii du reore duji
Ioga, itaidure cewu are maku inaiwuge eeduwo itabo iragojerewo keje, duma eeruduwo are maku inaiwu irugu kurireuji, mare paga karega, amearudu kurire ii moto towujedumodedu otodai
Ioga pemegarewu, awu moto kejeboe eeruduwakare ai, mare imi ioruduware ai, awuge jamedu eeruduware akie are irojai duji
Ire eeruduwado akieji, imode eeruduwado kimo pugeje, duma amearudu kurii iidu metuwo ebo, imuguwo etada jamedu
Nowu tuwadaru rekodaji, Jesus uture nowu ture joruduwadowuge ebo ia paga kurireu iere Cedron cedu okwa bakowu kae, ia okureboe pa jeturewo kae, du tore ure turemo ture joruduwadowuge ebo
Judas, cewu umode makuwu, joruduware nowu boe eedaji, Jesus utu kigodure toro nowu ture joruduwadowuge ebo kodi,
Icare Judas ure tugeragu sacerdotedoge eimejerage mare fariseudoge eno tarigaraidogei, ure eko pudabo, etaregodure nono joru tabo, baigadoge ebo
Icare Jesus tuioruduwai inoba boemode puduidu jamedu boe jitu dukodi ure tuwure taru etogi, icare unorare ei, akore: Ioguduba bogaiba taro oino?
Egore: - Jesus Nazaré kejewu bogaire cero oino. Akore ei: -Imireo (Judas, ure makuwu, rakojere ebo jamedu
Akore: -Imireo, ino dukeje kuri je, ere tuwure taru tugujebiji, tuwudui moto keje dutabo
Icare unoragodure ei pugeje: - Ioguduba bogaiba taro oino? Egore: - Jesus Nazaré pijiwu bogaire cero oino
Jesus akore ei pugeje: - Inagore: imireo, oinore inagore tai. Kode iwogaire taro oino dukeje, awuge etudo
Nowu inodu tabo ure nono bataru reore: “Cewu are maku inaiwuge ia ewogwakare ipiji” (Is 17,12
Simão Pedro ia toriga raireu mugure apo, du ure tawuje tuia piji, ure sacerdotedoge eimejera ia utugare okorido, tui okwacere kana pemegarewu jaogwaiwu bia kado dutabo (Nowu utugare iere Malco
Mare Jesus akore Pedroji: - Atoriga tugu tuiato! Ikudumodukare Iogare maku inaiwu jirireboece? Jesus rakojei baire eimejerage eegoraidu
Kodi icare utorigaraidoge ere tugeragu Jesus ji, ere kogudo
Ere reko boetoji Anás ae, cewu Caifás uiedoga, duwure baire eimejera rema nowu joruji
Cewu okituware judeudogei tagoi oino dutabo: - “Ema remawure mitotu jewu biwo boe etai du rema” (Io 11,50

Simão Pedro kodure Jesus apo ia ure joruduwadowu mitotu jedu apo. Nowu ure joruduwadowu ui mito tu jedu sacerdotedoge eimejera joruduware ji, dure ure turemo Jesus apo nowu sacerdotedoge eimejera uwai tadawu uwororo kae
Pedro rema mugure baiporo keje baawadu jaogwai, mare cewu sacerdotedoge eimejera joruduware jiwu makore jeture baiporo jiwudoji, duwudo ure udo turemo
Nowu jeture baiporo jiwudo unoragodure Pedroji, akore: - Awu imedu ure joruduwadowuge ia karega ure aki? Akore: -Boro! Imi karega
Nowu maragodure nonowuge, nowu jeture boeji nonowuge ere jorugo tuwo towarudo, biaku barikare kodi. Pedro rakojere ebo tui towarudo dutabo
Nowu baire eimejera unoragodure Jesus ji nowu ure joruduwadowuge eiboeji, ure boe eeruduwado jiboeji jamedu
Icare Jesus akore ji: - Imagore imago awadu tabo moto ji, ire boe eeruduwadodu maedo sinagoga tada, Pao uwai tada, cewu judeudoge ere tudo puiwo keje; podu karega imago imagore ei
Kodiba anorare ii? Anorado cewu mearudure imagoi puduiwugei. Nowuge eeruduware kaboba jiba ire tuioruduwado
Awu bataru keje, ia jeture boeji nonowu, ure tugera to Jesus jeji, akore: - Kodiba akagoino awu baire eimejeraji?
Jesus akore ji: - Iwadaru pegare dukeje, iwadaru pegare jiboe kuo, mare imago pemeganure dukeje, kodiba are akera to ii?
Icare Anás ure edo reko toro baire eimejera Caifás ae, iera kogu tabo
Simão Pedro mugure nono tui towarudo dutabo. Icare enoragodure ji: - Iarema aki cewu ure joruduwadowuge ia kana ure aki? Icare ure tuioruduwa bokwado ji, akore: - Boro! Imi karega
Icare baire eimejera ia utugare, cewu Pedrore bia kadowu ia uwobe, akore ji: - Iorudukare ai apo cewu okureboe pa tada?
Mare Pedrore tuioruduwa bokwado ji pugeje. Ca, kuri je kogoriga akogodure. Jesus rakojei Pilato jokoraidu
Ere Jesus reko nowu Caifás uwai piji brae eimejera uwai kae, meri rutu tabo. Mare judeudoge ekare turemo nowu brae eimejera uwaito, turorogodu kawo, duma tuwo Páscoa kowuje
Kodi icare Pilatos ure tuiebu etae, unoragodure ei: - Kakoduwu ia ro pegarewu koiaba tare awu imedu arego woe?
Egore ji: - Awu ro pegarewu umodukare ma, cemodukare maku akai
Du koiare icare Pilato akore: - Emareo, tagire tare tagogado ji nono taroia reore. Icare judeudoge egore: - Cegi, ukare turugadu cewo iaboe iaboe ewido
Awu inodu tabore ure nono Jesus bataru reore tagoi inobadu taboba tuwimode duji (Mt 20,19
Pilatore turemo tuwaito, makore Jesus bogai, unoragodure ji: - Akina judeudoge eimejerare aki?
Jesus akore: - Akaobijina akagoino, iarema iage kana egoino awiegai? Pilato akore
Kode, judeunure imi? Ako moto kejewu baire eimejerage ere amagu inai. Inoba arore?

Jesus akore: - Boe eimejerai imidu, awu moto kejeboe karega. Boe eimejerai imidu umode awu moto keje ma, boe jokodure itugarege emode tubewudo iwugeje imagudu kawo judeudoge etai. Mare boe eiemejerai imidu woeboe karega

Kodi icare Pilato unoragodure ji: - Kode, akina boe eimejare aki? Jesus akore: - U! Imire boe eimejerare imi. Imagowo boe rikireuji du bogaire iwudure, itaregodure awu moto kae. Boe rikireu mugure apowuge eiamedu boe emearudumode imagore jiboeji
Icare Pilato akore ji: - Kaboba boe rikireu rema? Tagoi oino dutabo, ure tuiebu pugeje, uture judeudoge etae, akore ei: - Iorudukare ia ro pegarewu boeji
Mare taroiare Páscoa keje tare ido ia meture baicorewu tadawu ro pegarewu tawuje du rema. Kode tagaidure iwo judeudoge eimejera inorudo?
Dukeje icare eiamedu boe enoiogwarire pugeje, tagoi: - Boro! Awu karega, Mare Barrabás! (Barrabasre ia iwogu kigodureu, boe ewidowu epa rema
Kodi icare Pilatore boe edo boe to Jesus biri kajeje
Utorigaraidogere ia boto jerigigarewu udo nono boe etaogajejewu reoredu ere tugu aoto, ere aroia kujagureu tugu ji
Ere tuburedo ji, egore ji: - Akireo! Judeudoge eimejera! Oino tui tugera to to jeji dutabo
Icare Pilatore tuiebu pugeje, akore judeudogei: - Ica, imode arego woe baawadu kae tagai, duma taeruduwo iorudukai ia ro pegarewu boe jituji
Dukeje icare Jesus ure tuiebu boto jerigigarewu kogui taogajeje dutabo. Icare Pilato akore: - Cewu imedu reo

Icare baire eimejerage mare utorigaraidoge, tuiorudui jitu keje, enoiogwarigodure, egore: - Nowu bu i padui pugajejedu keje, nowu bu i padui pugajejedu keje. Icare Pilato akore ei: - Tagi tageragu ji, bu i padui pugajejedu keje, iorudukare ia ro pegarewu jitu kodi
Icare judeudoge egore ji: - Ia ceroiare dukoiare awu bitodu rumode, mare paga karega akore Aroe Eimejera Onaregeduie ure pudumi dukodi
Kodi icare nowu egoinodu ure Pilato pagudugo
Ure turemo pugeje nowu brae eimejera tumuga kae, unoragodure Jesus ji, akore ji: - Kaibawuba ure aki? Mare Jesus makokare ji
Kodi icare Pilato akore ji: - Amagomodukare ii? Aeruduwakare ie irugadu iwo akinorudo iarema iwo aporu bu i padui pugajejedu keje?
Icare Jesus akore: - Aro rakarewu umodukare ii, makudukai akai baru piji dukeje. Kodire ure imagu akaiwu ro pega kodure aro pega kori

Nowu otobijire icare Pilato jemarure tuwo inorudo. Mare judeudoge enoiogwarire tagoi oino dutabo: - Amode inorudo ma, kode brae eimejera kurireu César metuia karega ure aki, mare paga karega, cewu ure boe eimejerado pudumiwu onanure Cesarji
Tumearudui nowu egoinodu jitu keje, Pilatore tuiebu Jesus apo, ure tumugudo brae eiemejera muga keje; nowu muga iere Pariri (hebreudoge ewadaru tabo iere Gabata
Nowu meri ji ere tugera pemegado boeji Páscoa kae. Meri jeture baru oiadoda. Icare Pilato akore judeudogei: - Ca, tagimejera reo

Mare ere iogwarido, egore: - Toro apo! Toro apo! Bu i padui pugajejedu keje. Icare Pilato unorare ei: - Imode tagimejera bu i padui pugajejedu keje? Icare baire eiemejerage egore: - Ia cegimejerakare ia toro pugeje, mare César tu rugadu
Dukeje icare Pilato ure maku etai, ewo bu i padui pugajedu keje rugadu. Ere Jesus bu i padui pugajejedu keje
Dukeje icare ere Jesus reko pudabo. Ema taobijire ure i padui pugajejedu reko bakurireu piji jice ia iere Calvário ceboe kae (Hebreudoge ewadaru iere Gólgota, boe ewadaru tabo ure oino: Boe era jeta
Nonore ere bu i padui pugajejedu keje. Iagere pobe apo: Ia okwacere kana pemegarewu jaogwai, ia okwacere kana koborewu jaogwai, Jesusre rakojere boiadoda
Pilatore ia bapera atugo pemegado du ure bu aora bukajeje, nowu i padui pugajejedu keje, du akore oino: - Jesus Nazaré kejewu, Judeudoge Eimejera
Makarewu judeudoge emagore nowu atugoji, paga karega, Jesus padure i padui pugajejedu keje puredu tu bakurireuji
Icare judeudoge eno baire eimejerage egore Pilatoji: - Akaba atugodo Judeudoge Eimejera oino, mare Awu imedu akore judeudoge eimejeraie ure pudumi oino
Mare Pilato akore ei: - Ire atugodoboe, atugododure
Utorigaraidoge ere Jesus bu i padui pugajejedu keje, icare ere tugeragu ukudaeji ere kado pobe puibiji, megawo mito tu tu pudai. Mare nowu ukudae kujiagiwu maegodunure, kamidukare

Dukodi icare egore pui: - Pamodukare bowuje, mare pamode pageragudu caido tabo, paeruduwo ioguduba onagodumode jiwu bogai. Awu inodu tabore ure nono bapera atugo reore: “Ere ikudae pedo pui, ikudae kujiagiwure ere tugeragu caireboedo tabo.“ (Sl 21,19). Oinore utorigaraidoge erore. Jesus uce
Puredu tu Jesus o i padui pugajeje duji, uce rakojere, uce uwie iei Maria cedu, cewu Cleofas oreduje, rakojere nono jamedu, Maria Madalena apo
Icare Jesus, tuiorudui tuje jitu keje, cewu mearudu kurire jiwu ture joruduwadowu rakojei nono duji jamedu dukeje, akore tujeji: - Aredu, akonaregedu reo
Dukejere akore nowu ture joruduwadowuji: - Ica, Ace reo. Nowu inodu otobiji nowu ure joruduwadowu ure uce reko pudabo tuwai kae. Jesus biredu
Icare Jesus, tuioruduwai boe jamedu boe ui turugadu dukeje, uwo nono bapera atugo jamedu reore, akore: - Pobo boire ii
Ia ruwobo mugure nono, pobo pagodureu tabo, icare utorigaraidogere boe otogugudu tugu nowu pobo pagodureuto, ere boe otogugudu bu ia ipo oto keje, ere raido okwa kae
Jesus tugudui nowu pobo pagodureuce dukeje akore: - Icare boe jamedu boere turugadu. Icare ure tuie jodo, icare akurure. Ia utorigaraireu ure Jesus mo porodo meriri otoboarewu tabo

Judeudoge epagudure, eedumode nowu i padui pugajejedu keje Sábado meri jituji, paga karega, enure tugera pamegado petaji, dukodire cewu sabadore jiwu meri motu rakaguragamode. Kodi icare enogwamagudure Pilatoji, uwo edo epogora ra kado, ewo erodo oino nowu piji
Utorigaraidoge etaregodure, ere cewuge ei pobedu epadure i keje apodu, ere epogora kado
Mare etaregodui Jesus ae dukeje, eerudure bie marigudu duji, dukodire ekare pogora ra kado
Mare ia utorigaraireu ure ia meriri otoboarewu bu jura otogajeje uwabo kae. Kuri je kure ceredo pobo tabo
Jorudure awu inodu jiwu ureadodure awu inoduji tameartoruwo. Ceeruduware makoi boe riki jituji
Awu inodu ure nono bapera atugo reore: “Ia ra boe kadodumodukare”
Nowu bapera atugo akore ia toro jamedu: “Boe etaiwomode cewu meriri otoboarewu padure kajejewuji”. (Zac 12,10

Nowu inodu rekodaji, José Arimatéia kejewu, ia Jesusre joruduwadowu, mare podu tabo tubagudu koia judeudogece, okwamagudure Pilatoji uwo boedo Jesus rawuje i padui pugajejedu piji. Icare Pilatore udo ino rugadu. Icare uture, ure Jesus rawuje i piji
Nicodemo kodure apo (cewu makore Jesus ji boecoji ia boe kejedu kodiwu). Ere ia roreboe jirireu reko pudabo
Ere tugeragu Jesus ji, ere nowu roreboe jirireu tugu nowu aroiato dure ere upodo apo, nono judeudoge ero magai tui pu tugu mototo du reore
Cewu Jesus birewo kejere ia okureboe pa mugure, nowu okureboe pa tada ia boe emedumodewo maiwu mugure, mare iaboe iaboe emedukare tada roga
Dukodi icare ere Jesus tugu nono, paga karega, judeudoge enure tugera pemegado Páscoa jitu kodi, nowu meta mugu puredure nono jamedu kodi
Kodure Sábado rekodaji boetojiwu meri ji, Maria Madalena uture meturewo kae, kuri barogwa kododu tabo, boe guguco kimo tabo. Boekarema, jorudure tori kurireu padukai meturewo je keje duji
Rekodure tuibagi, uture Simão Pedro ae, mare cewu Jesus mearudu kurire jiwu ure joruduwadowu ae, akore ei: - Ere Pagimejera tawuje tumedurewo piji, ceeruduwakare kaiba ere bu
Kodi icare Pedro mare cewu ure joruduwadowu ere tudawuje, eture meturewo kae
Eregodure puapo, mare nowu ia ure joruduwadowu rekodure Pedro kori, aregodure boetoji meturewo kae
Ure tuie jodo jice, jorudure aroiadogei moto keje, mare ukare turemo
Simão Pedro, kodure rekodajidu, aregodure, ure turemo nowu meturewoto, jorudure aroiadogei moto keje
Jorudure padure aora kejewu aroia kigadureuji, mare awu padukare nowu ia aroiadoge ebo: boere opodo tuginoi tu je
Dukodi icare cewu aregodure boetojiwu ia ure joruduwadowu ure turemo jamedu nowu metato. Jorudure, icare meartorure
Boe jokodure ekare bapera atugo akoi oinoie Jesus jewodumoduie bireuge epijidu pawuje roga
Kodi icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge ere tugirimi tuwai kae. Jesus ui towadudo Maria Madalena jekaidu
Nowu inodu boe tada, Maria rakojere baawadu keje, puredu tu nowu meturewoji toragudu tabo. dutabore icare ure tuie jodo taiwowo meturewoto
Du tabore icare jorudure tupadogei pobe duji: ekudae kigadure, emugure padurewo okwa keje, ia mugure ao keje, ia mugure bure keje
Duwugere enoragodure ji: - Aredu, kodiba akoragudure? Akore ei: - Paga karega, boere ikimejera reko mare ioruduwakare kaiba ere bu
Nowu tagoino dutabo ure tugirimi tuibagi, jorudure Jesus rakojei nono duji, mare joruduwakare ji

Icare Jesus akore ji: - Aredu, kodiba akoragudure? Meardaere nowu jeture okureboe jiwu rakuduie akoino, kodi dukeje akore ji: - Ikimejera, akimode are akeragu ji dukeje, iwie kaiba are bu, icare itumode bogai
Icare Jesus akore ji: - Maria! Tui tugirimi bai jaogwai dutabo, ure tumago rakado, akore hebreudoge ewadaru tabo, akore: - Rabboni! (Boe ewadaru tabo ure oino: Ikimejera! Oino
Jesus akore ji: - Akera jetu kaba ii, mare paga karega, irudukare Ioga ae roga, mare toro iwiemage etae, amagodo ei irudumode Ioga ae, Tao ae, ino Aroe Eimejera ae, tago Aroe Eimejera ae
Icare Maria Madalena rekodure nowu ure joruduwadowuge etae tuwo ewie tuioruduie Pagimejera jituji. Jesus ui towadudo ture joruduwadowuge eegaidu

Nowu meri rekodu tabo, duwure semana o meri boetojiwu rema, nowu ure joruduwadowuge ere baiporo mi pudui tuieduwo nowu bai tada, tubagudu koia judeudogece. Du kaere icare Jesus aregodure, ure turagojedo tu etoiadoda, akore ei: - Boe butugureu muguwo tagabo
Tagoi oino dukeje, ure eerududo tugeraji, ure eerududo tawubowuji. Icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge eegare kuricigore tuiorudui tugimejera jitu keje
Icare akore ei: - Boe butugureu muguwo tagabo. Ioga magai irojai du reorere, inure tarojai jamedu
Icare ure togwamu ei, akore ei: - Aroe Pemegarewu makudure tagai
Tamode ro pegarewuge ero pegarewu butugugo dukeje, butugugodaereboe umode ei. Tamodukare ero pegarewu butugugo ma, butugugodaereboe umodukare ei jamedu
Ia ure joruduwadowu iere Tomé cedu, metukare etada nowu Jesus aregodu keje

Icare nowu metage egore ji: - Ceerudure Pagimejeraji. Ure kirimi pai ei, akore: - Iorudumodukare meriri oiaji ierato ma, imodukare ikerako tugu meriri oioato ma, imodukare ikera tugu mo awubouto ma, imeartorumodukare

Meri ikera awubodure pobe ma awu metuia bokware taci ikera awubowuto du rekodaji, nowu ure joruduwadowuge eedure nowu tuieda mitodu keje pugeje, dutabore icare Tomé rakojere etada. Baiporo miture ei dutabore Jesus aregodure, ure turagojedo etoiadoda, akore ei: - Boe butugureu muguwo tagabo
Dukejere icare makore Toméji, akore ji: - Mato, akerako bu woe, akaiwodo ikeraji, akera raido awo tugu imo awubowuto. Ameartoru bokwa kaba, ameartorudo
Icare Tomé akore ji: - Ikimejera, ino Aroe Eimejera
Icare Jesus akore ji: - Ameartorure aerudure ii dukoia. Pemega remawugere emeartorumode tuiorudukai ii dutabo
Jesus ure ia turo kurireu makarewu towuje nowu ture joruduwadowuge eegai kimo, du padukare awu bapera keje
Mare awuge epadure bapera keje, dukoiawo tameartorure Cristo Aroe Eimejera Onaregeduie Jesusce duji, duma jereboe jetuwo tagabo ie koia, tameartorui ji dutabo
Nowu inodu rekodajire icare, Jesus ure towadudo pugeje, nowu ture joruduwadowuge eegai, puredu tu kuruga kurireu iere Tiberades ceduji. Ure towadudo oino dutabo
Simão Pedro mare Tomé iere Dídimo cedu, mare Natanael, cewu Galiléia tadawu Caná kejewu, mare Zebedeu ore, mare ia ure joruduwadowuge ei pobedu, eedure tu puapo
Simão Pedro makore nowu tumedagei, akore: - Iwoguwo. Egore ji: - Cedumode akabo jamedu. Icare eture. Ere taredo ikato. Mare nowu boecoji ekare tugeragu iaboeji iaboeji
Barogwa kododure tu je dutabore, Jesus rakojere nowu kuruga kurireu okwai. Mare nowu ure joruduwadowuge ekare pawuje
Icare Jesus onoragodure ei: - Itore kugure, ia tage karorogukare tu tagabo iwo kowuje? Egore. - Boro
Icare akore ei: - Tawuge barigu nowu tago ika ukana pemegarewu jaogwai, du taerudumode ji. Icare ere barigu. Dukejere icare ero rakakare tuwo tumugudo keje, kare emagaguragare tada kodi

Dukodi icare cewu Jesus mearudu kuricigore jiwu ia ure joruduwadowu makore Pedroji, akore: - Cewu Pagimejera rabodu! Simão Pedro, tumearudui Pagimejera raboduie dukeje, ure tugudae kogudo tugajeje (Paga karega, biri kedore du je dukodi), ure taredo taci poboto
Metage ekodure mato ika tabo, tui tumugudo buke keje kare ebo dutabo (mare paga karega, eedu jaekare moto ji
Tui taredo ika piji dukeje, eerudure ia jorui turugadu duji, ia karo padui joradu keje duji, ia amireu tabo duji
Jesus akore ei: - Tare tageragu jiwu ia kare erego mato
Icare Simão Pedro ruture ikato ure tumugudo mato buke keje, kare kurireuge makarewuge ebo boeki kae. Nowu kare kurireuge emagai inodu, buke ukare tubowuje ebo
Icare Jesus akore ei: - Mato, tagogwagewo. Nowu ure joruduwadowuge ia emage ekidakare tunorawo ji: - Ioguduba akibao? inodu bogai, mare paga karega, eeruduware tugimejeraie ure ema kodi
Icare Jesus ure tuburedo mato, ure tugeragu amireuji, ure maku etai. Du reorere ure cewu karo kodu ure maku etai jamedu
Awure Jesus ui towadudo pobe ma jewu metuia bokware tuiewodu rekodaji nowu ture joruduwadowuge eegai du rema

Nowu enogwage akedu kejere icare, Jesus unoragodure Simão Pedroji, akore ji: - Simão, João onaregedu, amearudu kurire ii awuge ekori? Akore: - U! Ikimejera, aeruduware imearudu kuricigoi ai duji. Icare Jesus akore ji: - Aetudo inagu cordeirodogei
Unoragodure ji pugeje, akore ji: - Simão, João onaregedu, amearudu kurire ii? Akore ji: - U! Ikimejera, aeruduware imearudu kuricigoi ai duji. Jesus akore ji: - Aetudo inagu cordeirodogei

Unoragodure ji pugeje pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, akore: - Simão, João onaregedu, amearudu kurire ii? Icare Pedro kiarigodu buture keje tu je. Mare paga karega, unoragodure ji tagoi: - Amearudu kurire ii? oino pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, dukoia. Icare akore ji: - Ikimejera, aeruduware boe jameduji, aeruduware imearudu kuricigoi ai duji. Icare Jesus akore ji: - Aetudo inagu ovelhadogei

Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino ai: iparedu kimoi aki dutabo, are apeagajejewu bukigu kogudo akudae kajeje, ature akaidurewo boe kae. Mare akaregodumode kuridogedui aki du kae dukeje, amode akera raido, iaboe emode apeagajejewu kogudo, emode arego akaidukarewo kae
Nowu tagoino dutabo, ure bie kakoduwu tuwi taboba umode Pao kurido duji. Tumagoi inodu jitu rekodaji, akore ji pugeje: - Akodudo itabo

Pedro, tui tumegido pai tuibagi dutabo, jorudure cewu Jesusre joruduwadowu, cewu mearudu kurire jiwuji (cewu ure taora bu mo keje, cewu enogwage boigoduwu dukodiwu keje, du unoragodure ji: - Ikimejera, ioguduba koiaba umode amagu? oino jiwuji
Icare, tuiorudui jitu keje, Pedro unoragodure Jesus ji akore: - Ikimejera, awu, inoba boemode ji?
Jesus akore ji: - Itaidumode rakojewo jii ii ikirimi du kae ma, akaiboe karega. Aki akodudo itabo

Kodi icare bakaru merekerewure taodo nowu ure joruduwadowuge ekao, cewu ure joruduwadowu bimodukae. Mare Jesus akokare: - bimodukare, ino, mare: - Itaidumode rakojewo jii ii ikirimi du kae, akaiboe karega. Oino. Bapera ao
Awu cewu ure joruduwadowu rema, dure readodure awu boe jamedu boeji, ure bu bapera keje jamedu. Paeruduware readodure jiboe boe jokoduie duji
Jesus ure ia boe makarewu towuje kimo. Bapera atugododumode jamedu boeji ma, imeardaere awu moto jamedu boe umodukae turugadu bapera atugododumode tabodu jituji. A
Imeduia Teófilo, nowu boetojiwu ino bapera keje, ire Jesus rore jiboe jamedu boe, ure boe eeruduwado jiboe jamedu boe, bu,
jii paru piji jii ruture baruto du kae, tui to apostolodoge eeruduwado Aroe Pemegarewu koia dukeje

Ica, ure tuiwodo du rekodaji icare ure towadudo tuie tabo to apostolodoge eegai, tui eeruduwadodu makaguragado dutabo. Merire ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure du tonajire ure towadudo eegai, tumagoi Pao baru tadawu o boe pemegarewuji ewiegai dutabo. Jesus rutui baru todu
Nowu boigoduwu togwagei ebodu keje, makore ei ekawo tuiaedo Jerusalém piji, mare epagawo nono jii Tuo makore jiboe ui tudowuje du kae, - du jire tamearudure iiabiji. Oinore akore
Paga karega, João ure boe etaimo pobo tabo, tagirema, tagao pegododumode Aroe Pemegarewu tabo oino maigodu
Emagerema, tui tudo pui dutabore, enorare ji, egore: - Cegimejera, oino maigodu kana amode Israeldoge eeda pemegado pugeje? Akore ei
Piji, ukare turugadu taeruduwawo Pao ure biado pudabo boeji
Mare ica, Aroe Pemegarewu umode turawuje tawugeje, umode tabewudo, dukoiare tamagomode iiboeji Jerusalém tada, Samaria o moto jamedu keje, jii moto okwa kae toro
Akoinodu tonajire icare ruture baruto eegai, icare okware pi tuku eeku piji boetugu tada
Etaiwore ji du tonajire icare ime ei pobedu, ekudae kigadure eidu, ere towadudo eegai, egore ei
Galiléia pijiwu ime, kodiba tagaiwore baruto tu oino tamugui? Ica, awu Jesus arudure tabiji barutowu, umode turawuje tuibagi pugeje, umagai taerudure rutui barutodu jitu du reore pugeje. Apostolodoge
