Dukejere icare ere tugirimi Jerusalemto, cewu mugu puredure tu Jerusalemji boe aoporu iei Oliveira cedu piji, jae karega, ure nono Sábado jiwu awara tu je

Ere turemo cewu togwagere Jesus apo tadawu baito, erudure toro bai cobojewuto, cewu emugu emugure tadawuto. Emagereo: Pedro, João, Tiago, André, Filipe, Tomé, Bartolomeu, Mateus, Tiago (cewu Alfeu onaregedu), Simão (cewu Zelota), mare Judas (nowu Tiago onaregedu
Emugure tuiamedu tabo tumagoi baruto dutabo; ia areme emugure ebo jamedu, duwuge etoiado Jesus uce Maria rema; Jesus uwiemage emugure ebo jamedu. Ere Matias tawuje muguwo Judas mugato
Icá emugui nono dukeje, ia meri keje, Pedrore turagojedo tuwiemage etada, ere nono 120, icare akore ei
Iwiemage, umode turugadu uwo nono Aroe Pemegarewure Davi makodo cewu uture ure tugeragu Jesus jiwuge etododaiwu iei Judas cedu jiboere
Emare remagudure apostolodoge cedoda, maragodure cedabo jamedu
Awu imedu ure moto aru turo pegarewu mori tabo. Dukejere icare buture togea tabo, icare ure tuwo toiagi, icare peguru kubiri jamedure tuwowuje jamedu
Awu inodu akaru ure taodo Jerusalém kejewuge ewiegai, dukoiare cewu moto iere Acéldama, oino ewadaru tabo, du jire boe egore Boe Eku Pa, oino ji
Paga karega, judeudoge ekeroia epa bapera kejere atugododure oino: “Uwai bioromode, boe emugumodukare tada”. Ia pugeje atugododure oino pugeje: “Ia tuginoiwu muguwo mugato” (Sl 68,26; 108,5
Dukodi icare umode turugadu, mugure pagabo Pagimejera Jesus Cristo rakojei padodadu tonaji jii João o boe etao pegododu piji jii arudui pabiji jiwu meri kaewu ime,
ia etada mitotu jewu readoduwo cedabo Jesus jewodui tuwi piji duji
Icare ere etawuje pobe, duwugere José iei Barsabá cedu, iei Jetororewu cedu, mare Matias remage
Icare emagore Pao ji eparu tabo, egore: - Pao Aroe Eimejera, akire aeruduware boe ewabo jameduji, kode, ceeruduwado awuge ei pobedu kakoduwu bogaiba amagore,
muguwo Judas mugato awu cemaragodae keje, paga karega, cewure ure tuwarigu tuduwo ia tuieda kae
Icare ere tuiwa aidugirireboe barigu, dukoiare ere tugeragu Matiasji duwure icare metagere apostolodogece
Judeudoge ia eno peta iei Pentecoste cedu o meri ji, nowu Jesusre joruduwadowuge emugure tuiamedu tabo nowu bai mitodu tada
Dukejere icare ia biaruru aregodure pi tuku, umagai ia bakuru rakarewu aregodu reore, duwure nowu emugure tadawu bai korobadudo tu
Dukeje icare ia ure nono boe ekeru reoreboe jorugu ure tumaedo eiogi tu tu ewugeje
Icare Aroe Pemegarewu ure turemo eto, ure ewabo, etaora korawu pudabo. Dukodi icare emagore ia boe tuginoiwuge ewadaru ji, emagore nono Aroe Pemegarewui emago emago du reore
Nowu dukodi, aidure tumagowo Pao jiwu ia judeudoge makarewuge, duwugere etaregodure ia moto tuginoiwuge eiamedu boe piji, eedure Jerusalém bakurireu tada
Icare tumearudui nowu biaruru jitu kejere icare, ia boe makarewuge ere tudo pui nono, eebogodure ei, paga karega, eiamedu biapagare emagoi tuwadaru tabo duji
Ere tumearudu awadudo pudui, eeku kidugodure, egore: - Galiléia kejewuge karega egoino?
Kode, kodiba paiamedu tabore pamearudure egoi pawadaru tabo duji?
Parto pijiwuge, Média pijiwuge, Elam pijiwuge, Mesopotâmia pijiwuge, Capadócia, Ponto, Asia pijiwuge,
Frígia pijiwuge, Egito pijiwuge, Líbia mugui puredu tu Cireneji o moto pijiwuge, Roma pijiwu awararewuge,
Judeudoge, judeudoge ere joruduwadowuge, Creta pijiwuge, Arábia pijiwuge, paiamedu tabore pamearudure ereadodui pawadaru tabo Pao o boe pemegarewu kurireu jituji
Dukodi icare eiamedu matadure, eeruduwakare inoba tumeardaemode duji, enora enorare pui: - Kabobao?
Iagerema egore:- Eiamedu etaora bai baire parera kuru kori koia. Ino tumago pegai ei dutabo. Pedro uwadodae
Dukeje icare Pedrore turagojedo tumedage ebo, icare makore tumago raka tabo, akore: - Judeia kejewu ime, Jerusalém tadawu taiamedu boe, tawiapagado iwadaru ji, taeruduwado
Tameardaere awuge etaora bai baie, mare etaora bai bai karega ure. Tagado, meri rekare boe kao roga
Mare profeta Joel makore jiboere tudowuje oino

Pao koiare ure nowu profeta akodo oino: “Ica, meri boiwu kejere imode Itaroe Pemegarewu maedo boe eiamedu joki. Tagore ime, tagore areme emagomode iwadaru ji. Tagore ipare eerudumode Aroei, taopegamage enuiaomode jamedu
Nowu meri ji imode Itaroe Pemegarewu maedo itugare ime eiogi, dukodi icare emagomode iwadaru ji
Imode iro rakarewu udo tuguo coboje baru tada, imode iro rakarewu udo tuguo cebegi moto keje. Boe eku umode tumaedo, joru umode tumaedo, jeredudu umode tumaedo
Meri joku okwamode, ari umode nono boe eku reore, cewu Pao o meri kuricigorewu aregodumodedu otodai
Dukeje icare makomode Pao bogaiwu jamedu boe umode cinorudo, umode tubemegado.“ (Jl 3,15
Tawiapagado mato iwadaru ji, Israeldoge: Nowu Jesus Nazaré kejewu, Pao jore keje taegai turo rakarewu tabo, tui udo turo rakarewu towuje tagoiadoda dutabo. Tagire taeruduware ro oino duji
Emare makududodure uwo nono Pao aidure, joruduware. Dukejere tare bito, tare ia moto tuginoiwu pijiwu ime edo bu i padui pugajejedu keje
Mare Paore jewodudo, ure boe ekera kogure tabowu boe ewi kado, paga karega, boe ewi jetumodukare jii pudabo kodi
Ica, profeta Davi makore jiboe reo: “Iorudure Aroe Eimejeraji jii je itododai, paga karega, rakojere ikana pemegarewu jaogwai, imegikawo jice woje, jice woje
Du koiare iwabo jekarere, ikerure tojarodo pudui, ikodu umode tamudo, tubaga tabo boe pemegarewu bogai dutabo
Paga karega, amodukare akera ra ipiji bireuge eeda keje, amodukare akonaregedu kodu kodu pegado
Are jereboe kaewu awara ioruduwado ji, amode iegaredo du kuricigodo, imugui aegai dutabo” (Sl 15,8-11
Iwiemage, imode awadudo tawiegai: Paedoga Davi bire, tugudure mototo, jaore mugure padoda jii awu meri kae
Mare profetanure ema, dukodire joruduware Pao akoe pudui ia tuwagedu mugumode tumuga keje duji
Tuioruduwai oinoie boemode dukodire Cristo jewodumode duji, akore: Pijidodukare bireuge eeda keje, kodu pegadodukare
Paore awu Jesus jewodudo, awu inodu jire ceeruduware, cereadodure
Paore akaru kurido turo rakarewu tabo, ure Aroe Pemegarewu makai, du ure udo tumaedo boe eiogi. Oinodu jire taerudure, tamearudure oino
Paga karega, Davi mitodu rutukare baruto, mare du inodu tabore akore: “Pagimejera akore Pagimejeraji: Amugudo ikana pemegarewu jaogwai,
Jii imode onare aiwuge ewu awure kuda du kae” (Sl 19,1
Dukodi icare Israeldoge taiamedu, taeruduwa remawudo, awu Jesus tare bu i padui pugajejedu kejewu ema, jire Paore boe eimejerado, ure Cristodo ema duji. Meartorure boetojiwuge
Tumearudui oinodu jitu keje, ekiarigodure tuwabo tada, enoragodure Pedroji mare ia apostolodogei, egore: - Cemanamage, kode, inoba ceromode?
Icare Pedro akore ei: - Tameartorudo, tae jodo taro pegarewu piji, tai mito tu tu jedu tagao pegodo Jesus Cristo ie tabo ma, taro pegarewu okwawo, dukejere Aroe Pemegarewu makudumode tagai
Paga karega, Pao akore tumoduie maku boe etaiboe pemegarewu makudumode tagai, tagore etai, mearudure Pao makore jiboe jiwuge etai jamedu
Pedro mako kuricigore iaboeji kimo, okituwai ei oino dutabo: - Taginorudo awu boe pegarewuge epiji
Icare meartorure bataru jiwuge etao pegododure. Dukodi icare, meartorureuge ere 3.000 bega bega tu je nowu meri ji. Meartorure boetojiwuge ero pemegarewu
Ere tumeartorudo apostolodoge ere boe eeruduwado jiboeji, tumearudu kurii pui dutabo, togwagei baru tadawu boe eke pemegarewu jitu tabo, tumagoi Pao jitu tabo
Epagudu kuricigore, mare paga karega, apostolodoge ere turo kurireu awadudo nowu Jerusalém tada, dukoiare eiamedu boe epagudu rakaguragare
Meartorureuge eiamedu boe eiore puwugeje, enoroere toroece puapo
Ere to moto, toroe jamedu, ere maku, ere pedu puiamedu ai tu tu je
Emearudu kurire pui, etu eture Pao uwaito meri jameduji. Ere amireu kado oiado tuwai tada, enogwagere ji tuiegare tabo, tuwabo jetororewu tabo
Ere Pao ocaro ocarodo. Ere boe eiamedu aidu aidudo pudui. Paore iage eto eto pui etae, duwugere etaidure tuwo tubemegado
Pedro mare João erudunure Pao uwai kae togwamaguduwo ji meri jogodu tabo
Du tabore icare boere ia pogora pegare jii tuwodu tabowu imedu reko mato, dure ere mugu mugudo Pao uwaiporo iere motureu cedu paru, meri jameduji
Icare nowu imedu, tuiorudui Pedroji, Joãoji, ei turemo Pao uwaito dukeje, makore ei eno mea bogai
Icare Pedrore tuioku kidudo ji, João jamedu ure tuioku kidudo ji, icare Pedro akore ji: - Akaiwodo cei
Aiwore ei tu je, tubaga tabo ia eno mea bogai
Boekarema, Padro akore ji: - Ino meriri bokwa, mare imode mugure itaboboe maku akai. Nazaré pijiwu Jesus Cristo ie tabo, aragojedo, amerudo
Icare ure tugera kogudo iera kajeje, dutabore ure rakojedo. Dukeje kuri je, bure, bureraparure turagoje rakado, ure taredo coboje, icare merure
Ure turemo Pao uwaito, tumerui, turerui, tui Pao ocarodo dutabo
Eiamedu boe jorudure meruji, jorudure ui Pao ocarodo duji
Eeruduware nowu mugu mugure Pao uwai poro motureu paru tumagoi boe eno mea bogaiwu mitodu raboduie ure duji. Dukodi icare epagudu kuricigore nowu ure tudowuje jiboe kodi
Nowu imedu mugu puredure Pedro, João magei, dukodire jorudu paga pagawu ia boe makarewuge ere tudo pui etae, nowu baiporo kurireu iei Salomão cedu kae
Dukodi icare Pedro makore boei, akore: - Israeldoge ime, kodiba taebogodure oino? Kodiba taeku kidu barikare cei, uwo nono ceigoiaie cere awu imedu merudo dukodiwore?

Abraão o Aroe Eimejera, Isaac o Aroe Eimejera, Jacó o Aroe Eimejera, paedogamage eno Aroe Eimejera ure tonaregedu Jesus kurido, dure tare maku, dure tare pijido brae eimejera Pilato jekai, aidure tuwo inorudo, kodi karega
Tagirema, tare imedu pemegarewu pijido, tamagoi ia imeceba remawu imedu bogai dutabo
Tare ure boe eiamedu boe botudowu bito, du Paore jewodudo bireuge epiji pugeje, awu inodu jire ceeruduware, jire cereadodure
Cemeartorure ie jitu dukoiare, ie mitodu koiare ure awu taerudure jiwu, taeruduware jiwu imedudo turagojedo. Meartorure Jesus jitu dukoiare ure tubemega remawudo taiamedu jekai
Oinore icare, imanamage, iwiemage, ioruduware, taeruduwakare dukoiaie tarore oino, tagimejeragere oinono jamedu
Mare oinodu tabore Paore, makore profetadoge eiabiji turomode jiboe towuje: Tonaregedu Cristo umoduie tuiwodo
Dukodi icare tagiarigo taro pegarewuji, tameardae pemegado ma, taro pegarewu okwawo
Du inodu tabore boe pemegarewu, boe butugureu umode tuburedo tai, Pao koia, icare umode makudumode tagaiwu Jesus Cristo rojai tagae
Mare umode turugadu muguwo baru tada jii, moto, baru jamedu boe umode tubemegado du kae, uwo nono Pao makore profetadoge eiabiji, awu moto paru piji
Boekare, Moisés makore marigudu, akore: “Pao Aroe Eimejera umode ia profeta ure nono ireorewu kuo tamanamage etoiabiji, dure tamearudumode bataru jameduji
Biapagamodukare awu profeta bataru jiuge eiamedu boe ewogwamode pi tuku boe epiji” (Deut 18,1519
Profetadoge eiamedu boe ereadodure nowu inoduji jii Samuel piji jii awu meri kae

Profetadoge etorere tagi. Paore tuwadaru maku taomage etai, tagai jamedu, cewu makore Abraão jitu: Awagedu koiare umode awu moto kejewu boe eiamedu boe eiwa aidugirido ma, taiameduwo taiaedo taro pegarewu piji
Paore, tui Tonaregedu jewodudo dukeje, ure arego tagae boetoji, uwo taiwo aidugirido ma, taiamedu boewo taiaedo taro pegarewu piji
Apostolodoge emagoi boei du tonajire icare, sacerdotedoge mare saduceudoge, mare Pao uwai tadawuge eimejera etaregodure
Ekorigodure ei, enure boe eeruduwado kodi, emagore boe eewodumode Jesus ie tabodu jitu kodi
Icare ere tugeragu ei, ere tugu baicorewuto jii barogwa kododu kae, boeco puredugodunure kodi
Mare mearudure ewadaru jiwu ia makarewuge emeartorure ei, dukodi icare meartorureuge ere 5.000 bega bega tu je
Barogwatore icare, nowu boe eimejerage, nowu codudoge, nowu bapera epage, ere tudo pui nowu Jerusalém bakurireu tada
Ere tudo pui nowu sacerdotedoge eimejera iei Anás cedu apo, Caifás, João, Alexandre mare sacerdotedoge eiamedu apo
Ere apostolodoge eragojedo toiadoda, enoragodure ei, agore: - Ioguduba ie taboba torore oinono?
Icare Pedro, Aroe Pemegarewu metui tudada dutabore akore: - Boe eimejerage, paopegamage, tawiapagado mato iwadaru ji
Awuji tanoranure cei awu kogodureu bogai, ioguduba ie taboba pemegagodure du bogai

Icá, taiamedu boe, mare Israeldoge eiamedu, taeruduwado: Jesus Cristo Nazaré pijiwu, cewu tare bu i padui pugajejedu kejewu, mare Paore jewodudo bireuge epijiwu, ie mitodu tabore awu imedu pemegagodure, rakojere taegai
Tagire tare awu Jesus pijido ui nono ia ipo paga pagawu, mare ure turagojedo ure nono bai ipo remawu
Iaboe iaboe koia karega boe emode tuginorudo, boe emode tubemegado, paga karega, awu baru kuda iaboe iaboe ekie makudukare ime etai dukoiawo pabemegagodure, mare ie mitodu tabore umode pabemegado
Tuiorudui Pedro, João mage ekidagoduji dukoiare icare eebogodure, paga karega, eeruduware joruduwakare bapera jiwugeie emageduji. Eeruduware Jesus metageie emageduji
Mare eerudui nowu imedu pemegadodureu mugui ebodu jitu koiare, egoiwakare tumagowo ei
Ere apostolodoge edo tudawuje nowu emugure tadawu bai piji, dukejere icare emagore pui
Egore: - Inoba paromode awu imei? Paga karega, ero kurireu akaru ure taodo Jerusalém tadawuge eiamedu joki, dukodire paroiwakare paeruduwa bokwado ero oino duji
Mare awu akaru ukawo taododu kuricigodo pugeje boe ekao, pamode epagududo emago kawo awu ie tabo iaboei iaboei awu otobiji pugeje
Icare emagore ewogai, egore ei emago kawo, ekawo boe eeruduwado awu Jesus ieji pugeje
Icare Pedro mare João egore ewadaru jipagi: - Tamagodo ji ka: Kakoduwuba pemegamode Pao jekai: cemeartoruwo tawadaru ji, iarema cemeartoruwo Pao bataru ji?
Ceroiwakare cemago kawo ceerudure jiboeji, cemearudure jiboeji

Dukejere icare enogituware ei pugeje, icare ere tugera ra epiji, erorerumode eidu kodiboe bokware kodi, epagudugodure boece jamedu, paga karega, boe eiamedu boe ere Pao akaru pemegado nowu ure tudowuje dukodi
Paga karega, cewu pemegadodureu imedu o jorure kodure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogiduredu kori. Meartorureuge ere Pao kurido tuiorudui apostolodegei pugeje dukoia
Nowu apostolodoge ere tudawuje nowu piji, dukeje ere tugirimi tumanamage etae, ereadodure ewiegai cewu sacerdotedoge, boe codudoge, egore puduiboe jamedu boeji
Tumearudui awu inodu jitu kejere icare, eiamedu boe ere tumago rakado Pao ji, egore: - Cegimejera, akire are awu baru to, are awu moto to, are mugure baru tadaboe, mugure moto kejeboe jamedu to
Akire Akaroe Pemegarewu koiare akagore cewu Davi okwabiji: “Kodiba padure pumekejewu boe ekodu kagirire pui? Kodiba boe emeardaere paga tu je, kodiba?
Awu moto kejewu boe eimejerage ere turagojedo, ere tudo pui tumago pegawo Pao ji, tumago pegawo o Cristoji” (Sl 2,13
Paga karega, ica, Herodes, Pôncio Pilato, padure pumekejewu brae eiamedu boe mare Israeldoge ere tudo pui awu bakurireu tada, etonare atugare pemegarewu Jesus ji, dure are boe eimejerado ema
Mare dutabowo erore nono akaidure marigudu uwo tudowuje
Dukodi icare, Cegimejera, akaiwodo ewadaru pegarewuji, dukejere atugaregedo awadaru arego boe etae tubagudu bokwa tabo rugadu
Akera raido boe ewugeje ma, boe ekogodae akeduwo, aro kurireu, aro rakarewu awadudo, atugare pemegarewu Jesus ie tabo
Awu enogwa kurireu akedu keje kuri je, nowu ere tudo pui kejewu moto amagadure, eiamedure okorobadure Aroe Pemegarewu tabo, icare ereadodure Pao bataru ji boe ewiegai, tubagudu bokwa tabo
Meartorureuge eiamedu ure nono ia boe ewabo ui mito tu je du reore. Iaboe iaboe emagokare toroeie toroece, mare eiamedu boe boe eiamedu oroere
Apostolodoge eragare, ekidare dutabore ereadodure Pagimejera Jesus jewoduji. Pao o boe pemegarewu awadure eiameduji
Iaboe iaboe marenarukare emage, paga karega, o motorewuge eiamedu boe, uwaireuge eiamedu boe, ere maku,
ere mori arego mato, ere bu apostolodoge ewure paru, du pedodure eiamedu ai tu tu tuboi du reore
Du reorere ia imedu iei José cedu (du apostolodogere iedo Barnabé, boe ewadaru tabo: Boe Eegareae epa), ia maragodure Pao uwai tadawu, Cipre moto pijiwu, o motore
Icare ure maku, ure mori reko mato, ure bu apostolodoge ewure paru jamedu
Ia imedu iei Ananias cedu, ure ia to moto maku, ure toreduje bie
Dukejere icare ure mori kado oiado, ia kobo mugure pudabo, toreduje aidui ji jamedu dutabo, ure ia kobo reko apostolodoge ewure paru kae
Mare Pedro akore ji: - Ananias, kodiba Aroe pegarewure tuienado awaboji, dutabore awadararodure Aroe Pemegarewuji? Dukodi icare awadararodure ako moto moriji

Umodukana turugadu amuguwo tabo, akai maku dukeje, iarema ai maku dukeje aroiwamodukare amuguwo mori tabo akaidui jitu keje? Kodiba ameardaere oinono awabo tada tu je? Ime ei karega, Pao jire awadararodure
Tumearudui nowu bataru jitu keje kuri je, cewu Ananias buture tuwi tabo tu je. Mearudure awu inodu akaru jiwuge eiamedu boe epegudugodu kuricigore
Dukejere icare ia ipare ere bireu reko nowu piji toro baawadu kae, ere tugu mototo
Boe raikare dukeje, oredujere turemo jamedu, tuioruduwa bokwa tabo ure tudowuje duji
Icare Pedro unoragodure ji akore: - Aredu, amagodo iwiegai: tare tago moto maku awu inodu mori bogai? Akore: -U! Nowu inodu bogaire cere maku
Icare Pedro akore ji: Kodiba tare tawadaru maku puai tawo tarokogado Aroe Pemegarewuji? Ica, ure akoredu tugu mototowuge ewure mugure jice baiporo keje, emode arego jamedu
Kuri je nowu aredu buture bure paru, icare bire tu je. Dukejere icare cewu ipare ere turemo, eerudure bireduji, ere reko toro baawadu kae, ere tugu mototo tu oino toredu meki,
Nowu boe eiamedu boe epagudu kuricigore; mearudure akaru jiwuge epagudu kuricigore jamedu. Apostolodoge ero kurireu
Du tabore icare apostolodoge ere turo kurireu makaguragado boe etoiadoda, ere tudo tudo pui cewu baiporo kurireu iei Salomão cedu keje
Iage epagudure tuwo tuburedo ei, boerema emago pemegaguragare ei
Meartorure Pagimejera jiwu ime areme emagagodure gu gu gu je
Du tabore icare ere kogodureuge etarego awara kae, ere emugudo kugadoge etada, Pedro o boetugu butuwo iage etae, kodui nono dukeje

Mugu puredure Jerusalém jiwu bakurireuge epijiwu ia boe makarewuge etaregodure jamedu, ere kogodureuge erego mato, ere Aroe pegarewuge emedure tadawu boe erego mato, icare epemegagodure. Braere apostolodoge etugu baicorewuto pugeje
Dukejere icare sacerdotedoge eimejera mare okwacere jaogwaiwuge (duwugere saduceudogere emage), ere turagojedo tugori kuricigorewu tabo
Ere tugeragu apostolodogei, ere etugu baicorewuto
Boekimorema, Pao ia o tupa ure nowu baiporo jado boeco oia keje, ure eebu baawadu kae, akore ei
Toro Pao uwai kae, tareadodudo boe etae bataru pemegarewuji

Tumearudui nowu bataru jitu tabore icare, ere turemo Pao uwaito, icare ere boe eeruduwado. Du tonajire icere nowu sacerdotedoge eimejera mare okwacere tuiaogwaiwuge ere tudo pui, dukejere ere brae eiemejera kurireuge, mare codudoge eto pui, dukejere emagore apostolodoge ewogai, etuwo mato nowu baicorewu piji
Icare nowu tugobaigarege eture toro. Boekarema, tui nowu baicorewu baiporo jado dutabore icare eerudukare ei, icare ere tugirimi tuibagi akaru tabo
Egore: - Ceerudure baicorewu mitu pemegaji, tugobaigarege eedure baiporo keje, icare cere baiporo jado, mare ceerudukare boeji nowu bai tada
Nowu akaru kejere icare, nowu sacerdotedoge eimejerage mare Pao uwai tadawuge eimejerage tori buture eiagi dugu dugu, enorare pui kaboba kodiba?
Boekarema, iage etaregodure akaru tabo, egore: - Cewu tare tugu baicorewu towu ime eedunure toro Pao uwai tada, tui boe eeruduwado dutabo
Dukejere icare nowu Pao uwai kejewu tugobaigarege eimejera uture tudugarege ebo toro etae, ure erego mato, mare butugu tabo, epagudure boe emode tori to pudui dukoia
Ere erego mato, ere eremo toro brae eimejerage kurireuge ere tudo puiwo kae. Dukejere sacerdotedoge eimejera unoragodure ei, akore
Cemago awadure tai takawo boe eeruduwado cewu ie tabo. Dukodi karega, tare Jerusalém korawu tare boe eruduwado jiboe tabo. Tagaidure tawo awu imedu ku butudo ceiogi?
Icare Pedro mare ia apostolodoge egore bataru jipagi: - Ure turugadu cemeartoruwo Pao ji ime ekori
Ica, paomage eno Aroe Eimejera ure cewu tare bito tai bu i padui pugajejedu kejewu Jesus jewodudo
Tugera pemegarewu tabore Pao ure rakojedo, ure boe eimejerado ema, ure boe einorudowudo ema, tuwo Israeldoge epemegado, tuwo ero pegarewu okwado
Awu inodu jire ceerudure, jire cereadodure, cewu Paore maku meartorure jiwuge eiamedu boe etaiwu Aroe Pemegarewu koia
Icare tumearudui nowu ewadaru jitu kejere icare nowu brae eiemejerage boe korire pudui, etaidure tuwo nowu apostolodoge ewido. Gamaliel mearudae
Boekimorema, ia nowu brae eimejerage ui mito tu jedu, ia fariseu iei Gamaliel cedu, joruduwa rakarewu, boe eiamedu meartorure jiwu, ure turagojedo
Makore boewo apostolodoge etawuje nowu piji biega tu je, dukejere akore tumedage ewiegai, akore: - Israeldoge ime, tameardae tugu, tameardae pemegado taromode awu ime eiwoji

Tawiapagado: marigudu ia imedu iei Teuda cedu ure tuguwo tui tudo nono ia imedu kurireu ureore dutabo. Ia ime ei puredu tu 400 cedu ere tudo pui ae. Mare bitodure, dukejere icare meartorure jiwuge eiamedu boe ere taodo, icare etagedure

Awu rekodajire icare, Judas Galiléia pijiwu, ure turagojedo pugeje boere cie bu bapera kejedu kodiboe keje, ure tumugudo boe eiamedu boe keje toro pudabo, mare ema jamedu bire, dukodi icare uture rekodajiwuge eiamedu boe ere taodo boe paru kajeje, etagedure jamedu
Oinore icare imode taeruduwado taro pega kawo awu imei. Nowu ime epiji, etudo. Paga karega, etaidure jiboe, erore jiboe aregodure ime epiji ma, okwamode taobiji
Mare aregodumode Pao piji ma, taroiwamodukare tawo okwado. Tamode tagonado Pao mitoduji. Icare emeartorure bataru ji
Emagore apostolodoge ewogai, ere boe edo iwara to ei. Dukejere icare emagore ei ekawo boe eeruduwado Jesus ie tabo pugeje, icare ere tugera ra epiji, ere etudo
Icare apostolodoge ere tudawuje nowu brae eimejerage ere tudo puiwo piji tuiegare tabo, mare ure turugadu brae eroreruwo pudui Jesus ie koia dukodi
Meri jameduji jii je ere boe eeruduwa eeruduwado Pao uwai tada, boe ewai tada jamedu

Nowu dukodi meartorureuge eidodu kuricigore, dukodire nowu Grécia o moto pijiwu ime emago pegagodure hebreudogei, paga karega, to okoge bokwarewu areme eredugodure, nowu ei toroe pedo pudui dukeje tu tu tu je
Dukodire icare nowu apostolodoge ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu ere meartorureuge eto pui, egore ei: -Ukare turugadu cewo boe enoroe remagu, cei Pao bataru pijido dutabo

Dukodi icare, iwiemage, tamode ia ime pemegarewuge, joruduwarewuge, Aroe Pemegarewu jore kejewuge ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu, tamode etawuje tabiji, duwugere cemode awu maragodae maku etai
Cegirema, cenogwamagudumode Pao ji cereadodumode Pao bataru ji
Dukodi, ere tawujewuge reo: Estêvão, ia meartoru kurireu imedu, Aroe Pemegarewu jore kejewu; Filipe, Prócoro, Nicanor, Timon, Parmena, mare ia meartorureu Antioquia pijiwu iei Nicolau cedu
Ere awuge erego apostolodoge etae, duwugere, togwamagudui Pao ji eparu tabo dutabore icare ere tugera bu ewugeje
Icare Pao bataru ure taododu kuricigodo, meartorure Pao bataru jiwuge emagagodu remawunure nowu Jerusalém tada, nowu judeudoge eno sacerdotedoge makaguragarewuge emeartorure jamedu. Diácono Estêvão
Cewu Estêvão, Pao o boe pemegarewu, ro rakarewu jore kejewu imedu, ure turo kurireu towuje towuje boe etoiadoda

Boekimorema, ia boe keje, ia sinagoga tadawuge, duwuge ekiere libertodoge ia Cirene pijiwuge, Alexandria pijiwuge; Cilícia, Asia pijiwuge eno sinagoga tadawu ia emage ere turagojedo tumago pegawo Estevaoji
Mare egoiwakare ji, joruduwa rakarewure ema kodi, Aroe Pemegarewu jore keje kodi
Dukodi icare ere ia ime ero pegado emagowo tumearuduie mako pegai Moisés jituji, Pao jituji
Icare ere boe eiamedu boe, codudoge, escribadoge, eiodo tuwadaru keje Estevaoji. Icare ere tugeragu ji, ere reko toro brae eimejerage etae
Icare ere nowu batararodureu ime erego mato, duwuge egore: - Awu imedu mako pega pegare Pao uwaiji, Moisésre boe eroiaguduji jamedu
Cemearudure makoi oinoduji: Jesus Nazaré pijiwu umoduie awu Pao uwai butudo, umoduie Moisere cerodo boe barigu puibagi
Dukejere icare nowu brae eiemejerage eiamedu boe ere tuioku kidudo ji, etaiwore ji. Boekarema, je urugure nono ia Pao o tupare
Icare sacerdotedoge eimejera unoragodure ji, akore: - Oino rugaduna?
Akore ei: -Iwiemage, imanamage, iogamage, tawiapagado mato. Pao Aroe Eimejera ure towadudo paedoga Abraão jekai, mugure Mesopotâmia kimo dutabo, kodumode tumuguwo Hara kejedu otodai
Akore ji: Atawuje ako moto piji, awobe epiji, atudo toro imode aerududo jiwu moto kae
Icare ure tudawuje Caldéia moto piji, uture toro Hara moto kae, dupijire, uo okware dukeje, Pao Aroe Eimejera ure aru awu tumugure kejewu moto kae
Ukare ia moto makai o motoce rugadu, mare akore tumoduie makai, dukejere tumeduie maku ore etai, orekare roga dutabo
Pao akore ji mugumoduie ia moto tuginoiwu keje, toroie ia brae emode tudugaregedo emage, erorerumode ei, jorumode ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure du tonaji
Mare Pao akore oino jamedu: - Irorerumode rorerure eiwugei, dukejere etaregodumode nowu piji tumaragoduwo inai awu moto keje

Icare Paore tumeduiado Abraãoce, dukodire Abraão ure tuwiri kado, dukodire ure Isaac botudo, dukejere, merire ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto dukeje ure Isaac biri kado jamedu. Isaac ure tonaregedu Jacó biri kado jamedu, duwure tore ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu ewiri kado jamedu, duwugere paedogamagere emage
Icare nowu Jacó ore ekorire tuwie José ji, du ere maku Egito kejewuge ekera kae. Mare Pao mugure apo

Ure inorudo ucebae jamedu boe piji, ure jiwo aidugirido, ure joruduwa rakaguragaredu makai nowu Faraão, Egito kejewuge eimejera kurireu jekai, duwu ure Egito kejewuge eimejerado ema, ure jetudo tuwai jameduji jamedu
Dukejere boe eke boi kurireure Egito kejewugei, boe ere tuiwo kuricigodo. Paedogamage eeruduwakare kaboba emode ko
Mare Paedoga Jacó joruduware trigoie Egito keje duji, dukeje ure tore ekodudo toro boetoji
Du rekodajire eture toro pugeje, dukeje José ure tumanamage edo boe pa pudui, icare ure brae eimejera kurireu Faraão jorududo tuwobei
Dukejere José makore tuo bogai uwobe eiamedu tabo, duwugere emagare, ere 75
Icare Jacó ure turawuje Egito kae, nonore akurure, paedogamagere jamedu
Icare ere era reko jice Siquém moto kae ere etugu Abraão ure aruwu aroe eiaro tada. Ure nowu aroe eiaro aru mori kuri inodu tabo, Henoc ore ekera piji, duwu Henoc nowu Siquém kejewure ema
Boe aregodure pudae Pao makore Abraão jiboe umode tudowuje du kae. Abraão uwobe eidodure, erijodure Egito keje
Jii ia Egito kejewuge eimejera kurireu tuginoiwu boture, du joruduwakare José jiboeji
Nowu brae eimejera pega remawunure paobei, rorerure paomagei, ure edo tore ewarigu ewiwo
Nowu dukodi Moisés boture. Moture Pao jekai, mugure tuwai tada arii pobe ma jewu metuia bokware
Dukejere, barigudure dukeje, Faraão onaregedu aredu ure tugeragu ji, ure ricodudo umagai tonaregedu jiture
Moisés joruduwadodure Egito kejewuge eeruduware jiboe jamedu boeji, ure tudurudo tuwadaru tabo, turo tabo
Aregodure tuioru ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogiduredu kae dukeje, aidure tuioruduwo tuwobe Israeldogei
Nonore icare jorudure ia Egito kejewu imedu rorerui ia jituji, aidure tuwo tugerabraredo ji, ure marenaru morido, ure nowu Ejito kejewu bito
Upagare tuwobe emode boe pa Pao umoduie einorudo tugera taboduji, mare ekare boe pa
Nowu meri rekodajire icare, ia emage ei pobedu erugodunure pui, icare jemarure tuwo ewudugugo pui. Icare akore ei: Imedage, tawobenure puje, kodiba tagorigodunure pui?
Mare nowu ure tuwie okoridowu akore ji: Ioguduba koiba ure cegimejerado aki?
Amodukana iwido nowu aro magai Egito kejewu jitudu reore?
Awu bataru keje, Moisés rekodure, ure tuwiado, mugure Madian moto keje, tui nono ia moto tuginoiwu pijiwu reore, torore ure toredo pobe
Joru makaguragare dukejere Pao ia o tupare towadudo jekai, toro boe pagawu tada, puredu Sinai torekoduji, ia botoguru uru oiabiji
Icare Moisere tumeardaedo pudui, tuiorudui nowu jitu koia, ure tuburedo tuioruduwo kaboba jiba inoba ureuba
Dukejere Pao makore ji, akore: Imire aomage eno Aroe Eimejeranure imi, Abraão, Isaac, Jacó eno Aroe Eimejeranure imi. Icare Moisés pagudugodure, ukare tuioku awogado
Icare Pao akore ji: Awure tadawu tawuje. Boe pagawu moto keje karega aragojere
Iorudu birigodure mugure Egito kejewu iwobe ecebaeji. Imearudure etoraguduji, icare itaregodure iwo edo cinorudo. Ica, mato, imode atudo Egito kae

Awu Moisés mitodu, du ere barigu tagoi oino jitu tabo: Ioguduba ure cegimejerado aki? Emare Paore utudo tui boe eimejerado ema, tui boe einorudowudo ema dutabo, nowu ure towadudo botoguru tadawu Pao o tupa jetui jitu tabo
Emare ure paomage etawuje Egito piji, tui turo kurireu awadudo Egito keje, Pobo Kujagureu keje, boe pagawu keje jorure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure du tonaji
Awu Moisés mitodu makore israeldogei, akore: Pao umode ia profeta tawuje tabiji tawogai, du umode nono ireore
Awu Moisés mitodu mugure paomage eedui boe matadu tadawuge ebo, mugure makore ji Sinai torekodu ao kejewu Pao o tupa apo jamedu. Aire boe eemode koiawu bataru makudure ai, tuwo maku cenai
Paomagerema, emeartorukare ji; tuwabo tadare ere tugirimi Egito kae
Emagore Aarão biegai, egore: Ia aroe eimejerage etawuje cenai ewo cerego. Paga karega, ure cedawuje Egito pijiwu Moisés jire ceeruduwakare kaiba kodure
Nowu dukodi ere ia tapira imedu to meriri ekureu tabo, tui ia aroe eimejera pagawudo ema, ere barege ewido jekai, eegarere nowu turore tugera tabo boeji

Dukodi icare Pao ure tuiaedo epiji, ure epijido ewo tubujodo baru tadawu kuiejedogei, uwo magai atugododure profetadoge eno bapera keje du reore: “Israeldoge, tare barege ewido tawo ikurido, nowu boe matadu keje, jorure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure pugeje du tonaji?
Ukare ino. Mare tagaidure Maloque uwaiji, tagodure tao pagawu Refa awara ji, tare awague etowuje tagera tabo tawo tabujodo ei” (Am 5,2527
Pao bataru jaira mugure paomage ebo boe pagawu tada. Awu Pao bataru jaira todure nono Pao makore Moisés jitu du reore

Makudure paomage etai duwugere arego biri kadodukarewuge eno moto kae, tugimejerai Josué du tonaji. Dukodi, Paore nowu biri kadodukarewuge etawuje nowu piji, ure eiaedo paomage ei. Icare nowu Pao bataru jaira mugure toro ebo jii paomage eimejera Davi aregodu kae
Awu imedu pemegare Pao jekai, akore pudui tuwo ia bai mugudo Jacó o Aroe Eimejera ai
Boekarema, paomage eimejera Salomão rugadure ure Pao kurireu uwai mugudo

Du inodu tabo, Pao Aroe Eimejera mugukare ime ere pemegadowu baidoge etada, ure nono profeta akore: 49”Barure imuga reno, motore iwure pa reno. Kakoduwu baiba tamode pemegado inai? Oinore Pao akore: Kakoduwu boe eedaba imugure tada?
Imi karega ire boe jamedu pemegado? “ (Is 66,12
Aora rakarewu ime, birikadodukarewu tawabo tawiaja tabowu ime, tare tadugu tadugu Aroe Pemegarewu ro kuda. Taro tarore nono taedogamage ereore
Kakoduwu profetadoge eiba taomage ekodu kagirikare ei? Taomagere makore Imedu Pemegarewu aregodumoduiedu jiwuge ewido, tagirema nowu Imedu Pemegarewu maku, tare bito
Tagaire Moisés o boe eroiagu makudure tagai, Pao o tupadoge ekera piji, mare tameartorukare ji
Emearudui awu bataru jitu kejere icare, ekodu kagirire ji, ere boe to ji boe kori koia ji
Emarema, Aroe Pemegarewu mugure apo, ure tuioku kidudo baruto, Aiwore Pao Aroe Eimejera uruguji
Icare akore: - Ica, iorudunure barui tuiado duji, Imedu Onaregedu rakojei Pao Aroe Eimejera kana pemegarewu jaogwai duji
Dukeje icare enoiogwari kuricigore, ere tugera bu tuwiaja keje, eiamedure ere tubodo apo turugodu tabo ji, boe kori koia ji
Ere reko toro bakurireu kujebiji, ere tori to ji tuwo bito. Ure tori to jiwuge ere to aroia boarewu tawuje, ere bu nono ia iparedu iei Saulo cedu apo
Dukejere ere tori to nowu Estevaoji. Emarema okwamagudunure Pao ji, akore: - Ikimejera Jesus, akeragu itaroeji akabo
Dukejere ure tubujodo, icare oiogwarire, akore: - Pao Aroe Eimejera, awiagodudo awuge eroi ii duji. Icare, awu tuwadaru kejere icare akurure

Saulo jore ewugeje, ei nowu Estêvão bito duji. Nowu meri mitodu jire icare brae erugodu kuricigore Jerusalém kejewu meartorureugeidu ure tubaru towuje. Dukodi icare nowu meartorurewuge ere taodo Judeia kao, Samaria kao; tu apostolodoge emugure Jerusalém tada
Du tonajire ia meartorureu ime eemarure tuwo Estêvão tugu mototo, etoragudu kuricigore bukeje
Saulo rema, kodu kagirinure Igrajaji. Dukodire ure turemo baidoge eto, ure ime, areme etawuje nowu piji, ure erego baicorewuto. Dicono Filipe maragodui Samaria kejedu
Boekarema, ure taodowuge etu eture boe jamedu keje tureadodui Pao bataru jitu dutabo
Ia emage iei Filipe cedu, ure turawuje Samaria moto kae, readodure Cristoji mugure nowu moto kejewuge ewiegai
Makarewuge ewiapaga awadure nowu Filipe bataru ji, ewiapagare ji, eerudure ro pemegarewu kurireuji
Boekimorema, Aroe pegarewure tudawuje Aroe pegarewu meture tadawuge epiji, tuiogwari kuricigo tabo. Jamedu meru bokwarewu, pogora bokwarewu makarewuge epemegagodure jamedu
Dukodi icare boe eegare kuricigore nowu bakurireu tada. Bari Simão
Nonore ia imedu iei Simão cedu, mugure nono, dure turo rakarewu to to bakurireu tada, dukoiare Samaria kejewuge eebogodure roji, du ure nono ia bari ro rakarewure
Biegarewuge, ricorewuge eiamedu boe ewiapagare ji, egore: - Awu imedu ure nono Aroe Eimejera iei Kuirireu cedu ro rakareboere
Emeartorure ji, paga karega, marigudu ure eekuri paga pagado turoi bidugudugu jitu tabo eegai
Mare emearudure Filipe makoi Pao o boe pemegarewuji, Jesus Cristo akaruji, du rekodajire icare emeartorure bataru ji, icare ime, arema, etaidure tuwo tao pegodo
Icare nowu Simão jamedu meartorure, icare ao pegododure. Icare ukare tuiaedo Filipeji, tuiebogodui ro pemegarewu, ro kurireu makarewuji
Apostolodoge emugure Jerusalém tadadu, emearudure Samaria kejewuge ei tugeragu Pao bataru jituji, icare ere Pedro mare João etudo toro etae
Awuge etaregodure toro dukejere icare enogwamagudure Pao ji nowu meartorure maiwuge eparu tabo, Aroe Pemegarewu makuduwo etai
Awurema karega, nowu dukodi Aroe Pemegarewu makudukare ia etai ia etai roga, mare etao pegododure Jesus ie tabo tu je
Dukodi icare nowu apostolodoge ei pobedu ere tugera bu etaora keje Aroe Pemegarewu makuduwo etai du bogai
Icare cewu Simão jorudure Aroe Pemegarewu makudui etai Apostolodoge ei tugera bu etaora keje dutabo duji, icare akore tumoduie diiero maku etai, tagoi oino dutabo
Awu taro raka maku inai jamedu ma, imode ikera bu aora kejewu jamedu boe Aroe Pemegarewu makuduwo etai
Icare Pedro akore bataru jipagi: - Ako diiero okwawo pi tuku akabo, ameardaere Pao o boe pemegarewu akomoduie diiero morice dukoia
Awu Pao maragodae ia koborogu makudukare akai rugadu, paga karega, awabo rorogodure Pao jekai kodi
Akodorogado ai awu aro pegarewuji, akogwamagududo Pao ji, boe jokodu kare kare, awu aro pegarewu okwawo
Mare paga karega, itaiwonure ai, jirireboe kuricigorewu tadare amugure, boe pegarewu ure akogudo
Icare nowu Simão akore: - Tagogwamagududo Pao ji iparu tabo ma, tamagore jiboe iaboe iaboe ekawo tudowuje ii

Icare apostolodoge ereadodure Pao bataru ji, tui tuiodo keje turo pemegarewu tabo dutabo, dukeje icare ere tugirimi Jerusalém kae. Ere Pao bataru kogado Samaria kejewuge eno moto kao. Etiópia kejewuge eimejerago utugare kurireu
Icare Pao o tupa aregodure Filipe ae, akore ji: - Aragojedo, atudo woje cebegi, ure turawuje Jerusalém pijiwu nowu moto biororewu iei Gaza cedu kaewu awara ji

Icare Filipe ure turagojedo, uture toro. Boekarema, ia Etiopia kejewu ia eunuco imedu, duwure Etiopia kejewuge eimejerago iei Candace cedu utugare kurireu rema, jeture oroe jamedu boeji, du uture Jerusalemto togwamaguduwo Pao uwai tada
Icarema unure tugirimi to imaridorewu tabo, dutabore makore profeta Isaias o baperaji
Icare Aroe Pemegarewu makore Filipeji, akore: - Apuredu pemegado nowu imaridorewuji
Icare Filipe ure tuburedo ji, mearudure cewu eunuco makoi profeta Isaias o bapera
atugoji. Icare unorare ji akore: - Are boe pa amagoi bapera jituji? Aeruduware ji?
Akore: - Inoba ioruduwamode, boekai inodu kogado iwiegai dutabo? Icare makore Filipeji rutuwo uwo tumugudo tumegi
Boekare, padure bapera kejeboe reo: “Ere reko bitoduwo umagai ia barogorogu ureore, umagai mako bokwarewu ia cordeirorogu du ere burogu kado du reore, du reorere ukare togwa jado
Ure tuwiegado dukoiare ere pegado, Ioguduba umode ore eremagu? Paga karega bimode dukodi”. (Is 53,
Icare nowu eunuco akore Filipeji: - Areadodudo iwiegai ioguduba jiba profeta akoino? pudumi na? ia tumeduiaji na?
Dukodi icare readodure. Ure tuwadaru paru tawuje nowu padure bapera kejewu bataru piji, icare readodure biegai Jesus jiboeji
Eture todobiji, dutabore etaregodure ia pobo ja kae, icare nowu eunuco akore: - Pobo reo. Kodiba umodukare turugadu itao pegododuwo?
Icare Filipe akore: - Ameartorumode awabo jamedu tabo dukeje, umode turugadu. Icare akore: - Imeartorure Pao Onaregedui Jesus Cristo ceduji
Ure imaridorewu buredo, icare ei pobedu ere turawuje pobo kae, icare Filipere nowu eunuco ao pegodo tu je
Ere tudawuje pobo piji kuri je dukejere icare Pao o Aroe Pemegarewu ure tugeragu Filipeji pi tuku toro eunuco joku piji. Icare nowu eunuco uture todobiji tadawara ji, tuiegare kuricigo tabo
Du tonajire Filipe rekodudodure Azoto kae. Icare uture toro kujebiji, ure Pao bataru kogado bakurireuge eiamedu tada, jii taregodui Cesaréia moto kae du kae . Saulo meartorui Pagimejera bataru jidu
Du tonajire icare Saulore akedo pudui tuwo Pagimejerare joruduwadowuge epagududo tuwo ewido. Dukodi icare uture sacerdotedoge eimejera ae

Makore ji bapera bogai tuduwo Damasco bakurireu kejewu judeudoge ere tudo pui tumagowo Pao o baperaji tadawu baidoge eiere sinagogadoge cedu etae. Aidure tuwo meartorureuge ime areme eiamedu reko ekera kogu tabo, toro Jerusalém kae
Boekarema, kodure awara ji du tonaji, puredu tu Damasco bakurireuji, icare, aregodure baru pijiwu ia urugureboe rakarewu ure taiado apo pi tuku je
Emarema, buture moto kae tuku. Icare mearudure ia boe emagoji akore ji: - Saulo, Saulo, kodiba akonare ii awo iwido?
Icare Saulo akore ji: - Ikimejera, ioguduba akiba? Icare Pagimejera akore ji: - Jesusnure imi dure are aiagu iwido. Boe pegarewure, ai awure to meriri oto todu rema
Icare amagadure tubagudu koia, icare akore: - Ikimejera, inoba akaidure irowo? Icare Pagimejera akore ji: - Aragojedo, awo aremo bakurireuto, dukejere boe emagomode ai inoba aromode duji
Boekarema, uture apowuge epagudu rakaguragare, eemeradure makoji, mare eerudukare boeji
Dukejere icare Saulo ure turagojedo moto piji, ure tuioku jado, mare jorudukare boeji

Dukodire icare uture apowuge ere tugeragu ieraji du apore ere turemo Damasco bakurireuto, du tadare mugure merire pobe ma awu metuia bokware jorudukai, okwagekai, kudukai boece dutabo. Ananias ure Saulo ao pegodo
Boekimorema, ia meartorureu imedu iei Ananaias cedu mugure Damasco tada. Pagimejera makore ji unuiao tada, akore: - Ananias, Ananias. Akore: - Ikimejera, imireo
Icare Pagimejera akore ji: - Aragojedo, atudo toro ia awara iei jetororewu cedu kae, icare anorare ia Tarso pijiwu imedu iei Saulo cedu bogai, Judas uwai tada. Unure togwa kurido
Du tonajire nowu Saulo jorudure tunuiao tada ia imedu iei Ananias cedu ui turemo tuwo tugera bu tuwugeje tuioruduwo pugejeduji
Icare Ananias akore pagimejeraji: - Ikimejera, makarewuge emagore iwiegai awu imedu jiboeji. Uie ure turo pegado meartorure aiwugei, Jerusalém tada duji
Woerema ure bapera arego sacerdotedoge eiemejerage ekera piji tuwo tugeragu meartorure aiwuge eiameduji
Mare Pagimejera akore ji: - Atudo toro ae, paga karega, ire nowu imedu tawuje tuwo itagaru reko boe eiamedu boe etae, boe eimejerage eegai, Israeldoge eegai jamedu
Imode udo boe pa uie turugadu boewo togorido igoia duji

Dukodi icare Ananias uture, ure turemo nowu baito, ure tugera bu ao keje, akore: - Iwie Saulo, Pagimejera Jesus ure towadudo awara ji aegaidu, ure itudo mato akae, aeku jadoduwo pugeje, akaroe okorobaduwo Aroe Pemegarewu tabo du bogai
Dukeje kuri je, iaboe ui nono kare ewodoredu buture joku piji, dutabore icare jorudure pugeje. Ure turagojedo taci je, icare ao pegododure
Dukeje okwagere, icare rakare pugeje. Mugure nowu Pagimejerare joruduwadowuge ebo, nowu Damasco keje meri makakare. Saulo uwadodae boetojiwu Damasco kejedu
Du tonajire kuri je uwadodure sinagogadoge ekao, akore boe ewiegai Pao Onaregeduie ure Jesus Cristo ceduji
Mearudure bataru jiwuge eiamedu boe eebogodure, egore: - Cewu onare meartorure Jesus jiwugei Jerusalém tada kanao? Aregodukana tuwo erego ekera kogu tabo toro sacerdotedoge eimejerage etae?
Saulorema, ure boe pa turo raka awadu iure, ure Damasco kejewu judeudoge epogurudo, tago awadui Jesusie Cristo rema
Meri makakare dukeje icare judeudoge ere tudo pui, ere tumeardaedo tuwo bito
Awu emeardae aregodure Saulo biaja kae. Emagerema eedure bakurireu baiporo keje meri ji boecoji, tuwo bito
Mare meartorureuge ere tugeragu ji boecoji, ere rawuje nowu bakurireu tori paru joki, metui kodo tada dutabo. Saulo maragodae Jerusalém tadadu
Du pijire icare aregodure Jerusalemto. Aidure tuwo tumeduiado meartorureuge ebo, mare eiamedu boe epagudunure ce, emeartorukare meartoruie Jesus jituji

Dukodi icare Barnabé ure tugeragu ji pudabo, ure reko apostolodoge etae, readodure ewiegai joruduie Pagimejeraji awara keje, pagimejera makoe ji, uie Jesus akaru kogado taidu raka tabo Damasco tada duji
Du otobijire icare, Saulo mugure ebo, tui tudawuje Jerusalém piji, tui turemo to pugeje, tui Pao akaru kogado tubagudu bokwa tabo
Makore Grécia kejewu judeudogei jamedu, awugerema etaidure tuwo bito
Icare meartorureu umanamage ere boe pa, dukejere icare eture apo jii Cesaréia kae, dupijire ere utudo toro Tarso bakurireu kae
Nowu dukodi Pao o Igreja butugugodure Judeia o moto jamedu keje, Samaria keje. Ricodure tumearudu kurii Pao jitu tabo. Aroe Pemegarewu koiare ure eidodudo. Pedro maragodui Lida kejedu
Pedro meru merure boe jameduji, bakurireu jameduji, ure turawuje Lida kejewu meartorureuge etae jamedu
Nonore jorudure ia imedu iei Enéias cedu, du padu pagare tuba keje jii jorure ikera awubodure pobe ma jewu metuia bokware ikera awobowuto padu pagai tuba kejeduji, ukare tubogora inogido kodi
Icare Pedro akore ji: - Enéias, Jesus Cristo koiare ure apemegago. Aragojedo, akera pemegado apaji. Kuri je ure turagojedo taci je
Icare Lida kejewuge eiamedu boe, Saron kejewuge eiamedu boe eerudure ji, dukodi icare emeartorure Pagimejeraji. Ia aredu jewodui Jope kejedu
Icare Jope bakurireu tadare ia meartorureu aredu iei Tabita cedu, mugure nono. Gregodoge ewadaru tabo iere Dorkas. Awu aredu pemegaguragare boei. Ure toroe maku maku du kuricigodo marenarue etai
Boekimorema, nowu boe keje, kogodure, icare bire. Icare ere aimo dukeje, erudure apo bairia cobojewu kae
Lida bakurireu mugu puredure tu Jope bakurireuji. Dukodi icare Jope tadawu meartorureuge emearudure Pedro mugui Lida tadaduji. Icare ere imei pobedu etudo toro togwamaguduwo ji: - Mato cedae kuri je

Icare Pedro ure turagojedo kuri je, icare uture ebo. Aregodure dukeje kuri je, ere reko cobojiwu bairiato. Ukoge bire pijiwu areme eiamedu boe ere tubodo Pedro apo, icare etoragudure tuiamedu tabo, ere jorududo nowu Dorkare tugera pemegado pudaewu eroia boarewu boe, ia tugudae makarewuji

Icare Pedrore eiamedu jeebu baawadu kae, dukejere icare ure tubujodo moto keje, okwamagudure Pao ji. Dukejere ure tugirimi nowu bireudo ae, dutabore akore: - Tabita, aragojedo! Icare ure tuioku jado, jorudure Pedroji, icare ure tumugudo
Icare Pedro ure tugera raido iera kae, ure turagojedo. Icare makore tuwiemage ewogai, nowu ukoge bokwarewuge ewogai jamedu, ure maku etai jewodu tabo
Awu akaru ure tumaedo Jope jameduji, dukodi icare makarewuge emeartorure Pao ji
Pedro mugure Jope tada meri makaguragare, ia ure barege ewiri pemegadowu imedu iei Simão cedu uwai tada
Nowu dukodi ia imedu iei Cornélio cedu, mugure Cesaréia keje, duwure ia Itália pijiwu tugobaigarege eimejeranure ema,
Rore nono Pao aidu reore. Meartorure Pao ji tuwobe eiamedu tabo. Ure toroe maku makudu kuricigodo marenarue etai, okwamagudure jii je Pao ji
Ia meri keje, meri jogodu tabo, awu imedu jorudu awadure ia Pao o tupai tuburedo pudui duji, akoi: - Cornélio, Cornélio. oino pudui duji

Icare Cornélio ure tuioku kidudo ji tubagudui ce dutabo, akore: - Kaboba, Ikimejera? Nowu Pao o tupa akore: - Akogwamagudure bogaiboe, are maku marenarue etaiboe, aregodure Pao jekai dukodire biapagare ai
Dukodire amode ia ime etudo Jope bakurireu kae, emagowo ia imedu iere Simão cedu bogai, du ie bio Pedro rema, utuwo mato
Emare mugure ia ure barege ewiri pemegadowu imedu iei Simão cedu uwai tada. Uwai mugure pobo maerewu okwai
Icare Pao o tupa uture piji dukejere, makore tudugarege ei pobedu ewogai, makore ia tugobaigare mugure pudabowu, meartorure Pao jiwu bogai
Icare readodure ewiegai tuiorudure jiboe jamedu boeji, icare ure etudo Jope bakurireu kae. Pedro jorudure jiboe
Nowu meri rekodaji, emeru kimoi puredu tu nowu bakurireu jitu tonaji, meri pagaia keje, Pedro ruture bai ao boarewu kae tuwo togwa kurido
Icare uke boire ji, icare aidure togwagewo. Mare ere uke pemegado du tonaji, ure tunuiao pemegado taci je
Icare jorudure barui tuiado duji, iaboe ure nono ia aroia kurireu ui turawuje baru piji moto kae, oto kogure pobe puibiji duji
Nowu aroia tadare barege eiamedu, kiege eiamedu, awague eiamedu meture tada
Icare iaboe emagore ji: - Pedro, aragojedo, awo bito, awo kowuje
Icare Pedro akore: - Umodukare ino, Ikimejera! Ikare boe pegarewu kowuje jii je rugadu
Icare nowu boe emago akore ji pugeje: - Amago pega kaba Paore pemegado boeji, akagokaba pegaie
Awu inodure tuguwo pobe pugeje. Dukejere nowu aroia kurireu todure baruto pugeje
Pedrore tumeardaedo nowu jorudure jiboeji, kabobao? Du tonajire icare nowu Corneliore etudo torowu ime eragojere baiporo keje tuiemarui Simão uwai bogai
Ere tugera to baiporoji, enorare boei Simão iei Pedro cedu mugu rakuduie nono du bogai
Pedro mearudunure tuiorudure jiboeji du tonajire icare Aroe Pemegarewu akore ji: - Ica, imei pobe ma jewu metuia bokwaredu eemarunure awogai, duwuge emugure nono
Aragojedo, arawuje, atudo ebo apagudu bokwa tabo, inure etudo mato awogai dukodi
Icare Pedrore turawuje, jorudure nowu imei, icare akore ei: - Imireo. Taemarure bogaiwu imireo. Kaboba bogaiba taro oino?

Icare egore: - Tugobaigarege eimejera Cornélio, imedu pemegarewu, meartorure Pao jiwu, duwure judeudoge eiamedu jorudu pemegare ji, emare jorudure Pao ia o tupaji, duwure akore ji makoiagu awogai, mearuduwo awadaru ji
Icare Pedro makore ei ewo turemo. Icare ure emugudo tuwai tada, enuduwo nono. Barogwatore icare uture ebo, ia Jope kejewu uwiemage ebo jamedu. Pedro rakojei Cesaréia kejedu
Nowu meri rekodajire icare etaregodure Cesaréia kae. Nowu Cornélio upaganure ewogai. Makore tuwobei, makore tumearudu kurire jiwu tumedagei, ure ewie, dukodire emugure uwai tada tubaga tabo ewogai
Pedrore tuiagu turemo dukejere Cornélio ure tudawuje tuwo tugeragu ji, icare ure tubujodo Pedro bure paru tuwo tubujodo ji
Boekimorema, Pedrore rakojedo taci je, akore ji: - Pao Kurireu karega ure imi, imedunure imi jamedu, aragojedo
Icare, makoi jitu tabore icare, Pedrore turemo uwaito, jorudure boe makarewuge eedui nonoduji, akore ei
Taeruduware ukae turugadu ia judeu uwo tumeduiado ia moto tuginoiwu pijiwu imedu ji, iarema uwo turemo uwaito, macare Paore ioruduwado ukae turugadu cewo iaboe iaboe ewarigu cebiji
Dukodire itaregodure mato kuri je, boe emagore iwogai dukeje. Kode, kodiba tagagoino iwogai?

Icare Cornélio akore ji: - Merire pobe puibiji du otodaire, imugure iwai tada imagoi Pao jitu tabo, meri jogodu tabo, du tonajire icare ia aroia kigadureu meture jiwu imedu ure towadudo iegai, akore ii
Cornélio, akogwamagudure bogaiboe aregodure Pao ae, Pao biabuture are maku marenarue etaiboe bukeje
Dukodi icare amode iaboe etudo Jope bakurireu kae, makowo ia Simão iei Pedro cedu bogai, utuwo mato. Mugure ia barege ewiri pemegadowu imedu uwai tada, pobo maerewu okwai
Dukodi icare ire boedo tumagowo awogai kuri je, atuwo mato, icare iegarere atui mato duji. Oinore icare, cegireo cedui pui Pao jekai, cemearuduwo Paore amagodo cewiegaiboe jamedu boeji
Icare Pedrore tuwadaru parudo, akore: - Boe jokodu ioruduware Pao ukae iaboe iaboe kurido iaboe biegado pugori duji
Mare boe eeda jamedu boe keje aidu pemegare meartorure jiwugei, ro pemegarewuge eiamedu boeji
Paore tuwadaru maku Israeldoge etae, ure boe pemegarewu, boe butugureu readodudo ewiegai Jesus Cristo okwabiji, dure boe eiamedu boe eimejeranure ema
Taeruduware awu jamedu boe ui tudowuje Judeia keje, tui paru tugu Galiléia piji, João o boe etaimodu rekodaji
Taeruduware Paoi Jesus Nazaré kejewu kurido Aroe Pemegarewu tabo, turo raka tabo duji, dukoiare ro pemegare, ure Aroe pegarewu meture tadawuge epemegago, Pao mugure apo dukoia
Cegire ceerudure, cereadodure, ure towuje Judeia keje boeji, Jerusalém tada boeji. Dukejere ere bito, ere tugu i padui pugajejedu keje
Mare Paore jewodudo meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje, ure udo towadudo
Mare eiamedu eegai karega, mare tu Pao aidure jiwuge eegai, ceegai, duwuge cenogwagere apo, cegudure apo, jewoduredu rekodaji
Ure cemagodo tuwadaru ji boe etae, ure cereadodu pemegado Pudumie Paore jerewuge, bireuge eimejerado Pudumi duji
Jire profetadoge eiamedu emagore meartorumode jiwuge eiamedu boe ero pegarewu okwadodumoduie ie tabo
Boekarema, Pedro akoinodu tonaji, Aroe Pemegarewu ure turawuje mearudure bataru pemegarewu jiwuge eiamedu boe ewugeje
Aregodure Pedro apowu meartorureu judeudoge eebogodu kuricigore tuiorudui Aroe Pemegarewu o boe pemegarewu ui turorido biri kadodukarewuge ewugeje jamedu jituji
Emearudure emagoi ia boe ewadaru tuginoiwu jituji, ei Pao kurido duji
Icare Pedro akore: - Umodukana turugadu awuge etao pegododuwo? Awurema karega, Aroe Pemegarewu makudure etai ui nono makudure cenai du reore
Icare ure boedo etao pegodo Jesus Cristo ie tabo. Dukodi icare enogwamagudure ji emuguwo pudabo biegatu kimo
Dukejere icare apostolodoge, Judeia kejewu meartorureuge emearudure biri kadodukarewuge ei tugeragu Pao bataru ji jamedu duji
Du Kodi icare Pedro ruture Jerusalémto, dukejere icare enogituware ji
Egore: - Kodiba are aremo biri kadodukarewuge ewaito, icare, akogwagere ebo?
Macare Pedro readodure ewiegai ure tudowuje jamedu boeji, tagoi oino dutabo
Inogwamagudunure Pao ji Jope bakurireu tada, icare ire ido ikinoi, dutabore iorudure aroeji: iaboe ui nono aroia kurireu reore, oto kogure pobe puibiji, ure tudawuje baru piji puredu tu ii
Itaiwo birigodure ji, icare iorudu awadure barege, awague, kiege barege, emedui tada duji
Icare imearudure ia boe emagoi iwiegai oino duji: Pedro, aragojedo awo bito, awo kowuje
Imirema, inagore: Umodukare ino, Ikimejera, iaboe iaboe pegarewu ukare turemo iiagi jii je
Icare cewu boe emago akore iwiegai baru piji pugeje, akore: Amagokaba Paore pemegado boeji akagokaba pegaie
Awu inodu ure tudowuje pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, dukejere jamedu boe todure baruto pugeje
Dukejere icare ia ime ei pobe ma jewu metuia bokwaredu etaregodure nowu imugure tadawu bai kae, duwugere boere etudo iwogai Cesaréia piji
Boekimorema, Aroe Pemegarewu akore ii ikoduwo ebo ipagudu bokwa tabo. Awu cewiemage ei ikera awubodure mito taci jedu ekodure itabo jamedu. Icare cere ceremo Cornélio uwaito
Emare icare readodure cewiegai tuioruduie ia Pao o tupa ui towadudo tuiegai akoi pudui oinodu jituji: Amode iaboe etudo Jope bakurireu kae tumagowo Simão iei Pedro cedu bogai
Emare makomode ai bakaru pemegarewuji dukoiare amode akinorudo, awobe eiamedu tabo
Icare ire iwadaru paru tawuje du tonajire kuri je Aroe Pemegarewu ure turawuje ewugeje ure nono ure turawuje pawugeje marigu du reore
Du tabore icare iwiabuture Pagimejera akoino dukeje: Joãore boe etao pegodo pobo tabo, tagirema tagao pegododumode Aroe Pemegarewu tabo
Kode makudure meartorure jiwuge cenaiwu Pao o boe pemegarewu mitodu makudure etai jamedu ma, ioguduba imiba iwo ituu Pao Aroe Eimejera aidu kuda?

Emearudure awu bataru jitu kejere icare emago bokware ji pugeje, ere Pao jekaredo, egore: - Kode, biri kadodukarewuge etai jamedu Paore ero pegarewu kiarigodae maku etai, etaregoduwo boe eerewo kae. Antioquia tadawu Pao uwobe eparu ui tudowujedu

Du tonajire nowu ure taodo boe jamedu boe kaowuge, cewu brae etonare pudui boe keje, Estêvão o meri keje, etaregodure Fenícia kae, Chipre kae, Antioquia kae, tui Pao bataru kogado tu judeudoge ewiegai dutabo
Mare ia Chipre kejewuge, ia Cirene kejewuge, enogore ekaodu, etaregodui Antioquia kae dukeje, emagore gregodoge ei jamedu, ere Pagimejera o bakaru kogado ewiegai jamedu
Pagimejera mugure ebo dukodire icare boe makarewuge emeartorure, ere tugirimi Pao ae
Awu boe jamedu boe akaru aregodure Jerusalém tadawu meartorureuge ewiegai. Dukodire ere Barnabé utudo Antioquia kae
Aregodure toro dukejere jekarere tumearudui Pao o boe pemegarewu jitu koia, icare makore ei emugu kiduwo Pao apo, turo raka tabo
Paga karega, emare imedu pemegarewu rema, meartoru kuricigore, Aroe Pemegarewu mugure apo. Dukodire ia boe makarewuge ere tumeduiado Paoce
Kuri je dukeje icare Barnabé uture toro Tarso kae, tuiemaruwo Saulo bogai, icare jorudure ji, ure reko Antioquia kae

Joru mito tu jedu oto kae, etu eture meartorureuge ere tudo puiwo kae tu tu tu je, ere makaguragarewuge eeruduwado. Dukodire Antioquia kejere nowu meartorure Cristo jiwuge eiere cristãodoge oino boetoji
Nowu kodiboe keje ia profetadoge ere turawuje Jerusalém piji Antioquia kae

Ia emage ui mito tu jedu iei Agabo cedu, ure turagojedo, icare Aroe Pemegarewu koiare readodure ia boe eke boi moduie boei du kuricigomode moto jamedu boe keje. Boekimorema, awu boe eke boi aregodure nowu Cláudio brae eimejera kurireui pudumi du tonaji
Dukodi icare Antioquia kejeu meartorureuge etaidure tuwo tugera braredo, tuwo toroe maku Judeia kejewu tumanamage etai, tu tu, turoia reore
Icare erore oino rugadu ere maku toro Barnabe, Saulo mage ekera tabo. l2. Herodes onare Pao uwobei, ure Tiago bito
Nowu joru mitoduji, brae eimejera Herodes ure tudugarege edo ia meartorureuge eiemejerage ekera gogudo turoreruwo ei
Dukodire ure João umana iei Tiago cedu bito toriga raireu tabo. Pedro tugudure baicorewuto dupijire Paore inorudo

Icare nowu Herodes ure boe pa judeudoge etaiduie awu ro oinodu jitu duji, dukodire ure tudugarege edo Pedro ieragogudo jamedu. Awu inodu ure tudowuje nowu judeudoge ere amireu iogoae metukare tadawu kowuje jiwu meri ji
Icare ure tudugarege edo iera gogudo, edo tugu baicorewuto. Ure tugobaigarege ei pobedu jetu nono eetuwo ji, rekodu kawo. Aidure tuwo boe eerududo ji, nowu Páscoa rekodaji
Icare Pedro meture baicorewu tada, du tonajire icare Pao uwobe enogwamagudunure Pao ji jii je Pedro paru tabo

Boekarema, Herodes uiagu boe eerududo jiwu meri otodaiwu boeco tada, Pedro unudunure baicorewu tada, ia tugobaigarege ei pobedu etoiadoda, iera gogure meriri ikui pobe dutabo. Ia tugobaigarege eedure baiporo keje taiwo tabo ji

Boekimorema, Pao Aroe Eimejera ia o tupare ure towadudo. Kuri je boeragudure nowu bai otoji krk! Icare nowu tupare amagadudo Pedro meto, icare ure jetadudo, akore ji: - Aragojedo kuri je. Icare nowu meriri iku buture iera piji kuri tai je
Icare nowu tupa akore ji: - Akudawu tugu ai, awurekea kejewu tugu awurekoto. Icare rore ino rugadu. Icare nowu tupa akore ji pugeje: - Akudawu aroia bai tugu ai, ako itabo
Pedrore tudawuje, uture rekodaji tuioruduwakai boe jokoduie kodi karega; meardaere tunuiaoie ure duji

Ekodure boetojiwu tugobaigarege ekori, rekodajiwuge ekori jamedu. Dukejere etaregodure bakurireu okwaiwu baiporo meriri kurireu kae, ure tuiado taobiji, icare ere pagado kajeje taci, eture puapo nowu bakurireu kejewu ia awara ji, dukeje icare kuri je nowu Pao o tupa okware pi tuku je
Dukejere icare Pedrore boe pa, icare akore: - Icare iorudure boe jokoduie Pao koiaie ure to tupa arego iwogai tuwo ikinorudo Herodes iera piji, judeudoge epagare bogaiboe jamedu boe piji jamedu
Ure tumeardaedo dukejere icare uture João Marcos uce Maria uwai kae, nonore makarewuge ere tudo pui tumagowo Pao ji
Ure tugera to baiporoji, icare maragodure nonowu ia aredu iei Rosa cedu, uture jice tumearuduwo ioguduba ba?
Icare mearudui Pedro mako jitu koia, ukare baiporo jado tuiegare koia, mare rekodure tuibagi toro baito tureadoduwo tumedage ewiegai Pedro rakojeie baiporo keje duji
Egore ji: - Akaora bai baire? Akore ei pugeje ema rugaduie, ema rugaduie. Icare egore: - O Tupamode
Du tonajire icare Pedrore tugera to to baiporoji pugeje. Boe oto kejere icare ere baiporo jado, eerudure ji, icare erore poku, tori buture eiagi

Icare ure tugera onado ei emago kaiagu, icare readodure ei Pao Kurireu ui tuginorudo baicorewu pijiduji. Icare akore: - Tamode Tiago bie, tamode pawiemage ewie. Dukejere ure tudawuje nowu piji, uture ia boe eeda kae
Barogwatore icare tugobaigaegere tumorora amagadure du kuricigodo nowu ure tudowuje Pedro jitu koia

Herodes jemarure bogai, jorudukare ji, dukodire boedo tugogado nowu tugobaigaregei, icare ure edo ewido. Boe raikare dukejere icare Herodes ure tudawuje nowu Judeia moto piji, nowu Cesaréia kae, icare rakojere nono. Herodes bi

Herodes rugodunure nowu Tiro, Sidnia kejewugei. Awugerema emagore pui, dukejere eture ae, icare enogwamagudure ia utugare iei Blasto ceduji makowo ji, butuguguduwo pudui (Paga karega, awu Blastore etaidure jiwu boe eke maku maku etai
Icare makore jiwu meri jire icare Herodes ure brae eimejera epa aroia meture pudui dutabore ure tumugudo ture tugogado boei kejewu muga keje, dupijire makore ewiegai
Icare boere tugera to pui, egore: - Ia aroe eimejerare akoino
Nowu inodu keje kuri je Pao o tupa ure okorido, ukare Pao jekaredo dukoia. Icare ate ere kodu kowuje, icare bire. Barnabé, Paulo mage ere tugirimi Antioquia kae
Du tonajire Pao bataru itodure, ure tumaedo tu tu tugori
Barnabá, Paulo mage ere tumaragodae akedudo Jerusalém keje, dukejere icare ere tugirimi Antioquia kae pugeje. Ere João iei Marcos cedu ko pudabo

Antioquia tadawu Pao uwobe etada profetadogere, joruduwarewugere jamedu. Ia emage reo: Barnabé Simão iei Corewu cedu, Lúcio Cirene pijiwu, Manam cewu Herodes metuia tugodui puregodajidu kimoboe keje, mare Saulo
Ia meri keje, awuge ere todorogado pudui, dukejere ere Pao jora ko, dutabore icare Aroe Pemegarewu makore ei, akore: - Tamode Barnabé mare Saulo etawuje inai emaragoduwo itaidure jiboe keje
Dukejere icare, ei todorogado pudui dukejere, ere togwakurido eparu tabo, icare ere tugera bu ewugeje, dukejere ere etudo
Du koiare Aroe Pemegarewu koiare ure etudo, dutabore eture bakurireu mugui pobo maerewu okwai du iere Seléucia cedu kae. Dupijire eture ika kurireu tabo ia pobo aiare moto tabowu iei Chipre cedu kae
Etaregodure Salamina bakurireuto dukejere ere Pao bataru kogado nono judeudoge ere tudo pui tumagowo Pao bataru jiwu baidoge etada. João (Marcos) kodure ebo tuwo tugera braredo ei

Dukejere emerure jii je, nowu pobo aiare moto tabowu kajeje jii etaregodure Pafos bakurireuto, du tadare eerudure ia judeu iei Barjesu ceduji, duwure boe eekuri pagado turo tuginoiwu tabo, profeta pagarewunure ema
Mugure brae eimejera pemegarewu iei Sérgio Paulo cedu apo. Awu brae eimejera makore Barnabé mare Saulo ewogai, aidure tumearuduwo Pao bataru ji kodi
Icare nowu profeta paga pagarewu, du iere jamedu Elimas cedu, ure tonado ei, aidure tuwo nowu brae eimejera meartoru kado Pao ji
Dukodi icare Saulo, du iere Paulo, Aroe Pemegarewu mugui apo dukoia, ure tuioku kidudo ji, akore
Aroe pegarewu onaregedu, ure boe eekuri pagadowu, batararodureu, onare boe jetororewu jiwu imedu, anure Pao Aroe Eimejera utawara jetororewu meki mekido

Ica, oinonore icare iera butumode awugeje, dukoiare aeku bokwamode. Aerudumodukare meri jokuji jii boe emagomode ai pugeje du kae. Kuri je dukejere icare boeco buture joki, icare merure, ure taiado bai bai bai, jemarure ioguduba umode tugera maku pudai du bogai
Nowu brae eiemejera tuiorudui nowu Saulo ro rakarewu jitu kejere icare, meartorure Pao ji, jeebogodu kuricigore Paulo makore jiboeji. Paulo uwadodae Antioquia bakurireu mugui Pisídia kejewu keje

Dukejere icare Paulo uture tumedage ebo ika kurireu tabo nowu Pafos bakurireu piji, etaregodure Perge bakurireu mugui Panfília moto kejewu kae. Nonore icare cewu João Marcos uture epiji, ure tugirimi Jerusalemto pugeje
Ekodure toro Perge bakurireu kori toro Antioquia bakurireu mugure Pisídia moto kejewu kae. Dukejere icare ere turemo judeudoge ere tudo pui tumagowo Pao bataru ji tadawu baito, icare ere tumugudo

Dukejere boe emagore profetadoge eno baperaji, emagore boe eroiagudu padui bapera keje duji; dukejere nowu judeudoge ewai tadawu eimejerage emagore Saulo, Barnabé ewogai, egore: - Cemanamage, tagaidure tamagowo iaboeji boe ewiegai dukeje, tamagodo
Icare Paulore turagojedo, ure tugana aogado boe etae, akore: -Israeldoge, meartorure Pao jiwuge tagi, tawiapagado
Israel uwobe eno Aroe Eimejera ure tugeragu paomagei pudae, ure eidodudo, emugui Egito keje du tonaji, dupijire ure etawuje tugana rakarewu tabo
Jorui 40 du tonaji, ure enogwagedo ia kugaru awadure jiwu moto keje
Dukejere ure Canaã moto kejewu boe etuwobe makarewuge eeda kedodo, icare ure nowu moto pedo etai jorui 45 du tonaji
Dukejere ure jeture eiwuge emagu etai jii Samuel aregodure du kae
Dukejere icare enogwamagudure ia boe eimejera kurireu bogai pudai. Dukejere icare Paore Saul, Cis onaregedu, Benjamim uwobe, maku etai jorui 40 du tonaji
Dukejere Paore Saul pijido, ure eimejera Davi maku etai, du jire Pao akore: Iorudure Jessé onaregedu Daviji, itaidure jiwu imedu duwu romode itaidure jiboe jamedu boeji
Rekodajiwuge epijire Paore nowu ure boe einorudowu Jesus tawuje epiji uwo nono profetadoge emagore marigudu du reore
Nowu Jesus aregodu otodaire, Joãore boe eedorodowu boe etaimodu kogado, nowu Israel uwobe eiamedu boe ewiegai
Emare, tui tumaragodae akedudo du tonajire akore: Cewu tameardaere jiwu imedu, imi karega, mare iregodajire icare ia ikare irugadu iwo bure tadawu iku kiwujewu aregodumode
Iwiemage, Abraão ore tagi, meartorure Pao jiwugere tagi, pagaire awu umode paginorudowu bakaru rojaidodure
Paga karega, Jerusalém tadawuge mare eimejerage eeruduwakare Jesus ji, ere tugogado ji, ere bito, dutabore ere tumagore baperaji Sábado meri jiwu profetadoge ewadaru ere towuje
Enogwamagudure Pilatoji uwo bito, eerudukare ro pegarewuji kodi karega
Icare ere bapera atugododure taboboe jamedu towuje, dukejere ere tawuje i padui pugajejedu piji icare ere tugu aroe eiaoto
Macare Pao Aroe Eimejera ure jewodudo bireuge epiji
Icare cewu ruture apo Galiléia piji Jerusalém kaewuge eerudure ji meri makaguragare du tonaji, duwugere ereadodure boe ewiegai
Cereadodunure tawiegai Pao makore paedogamege eiboeji
Ure tumagore eiboe towuje etore ceegai, ure Jesus rakojedo ure nono bapera atugododure Pao roia tabodu reore: “Itonaregedunure aki, awuji ire atowuje” (Sl 2,7
Paore tonaregedu jewodudo bireuge epiji ukawo tugirimi tubegagoduwo, ure nono ako reore: “Imode imagore Davi jiwu ino boe pemegarewu maku tagai” (Is 55,3
Davi mitodu ia boe keje akore: “Amodukare atugare pemegarewu kodu pegadodudo” (Sl 15,10
Aró, kode, Davi rore nono Pao ui turoiagudu reore dukejere bire. Tugudure mototo puredu tu taomagei, icare kodu pegagodure
Mare cewu Paore jewodudo bierewuge epijiwu kodu pegagodukare
Dukodire, iwiemage, taeruduwado koiaie cereadodunure tawiegai boe ero pegarewu akedumode duji
Emare ure meartorure jiwuge eiamedu boe epemegago, mare Moisés boe eroiagudodu koia karega
Icare tamearudu awadudo tai cewu profetadoge emagore jiboe butukawo tawugeje

Nowu profetadoge egore: “Ure boe epijidowuge tagi, tamearudu awadudo tai, tadugu tai, tabagudu kuricigodo. Paga karega, imode iro kurireu tuginoiwu towuje taegai, du jire tameartorumodukare ji, iaboe ereadodumode tawiegai dukeje” (Hab 1,5
Dukeje icare, ere tudawuje du tonajire icare enogwamagudure ei emagowo pudai pugeje aregodumode pugejewu Sábado meri ji
Nowu ere tudo pui dukejere icare, judeudoge makarewuge, judeukare emawu meartorureu makarewuge eture Paulo, Barnabé mage ebo, duwugere emago emagore ei ekidawo tumugui Pao apo jii je
Nowu Sábado rekodajiwu meri ji icare nowu bakurireu tadawuge eiamedu etaregodure tumearuduwo Pao bataru ji
Icare judeudoge tuiorudui nowu boe makarewugei dukoiare, ekorire ei, emago pegare Paulo makore jiboeji
Dukodi icare Paulo mare Barnabé emagore ei tumago raka tabo, egore: - Tagaire Pao bataru kogadodumode tagai boetoji, macare tanure pijido, dukodi icare cemode cemegido judeukare emawuege etai
Paga karega, oinore Pao akore: “Ire atawuje awo boe eno moto tuginoiwu kejewuge erugudo, iwo moto kejewuge eiamedu boe einorudo” (Is 49,6
Awu bataru koiare ure jedukare emawuge eegare kuricigodo, duwuge ere Pao bataru kurido. Icare ere turugadu tuwo tumagu Pao ai, duwugere emeartorure ji
Du tabore icare Pao bataru ure taodo nowu moto jamedu joki
Macare nowu judeudoge ere nowu bakurireu tadawu ia areme kurireuge edo brae eimejerage erugo Pauloji, Barnabeji, icare ere etudo nowu to moto piji
Icare nowuge ei pobedu ere tuwureko tadawu moto urugudu jukodo ei. Ere tudawuje nowu piji, icare eture Icônio kae
Meartorureuge rema eegare kuricigore Aroe Pemegarewuji

Paulo mare Barnabé etaregodure Icônio kae, dukejere icare ere turemo judeudoge ere tudo pui tadawu baito, nowu turo oino reore, du tadare icare ere Pao bataru kogado. Dukodi icare judeudoge makarewuge, gregodoge makarewuge emeartorure
Mare ia meartorukarewu judeudoge, ere judeukare emawuge erugo nowu meartorureugei
Dukodi karega, Paulo mare Barnabé emugu raire nono kimo, epagudu bokware, emeartorure Pao ji, Pao ierabrarere ewadaru ji kodi, ure turo rakarewu to to nowu apostolodoge ekera tabo
Icare nowu bakurireu tadawuge ere tugado puiato: iage ere tumegido judeudoge eiaogwai, iage ere tumegido apostolodoge eiaogwai
Macare ia judeudoge, ia judeukare emawuge ere turagojedo turugoduwo apostolodogei, tuwo tori to ei
Dukeje icare Apostolodoge ere boe pa, dukodire eregodure Licaônia, Listre, Derbe bakurireuge ekae, oieiwu moto kae jamedu
Nonore icare ereadodure Pao o bakaru pemegarewuji. Ure tudowuje Listra, Derbe bakurireuge etadaboe
Nowu Listra tadare ia imedu pogora pegarewu mugure tada, meru bokware jii boture dupiji jii oino du kae
Mearudunure Paulo bataru ji tumugui nono dutabo, icare Paulore tuioku kidudo ji, jorudure meartoruie tuwo tubemegado
Du koiare ure tumago rakado ji, akore ji: - Aragojedo, aedorodo awure keje. Icare ure taredo taci je, icare merure
Icare nowu boe makarewuge, tuiorudui Paulo ro oinoduji dukeje, ere tumago rakado, enoiogwarire Licaônia kejewuge ewadaru tabo, egore: - Ime ereorewu Aroe Eimejerage ere turawuje pagae
Icare ere Barnabé iedo Zeusce, ere Paulo iedo Hermesce, paga karega, awu mako makore dukodi

Icare ia Zeus bure joia imedu iei Propeleo cedu ure ia tapiradoge ime eerego mato, nowu bakurireu baiporo kae, ure ekenawudo, ure edugodo tuwo ewido nowu Paulo mare Barnabé etai, tumearudui Aroe Eimejerageie ure emage, nowu boe eiamedu emeardaere oino jamedu
Mare nowu apostolodoge ei pobedu, tui boe pa nowu oinodu jitu kejere, ere tugudae bowuje, ere taredo nowu makarewuge etoiado

Egore : - Ime, kodiba taro oino? Boe bimodeugere cegi jamedu tareore. Ica, cenogituwanure tai tawo taedorodo, tawo tagirimi boe pegarewu piji, Pao jerewu kae, koiare ure baru to, ure awu moto to, ure pobo maerewu to, ure mugure jekeboe jamedu boe ure towuje jamedu
Marigudu ure moto kejewu boe etawarado mitotu mitotu tu ereore

Dukodi karega ure towadudo paiamedu jekai jii je, turo pemegarewu tabo, ure butaodoge ewududo pagai baru piji, ure boe pemegarewudo pagai, ure page kuricigodo boe jameduji, ure pawabo jekare kuricigodo
Mare rakare ei tukawo edo tapiradoge ewido, tukawo edo tubujodo tuiegai

Macare ia Antioquia pijiwu, ia Icônio pijiwu judeudoge etaregodure, duwugere ere boe makarewuge etaora pegado. Dukodi icare ere tori to Pauloji, icare emeardaere tuie bito duji, dukodi icare ere tumugudo keje kororo, toro nowu bakurireu baawadu kae
Dukejere icare ure joruduwadowuge ere taiado apo. Icare ure turagojedo taci, ure turemo bakurireuto pugeje. Nowu rekodajiwu meri jire icare uture Barnabé apo toro Derbe bakurireu kae

Icare ereadodure Pao bataru ji nowu Derbe kejewuge ewiegai, ere ture joruduwadowuge emagado nono. Dukejere icare ere tugirimi nowu piji, toro Listra, Icônio, Antioquia (Pisídia kejewu) bakurireuge etae
Ere meartorureuge emearudu awadudo pudui tuwo tudurudo tumeartorui Pao jitu tabo. Egore ei uie turugadu pawo paremo Pao mugurewo kae pabagai boe ecebae makarewu kajeje dutabo
Dukejere ere Pao bure jore kejewuge emugudo Igreja jamedu tada. Enogwamagudure Pao ji eparu tabo, tui todorogado pudui dutabo, tui togwa kurido dutabo
Icare ere pagado Pisídia moto kajeje, etaregodure Panfília moto kae
Ereadodure Pao bataru ji Perge bakurireu tada, dukejere ere turawuje Atália kae
Du pijire icare ere taredo ika kurireuto, ekodure Antioquia (Sria kejewu) kae pugeje. Nowu bakurireu pijire ere tudawuje marigudu tui tumagu Pao ai awu tumaragodae akedugoduredu kae
Etaregodure nono dukeje, ere meartorureuge eto pui, icare ereadodure ewiegai Paoi turo kurireu towuje etaiduji, ui judeukare emawuge emeartorudo tuwadaru jituji
Icare emugu raire nono ebo
Icarema ure turawuje Jerusalém pijiwu ia ime emagore Pao uwobei, egore: -Tamodukare tawiri kado, Moisesre boe eroiagudo du reore ma, tamodukare taginorudo. Oinore egore ei

Icare Paulo mare Barnabé enogituwa kuricigore ei, mare ekare tuwudugugo Icare eiamedu etaidure tuwo Paulo mare Barnabé etudo toro Jerusalém kae, ia tuwiemage ebo, tunorawo apostolodogei, inoba umode duji

Icare ere tugimadudo nowu Pao uwobe epiji, icare ekodure toro Fenícia, Samaria kajejewu awara ji. Icare ereadodure Pao uwobe eiamedu ewiegai icai judeukare emawuge emeartoruie Pao jituji. Dukoiare eiamedu jekare kuricigore. Apostolodoge eiamedu ere tudo pui Jerusalém tadadu
Icare etaregodure Jerusalémto. Nonore Pao uwobe, apostolodoge, Pao uwobe eimejerage ere tugeragu ei tuiegare tabo. Dukejere ereadodure ewiegai Pao rore puduiboe jamedu boeji

Macare iage, duwugere fariseudogere emage marigudu tumeartorure Pao jitu otodai, ere turagojedo, egore umoduie turugadu boewo judeukare emawuge ewiri kado jamedu, uwo nono Moisés ure boe eroiagudo du reore
Icare apostolodoge, mare nowu Pao uwobe ia eimejerage, ere tudo pui tumagowo nowu inoduji, inoba umode duji
Emago raire pui, dukejere icare Pedrore turagojedo, akore ei: - Iwiemage, taeruduware jii paru pijie Paore tugeragu ii tabiji ireadoduwo tuwadaru ji judeukare emawuge ewiegai ma, emeartoruwo ji
Emare joruduware ime ewaboji, dukoiare ure turodo nono tumearudu kurii ei dukodiwore, ure Aroe Pemegarewu maku etai, umagai maku pagai du reore
Aiwore ei taiwo magai pai du reore, ure ewabo pemegado emeartorure ji kodi
Kode, kodiba tagomare Pao ji? Tare joruduwadowuge enoredudo paomage eroiwakare jiboe tabo, paroiwakare jiboe tabo, kodiba?
Pagire pameartorure paginorudoduie Pagimejera Jesus Cristo o boe pemegarewu koia duji. Oinore umode etai jamedu
Eiamedu biapagare Pedro bataru ji tumago bokwa tabo. Dukeje icare ewiapagare Barnabé mare Paulo ereadodui tuwiegai Paoi tudowuje ekera tabo judeukare emawuge etaiwu turo pemegarewu kurireu jameduji
Emago akedu kejere icare, Tiago akore: - Iwiemage tawiapagado
Oino maigodu Simão Pedro readodure pawiegai Pao aiwoi judeukare emawuge eiduji, tuwo tuwobedo emage
Ica, awu inodu ure nono profetadoge ewadaru padui bapera kejedu reore
Awu inodu otobiji imode ikirimi, imode Davi uwai butureu rakojedo pugeje, imode uwai koborogu boe pemegado, imode rakojedo
Ma, rakoje kimomodeu ime ekoduwo Aroe Eimejera bogai, boe emagore ikie bogai bukejewu boe epadui pumekejedu jamedu boe ekoduwo bogai jamedu
Oinore Pao akore, duwure awu jamedu towuje, joruduware jamedu boeji jii paru piji (Am 9,
Dukodi icare imeardaere uie turugadu pakawo judeukare emawuge ei tugirimi Pao ae tuibagi pugejewu emorora amagadudo
Imeardaere uie turugadu pawo bapera atugodo etai ekawo makudure aroe eimejerage pagarewuge etaiwu barege ekodu kowuje, eerebari kawo, ekawo akere bitowu barege ekodu, eku, kowuje. Oino tu je
Paga karega, padure bapera kejewu Moisés ure boe eroiagudodu makodu makodure Sábado jameduji bakurireuge eiamedu tada boe eiamedu padui pumekejedu ewiegai jii marigudu jii oino

Dukodi icare apostolodoge, Pao uwobe eimejerage, Pao uwobe eiamedu boe eerudu pemegare tuwo ia ime etawuje tubiji, etuwo Paulo apo, Barnabé apo, Antioquia kae. Ere etawujewuge reo: Judas, iei Barsaba cedu, mare Silas, duwuge kurireugere emage tumedage etada. Jerusalém pijiwu boe eroiagudu
Ere reko pudabowu bapera atugo reo: - Apostolodoge cegi, Pao uwobe eimejerage cegi, cegimadunure judeukare emawu Antioquia tadawu, Sria tadawu, Cilícia tadawu cewiemage tagai
Cemearudure boe egoi ia uture cebijiwuge ei tumago maere tai, tui tamorora amagadudo dutabo. Mare cegire cekare etudo tawogai
Dukodi icare cere cedo pui, cere ia ime etawuje cebiji cewo etudo tawogai, cemearudu kurire jiwu Barnabé, Paulo mage ebo
Duwuge ere tumagu tuwidoduwo Pagimejera Jesus Cristo ie koia
Icare cere Judas mare Sila etudo ebo tawogai, duwuge ereadodumode nowu inoduji tawiegai
Aroe Pemegarewu apore ceerudu pemegare cekawo tagoredudo iaboe iaboe tabo, mare awu inodu tabo tu je

Tagogwagekawo makudure aroe eimejerage pagarewuge etaiwu barege ekoduji, takawo akere bitowu barege ekodu, eku kowuje, tagera keadu kawo jamedu. Umode turugadu tawo inoduboe pijido. Cegimadunure tawogai
Dukejere icare nowugere tugimadudo epiji, icare eture toro Antioquia kae, torore icare ere Pao uwobe eto pui, icare ere bapera maku etai
Emagore baperaji, dutabore eiamedu jekarere, icare emearudu awadure pudui pugeje
Icare Judas, Silamage, duwugere profetadogere emage jamedu, emago awadure nowu Pao uwobei, tui eeruduwado, tui emeardae awadudo pudui jamedu dutabo

Meri makakare ei nono, dukejere Pao uwobe ere tugimadudo ebo pugeje, boe butugu tabo. Icare ere tugirimi tuibagi cewu ure tududo torowuge etae pugeje. 34(Boekarema. Silas jorudu pemegare tumuguwo nono, Judas rema ure tugirimi Jerusalém kae tuibagi
Paulo mare Barnabé emugure Antioquia tada jamedu. Ere boe eeruduwado, ere Pao bataru kogado ia tumedage makarewuge ebo. Paulo mare Sila emeru rekodajiwu

Meri makakare pugeje dukeje, Paulo makore Barnabeji, akore: - Pawo pagirimi, paeruduwo pawiemagei pugeje, nowu pare Pao bataru kogado tadawu bakurireuge eiamedu boe ekao. Paeruduwo inoba ere, epemegare, iarema epegare du bogai
Boekimorema, Barnabé aidure tuwo João iei Marcos cedu ko pudabo
Paulorema meardaere boroie, paga karega, marigudu, emugui Panfília keje dukeje, João uturadu Paulo mare Barnabé epiji, ukare tugerabraredo ei emaragodae keje
Dukodi icare Paulo, Barnabé emeardaekare pureore, icare ere tudo tuginoi. Icare Barnabé uture Chipre kae, ika kurireu tabo, ure Marcos reko pudabo
Paulorema ure Silas reko pudabo, icare Pao uwobe emagore Pao ji eparu tabo, icare uture jamedu. Merure Síria moto kae, Cilícia moto kae, tui Pao uwobe emearudu awadudo pudui dutabo
Aregodure Derbe bakurireu kae dukejere uture Listra bakurireuto. Nonore icare ia ure joruduwadowu iei Timóteo cedu mugure nono. Uce Judeia cristãorodo rema, uo Grécia kejeu rema
Awu imedu pemega remawunure Listra, Icõnio kejewu Pao uwobe eegai
Dukodi icare Paulo aidure koduwo pudabo, mare ure biri kado jao, judeudoge eigoia, eiamedu joruduware uoie Grêcia kejewuie ure ema kodi
Ekodure kaewu bakurireuge etada ere boe eeruduwado emeartoruwo apostolodoge mare Pao uwobe eimejerage ere boe eroiagudu Jerusalém tadaduji
Oinodu tabore Pao uwobe ere tubewudo tumeartoru tabo, ere cidodudo gu gu meri jameduji
Dukejere ere pagado Frígia moto kajeje, Galácia moto kajeje, mare ekodukare Asia moto kae, Aroe Pemegarewu aidukare kodi
Etaregodui Mísia moto kae dukeje, etaidure tugoduwo Bitínia moto kae, mare Pagimejera Jesus Utaroe Pemegarewu aidukare jamedu
Dukejere icare ere pagado goro goro tabo Mísia moto kajeje, icare ere turawuje Tróades bakurireu padui pobo maerewu okwai du kae. Ere pagado Macedônia kae
Ia boeco jire Paulo unuiaore: Jorudure ia Macedônia pijiwu imedu rakojei tuiegai, okwamagudi pudui duji, akore: -Amode pagado pobo maerewu okwa bakowu kae, amode akera braredo cei

Awu unuiao akedu kejere icare akore cei cegoduwo toro Macedônia kae, ceeruduware Pao makoi cewogai, cewo tuwadaru kogado nonowuge ewiegai duji kodi. Emugure Filipo bakurireu tada. Lídia ure tumagu Pao ai
Dukodi icare, nowu Tróade bakurireu pijire icare cere cedaredo ika kurireuto, cegodure kuri toro Samotrácia kae, dupijire cegodure Necápoli kae
Du pijire cegodure pugeje Macedônia kejewu kurire tumedage ekoriwu bakurireu iei Filipo cedu kae. Awu Macedônia moto mugure Roma kejewuge ero kuda. Meri makakare cei nono

Icare, nowu Sábado meri ji, cere cedawuje nowu bakurireu o baiporo piji toro pobo okwato, cemeardaere toroie pemegamode cenogwamaguduwo Pao ji kodi. Nonore icare cemugure, dutabore cereadodure ia areme etui pui nonodu biegai
Ia emage ui mitodu, iei Lídia cedu, Tiatira bakurireu pijiwudo, duwudore aroia akirodo tabo, pagudure Pao ji, biapaganure cei, Paore uwabo jado biapaga pemegawo Paulo bataru ji

Dukodi icare ao pegododure, uwobe jamedu, dukejere okwamagudure cei, akore: - Tameardaemode imeartoruie Pao ji ma, taremo iwaito, tamugudo itabo. Icare ure cerodo ino rugadu. Braere Paulo mare Sila etugu baicorewuto

Boekimorema, ia meri keje, cedui pagogwamagudure Pao ji kejewo kae dukeje, ia nogwaredu aregodure cedogi, brae etugareredonure ema, duwudo, Paokare emawu iei Piton cedu utaroe meture tada, dukodire joruduware boe biarewuji, dutabore ure cimejerage eno diiero maka makado
Icare uture ceregodaji, Paulo rekodaji, tagoi oino dutabo: - Awu imere Aroe Eimejera Kurireu utugaregere emage duwugere taeruduwado baru kaewu awara ji

Mako makore awu inoduji meri makaguragare tu tu tu je. Du inodu otobiji, Paulo korigodure ji, ure tuie kirimi bogai, icare makore nowu aroeji, akore: - Jesus Cristo ie tabo imagonure ai: atawuje piji. Kuri je dukejere icare ure tudawuje piji
Boekimorema, nowu imejerage ere boe pa tumodukae tugeragu o diieroji pugeje duji. Dukodi icare ere tugeragu Pauloji, Silaji, ere erego toro brae eimejerage ere tudo pui tuwo tugogado boeiwo kae

Dukejere ere brae eimejerage eerududo ei, tagoi oino dutabo: - Awu imere judeudogere emage, enure pago bakurireu tadawuge etago turugoduwo, enure boe eeruduwado erowo nono Roma pijiwuge cegi cedaidukare, ceroiwakare jiboe reore
Dukodi icare nowu bakurireu tadawuge ere turagojedu turugoduwo ei. Icare brae eiemejerage ere boedo ekudae tawuje tuwo iwara to ei
Ere iwara to ei dutabore ere ecebae kuricigodo, dukejere ere etugu baicorewuto, egore jeture eiwuji jetu pemegawo ei
Nowure icare meartorure tugimejerage ewadaru ji dukoiare ure etugu baicorewuto toro upo kae, ure ewure gogudo iku meriri tabo, ure nowu meriri iku kogudo ipo kajeje pugeje tuku
Boekimorema, boeco oia keje, Paulo mare Sila enogwamagudunure Pao ji, eranure Pao o roia pemegarewuji; meture baicorewu tadawuge ewiapagare ei
Kuri je dukejere icare, moto amagadu kuricigore, dukodire nowu baicorewu bure amagadure jamedu. Icare baiporodoge ere tuiado, mugure baicorewu tadawuge ewure kajejewu iku meriri ure tugiwuje jamedu
Icare nowu jeture eiwu imedu jetadure, jorudure baiporodoge ei tuiado duji, icare meardaere meture baicorewu tadawuge eregoduie marigudu duji. Icare ure toriga raireu tawuje tuwo tuwido
Macare Paulo oiogwarire ji, akore: - Akaba akogorido! Cemugure woe ceiamedu tabo
Dukejere, nowu jeture eiwu makore jorugu bogai, icare ure turemo nowu baito, ure tuwu tai je Paulo mare Sila ewure paru
Dukejere ure turagojedo, ure erego baawadu kae, unorare ei, akore: - Ikimejerage, inoba iromode iwo ikinorudo?
Icare egore ji: - Ameartorudo Pagimejera Jesus Cristoji, dutabore amode akinorudo, aki awobe eiamedu tabo
Icare ere Pao bataru kogado ji, uwobei jamedu
Icare nowu boeco mitoduji, ure jetu pemegare ei, ure ecebae kabi. Kuri je dukejere icare ere ao pegodo jamedu
Dukejere ure erego toro tuwai kae coboji, ure eke pemegado, icare jekare kuricigore, tuwobe eiamedu tabo, icai tumeartorui Pao jitu koia
Barogwatore icare brae eimejerage ere ia tugobaigarege emagodo ji. Nowu ime etawuje, etudo
Icare nowu jeture baicorewu jiwu imedu readodure Paulo biegai, akore: - Nowu ikimejerage emagore iwiegai iwo taginorudo, dukodi icare tadawuje, tadudo boe butugureu tabo
