Macare Paulo akore: - Roma kejewugere cegi, dukodi karega ere iwara to cei boe eegai, icare ere cedugu baicorewuto tukai tugogado cei dutabo. Macare oino ere cedo cedawuje oino podu tabo. Umodukare ino! Etuwo mato cedae, ewo cegiwuje tugera tabo ewo cedawuje awu piji
Icare nowu tugobaigarege ereadodure nowu bataru ji nowu brae eimejerage ewiegai, duwugere epagudugodure tumearudui Roma kejewugeie emage
Icare eture toro etae, emagore ei butugu tabo, emagore ewo tuwudugugo pudui, enogwamagudure ei etuwo nowu bakurireu piji
Icare ere tudawuje nowu bakurireu piji, dukejere icare ere turemo Lídia uwaito, du tadare eerudure tuwiemagei, ere emearudu awadudo pudui pugeje, dukejere eture nowu bakurireu piji
Ere pagado Anfípoli bakurireu kajeje, dukejere ere pagado Apolônia bakurireu kajeje, icare etaregodure Tessalônica bakurireuto. Nonore judeudoge ia eno sinagoga mugure
Icare Paulo uture etae turorewoji, icare makore ei, emagore ji, emagore pui puibagi, sabadore ei pobe ma jewu metuia bokware
Readodure ewiegai, ure eeruduwado Pao o bapera tabo uie turugadu Cristowo tuiwodo dukeje tuiewoduwo bireuge epiji duji. - Awu ireadodure tawiegaiwu Jesus, emare Cristo rema. oinore akore ei
Icare ia emage emeartorure Pao ji, ere tumedagedo Paulo, Sila magece. Ia judeukare emawu makarewuge duwugere emeartorure Pao ji marigudu, mare ia areme kurireuge, ere tumedagedo emage jamedu
Icare judeudoge ekorire ei, ere ia ime eto pui dutabore icare ere boedo turagojedo turugoduwo ei. Icare eture Jason uwai kae, ere turemo to, tuiemarui ewogai tuwo emagu boe etai ewo ewido

Mare eerudukare ei nono, dukodi icare ere tugeragu Jasonji, ia Pao uwobe ebo, icare ere erego toro brae eiemejerage eegai egore: - Awuge ere boedo turugoduwo pui boe jamedu boe keje. Icare emugure oino woe. Icare Jason ure tugeragu ei tuwai tada
Eiamedu etonare pagimejera kurireu Cesarji, tui ia eimejera kurireu mugudo mugato, dure Jesus reno
Awu tuwadaru tabore ere boe ekorigo, ere eiemejerage ekorigo
Macare Jason mare ia uwobe ere diiero maku etai, dukejere ere etudo
Icare, boeco aregodure dukeje, Pao uwobe ere Paulo mare Sila etudo Beréia bakurireu kae. Etaregodure to dukejere icare ere turemo judeudoge ere tudo pui tumagowo Pao bataru ji tadawu baito
Awu judeudoge epemega kodure nowu Tessalônica tadawuge epemega kori, dukodi icare ere tugeragu Pao bataru ji taidu kuricigo tabo. Eemarure Pao o bapera keje umode ino rugadu du bogai
Makarewuge emeartorure Pao ji, ia judeukare emawu areme kurireuge emeartorure jamedu, ia ime makarewuge emeartorure jamedu
Macare nowu Tessalôica kejewu judeudoge ere boe pa Pauloie Pao bataru kogado Beréia keje duji, dukoiare icare eture toro tuwo nowu boe erugo ji pugeje
Dukodi icare Pao uwobe ere Paulo utudo nowu piji toro pobo maerewu okwa kae. Sila mare Timóteo emugure nono
Uture Paulo apowuge ere reko Atenas bakurireu kae, dupijire ere tugirimi tuibagi, icare emagore Sila mare Timóteo ewiegai Paulo bataru ji, etuwo tuwogai kuri je. Paulo uwadodae Atenas kejedu
Paulo paganure tumedage ewogai Atenas bakurireu keje, du tonajire icare kiarigodu kuricigore tuiorudui boe emugui Paokare emawuge ekuda duji kodi
Meri jameduji mako makore judeudogei, meartorure Pao jiwu judeukare emawugei, jorudure ji bororo jiwugei jamedu
Ia joruduwarewuge, epicureuge, estoicodoge emagore ji. Iage egore: - Kaba jiba awu mako paga pagarewu akoino? Iage egore: - Readodunure Aroe Eimejerage maiwugei rakudu
Dukodi icare ere tugeragu ji, ere reko toro pudabo, joruduwarewuge ewai kae, icare egore ji: amagodo: Kakoduwu bataru maiwu jiba akagoino?
Cemearudure aiabiji jiboe ure tuginoi ceegai. Cedaidure ceeruduwawo kaboba jiba akagoino
Paga karega, Atenas kejewuge, aregodure Atenas kaewuge, erokare ia turo, mare etaidure tuioruduwawo kakoduwu bataru maiwu jiboe egoino tu je
Icare Paulore turagojedo nowu joruduwarewuge ewai oiabiji, akore: - Atenas kejewu ime, inure boe pa tameartoru kuricigoi Aroe Eimejerage eiduji

Imerure tago bakurireu kao, dutabore iorudure tare tabujodo jiwu tagoroei, icare itaregodure ia tago Aroe Eimejera muga kae dukejere atugododure oino: - Boe eeruduwakare jiwu Aroe Eimejera ai. Oino. Ica, tare tabujodo ji taeruduwakai jitu tabowu Aroe Eimejera jire ireadodunure tawiegai
Ure awu moto towuje, ure mugure kejewu boe jamedu boe towujewu Pao Kurireu rema. Ore awu moto, awu baru rema. Mugukare ime ere towujewu baidoge etada
Makokare boewo tugerabraredo pudui, okeakare iaboe bogai iaboe bogai. Emare ure boe eiamedu jedo, ure ake arego boe eiamedu ja piji, ure boe jamedu boe maku boe etai
Ure ime eiamedu botudo ia imedu mito tu je dupiji, emuguwo awu moto jamedu boe kao. Ure eno joru, eno moto ure remagu etai
Aidure boe eiamedu boe eemaruwo Pao Kurireu bogai, etaregoduwo ae, eeruduwo ji. Ica, Pao Aroe Eimejera mugu jaekare pai
Paga karega, tadare pamugure, tadare pamagadure, tadare paragojere. Umagai ia tageroia epa akore: “Pagi jamedu uwobere pagi”
Kode Pao Kurireu uwobere pagi dukeje, pameardaemodukare Pao Kurireuie nono meriri ekureu, iarema meriri kigadureu, iarema imere towuje tuioruduwa tabowu tori mori kurireu reore
Mare Pao Kurireu aiwokare ime eeruduwakai puduidu kodiwoji. Oino makonure padure boe jamedu boe kejewu ime eiamedu bogai ewo tugirimi pudae tuibagi

Joruduware tumode tugogado awu moto kejewu ime eiamedu boei dukejewu meri ji. Aidure tuwo tugogado ime eiamedu boei ia imedu mito tu jewu maragodae tabo. Ure awu inodu awadudo boe eegai, tui nowu imedu jewodudo bireuge epiji dutabo
Icare emearudure makoi boe ewodumodeduji dukeje, ia emage ewadarurerure ji, iage egore: - Piji jao, ia boe keje cemearudumode awu akoinoduji pugeje
Dukodi icare Paulore tudawuje epiji
Boekimorema, ia ime enogwaceradu Paulo jaogwai, emeartorure bataru ji, duwuge etada Dionísio joruduwa rakarewu mugure, mare ia aredu iei Dêmaris mare iage emugure jamedu
Nowu inodu rekodajire icare Paulore tudawuje Atenas bakurireu piji, icare uture Corinto bakurireu kae

Nonore jorudure ia judeu iei Aquila cedu, Ponto pijiwu, oreduje apo duji, Awuge etaregodure maigodu Itália piji. Brae eimejera kurireu iei Cláudio cedu ure judeudoge eiamedu edo tudawuje Roma piji kodi. Icare Paulore tumedagedo emage
Emaragodaere pureore, dukodi icare mugure ebo, maragodunure ebo jamedu (Ere aroia bai towuje brae ewaice
Sábado jameduji mako makore sinagoga bai tada, ure tubewudo tuwo judeudoge, gregodoge emeartorudo
Dukejere icare Sila, mare Timóteo etaregodure Macedônia moto piji. Icare Paulore tumagu tuiamedu tabo tuwo Pao bataru kogado, mako makore judeudoge ewiegai Jesusie ure Cristo rema duji
Nowugerema emeartorukare, emago pegare ji, dukodi icare ure tugudae aroia jukodo ei, akore ei: - Tagu butuwo taiogi. Ikera rorogodukare. Ica, awu otobiji iemarumode judeukare emawuge ewogai
Icare ure tudawuje nowu piji, ure turemo ia judeukare emawu meartorure Pao jiwu iei Tito Jetororewu cedu uwaito, uwai mugure nowu sinagoga bai meki

Du inodu tabo ia imedu iei Crispo cedu, nowu sinagoga bai kejewuge eimejera, meartorure Pao ji uwobe apo dukodire, Corinto bakurireu tadawu ia makarewuge emearudure Paulo bataru ji, emeartorure jamedu, icare etao pegododure
Icare ia boecoji Pao makore Pauloji unuiao pemegarewu tada, akore: - Apagudu kaba, amagodo boei, amago bokwa kaba. Ica, iragojere akabo
Iaboe iaboe emodukare tuburedo ai tuwo akogorido, iwobe emagare awu bakurireu tada dukodi
Paulo rakojere nono joru mito, ari ikera awubodure mito taci ikera awubowuto, unure boe eeruduwado Pao bataru ji. Paulo rakojei brae eimejera jekaidu
Nowu Acaia moto kejewuge eimejera Galião rema, dutabore nowu judeudoge ere turagojedo tuiamedu tabo Paulo togi. Icare ere tugeragu ji, ere reko brae eiemejera ae, egore
Awu imedu ure boedo tubujodo ia Aroe Eimejera ukai nono judeudoge eroiagudu reoreduji
Icare Paulo aidure tumagowo, macare nowu brae eimejera Galião makore judeudogei, akore: - Awu inodu umode ia boe ero pegarewu rugadu dukeje, umode turugadu iwiapagawo tai
Mare taeruduwa reno, taroiagudu reno, dukodire tagire tamode tagogado ji. Itaidukare iwo ikogado awu inoduji
Icare ure etudo nowu bai piji

Dukodi icare eiamedure tugeragu Sostenesji, nowu sinagoga kejewuge eimejera, ere boe to ji nowu brae eiemejera jekai. dutabore nowu brae eiemejera Galião makokare iaboeji. Pauloi tugirimi Antioquia kaedu

Paulo mugure Corinto tada biega tu je kimo, dukejere ure tugimadudo nowu Pao uwobe epiji, icare uture ika kurireu tabo Síria moto kae. Priscila, mare Aquila ekodure apo jamedu. Mare etaregodumode Síria kaedu otodai, Paulo rakojere jao Cencréia ba kurireu tada tuwo tao rawuje, ia boe keje makore Pao ji oinoie turomode pudui dukodi
Dukejere etaregodure Éfeso bakurireu kae du tadare ure nowuge ei pobedu mugudo nono. Emare ure turemo sinagoga baito du tadare makore nowu judeudogei
Awuge enogwamagudure ji muguwo nono ebo kimo, mare aidukare
Imadure ebo tuberabiji, akore: - Imode ikirimi tawogai Pao aidumode dukeje. Dukejere icare uture nowu Éfeso piji
Uture jii Cesaréia moto kae, icare ruture Jerusalém bakurireu kae, cimaduwo nowu Pao uwobe ebo, dupijire kuri je ure turawuje Antioquia kae
Nonore mugure biega tu je, dukejere uture pugeje ure pagado Galácia moto kajeje, icare ure pagado Frígia moto kajeje, tui Pao uwobe emearudu awadudo pudui dutabo. Apolo maragodae Éfeso kejedu
Du tonajire icare ia judeu iei Apolo cedu, ia Alexandria pijiwu imedu, mako pemegarewu, joruduwa kuricigore Pao bataru jiwu imedu, aregodure Éfeso bakurireuto
Emare joruduwa rakare Pao utawara ji, mako kuricigore tumeardae pemegarewu tabo Jesus jiboeji, joruduware João o boe etao pegoji tu rugadu kodi karega
Dukodire makore nowu sinagoga bai tada tubagudu bokwa tabo. Icare Priscila, Aquila emearudure ji, dukodi icare ere ko pudabo ere Pao utawara awadudodu pemegado jekai

Icare aidure tuduwo Acáia moto kae, dukodi icare Éfeso tadawu meartorureuge ere mearudu awadudo pudui, ere aidudo, ere bapera atugodo nowu Acáia kejewu meartorureuge etai ewo tugeragu ji. Tumugui toro dutabore ure tugera braredodu kuricigodo nowu meartorureugei Pao o boe pemegarewu koia
Ure tumago rakado judeudoge ewadaru jipagi boe eegai, tui eeruduwado, Pao o bapera tabo, Cristoie ure Jesusce duji
Apolo mugui Corinto bakurireu tada du tonaji, Paulore pagado mugure cobojiwu moto kajeje, icare aregodure Éfeso bakurireuto. Nonore jorudure ia meartorureugei, unorare ei, akore
Nowu tameartorure boetoji dukodiboe keje, Aroe Pemegarewu makudure tagai?

Icare egore ji: - Boro. Mare cemearudukare Aroe Pemegarewuie ure duji jamedu. 3. Icare Paulo akore: - Kode, kakoduwu boe etao pegododu taboba tagao pegore? Egore: - João o boe etao pego tabore cedao pegododure
Icare Paulo akore: - Joãore boe etao pegodo boe eedorore tabowu boe etao pego tabo, makore boei emeartoruwo aregodumode turegodajiwu imedu ji, duwure Jesus rema
Emearudure awu inodu jitu kejere icare etao pegododure Pagimejera Jesus ie tabo
Icare Paulore tugera bu ewugeje, dukejere Aroe Pemegarewu ure turawuje ewugeje. Icare emagore boe ewadaru tuginoiwuji, emagore Pao bataru ji jamedu
Nowu ime ere pagera pudogidure ere pobe pugeje. Pao uwobe ei tuguo Éfeso bakurireu tadadu
Icare Paulore turemo sinagoga baito du tadare readodure Pao bataru ji tubagudu bokwa tabo, Arire pobe ma jewu metuia bokware duji, ure eeruduwado Pao o boe pemegarewuji

Mare ia emage emeartorukare, ewabo rakare, emago pega kuricigore Pao bataru ji boe eegai, dukodi icare Paulore tuiaedo ei. Icare ure meartorureuge eto pui pudabo, ure eeruduwado meri jameduji, ia imedu iei Tirano cedu uwai tada
Oinore ure jorui pobedu keje. Dukodire Asia kejewuge eiamedu boe, judeudoge, judeukare emawuge emearudure Pao bataru ji
Paore turo kurireu towuje towuje Paulo iera tabo. Dukodire ere jore Paulo jiwu kigadureu aroiarogu, mare ia aroia boe reko kogodureuge etai
Dukeje epemegagodure, Aroe pegarewure tudawuj tumedure tadawuge epiji jamedu

Boekarema, ia judeudoge, duwugere Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu boe epiji jamedu, emerure nono, icare ere tumeardae tawuje tuwo Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu Jesus ie tabo Aroe pegarewu meture tadawuge epiji. Icare egore Aroe pegarewu dogei: - Cenure tado etadawuje Paulo readodure jiwu Jesus ie tabo
Rore oinowugere ia sacerdote judeu iei Scevas cedu orenure emage
Macare Aroe pegarewu akore ewadaru jipagi, akore: - Ioruduware Jesus ji, ioruduware Pauloji, tagirema, kakoduwuge tagiba?
Du tabore nowu Aroe pegarewu meture tadawu imedu ure taredo ewugeje, ure etogorido, dukoiare eregodure nowu bai piji, togoridodu tabo, tugudae aroia mega megarogu tabo
Awu bakaru aregodure nowu mugure Éfeso bakurireu tadawu judeudoge eiamedu boe, gregodoge eiamedu boe etae. Icare eiamedu pagudugodu kuricigore. Kodi icare ere Pagimejera Jesus ie kurido
Icare makarewuge etaregodure tumagowo turo pegarewuji
Ia makarewuge emaragodure Aroe pegarewuge ebo, duwugere to bapera arego, ere kowu boe eiamedu jekai. Nowu baperadoge emori kuricigore kodi karega
Oinore Pao bataru ure tugidado, ure taododu kuricigodo. Paulo mearudae

Dukejere Paulo aidure tuduwo Jerusalemto, mare umode pagado Macedônia moto kajeje, Acáia moto kajeje jao. Icare akore: - Imugumode toro (Jerusalém keje) dukeje umode turugadu ituwo Roma bakurireu kae joruduwo ji
Ure tumedage Timóteo mare Erosto ei pobedu etudo Macedônia kae, pudumire mugure eiageje Asia moto keje jao. Meriri kigadureu epage erugodui Paulo jidu
Nowu dukodi ia boe pegarewu ure tuguo Pao bataru ji
Ia imedu meriri kigadureu epa iei Demétrio cedu duwure aroe eimejerago pagarewudo iei Diana cedu uwai meriri kigadureurogudoge etowuje, dutabore ure tumedage edo tugeragu mori kuricigorewuji
Icare ure nowu tumedage meriri epage eto pui, akore ei: - Taeruduware pai pageragu du kuricigoie diieroji awu pamaragodae morice duji
Macare taerudure, tamearudunure awu Paulo akoi makarewuge ewiegai, imere towujewu aroe eimejerageie, aroe eimejerage kaegae. Ure awu Éfeso tadawuge eiamedu boce kodi emeartorudo tagoino duji

Awu imedu pemegakare pai, pamaragodae umode tubegado. Boe emeartorumodukare pagimejerago Diana Kurireudo uwaiji pugeje. Cewu Asia kejewuge eiamedu, moto kejewuge eiamedu ere tubujodo jekaiwu pagimejerago Diana biegamode pugeje
Kodi icare, awu bataru koiare ure enogorawu boe kori tabo, dukodire enoiogwarigodure, egore: - Éfeso kejewuge eimejerago Diana kuricigore
Icare nowu bakurireu tadawuge eiamedu boe ere turagojedo eregodure nowu bai kurireu kae, ere tugeragu Caioji, Aristarcoji, duwugere Paulo metagere emage, Macedônia moto pijiwugere emage
Paulo aidure tuwo boe eerududo pudui, mare metage etaidukare rowo ino
Ia Asia kejewuge eiemejarage duwugere tumeduiado ema marigudu, ere bakaru maku bogai jamedu utukawo nowu bakurireu kae
Nowu boe etui puidu pega remawunure: enoiogwarire jice woje, jice woje, mare eiamedu joruduwakare kodiba turagojere nono duji
Dukejere ere ia judeu iei Alexandre cedu tawuje tubiji, metage ere tugera jodo keje tuwo rakojedo boe etogea keje makowo boei. Icare Alexandre ure tugera awogado boe eegai tumagowo
Mare boe eerudure judeuie ure emaduji, dukeje eiamedu oiogwarire jii je horare pobe duji, egore: “Éfeso kejewuge eimejerago Diana kuricigo remawunure”. Oinore egore tu tu tu je

Dukeje, nowu bakurireu tadawuge eimejera rekodajiwu aregodure tuwo boe ewudugugo. Akore: - Éfeso tadawuge tagi, ime eiamedure eeruduware awu Éfeso bakureuie akarureu Diana kurido, eiamedu boe eeruduware Diana ureureu meriri butuie baru piji duji
Iaboe iaboe emodukare tuioruduwa bokwado awu inoduji, dukodire ure turugadu tawudugugoduwo, tarokawo ia taro tameardae bokwa tabo
Awu tare tageragu jiwu ekare tagimejerago pegado, emago pega karega ure ji
Kode, Demétrio iarema ia metage etaidure tumagowo iaboerogu boeji iaboei ma, boe eimejerage ewai mugure nono, jadodure, eimejerage emugure nono jamedu, emode tugogado ei
Tagaidure tamagowo iaboeji ma, boe eimejerage emode tugogado

Boe puredumode pai boewo parego brae eimejerage etae awu ure tudowuje awuji oinono dukoia. Paga karega, boe kodiboe bokware awu boe enogo kuricigoi pui turugoduwo pui, tokiwo pui, togoriwo pui du bogai
Nowu bataru koiare icare nowu boe etui puidu ure taodo, akedure
Nowu boe enogoi puidu akedu keje, Paulore tumedage eto pui pudae, icare makore ei; dukeje imadure ebo tudui epiji toro Macednia kae dutabo
Merure nowu moto kao jii je, ure Pao uwobe eeruduwado tumago kuricigo tabo, dukejere aregodure Grécia moto kae

Nonore rakojere arire pobe ma jewu metuia bokware. Uiagu taredo ika kurireuto tuduwo Sria moto kae, du tonajire judeudogere jorubo reko utawara ji. Dukodi icare ure tugirimi tuibagi Macedônia moto kae

Ia metage ekodure apo, duwugere Sápatro, Beréia moto pijiwu, Pitro onaregedu, mare Aristarco, mare Segundo, Tessalônica pijiwuge, mare Gaio, Derbe pijiwu, mare Timóteo, mare Títico, mare Trófico, Asia pijiwuge
Awugere eture cedododai, icare epagare cewogai Tróade bakurireu keje
Cegirema cemugure nono jao. Icare, Páscoa akedu keje, cere cedaredo ika kurireuto, nowu Filipo bakurireu piji toro Tróade kae etae. Nonore ceragojere semanare mito
Nowu semana boetojiwu meri ji cere cedo pui cewo Pao o amireu kowuje. Icare Paulore tuduiagu nowu piji nowu meri rekodajiwuji, dukodire mako makore nowu Pao uwobei, makore ei jii boeco oia kae tu
Jorugu makare nono cemugure tadawu bai tada

Boekimorema, ia iparedu iei Eutico cedu, muguradu ia baiporo koborigodu keje, icare unudure, Paulo mako tonaji. Nori kori remawunure jokuji dukodire buture baire pobe ma awu metuia bokware dupiji moto kae, nori kori koia. Icare bire. Ere tugeragu ji bi inoduji
Icare Paulore turawuje ae, ure tumegido bukeje, ure tugeragu ji tugana pobe dutabo, ure bu todogajeje, akore: - Tamorora amagadu kaba, jeere pugeje
Icare ruture pugeje, dukejere mako raire ei pugeje jii barogwa kododu kae
Nowu iparedu rema, ere reko, je inodu tabo, tuiegare kuricigo tabo
Icare cere cedaredo ika kurireuto, icare cegodure Assos bakurireu kae; Paulorema uture moto kajeje. Assos keje cebagare bogai, taidu rekodaji
Nowu Assos bakurireu kaere icare aregodure cedae, cere cegeragu ji ika kurireu tada dutabore cegodure Mitilene bakurireu kae

Du pijire cegodure pugeje nowu pobo maerewu kajeje pugeje. Barogwatore icare cedaregodure Quios bakurireu kae. Nowu meri rekodajiwuji pugeje cedaregodure Samos bakurireu kae. Barogwato pugeje icare cedaregodure Mileto bakurireuto
Paulo kiarire tuduwo Éfeso bakurireuto, tumugu raikawo Asia moto keje, akere ji taregoduwo Jerusalém kae tuwo Pentecostes o peta ko. Paulo uwadodae Éfeso kejewu codudoge ewiegaiwu
Mare nowu Mileto mito dupijire makore Éfeso tadawu Pao uwobe eimejerage ewogai
Icare etaregodure ae, ere tuiamedu to pui, dukejere icare akore ei: - Taeruduware inoba iro irore tai boe jaeduji jii ire iremo awu Asia moto kaewu boetojiwu meri otobiji
Imaragodure Pao ai, ire iwiegado tu je dutabo, itoragudu tabo, judeudoge ere mugudo inaiwu jorubo oiagi
Taeruduware ikae umode turugadu tagaiboe iaboe iaboe pijido, ikare biado, mare ire awadudo tawiegai boe eegai tawai otoji duji
Inogituware judeudogei, inogituware judeukare emawugei, ewo tugirimi tuibagi Pao ae, emeartoruwo pagimejera Jesus Cristoji
Oinore icare Aroe Pemegarewure tumugudo ikeje ikoduwo Jerusalemto, mare ioruduwakare iwo aidugirimode toroduji
Ioruduware tu jiboe reo: Aroe Pemegarewu ure ido boe pa itu iture kaewu bakurireu jamedu kejeie, baicorewu, boe ecebae epagare iwogaiduji
Mare ipagudukare iaboeji iaboeji, ipagudukare iwiwo. Umode turugadu iwo Pagimejera Jesusre maku inaiwu imaragodae akedudo, umode turugadu ireadoduwo o boe pemegarewu akaruji
Oino ioruduware taiamedu taboie, duwuge etoiagire imeru imerure ireadodui Pao o boe pemegarewuji, taerudumodukare ii pugeje duji
Dukodire inago oino tawiegai: Ia tagi tawogwamode ma, boe jomodukere iwugeje
Paga karega, ikiarikare imagowo tawiegai Pao aidure jiboeji
Taeto tai, taeto Aroe Pemegarewure maku tagaiboeji. Aroe Pemegarewu ure boe eimejeragedo tagi taetuwo Pao uwobei, duwuge ure etaru Tonaregedu ku tabo
Ioruduware iiagejeie icare riedoge emode turemo tado, tuwo barege pemegarewuge ewido
Jamedu ime pegarewuge emode turemo tadoda jamedu duwugere emode bakaru pegarewu kogado, tuwo Pao uwobe erego pudabo
Tamearudu awadudo tai, tawiagodu kaba jorure pobe ma awu metuia bokwaredu meri ji boecoji inogituware tai tu tu tu je, itoragudu tabo, ikiarigodu tabo
Oinore icare inure tamagu Pao ai, inure tamagu Pao o bataru pemegare ai, emare joruduware tuwo tarijodudo, roiware tuwo tamugudo pemegarewuge etada
Imagokare iaboeji meriri ekureu bogai, meriri kigadureu bogai du kare
Taeruduware awu ikera tabore imaragodure iwo ikerogudo, iwo ikudaerogudo, iwo imedage ekerogudo jamedu
Jii je ire taeruduwado uie turugadu pamaragoduwo, pawo pagerabraredo roiwakarewugei du bogai, uwo nono Pagimejera bataru reore: Nowu ure boe makuwu jekare kodure nowu boe makudure aiwu jekare kori
Awu tuwadaru rekodajire icare Paulore tubujodo mototo, okwamagudure Pao ji ebo
Rakojere nonowuge eiamedu etoragudugodure, icare ere todomo Paulo kajeje, imadui puabo du tonaji
Ekiarigodu kuricigore Paulo akore ei eerudumodukae pudui pugeje dukodi. Icare eture apo toro ika kurireu kae
Cedure epiji dukeje cere cedaredo ika kurireuto, dutabore cegodure Cós bakurireu kae. Barogwatore icare cegodure pugeje Rodes bakurireu kae, dupijire cegodure pugeje Pátara bakurireu kae
Nonore ceerudure kodumode Fenícia kaewu ia ika kurireuji. I,care cere cedaredo to, dutabore cegodure cenodobiji

Icare ceerudure ia pobo aiare tabowu moto iei Chipre ceduji, okwacere woje cegana koborewu jaogwai; cegodure kori toro Síria moto kae. Icare cedaregodure ia bakurireu mugui pobo okwai iei Tiro cedu kae. Nonore boe emode nowu ika kurireu biorodo, dukodire cerudure moto kae nono
Nonore ceerudure ia Pao uwobei, dukodi icare cere cemugudo ebo merire ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto; Aroe Pemegarewu jore ewugeje, dukoiare enogituware Pauloji rutu kawo Jerusalemto

Nowu merire ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu akedure dukejere icare cegodure cedawara ji pugeje. Eiamedu rore taci cedabo tuwiremage ebo, tore ebo jii bakurireu kujeto. Dukejere cere cebujodo nowu kugaru keje icare cenogwamagudure Pao ji
Dukeje icare cegimadure ebo, icare cere cedaredo ika kurireuto, emage ere tugirimi tuwai kae

Cegodure ika kurireu tabo nowu Tiro bakurireu piji jii ia bakurireu iei Ptolomaida cedu kae. Nonore cegimadure cewiemage ebo, icare cemugure ebo nowu meri ji. Profeta Agabo akore Paulo jiboe Cesareia kejedu

Barogwatore icare cegodure pugeje, icare cedaregodure Cesareia bakurireuto pugeje. Dukejere cere ceremo Filipe uwaito. Emare Pao bataru epa rema, nowu diaconodoge ei sete ia emagenure ema. Icare cemugure uwai tada
Ore areme ere pobe puibiji duwuge emugukare imedu apo roga; emagere emago emagore Pao bataru ji
Cemugure nono meri makakare, dukeje ia profeta aregodure Judeia piji, iere Agabo

Aregodure mato cewogai, dukejere icare ure tugeragu Paulo peagajejewu, dutabore ure tugeragogudo tabo, ure tuwure gogudo tabo, icare akore: - Oinore Aroe Pemegarewu akore: - Oinore judeudoge emode ore awu boe epeagajejewu iera gogudo, buregogudo, emode maku judeukare emawuge ekera kai toro Jerusalém tada
Awu bataru koiare icare cegi mare mugure nonowu Pao uwobe cenogwamagudure ji rutu kawo Jerusalemto
Mare Paulo akore: - Kodiba tagoragudure? Icare tare ikiarigodu kuricigodo! Ica, inure irugadu boewo ikeragogudo, boewo iwido jamedu Pagimejera Jesus ie koia
Icare cewadaru iwakare rutu kawo toro. Dukodire cemagokare ji pugeje, icare cemagore: - Boewo nono Pao aidu reore
Meri makakare dukejere icare cere cerugadu cemeruwo, icare cerudure Jerusalém kae
Cesaréia tadawu ia pawobe ekodure cedabo, duwuge ere cerego ia Chipre pijiwu imedu iei Menason cedu uwai kae, nonore cenudumode. Paulo rakojei Jerusalém tadadu
Icare cedaregodure Jerusalemto, dukejere pawiemage ere tugeragu cei tuiegare tabo taidu tabo
Barogwatore icare Paulo uture cedabo Tiago uwai kae, nonore icare nowu Pao uwobe eimejerage eiamedure tudo pui nono cedaregodu kae
Icare Paulo imadure ebo, icare readodure ewiegai Pao rore judeukare emawuge etai tugera tabowu jamedu jiboeji

Emearudui awu inodu jamedu jitu koiare ere Pao kurido, icare emagore Pauloji, egore: - Cemana, aerudu pemeganure, awu judeudoge makarewuge duwugere emeartorure Pao bataru ji tukai judeudoge eroiagudu pijido dutabo duji
Emagere emearudure boe egoi akie are nowu mugure judeukare emawuge etadawu judeudoge eeruduwado ewo tugera ra Moisés piji, akagoi ei: ekawo tore ewiri kado, erokawo nono judeudoge eroiagudu reore
Inoba paromode? Eeruduwamode akaregoduie rugadu
Kode, arodo nono cemagomode ai du reore. Imere pobe puibiji woe, tuwo tumorido Pao ai
Eko akabo, aedorodo ebo, mori maku eparu tabo tuwo etao rawuje. dutabore eiamedu boe eeruduwamode tumearudure jiwu aiboe boe kaegae, aki jamedu aroie nono judeudoge eroiagudu reore

Judeukare emawu meartorureuge eiboe rema, cere bapera atugodo etai, ewo tugera ra tui mori maku aroe eimejerage pagarewuge etai dupiji, ekawo ake todure towu barege eku ekodu kowuje, ekera keadu kawo jamedu
Barogwatore icare Paulo kodure nowu ime ebo, icare ure tuiedorodo ebo, ure turemo Pao uwaito, nonore icare ure remagu umode mori maku tubaru tabowu eparu tabowu moriji
Merire pagera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto dukeje, ia judeudoge etaregodui Asia moto piji, eerudure Pauloji nowu Pao uwai tada, dukodire ere boe erugo ji. Ere tugeragu ji, icare enoiogwarire
Egore: - Judeudoge, tagerabraredo cei! Mako pagare cewobei, Pao uwaiji, ceroiagudu boe jiwu imedu reo! Emareo! Unure Grécia pijiwu ime edo turemo Pao uwaito jamedu, tui pegado dutabo
Egore oino, eerudure Trofimo, Éfeso pijiwu, kodui apo bakurireu tada duji, dukoiare emeardaere uie turemo Pao uwaito, kodire egoino

Mugure nowu bakurireu tadawuge eiamedu boe emorora amagadure, icare ere tudo puidu emagaguragare. Ere tugeragu Pauloji, ere reko oino moto ji Pao uwai piji toro baawadu kae, icare Pao uwai porodoge ere tumi pi tuku peragajeje
Etaidure tuwo bito, mare iage ere tugobaigarege eimejera bie Jerusalém tadawuge eiameduie turagojedo turugoduwo

Dukodire icare kuri je ure tugobaigarege mare ia tugobaigarege eimejerage eko pudabo toro rugodureuge etae. Awugerema, eerudui nowu tugobaigarege eimejera aregodui tudugarege eboduji dukeje kuri je, ere tugera ra tui boe to Paulo jitu piji
Icare nowu tugobaigarege eimejera ure tuburedo Pauloji, ure tugeragu ji, ure tudugarege edo ieragogudo meriri iku pobe dutabo. Icare unorare boei iogudubabao, kaboba jiba ro oino
Eiamedu boe enoiogwarire jice woje, jice woje, dukodire roiwakare tuioruduwawo nowu boe enogoi pui dukoia. Dukodi icare ure tudugarege edo reko baicorewu rakarewuto
Icare Paulo aregodui bai kurireu o escala kae dukeje, tugobaigarege ere tudugu ji tuietuwo ji boe ekorii ji tu piji
Nowu boe makarewuge ekodure rekodaji toiogwari tabo, tagoi oino dutabo: - Bito rugau

Umode turemo nowu baicorewu rakarewu to dukeje, Paulo unoragodure nowu tugobaigarege eimejeraji, akore ji: - Awudugugo ii biegatu je, imagowo boei jao. Nowu tugobaigarege eimejera akore: - Aeruduware gregodoge ewadaru ji?
Nowu Egito pijiwu imedu, duwure boe erugo pui marigudu, icare ure rugodureu ime ei quatro mil reko pudabo boe matadu kaewu aki kanao?
Icare Paulo akore: Judeunure imi, Cilécia moto kejewu bakurireu iei Tarso cedu pijiwunure imi, inogwamagudunure ai awo imagodo boei
Icare nowu tugobaigarege eimejera ure makodo. Icare Paulo, turagojei nowu escala keje dupiji, ure tugera aogado boei, icare boe makodure pi tuku. Icare makore ei hebreudoge ewadaru tabo, akore
Imanamage, iwiemage, iogamage, tawiapagado iwadaru ji: ireadodumode tawiegai kodiba iro oino
Emearudure makoi hebreudoge ewadaru ji dukejere ewiapaga awadure ji

Icare akore pugeje: - Judeunure imi. Cilécia moto kejewu bakurireu iei Tarso cedu kejere iwodure, mare irijodure awu bakurireu tada, nowu joruduwa rakarewu iei Gamaliel cedu bure paru ioruduwadodure paomage eroji. Pao Kurireu jaogwaire inogwacere tareore, tare tagogwacere Pao jaogwai jii oino jamedu, du reorere ire ino jamedu marigudu
Marigudu itonare Cristo metagei iwo ewido. Ire ikeragu meartorure Cristo jiwu imei, aremei, ire erego baicorewuto

Sacerdotedoge eimejerage mare boe eimejerage eeruduware iro oinoduji. Ere bapera maku inai iwo reko Damasco kejewu judeudoge etae, icare iture nowu bakurireu kae iwo ikeragu meartorureuge emugui toro duji, iwo erego Jerusalém kae boewo eedorodo
Boekimorema, ikodui awara ji, puredu tu Damasco bakurireuji, meri jetui pagaia keje dutabo, icare baru pijiwu ia urugureboe kuricigorewu ure itaiado pi tuku je
Icare iwudure moto kae, icare imearudure ia boe emagoi ii duji, akore: - Saulo, Saulo, kodiba akonare ii? Kodiba?
Icare imagore ji: - Ioguduba akagoino, ikimejera? Icare nowu akoinoboe makore ii pugeje, akore: - Jesus Nazaré pijiwu imireo, cewu akonare jiwu imireo
Boekimorema, imedage eerudure urugureboeji, mare emearudukare nowu akoino iiboe makoji
Icare imagore ji: - Ikimejera, inoba iromode? Icare akore ii: - Aragojedo, atudo Damasco bakurireuto, torore boe emode awiie inoba aromode duji
Iorudukare iaboeji nowu urugureboe kuricigorewu koia, dukodire imedage ere tugera kogudo ikera kajeje dutabore itaregodure Damascoto
Ia imedu iei Ananias cedu, mako makore Pao jiwu imedu, duwu rore nono judeudoge eroiagudo du reore, nowu bakurireu tadawu judeudoge eerudu pemegare jiwu imedu,
Aregodure itae, akore ii: Iwie Saulo, aeku pemegare pugeje. Dukeje kuri je itaiwore
Icare akore pugeje: Paomage eno Aroe Eimejera ure atawuje aeruduwawo taidure jiboeji, aeruduwawo Imedu Pemegarewuji, amearuduwo jabijiwu bataru ji
Ica, areadodumode ime eiamedu boe ewiegai aerudure jiboeji, amearudure jiboe jamedu boeji
Kodi icare, amara tabo! Aragojedo, akao pegodo, awabo kigadudo aro pegarewu piji nowu Pemegarewu Imedu ie tabo
Dukejere icare ire ikirimi Jerusalemto, icare inogwamagudure Pao ji uwai tada, du tonajire Paore ido ikinoi, ure iorududo boe pemegarewuji
Icare iorudure Jesus makoi ii duji, akore: Amara tabo! Atudo Jerusalém piji, paga karega, awuge emearudumodukare areadodui iiboe jituji
Icare imagore: Ikimejera, emage eeruduware iie meartorure aiwuge etugu etugu baicorewuto, eeruduware iie iwara to to ei duji
Icare Estêvão ure tuiwodo akie koia dukeje, iragojere nono jamedu, ieture ure bitowuge ekudawu aroiaji
Macare Jesus akore: Toro, imode atudo toro ia boe etae jaegiri. Paulo mugui baicorewu rakarewu tadadu
Judeudoge emearudure jii je nowu bataru kae, dukeje icare enoiogwarire, egore: - Nowu imedu tawuje nowu piji, umodukare turugadu tuiewo
Dukeje icare enoiogwari kuricigore, ere tugudae aroia tawuje, ere moto urugudu barigu baruto boekori koia ji

Dukodi icare nowu tugobaigarege eimejera ure tudugarege edo tugeragu ji ewo reko baicorewu rakarewuto, ewo iwara to ji, ewo okoridodu kuricigodo, tuioruduwawo kodiba boe enoiogwarire boe kori koia ji du bogai

Icare enure kogudo barogo biri bukigu tabo dukejere Paulo unorare ia tugobaigarege eimejera mugui nonoduji, akore: - Umodukana turugadu boewo boe to ia Roma kejewu imedu ji, brae eiemejerage ekai tugogado jitu otodai?
Icare nowu tugobaigarege eimejera mearudure awu bataru jitu keje kuri je, uture tugimejera ae, ure bie, akore: - Inoba aromode? Awu imedu Roma kejewunure ema
Icare nowu brae eimejera uture mato Paulo ae, akore ji: - Roma kejewu akinao? Amagodo. Paulo akore: - U
Icare nowu brae eiemejera akore: - Ire Roma kejewudo imi mori kuricigo tabo. Icare Paulo akore: - Ica, Roma kejewunure imi iwodure dupiji
Dukeje kuri je, nowu umode okoridowuge ere tuiaedo ji pi tuku. Nowu brae eiemejera morora amagadure, paga karega, ure tudugarege eedo kogudo Roma kejewui ema dutabo
Barogwatore icare, nowu brae eiemejera aidure tuioruduwa birigoduwo kodiba rakuduie judeudoge emago pegare ji. Ure iera kiwuje, icare ure sacerdotedoge eiemejerage eto pui. Icare ure Paulo arego etae
Icare Paulore tuioku kidudo nowu judeudoge eimejerage ei tu... Icare akore: - Imanamage, imire imerure Pao jekai iwabo pemegarewu tabo, imeardae pemegarewu tabo jii awu meri kae
Macare nowu sacerdotedoge eimejera iei Ananias cedu, ure mugure mekiwuge edo tugera to okwaji
Icare Paulo akore ji: Imedu roarodureu, Pao umode akogorido jamedu. Amugure awo akogado ii paroiagudu rekodaji, macare akonai paroiagudu jitu tabore are boedo itogorido. Kodiba?
Icare mugure nonowuge egore: - Awadaru pegare Pao bure joia kurireuji
Icare Paulo akore: - Iwiemage ioruduwakare Pao burejoiaie ure emaduji. Paga karega, Pao o bapera keje atugododure oino: “Amago pega kaba awobe eimejerajii” (Ex 22,28

Paulo joruduware nowu judeudoge eiemejerageie tuginoi duji. Iage fariseudogere emage, iage saduceudogere emage. Dukodi lcare akore tumago raka tabo: - Imanamage, fariseunure imi, fariseudoge etonaregedunure imi. Ica, imeartorure bireuge eewodumode tuwi piji pugeje duji, dukoiare boere tugogado ii

Awu bataru keje, nowu fariseudoge mare nowu saduceudoge etokire pui, emagore pui puibagi, icare nowu boe eimejerage etonare pui. 8(Paga karega, saduceudoge egore bireuge ewodumodukae, tupadoge bokwae, aroedoge bokwae; fariseudogerema emeartorure nowu boe jameduji

Dukodi icare ia boe enoiogwari kuricigorewu ure tuguo. Icare ia fariseudoge, ere turagojedo, emago rakare, egore: - Ceeruduwakare awu imedu ia ro pegarewuji. Ia Pao o tupa, iarema ia Aroe emago kana ji?

Icare nowu emagoi puidu nowu etokii puidu icare rakagodure. Dukodi icare nowu brae eimejera pagudugodure emode Paulo roto oino pa je duji, dukodi icare ure tugobaigarege edo turawuje, ewo Paulo aru epiji, ewo reko baicorewu rakarewu kae
Nowu boecoji icare Paore towadudo Paulo jekai, akore ji: - Amearudu awadudo ai, areadodure ii Jerusalém tadadu reorere umode turugadu areadoduwo ii pugeje Roma bakurireu tada jamedu
Barogwa kododu tabore icare ia judeudoge ere tudo pui, emagore pui togwagemodukae iaboe boeji, tugudumodukae iaboe boece, tumode Paulo bito du otodai
Nowu makore oinowuge ere nono ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure du reore
Icare eture nowu sacerdotedoge eiemejerage etae, egore ei: - Cemagore Pao jekai, cenogwagemodukae iaboe boeji jii cemode Paulo bito du kae
Kode, tagi mare pagimejerage tamagodo brae eiemejeraji uwo Paulo reko mato tawogai. Tamagodo ji tamode tagoga pemagado ji pugeje. Cegirema, umode tuburedo mato dukeje, cemode cedo cerugadu cewo bito
Boekimorema, Paulo utuie ia onaregedu, urade nowu emeardae pegarewu pawuje, dukodi icare kodure toro baicorewu rakarewu kae, ure Paulo bie
Awure icare makore tugobaigarege eimejera bogai, akore ji: - Awu iparedu reko toro akimejera ae, aidure tumagowo ji iaboeji
Icare ure reko nowu brae eimejera jekae, akore ji: - Nowu meture baicorewu tadawu iei Paulo cedu okwamagudure ii iwo awu iparedu reko mato aegai, aidure tumagowo ai iaboeji dukodi
Icare nowu brae eimejera ure tugera kogudo nowu iparedu iera kajeje, ure reko jice baiporo kae, akore ji: - Kaboba jiba akaidure amagowo ii?
Akore: - Judeudoge emagore pui barogwatoie togwamagudumode ai awo Paulo reko judeudoge eimejerage eegai pugeje, ewo tugogadodu pemegado ji

Akirema, awiapaga kaba ewadaru ji. Paga karega, ia ime ere ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogiduredu, duwuge emode tuwiado awara okwai tuwo bito. Ere togwatugu Pao jekai togwagemodukae iaboe oeji, tugudumodukae iaboe boece jii tumode bito du otodai. Enure turugadu, epagamode awadaru bogai tu je
Icare nowu brae eimejera ure nowu iparedu utudo, akore ji mako kaiagu iaboe boei tuie bie pudui duji. Paulo rekodudodui Cesaria kaedu
Dukeje icare makore tugobaigarege eimejerage ei pobedu bogai, akore ei: - Tamode tugobaigarege ei 200 cedu edo turugadu etuwo Cesaréia kae, awu boeco kajeje
Tamode kawarudoge edo turugadu Paulo bogai jamedu, dure tamode reko pagimejera Félix ae. Taetu pemegado ji
Ure ia bapera atugodo tagoi oino dutabo: 26"Cludio Lísia ikimadunure pagimejera kurireu Félix awogai
Judeudoge ere awu imedu ieragogudo, eiagu bito, dukejere icare itaregodure ae ino tugobaigarege ebo, icare iorudure Roma kejewuie ure ema duji, dukodire ire inorudo ekera piji
Dukeje icare itaidure ioruduwawo kaba kodiba ere tuiagu bito, dukodire ire reko judeudoge eimejerage eegai, ewo tugogado ji,
Icare imearudure eie tuiagu bito turoiagudu koia, mare ia ro pegarewu bokware ewo bito, iarema ewo tugu baicorewuto
Mare dukejere icare ia boere iwie ia judeudogeie tudo turugadu tuwo bito rugadu, dukodire icare ire boedo reko toro akae, imagore onare jiwugei etuwo akae jamedu. Urugadu. Amugu pemegado
Icare, nowu boecoji nowu tugobaigarege ere tugeragu Pauloji, nowu tugimejera mako rekodaji, icare ere reko toro Antipátride kae
Barogwatore icare ere maku kawaru epage etae, ewo reko tododai, pudumire icare ere tugirimi tuibagi tumuga kae pugeje
Etaregodure Cesaréia bakurireuto dukeje, ere bapera maku nowu brae eimejera ai, ere jorududo Pauloji jamedu

Icare makore nowu bapera atugoji, dukejere icare unoragodure ei kakoduwu moto kajeba. Egore: Cilécia moto kejewu reno. Icare akore: - 35 Iwiapagamode ai, onare aiwuge etaregodumode dukeje. Icare ure edo Paulo jetu otorogado judeudoge eimejera Herodes uwai kurireu tada. 24.Brae eimejerage ere tugogado Pauloji

Merire pagera awubodure du rekodajire icare nowu sacerdotedoge eimejera kurireu ure turawuje nowu kae, ia codureuge ebo, ia boe eroiagudu epa iei Tertulo cedu kodure ebo. Etaregodure dukejere, eture nowu brae eimejera kurireu ae, tumago pegawo Pauloji biegai

Emagore Paulo bogai tuwo tugogado ji. Icare nowu Tertulo mako pegare ji nowu brae eimejera jekai, akore: - Akire are boe pemegado cei, are boe butugudo cei. Aro koiare boe ero pegarewu makarewu kadodure ceno moto keje
Ceeruduware aro oinoduji, boe jamedu boeji jii je, boe jamedu boe keje, akarureu Félix, dukodire cenure tukutaido ai
Macare itaidukare boe koriwo ai jii je dukodire inogwamagudunure ai awiapagawo iwadaru ji jao
Ceerudure awu imedu ji, pega remawure, ure boe erugo pui boe jamedu boe keje, judeudoge etada. Nazarewudoge ia eimejeranure ema

Uiagu Pao uwai pegado jamedu, macare cere cegeragu ji. 7(Cedaidure cewo cegogado ji, ceroiagudu rekodaji, mare nowu brae eimejera iei Lísias cedu aregodure, icare ure tugeragu cegera piji turaga tabo taci je, icare ure onare jiwuge cedudo mato aegai
Ica, aki mitodu anoramode ji, dutabore aeruduwamode cemagore ai jiboeji jamedu boe ema remawuie
Icare nowu judeudoge ere tuiodo nowu turoiagudu epa bataru keje, egore oinoie ure rugadu

Dukeje icare nowu brae eimejera ure tugera amagadudo Paulo bogai, icare Paulo akore: Ioruduware joru makaguragare aetui awu moto jitu duji, dukodire imagomode iparu tabo aegai ipagudu bokwa tabo, imeartorui ai dutabo
Boe rakamodukare ai aeruduwawo meri kodukae ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu kori irudui Jerusalém bakurireuto dupiji. Irudure toro, inogwamaguduwo Pao ji
Iaboe iaboe eerudukare ii inogirui iaboeji iaboeji; eerudukare ii boe erugo Pao uwai tada duji, iarema sinagoga tada, iarema bakurireu tada
Jamedu eroiwakare tuwo aerududo tumago peganure iiboeji

Imagonure oino aegai: Ikodure paedogamage eno Aroe Eimejera utawara ji, imeartorure atugododure Moisés o bapera kejeboeji, profetadoge eno bapera kejeboe jamedu boeji, ikodui emagore tuginoiwu oino jiwu bakaru rekodaji
Ipaganure Pao ji epagamagai jitudu reore, pemegarewuge, pegarewuge eewodumode pugeje duji
Kodire inure idurudo ikoduwo imeardae pemegarewu tabo Pao jekai, ime eegai jamedu
Joru makaguragare dukeje, itaregodure iwobe etae, makudu pagare etaiboerogu tabo, makudumode Pao uwai tada boe tabo jamedu
Icare iroi nono dukeje, eerudure ii ipemegado Pao uwai tada duji, mare boe ekare tago, boe erugodukare pui nono
Eerudure iiwu, ia judeudoge etaregodui Asia pijiwugere emage, emagere etaregodumode aegai emagowo iiboeji, eerudure iro pegarewuji rugadu dukeje, kodi karega
Mare mugure oinowuge emagowo awiegai eerudu rakuduie ia iro pegarewuji nowu ere irego judeudoge eimejerage eegai dukeje
Imagore tu jiboe imago raka tabodu reo: Bireuge eewodumodedu koiare judeudoge eimejerage ere tugogado ii taegai

Boekare. Nowu brae eimejera Félix joruduwa birigodure emeartoraeji, dukodire ure nowu judeudoge eimejerage etudo jao, akore: - Nowu boe eimejera Lísias aregodumode mato dukeje imearudu birigodumode tai
Icare ure nowu tugobaigarege eimejerado tugedo pemegado Pauloji, akore ji jetuwo ji butugu tabo, ukawu metage ei tugerabraredo jitudu pijido
Meri makakare dukeje, nowu brae eimejera Félix aregodure toreduje Drusila apo, duwudo judeudore ema. Makore Paulo bogai, icare biapagare makoi boe emeartorui Jesus Cristo jituduji

Dukejere Paulo makore ei boe emodukae pu pegado, pu barigududo, boe ekera keadukawo pudui, ia meri keje Pao umoduie tugogado boei, dukodi icare nowu Félix pagudugodure, icare akore Pauloji: - Urugadu jao, atudo jao, ia kodiboe keje imagomode awogai pugeje
Upagare jamedu Paulo umoduie diiero maku pudai du bogai, dukodire mako makore bogai tu tu tumagowo ji

Jorure pobe du rekodaji, brae eimejerage ere Félix tawuje nowu moto piji, ere Pórcio Festo mugudo mugato. Boekimorema, nowu Félix aidure tuwo judeudoge eegaredo, dukodire ure Paulo mugudo baicorewu tada tuiageje
Meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje, nowu brae eimejera Festo aregodure nowu moto kae, icere ruture Jerusalém bakurireu kae
Nonore icare nowu sacerdotedoge eimejerage mare judeudoge kurireuge eture ae, emago pegare Pauloji biegai
Enogwamagudure ji tuwo boedo Paulo reko mato Jerusalém kae pugeje. Paga karega, etaidure tuwo tuwiado awara okwai tuwo bito
Mare Festo akore Paulo muguie baicorewu tada Cesaréia bakurireu keje, pudumie tudumoduie toro meri makakare dukeje
Icare akore ei: -Kode, ia kurireuge tagi tamode tarawuje itabo, icare nowu imedu ia ropegarewure dukeje, tamagomode iiegai toro
Icare mugure nono kimo meri ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto rakudu dukejere icare ure turawuje Cesaréia bakurireu kae, icare makore Paulo bogai
Paulo aregodure ae, dukejere icare aregodure Jerusalém pijiwu judeudoge ere taiado apo, enogirure Paulo ro pegarewu makaguragarewuji, mare enogiru paganure
Paulo rema, mako makore tubaru tabo, akore: - Iro pega bokwa. Iro pegakare judeudoge eroiaguduji, iro pegakare Pao uwaiji, iro pegakare Roma kejewu brae eimejera kurireuji
Mare nowu brae eimejera Festo aidure tuwo judeudoge eegaredo, dukodi icare makore Pauloji, akore: Akaidure aruduwo Jerusalém kae ewo tugogado ai iegai?
Icare Paulo akore: Roma kejewu ia brae eimejera jekaire imugure, dukodi icare umode turugadu boewo tugogado ii toro Roma bakurireu keje. Iro pegarewu bokwa judeudogei, akire aeruduware

Iro pegarewu umode ei, ewo iwido rugadu ma, ipagudumodukare iwiwo. Mare awu ereadodure jiwu iro pegarewu bokware dukeje, iaboe iaboe eroiwamodukare tuwo imagu mako pegare iiwuge ekera kai. Itaidure ituwo Roma kejewu brae eimejera kurireu César ae
Dukeje icare Festo makore jao tumedage ebo, icare akore ji: - Amagore César bogai, dukodi icare atumode César ae. Brae eimejera Festo makoi judeudoge eimejera Agripa biegai Paulo jiboeji
Meri makakare dukeje, nowu judeudoge eimejera Agripa ure turawuje toreduje Berenice apo toro Cesaréia bakurireu kae, tugimaduwo Festo apo
Icare emugu raire nono, dutabore icare Festo readodure nowu judeudoge eimejera biegai Paulo jiboeji. Akore: - Félix ure ia imedu mugudo baicorewu tada tuiageje
Icare iture Jerusalémto dukeje, nowu sacerdotedoge eimejerage mare judeudoge codureuge etaregodure tumago pegawo ji iwiegai, enogwamagudure ii iwo boedo bito
Icare imagore ei Roma kejewuge ceroiwakae cewo boedo iaboe iaboe ewido, cemode nowu bitodumodewu udo turagojedo mako pegare puduiwuge eegai tumagowo tubaru tabodu otodai
Icare etaregodure mato. Icare nowu barogwato kuri je inure iwiapagawo ei, icare ire itugarege edo nowu imedu reko mato jamedu
Icare nowu onare jiwuge etaregodure mato iegai, mare emago emagokare ia imeardaere ro pegare jiboeji
Emago pegare pui tumeartorure jiboe koia. Emagore pui ia bireu imedu iei Jesus cedu jiboeji, duwure Paulo akore jewoduie
Dukodi icare irore ta... Ioruduwakare inoba iromode ji nowu tagoino dukoia. Dukodire inoragodure ji aidurakuduie tuduwo Jerusalemto boewo tugogado pudui toro
Macare Paulo akore taiduie tuduwo Roma kejewu cegimejera kurireu César ae. Dukodi icare ire Paulo mugudo baicorewu tada jii imode boedo reko toro César ae du kae

Icare nowu judeudoge eimejera Agripa akore nowu brae eimejera Festoji: - Imi jamedu itaidure imearuduwo nowu imedu bataru ji. Icare Festo akore: - Barogwato amearudumode ji. Paulo rakojei judeudoge eimejera Agripa jekaidu
Barogwatore icare nowu Agripa aregodure toreduje Berenice apo, tuguri kuricigo tabo, ure turemo nowu brae eimejera uwaito, ia brae eimejerage ebo, mare nowu bakurireu ia brae kurireuge ebo jamedu

Icare Festo akore: - Akarureu judeudoge eimejera Agripa, awiapagado. Mugure woewu boe taiamedu, tawiapagado. Taerudunure awu imedu ji oino, du judeudoge eiamedu emago emagore, enoiogwarire bitoduwo. Emagoino woe, emagoino Jerusalém tada jamedu
Mare iemarure inoba rore du bogai, icare iorudukare ia roji bitoduwo. Mare makore tudumoduie César ae, dukoiare ire imeardaedo rekoduwo toro César ae
Mare iwo bapera atugodo cegimejera kurireu Roma kejewu bogai tabowu ro pegarewu bokwa. Dukodire ire arego woe taegai, akarureu tagimejera jekai, taeruduwo ia ro pegarewuji ma, iwo bapera atugodo ji
Paga karega, iegaire umodukare turugadu iwo boedo reko toro ireadodukai onare jiwuge emagore jiboe jitu tabo

Icare nowu judeudoge eimejera Agripa akore Pauloji: - Amagodo aparu tabo. Icare Paulore tugera onado boei, akore: 2"Iegarenure, paga karega, imagomode iparu tabo cegimejera kurireu Agripa aegai, nowu judeudoge emagore ii jiboe jamedu boeji
Paga karega, aerudu birigodure judeudoge eroji, mugure pumegiwu emeartoraeji jamedu. Dukodi icare inogwamagudunure ai, awiapagawo awudugu tabo iwadaru ji
Judeudoge eeruduware iro oino duji jii negedurogu imi dupiji, eerudure ii ino moto keje, bakurireu tada jamedu
Marigudu eeruduware inogwacei fariseudoge eiaogwai duji, duwuge emeartoru raka kodure ia judeudoge emeartoru raka kori
Macare oino ipaganure Pao akore paedogamagei tumoduie maku pagaiboe jitudu bogai, dukodire emago pegare ii aegai
Padure pumekejewu pawobe ei pagera pudogidure ere pobe pugejedu epaganure Pao akoinodu bogai, tumaragodui Pao ai boecoji meri ji jii je. Awu ipagare bogaiboe koiare judeudoge emago pegare ii
Imi jamedu imeardaere marigudu umoduie turugadu iwo itonado du kuricigodo Jesus jituji

Oinonore irore rugadu Jerusalém tada. Ire makarewu iwiemage etugu baicorewuto, sacerdotedoge eimejerage ei tuwadaru maku inai dutabo. Icare sacerdotedoge eimejerage ere boedo ewido dukeje, ire iiodo ewadaru keje jamedu

Iture eregodaji itonai ei dutabo nowu sinagogadoge ekao, irorerure ei iwo ewarigu tumeartorure jiboe piji. Nowu ikorigodure eiwu itodure gu gu gu je, icare itonare ei, iture eregodaji jii moto tuginoiboe kae
Dukodire iture Damasco bakurireu kae, sacerdotedoge eimejerage eno bapera tabo

Du tabore icare, ikimejera kurireu, itunure awara ji meri pagaia keje, dutabore baru pijiwu ia urugureboe aregodure, nowu urugureboe kodure meri joku urugu kori, urugu ure tumaedo iiogi, imedage eiogi
Boekimorema, ceiamedu buture mototo kuri tuku je. Icare imearudure ia boe akoi ii duji, hebreudoge ewadaru tabo, akore: - Saulo, Saulo, kodiba akonare ii, kodiba? Rakare ai awo awure to meriri ototo
Icare imagore: Ioguduba akiba akagoino, ikimejera? Icare Pagimejera akore: - Akonare jiwu Jesus imireo
Mare aragojedo! Inure ikuo akai iwo itugaredo aki awadoduwo boe etai awu aerudure jiboe jamedu boeji. Imode ikuo akai pugeje iwo aerududo makaguragareboeji du jire areadodumode boe etai jamedu
Ire akinorudo judeudoge epiji, judeukare emawuge epiji
Inure atudo etae, awo eeku jado, ewo tugirimi boeco piji urugureboe kae, ewo tugirimi boe pegarewu piji Pao ae ma, tumeartorui ii dutabo turo pegarewu okwawo, emuguwo pemegarewuge etada
Nowu kodiboe pijire, ikimejera kurireu Agripa, imeartoru bokwakare nowu iorudure jiwu baru tadaboeji
Ire Pao bataru kogado Damasco kejewuge ewiegai boetoji, dukejere ire kogado Jerusalém tada, dukejere ire kogado judeukare emawuge ewiegai, ewo tuiedorodo, ewo tugirimi Pao ae, turo pemega tabo
Awu iro oino dukoiare icare judeudoge ere tugeragu ii, ere tuiagu iwido
Mare Paore tugera braredo ii, dukoiare iragoje kimore jii oino. Moisés mare profetadoge egore umoduie tudowujeboe du jire imago imagore biegarewuge ewiegai, kurireuge ewiegai
Du reo: Cristo umoduie tuiwodo, jewodumoduie bireuge epiji boetojiwu, dutabore umoduie urugureboe awadudo judeudoge etai, judeukare emawuge etai jamedu
Nowu Paulo akoinodu kejere icare Festore tumago rakaguragado, akore: - Akaora bai baire, Paulo, aeruduwa kuricigo dukoiare ure ameardae pegado
Icare Paulo akore ji: - Itaora pegakare, akarureu Festo, mare boe jokoduwu, boe jetororewu jire inago oino

Ica, awu cegimejera kurireu Agripa, duwu jekaire inago oino ipagudu bokwa tabo, joruduwa birigodure inago oino jamedu boeji. Ioruduware inago oino jiboe iaboe iaboe biadodukae joku piji, paga karega, iaboe iaboe ukare tudowuje boe biarewu tada
Ikimejera kurireu Agripa, ameartorure profetadoge ewadaru ji? Ioruduware ameartoruie ure duji
Icare Agripa makore Pauloji: - Boce kodi anure cristaodo imi, kodi karega
Icare Paulo akore: - Inogwamagudunure Pao ji uwo ado nono ireore, mare tu aki karega, mearudure iwadaru jiwuge eiamedu boe ewo tudo nono ireore, mare awu ikeragogui oino dutabo karega
Icare nowu judeudoge eimejera, nowu brae eimejera, nowu Berenice, mare mugure nono ebowu jamedu boe, ere turagojedo
Icare ei tudawuje du tonaji emagore pui, egore: - Awu imedu ukare iaboe iaboe towuje bitoduwo
Agripa akore Festoji jamedu: - Awu imedu okwamagudumodukare tuduwo César ae ma, uia turugadu boewo kiwuje uwo tuginorudo
Nowu brae eimejera aidure cegoduwo Itália moto kae dukeje, ure Paulo mare ia ieragogudodureuge emagu ia tugobaigarege eimejera iei Júlio cedu ai, duwure nowu brae eimejera kurireu uwai tadawunure ema

Icare cere cedaredo ia Adrumeto bakurireu pijiwu ika kurireuto, du kodumode Asia moto okwaji, icare ure meriri aogado moto piji. Ia imedu iei Aristarco cedu, ia Macedônia moto kejewu bakurireu iei Tessalônica cedu pijiwu imedu, kodure cedabo jamedu

Barogwatore icare cere cedaredo jao Sidônia bakurireu okwai, icare nowu ika kurireu tadawuge eimejera Júlio, turo pemegai Pauloji dutabo, ure udo tudaru tumedage ewai kae, tuwo tugeragu taidure jiboeji
Du pijire icare cere ceremo pobo maerewuto, icare cegodure pobo aiare tabowu moto iei Chipre cedu okwaji, bakuru aregodure cedogi dukodi
Cere pagado Cilícia mare Panfília eno pobo maerewu kajeje, icare cedaregodure ia Lícia moto kejewu bakurireu iei Mira cedu kae
Nowu ika tadawuge eimejera jorudure ia Alexandria bakurireu pijiwu ika kurireuji du kodure Itália moto kae, icare ure cedo cedaredo to
Cero butugure ceno ika kurireu tabo meri makaguragare jii cegodure Cnido bakurireu kae. Nonore icare bakuru ukare cedo ceburedo to

Icare cerore pobo aiare tabowu moto iei Creta cedu okwaji, puredu tu moto joi pobotodu iei Salamina ceduji. Cero kodu pegare nowu moto okwaji, dukejere cedaregodure okwa iei “Bons Portos” cedu kae, puredu tu ji Laséia bakurireu mugure
Boere marigudu, boere todorogado pudui dukejewu boe ure marigudu. Boe ekodui nowu ika kurireu tabodu pegagodure. Dukodire Paulore tumedage ewie nowu inoduji, akore
Imedage, iorudunure awu cegodui tabodu pegagoduie ure cei, ikaji, ika oredure tabo boeji
Mare nowu tugobaigarege eimejera meartorure ika epaji, ore ika cewuji, mare Paulo bataru ji karega

Jamedu nowu ikadoge epa pegare emuguwo keje nowu biaku keje, dukodire boce kodi eiamedu meardaere umoduie turugadu tuwo tugirimi pobo maerewuto, epagare turegodumode Creta moto tadawu bakurireu iei Fênice cedu kae du bogai, tumuguwo tada nowu biaku tonaji; paga karega, mugure meri rutu jaogwai, bakuru aregodure to. Bakuru rakarewu koiare ure emeru pegadodu
Sul jaogwaiwu bakuriri aregodure, dukodire emeardaere tumoduie turowo nono taidu reore. Icare ere meriri aogado pobo piji, ekodure pobo okwaji, puredu tu nowu pobo aiare tabowu moto iei Creta ceduji
Boekimorema, boe raikare du rekodaji nowu pobo aiare moto tabowu pijire ia aroe medobo aregodure, du iere Europa pijiwu Aroe Medobo
Nowu ika kurireu roiwakare nowu bakuru rakarewuji, du ure tumugudo keje taci; cere udo cerego rugadu taci
Ure cewarigu kuri ia pobo aiare tabowu moto biegarewu iei Clauda cedu kae, dukejere icare cere cemugudo, nowu ika kurireu o boe ewurejoia keje. Icare cere jetu otorogado

Dukejere ere bukigu kurireu upodo nowu ika kurireu tabo, boe jokodu kadu kawo (nowu pobo butoborewu ukawo bowuje, ukawo pegado). Icare epagudure nowu ika kurireu jomode Sirte kejewu kugaru uporuto duji. Dukodi icare ere ao jiwu aroia rawuje, ere bakurudo turego toro boeto
Barogwatore icare bakuru rakaguragare kimo, dukodire ere ika kurireu oredure taboboe barigu barigu poboto
Rekodajiwu meri ji pugeje cere ia ika epa meriridoge ewarigu ewarigu poboto jamedu cegera tabo rugadu
Boe raire du tonaji meri joku aregodukare kuiejedoge ewogware jamedu. Bakuru rakaguragare kimo. Cebagakare cemode ceginorudo du bogai pugeje

Boe raicigore cekai boe ko dutabo, du rekodajire icare Paulore turagojedo boe etoiado, icare akore: - Iwiemage, tawiapagamode iwadaru ji takawo tadawuje Creta piji ma, pawudumodukare awu boe pegarewuto, pamodukare awu pagoroe barigu barigu, kodi karega
Ica, oinore icare inure taeruduwado: tagidado, tabagudu kaba, ia tagi ia tagi tawogwamoduka. Ikare okwamode mito tuje
Awu boecoji, imaragodure aiwu Are Eimejera, du ore imi jamedu, ia o tupare towadudo iiegai, akore ii
Apagudu kaba, Paulo, umode turugadu akoduwo Roma kejewu César ae. Paore awu kodure akabowuge emagu akai, ewo tuginorudo
Dukodi icare, imedage, tabagudu kaba. Imeartorure boemode nono Pao o tupa akore iwiegai du reore
Cewarigududodumode ia pobo aiare tabowu moto kae
Cemugure pobo maerewu iei Adriático cedu kajeje boecore pobe puibiji du rekodaji, boekimorema, boeco oia kejere icare nowu ika kurireu epage ere boe pa tuburedugoduie ia moto kae duji

Icare ere meriri barigu poboto bukigu tabo tuioruduwo pobo koji; ure pagera pudogidure ure ino pugeje. Otobiji pugeje biegatu je, boe ekana remagudure, ure pagera pudogidure pagera awubodure turegodaji pugeje
Dukodi icare epagudure tumode ika to ia toritoduji; dukodire ere meriri motudureu ui pobe puibijidu barigu poboto ika upo jaogwai, tuiedu rakawo ji, nonore epagare jii barogwa kododu kae

Kuri je nowu ika kurireu epagere turegoduiagu, dukodire ere tuiagu nowu ika kurireu je kejewu meriri motudureu barigu poboto mare ero arodunure, ere nowu ika biegarewu rawuje, ere tumugudo keje poboto turegoduwo tada
Paulorema ure nowu ika kurireu tadawu tugogobaigarege eimejera bie, ure tugobaigarege ewie jamedu, akore: - Nowu ime emugumodukare ika kurireu tada ma, taroiwamodukare tawo taginorudo
Dukodi icare nowu tugobaigarege ere nowu ika biegarewu iku kado, ere udo tuwududo
Barogwa kododu tabore icare Paulore eiamedu edo tudugu tudo, ure edo iaboerogu boe kowuje, akore ei: -Merire pagera pudogidure ere pobe puibiji tuwugeje
tanudukai, takai ia ko dutabo. Oinore icare inogwamagudunure tai tawo iaboerogu ko, tawo tadurudo. Ica, ia tagaorogu okwamodukare tagaora piji rugadu
Awu tagoinodu tabore icare Paulore tugeragu ia amireuji, mako pemegare Pao ji eiamedu jekai, dukeje icare ure bowuje, ure togwage paru to
Awu ro oinodu kejere icare eiamedure tudugu tudo, ere togwage paru to jamedu
Eiamedure 276 nowu ika tada
Icare ekuredure, dukeje ere nowu ika kurireu barigodudo, tui trigo barigu poboto dutabo

Dukejere icare, meri awadure dukeje, nowu ika epage ere boe pa tuioruduwakae nowu moto ji. Icare eerudure ia pobo maerewu ui turemo mototo duji, kugarubo padure nowu pobo okwaji. Etaidure tuwo nowu ika kurireu jodo to, turoiwamode dukeje
Icare ere nowu meriri motudureu eceba bukigu kado kado, ere pijido toro poboto, ere ika bure kiwuje, ere ika aroia jeture ipo towu jado, icare nowu ika puredugodure nowu kugaru okwa kae
Boekimore, nowu ika kurireu jeture ia kugaru ao otorewuji. Nowu ika jore kugaruto, tudure to, dukeje ukare tudawuje piji, dutabore nowu ika upore tubegado, ure tuwowuje nowu pobo rakarewu koia
Icare nowu tugobaigarege etaidure tuwo nowu iera kogureuge ewido ma, eregodukawo poboji
Mare owu eimejera iei Júlio cedu, aidure tuwo Paulo inorudo, dukoiare makore ei erokawo ino. Icare akore joruduware tugurugoduwowuge ei ewo tuwarigu boetoji poboto etuwo kuri toro moto kae
Iagerema etaregodure moto kae tubadui ira keje dutabo, iage etaregodure moto kae tubadui nowu ika koborogu boe ewugeje dutabo. Oinore icare eiamedu etaregodure moto kae tuie tabo, tubemega tabo
Icai cei ceginorudo dukeje, cere boe pa nowu pobo aiai tabowu moto ieie Malta, oino
Nowu moto kejewu boe eetu pemegaguragare cei, ere ia jorugu kurireu mugudo, du oiadodare ere cemugudo, paga karega, bubutunure, biakunure
Icare Paulore tudugu jerigi upo kuda tuwo barigu joruto, du tonajire icare ia awagu eworireu, rekodure joru pijidu, ure taredo ta, okwa jore tuku ierato
Nowu boe eerudure nowu awagu bararei Paulo kanajura jituji, dukeje emagore pui, egore: - Boe jokodu awu imedu ure boe ewido, paga karega, ure tuginorudo pobo pegarewu piji, mare Pao aidukare jewo
Ure tugera jukodo awagu apo joruto boe puredukai pudui dutabo

Nowu boe emeardaere kana bokumoduie dukejere bimode kuri je duji. Mare epaga raicigore bogai dukejere ere boe pa boe puredukae ji rugadu duji. Dukodire ere tumardae kirimi, egore: - Aroe Eimejeranure ema rugadu rabodu
Nowu oiei, nowu moto kejewu ia imedu iere Públio cedu o baidoge emugure. Awu imedu ure tugeragu cei tuwaito, merire pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, jetu pemegare cei
Boekimorema, nowu Publio uo kogodure, padure tuba keje, biri urunure, kuri kugudure jamedu. Paulo uture ae, okwamagudure Pao ji paru tabo, ure tugera bu ao keje, icare ure pemegago
Awu Paulo roi oinodu kejere icare, nowu pobo aiare tabowu moto kejewu kogodureuge eiamedu etaregodure ae, epemegagodure jamedu, dukodire eetu pemegaguragare cei
Icare cedui nowu piji dukeje, ere cedaidure jiboe jamedu boe maku cenai. Ekodui Malta piji Roma kaedu
Arire pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje, cere cedaredo ia Alexandria pijiwu ika kurireuto, duwu muguradu nowu pobo aiare tabowu moto keje nowu biaku tonaji. Dioscorodoge eie mugure ika kurireu keje
Cedaregodure Siracusa bakurireuto, dukeje icare cere cewuredo tada, du tadare cemugure merire pobe ma jewu metuia bokware

Du pijire cegodure oino pobo okwaji jii cedaregodure Régio bakurireuto du kae. Barogwatore icare, Sul jaogwaiwu bakuru aregodure, dutabore cegodure. Icare merire pobe dukeje cedaregodure Pozzuoli bakurireuto
Nonore ceerudure ia cewiemagei, duwugere etaidure cemuguwo pudabo merimode ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto. Dukeje cegodure Roma bakurireu kae

Roma kejewu pawiemage ewiedure marigudu cedaregodumode duji. Dukodire etaregodure cedogi jii ia bororo iei Apia cedu kae, ia boe eda iei “Três Tabernas “ cedu kae. Icare Paulo jorudure ei dukejere ure tudugu tudo pugeje, jekarere Pao ji. Paulo roi Roma kejedu
Icare cedaregodure Roma bakurireuto dukeje, tugobaigarege ere Paulodo tumugudo ewai tada, ia tugobaigare jeture ji

Merire pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje, Paulo makore nowu judeudoge kurireuge ewogai, etuwo pudae. Ere tudo pui ae, dukeje icare akore ei: - Imanamage, iro pegakare boei, iro pegakare paedogamage eroji, dukodi karega icare boere tugeragu ii Jerusalém tada, ere imagu Roma kejewuge ekera kai
Awugere icare tui tugogado ii dukeje, etaidure tuwo ikinorudo, eerudukare ia iro pegarewuji iwiwo kodi
Mare judeudoge ekiarire, dukodire inogwamagudure César bogai, mare itaidukare imago pegawo iwobei
Kodire imagore tawogai, imagowo tai, paga karega, Israeldoge epagare bogai boe koia boere ikera kogudo awu meriri iku tabo
Icare egore ji: - Ia bapera aregodukare cewogai Judeia piji iaboe tabo, ia cewiemage etaregodukare nowu moto piji jamedu tumago pegai ai dutabo
Mare cedaidure aki rugadu amagowo cewiegai ameardae jiboeji. Paga karega, ceeruduware tu jiboe reo: Boe etona etonare nowu boei boe jamedu boe keje

Icare ere ia meri remagu tumagowo pui. Dukejere makarewuge etaregodure bogai nowu mugure tadawu baito. Meri jamedu jire emagore pui meri rutu piji jii meri butu kae. Paulo readodure ewiegai Pao o boe pemegarewuji, ure tubewudo Moisés mare profetadoge ewadaru tabo tuwo emeartorudo Jesus ji
Iage emeartorure bataru ji, iagerema emeartorukare

Eerudu pemegakare pu meardaere puibagi, dukodi icare eture, dukodire Paulo akore ei: - Boe jokodu Aroe Pemegarewu akore taomagei profetadoge eiabiji: 26”Atudo nowu boe etae, amagodo ei: Tawiaja tabore tamearudumode, mare taeruduwamodukare; taeku tabore taerudumode, mare tamodukare boe pawuje
Paga karega, awu boe ewabo rakare, ere tuwiaja mi, ere tuioku mi, tukawo tuiedorodo ma, ikawo epemegado” (Is 6,
Dukodi icare, taeruduwado: awu Pao o boe pemegarewu makudumode judeukare emawuge etai. 29(Dukejere icare judeudoge ere tudawuje nowu piji tumago rakai pui dutabo
Paulo mugure nowu ture aruwu bai tada jorure pobe. Nonore ure tugeragu jemarure tuwogaiwuge eiamedu boei
Readodure brae ewiegai Pao o boe pemegarewuji, ure boe eeruduwado Jesus jiboeji, turaga tabo, taidu tabo rugadu, iaboe iaboe emagokare ji rokawo ino. R
Imi, Paulo, imode awu bapera atugodo. Jesus Cristo burejoianure imi, Pao ure apostolodo imi, ure tugeragu ii iwo bakaru pemegarewu kogado du bogai
Marigudu Pao makore to profetadoge eiabiji awu bakaru pemegarewu umode tudowuje duji, duwugere awu inodu bu bapera pemegarewu keje
Kejere boe emagore Pao Onaregedu Pagimejera Jesus Cristo jiboeji, duwu brae eimejera Davi otojiwunure ema, imedui pudumi du reore
Aroe Pemegarewure boe edo boe pa Aroe Eimejera Onaregeduie Jesus Cristoce duji, jewodui bireuge epiji dukoia
Pagimejera Jesus Cristo, koiare ure apostolodo imi, imaragoduwo tumaragodaeji, iwo awu moto kejewu boe erego emeartoruwo ji, ewiapagawo ji
Awuge etadare tamedure jamedu, Roma kejewuge, Jesus Cristo makore tawogai jamedu
Taiamedu boe, Roma kejewuge, Pao mearudu kurire tai, togewo tagi du bogai. Pao Aroe Eimejera, Pagimejera Jesus Cristo o boe pemegarewu boe butugureu jetuwo tagabo
Iegare kuricigore Aroe Eimejeraji, Jesus Cristo tada, taigoia, mare paga karega, moto kejewuge eiamedu boe eegarenure tameartoraeji. Paulo aidure tuduwo Roma bakurireu kaedu
Pao Aroe Eimejera, imaragodure aiwu iwabo jamedu tabo Tonaregedu o bakaru pemegarewu keje, joruduware imagoi pudui tabaru tabo duji
Inogwamagudure tu tu tu ji tuwo itudo tawogai, taidumode dukeje
Itogea kuricigore ioruduwo tai, iwo ia baru tadawu boe pemegarewu maku tagai, tamearudu awaduwo tai du bogai
Mare pawo pu mearudu awadudo puibagi, pameartorae mitodu jitu koia

Iwiemage, itaidure taeruduwawo itaidu rakare ioruduwo tai du bogai duji, itaidure imaragodu pemegawo tagabo, imaragodu magai ia ao pegokarewuge ekao du reore, mare jii oino iroiwakare ituwo tawogai roga
Imaragodure boe eiamedu boe etai: Grécia kejewuge etai, Grécia kejewukare emawuge etai, joruduwarewuge etai, joruduwakarewuge etai jamedu
Dukodire ire irugadu iwo bakaru pemegarewu kogado Roma kejewuge tawiegai jamedu. Boe emeartorae
Ipogurumodukare inagoi bakaru pemegarewu jituji. Paga karega, ro rakaguragarewunure ema tuwo meartorureuge eiamedu einorudo, Judeia kejewuge boetoji, rekodaji Judeia kejewukare emawuge

Mare paga karega, kejere Pao o boe jetororewu ure towadudo taregodui boe emeartorae piji, tui boe erego boe emeartorae kae, padumagai bapera pemegarewu keje du reore: “Pemegarewu imedu jemode tumeartorae kodi” (Hab 2,4). Meartoru bokwarewuge ero pegarewu
Boe jokodu, Pao kodu kagirire ure boe rakarewu biado turo pegarewu koiawu imei
Paga karega, ure boe eerudumode puduiboe awadudo eegai
Awu moto towujedure du rekodaji, boe eerudukare jiwu Pao jiboe: ro raka, Aroe Eimejerai pudumidu, boe eeruduware ji ure towujeboe koia. Dukodire boe emodukare tuioruduwa bokwa bokwado
Boe eerudui Pao jitu tabo, ekare akaru kurido, ekare tukutaido ji, dure karega, emeardae pegare, ewabo mugure boeco tada
Egore tuioruduwa rakaguragae, mare etaora bai baire
Ewiapagakare Aroe Eimejera remawuji, mare ewiapagare aroe eimejerakare emawugei, ime ereorewugei, barege ereorewugei, kiege barege ereorewugei
Dukodire Paore emagu nowu ewabo aidure jiboe kai, dukodire ere tugodu pegado
Ere Pao bataru jetorogodureu maku tuwadararodae jipagi, ere tubojodo Paore towuji boeji, du jire ewiapagare, ekare tubujodo Pao remawuji, ewiapagakare ji. Duwu jire boe eegaremode jii je. Oino godu
Dukodire Paore emagu poguru bokwareboe kai: Areme ere tumagu turowo nono eromodukare jiboe kai
Ime ero pegare pui jamedu, tui toreduje pijido dutabo, ere tumagu puai, dukodire ere tugodu pegado turo pegarewu morice
Etaidukare tuioruduwawo Pao ji, dukodire ure emagu tumeardae pegarewu kai, turomodukare jiboeji

Enogorobadure boe pegarewu awadu tabo, boe ero pegajagureu awadu tabo, boe etaidui pu oroe jitu tabo, boe erorerae pegarewu tabo, boe eimaredui pui dutabo, boei pu bito dutabo, boe erugodui pui dutabo, boe ewadarodae tabo, boe emeardae pegarewu tabo, etonare Pao Aroe Eimejeraji
Emago pegare pui, enogirure pui, ekodu kagirire pui, ere tojarodo pudui, ero pegarewu awadure, ewiapagakare tuomagei
Etaora bai baire, ewadaru riki bokwa, enogudu bokware tumedage ebo
Ero kigodure awu turo oino jiboeji icare eiore rore oinowugei jamedu, eeruduware Pao akoe inodu bitodumode, kodi karega
Imeduia, are akogado amedagei? Nowu inodu tabo aro peganure rugadu. Are akogado amedagei mare arore nono ero reore, dutabo are boe pegado ai akaobiji
Paeruduware Pao jetorogodui tui tugogado nowu rore oinowuge ei duji
Mare aki are akogado amedagei, aroi nono ero reore, ameardaekana amode akinorudo Pao umode tugogado ai dupiji?
Amodukana Pao pemegaguragai paidu redugodudo? Aeruduwakare Pao makoi awagoidu tubemegaguraga tabo awo atugu ato, apemegawo du bogai?
Mare awabo rakaguragare, akaidukare ameartoruwo Pao bataru ji, dukodire anure Pao korigodumode aidu itodudo, umode tugogado boei dukejewu meri kae
Umode paro morido pagai paro rekodaji
Umode jere jii jeboe maku ure tubewudo pudui tuwo turo pemegadowuge etai, jemarure tuiegare pemegawo, tuwo tugurido, tuwi bokwawo du bogaiwuge etai
Mare aidure tu puduiwuge, ure boe rikireu pijido tugoduwo boe jokodukarewu rekodajiwuge, Pao korigodumode ei, umode etogorido
Ro pegarewuge eiamedu boe, boe korimode ei, eno maidodumode pudabo: Judeia kejewuge ekodumode boetoji, Judeia kejewukare emawuge ekodumode rekodaji nowu inoduto
Mare Pao umode boe pemegarewu, boe butugureu maku ro pemegarewuge etai: Judeia kejewuge etai boetoji, eregodaji Judeia kejewukare emawuge etai
Paga karega, Pao aiwore bo eiamedu boei pureore

Judeukare emawuge enokare Moisés ui boe eroiagudu: ero pegare dukeje, ere tuwarigu boe pegarewuto awu boe eroiagudu bokwa tabo. Cewu ore Moisés ui boe eroiaguduwuge eiamedu boe ero pegare dukeje, awu boe eroiagudu umode tugogado ei
Paga karega, mearudure boe eroiagudu jiwuge epemegakare, mare tu rore nono boe eroiagudu reorewuge epemegare Pao jekai
Judeukare emawuge enokare Moisés boe eroiagudu rema, mare erore tumeardae reore boe eroiagudu rekodaji, enokare nowu inoduce, kodi karega. Kode emeardae ure turugadu etai boe eroiagudu reore

Nowu turo oino dutabo, ere oinodu awadudo boe eroiagudu metui tuwabo tada duji. Nowu ewabo tadaboe ure edo boe pa awu inodu boe jokoduie. Mare paga karega, ia dukeje emeardaere turo pegaie ure, ia dukeje emeardaere turo pemegaie ure duji
Nowu inodu awadumode Pao umode tugogado ime ero biadureu jiwu meri ji Jesus Cristo koia, ire kogadowu bakaru pemegarewu rekodaji
Aki akagore judeuie ure aki, are aiodo boe eroiagudu keje, aegarere ako Aroe Eimejeraji
Aeruduware Pao aidure jiboeji, boe eroiagudu ure aeruduwado boe pemegarewu ema remawuji

Akire ameardaere akodui joku bokwarewuge etododai duji, ameardaere akie urugureboere aki boeco tadawuge etaiduji, ocarokare puduiwuge ekodu pemegado duji, aeruduwa birigodui boe jetorogodureu padui boe eroiagudu keje duji
Akire are amedage eeruduwado, kodiba akare aeruduwado? Akagore boe eiwogu kaiagu, kodiba akiwogure?
Akagore boe eerebari kaiagu, kodiba aerebarire? Akodu kagirire aroe eimejerakare emawugei, mare kodiba akiwogure ewai tada boeji?
Akojarore ai boe eroiaguduji, mare Pao poguraenure aki akodui boe eroiagudu peragajeje dutabo
Mare paga karega, bapera atugo akore: “Judeukare emawuge emago pegare Pao ieji taigoia” (Is 52,5
Aromode nono boe eroiagudu rekodaji ma, judeudoge eno kruca umode turugadu ai, mare ameartorumodukare ji ma, amode nono kruca padukare kejewuge ereore
Kruca padukare kejewuge eromode nono boe eroiagudu reore ma, Pao biapagamode ei biapaga magai kruca padure kejewuge ei du reore
Dukodi icare, judeukare emawu turoi nono boe eroiagudu reore umode tugogado ai, are boe eroiagudu kejeboe kado aerudui boe eroiaguduji, kruca padui awugeje dukodi karega
Judeu ema remawu karega ure ema, nowu ure oino boe eegai tu je, kruca padure tu keje karega jamedu
Paci oino, kruca padure uwabo kejewu judeu remawu rema, Aroe Pemegarewu koia, mare bapera atugo koia karega. Boe ewadaru jerebarimodukare apo, mare tu Pao Aroe Eimejera jerebarimode apo
Inoba judeudoge ekodure iage ekori? Inoba kruca padure kejewuge ekodure kruca padukare kejewuge ekori?
U! Inodu kuricigo, makaguragare. Boetoji, ica, Pao ure tumeartorudo to bakaru pemegarewu tabo etai
Kode, ia emage emeartorukare ma, kode, nowu emeartorukaredu umode Pao mearudu kurii boeidu kado?

Boro! Ukare ino rugadu! Boe eiamedu boe ewadararodure, mare Pao makore boe rikireuji tu rugadu. Ure nono bapera atugo reore: “Boemode boe pa aedorogoduie ure duji awadaru keje, ai akogado boei dukeje” (Sl 50,6

Paro pegarewu umode Pao jetorogoduidu awadudo ma, inoba pagagomode? Pagagomode ro pegaie ure tugorigodui pai duji? 6(Imagonure ime emagore jiboe reore). Boro! Ukare ino! Umode ino ma, inoba umode tugogado awu moto kejeboeji?
Iwadararodae umode Pao jetororeboe urugu awadudo ma, kodiba icare umode tugogado ro pegareboeie ure imi duji?

Umode ino ma, kodiba pagagomodukare oino: - Paro pegawo, boe pegarewu aregoduwo boe pegarewu piji ? (Boe jokodu iaboe emeardae pegare ii tagoi iie iiodo nowu inodu keje duji. Mare boe pegamode nowu boe egoi oinodu morice). Boe eiamedu boe ero pegare
Kode, inoba pagagomode? Judeudoge cegi cebemega kodumodukana judeukare emawuge epemega kori? Boro! Cere, judeudoge eiamedu boe, judeukare emawuge eiamedu boe eedui boe pegarewu kudadu awadudo
Nono bapera atugo reore: “Ia ro pemegareboe bokwa
Ia joruduwareboe bokwa. Ia jemarure Pao bogai boe bokwa
Boe eiamedu boe ere tuiaedo awara jetororewu piji. Boe eiamedu boe ere tuwogwado. Ia ro pemegareboe bokwa, boe bokwa rugadu

Eruwo ure nono boe eiao jadodu reore. Boe ewadararodaere tudawuje eiabiji, awague etogori reoreboe ure tuwiado enogwa tada “ (Sl 5, 10; Sl 89,4). 14”Eia okorobadure tuwadaru pegarewu tabo, jirireboe tabo
Ewure kiarikare, eregodu rakare tuwo boe eku redo
Boe ecebae, ure boe epegadoboe, jeture ekoda rea keje
Eeruduwakare boe butugureu kaewu awara ji” (Is 59,7) 18"Eeruduwakare tubagudui Paoce duji (Sl 32,5

Aró, kode, paeruduware padure boe eroiagudu kejeboe jamedu boeie makore mugure boe eroiagudu kudawuge ewiegai duji. Nowu inodu tabowo boe eiamedu boe enogwa jetukawo pugeje, jamedu awu moto kejewu boewo boe pa turo pegarewuji Pao jekai
Paga karega, iaboe iaboe umodukare tubemegado boe eroiagudu koia. Mare boe eroiagudu ure boe edo boe pawuje boe ero pegarewuji tu je. Boe ere tubemegado tumeartorui Jesus Cristo jitu koia
Mare oino, boe eroiagudu, mare profetadoge emagore jiwu Pao o jetororeboe, ure towadudo boe eroiagudu bokwa tabo
Pao o jetororeboe makudure boe emeartorui Jesus Cristo jitu koia, meartorure jiwuge eiamedu boe etai, boe epadukare pumekeje kodi
Mare paga karega, eiamedu boe ero pegare, ere tuiaedo Pao urugu piji
Epemegagodure mori bokwa tabo, Pao o boe pemegarewu koia; Jesus Cristo koiare ure einorudo

Pao aidure Cristo uwo tuiwodo dukoiawo boe ero pegarewu okwadodu makuduwo boe etai, boe emeartorui Jesus Cristo jitu koia. dutabore ure boe eerududo tuiedororeboeji, tuwudugugodui mariguduwuge ero pegarewuji
Awu kodiwu keje ure boe eerududo tuiedororeboeji, tui meartorure Cristo jiwuge eedorodo dutabo
Dukodire pagojaromode dukoiaboe bokwa. Kodiba? Paroi nono boe eroiagudu reore dukodi kana? Boro! Pameartorure Cristo jitu kodi
Mare paga karega, cemeardaere boe epemegagoduie tumeartoru koia, mare turoi nono boe eroiagudu reore dukoia karega
Paokana umode tu judeudoge eno Aroe Eimejera? Judeukare emawuge eno Aroe Eimejera karega una? U! Ema rugadu. Paore judeukare emawuge eno Aroe Eimejera jamedu
Pao Aroe Eimejera ure mito tu je. Emare umode judeudoge, judeukare emawuge eedorodo emeartoru koia
Awu inodu tabo, pakana ure boe eroiagudu perodudo pudui boe emeartorae koia? Boro! Ukare ino! Paci oino, panure boe eroiagudu rakado
Inoba pagagomode makudure kodure pagododaiwu Abraão aiboeji? Inoba boere ji?
Abraãmode tuiedorodo turo koia ma, ocaromode pudui rugadu, mare Pao jekai karega
Bapera atugo pemegarewu akore oino: “Abraão meartorure Pao ji, dukodire Pao biapagare nowu inoduji tuwo jetorogodudo” (Gen 15,6
Mare maragodureu maragodae morire, mori makudu karega ure boe enogudu koia, mare maragodae koia
Mare cewu ia ro bokwarewu meartorure ure ro pegarewu jetorodowu Pao jiwu, nowu meartoru koiare ure jetorodo, Pao okudu koia
Awu inodu jire Davi makore, tagoi: “Eiwo aidugirimode Pao umode eedorodo taiwo kai ero jitu tabo
Jiwo aidugirireuge ero pegarewu okwadodure, biadodure
Jiwo aidugirireu imedu Pao biapagakare ro pegarewuji”! (Sl 31,

Davi makoi awu inodu jitu tabo, tu kruca padure kejewuge eiwo aidugirimode? Boro! Kruca padukare kejewuge eiwo aidugirimode jamedu. Mare paga karega, pamagore: - Abraão meartorure, kodire Paore pemegado
Inoba boeredu kejeba awu inodure tudowuje? Kruca padui Abraão kejedu otodai kana? Iarema rekodaji kana? Kruca padure kejedu rekodaji karega, mare kruca padure kejedu otodai

Kruca padure keje ia boiwu keje. Nowu kruca padui kejedu koiare boe edo boe pa pao Abraão jetorogodure duji, meartoru koia, nowu kruca padumode kejedu otodai. Nowu inodu koia Abraão orenure meartorureuge eiamedu boece, duwugere Pao aidure ei, kruca padukai ewugeje dutabo
Abraão orenure kruca padure kejewuge eiamedu boece jamedu, kruca padui ewugeje dukodi karega, mare ekodure Abraão ro rekodaji kodi
Pao makore Abraãoji, rekodajiwugei jamedu, enomoduie awu motoce duji. Pao makore awu inoduji, mare Abraão rore nono boe eroiagudu reore dukodi karega, mare ure jetorodo meartoru koia dukodi
Mare Pao umode makuboe, kodure boe eroiagudu rekodajiwuge enomode ema, boe karega umode boe emeartoraece, icare Pao akore tumode maku boe etaiboe kodumodukare pudui
Mare boe eroiagudu ure boe ekorigodae arego. Mare boe eroiagudu bokwa keje, boe ero pegarewu bokwamode jamedu

Nowu inodu koia, Pao akore tumoduie makuboe aregodumode boe emeartorae koia, duma, Pao akore tumoduie makuboe makudu pagawo Abraão ore eiamedu boe etai. Pao akore tumoduie makuboere, rore nono boe eroiagudu reorewuge etai tu je karega, mare meartorure nono Abraão meartoru reorewuge etai jamedu, paiamedu boe Paonure ema kodi

Oinore bapera atugo pemegarewu akore: “Ire makaguragarewu moto kejewuge etuodo aki”. (Gen 17,69). Oinore Abraão meartorure jiwu Aroe Eimejera akore. Ure bireuge ewodudowu Aroe Eimejera, ure jekareboe eedowu Aroe Eimejera
Upagamode bogaiboe bokware boe eegai, dutabore upagare, meartorure makarewu moto kejewuge etuomode pudumi duji, nowu bapera atugo pemegarewu ako reore: “Oinore aregodajiwuge emagaguragare” (Gen 15,59
O joru puredugodunure 100 kae, jorudure tageduie ure duji, joruduware toreduje Sara akeduie ure jamedu duji, mare du inodu tabo meartoru akedu kare
Ukare Pao bataru perodudo pudui, mare ure turo rakado tumeartoru tabo, tui Pao jekaredo dutabo
Joruduwa birigodure Pao roiwai turowo nono tagoi turomode jitu reore
Du inodu koiare Pao ure pemegado
Awu bapera atugo akoi Paore pemegado. Abraãoji tu je karega akoino
Paire akoino jamedu. Paga karega, pameartorure ure Pagimejera Jesus Cristo jewodudo bireuge epijiwuji, dukodire umode paedorogodudo, umode pabemegado jamedu
Pagimejera Jesus Cristo bitodure paro pegarewu koia, jewodure bireuge epiji tuwo pabemegado du bogai
Icare paedorogodudodure pameartoru koia, dukoiare pabemegare Pao ji, pagimejera Jesus Cristo koia
Koiare ure pagarego Pao o boe pemegarewu kae, pameartorui jitudu koia. Icare padumode pabewu tabo awu Pao o boe pemegarewu tabo, icare paegarere pabaga tabo paeduwo Pao urugu tada du bogai
Mare paegarere pagogodae keje jamedu, paga karega, paeruduware pagogodae koiaie ure pabewudo pai paro pemegarewuji
Awu pai pabewudo paro pemegarewu jitudu ure Pao aidudo pai; awu Pao aidui paidu koiare ure pado pabagado
Awu pai pabagadodu umodukare paekuri pagado, paga karega, Paore tumearudu kurii paidu redo pawabo tada, ture maku pagaiwu Aroe Pemegarewu koia
Ia meri keje, paro pega keje, Cristo bitodure ro pegarewuge pagai, boe aregodure pudae dukeje
Ica, boe ewimodukare ro pegarewu ai. Ia boe pemegareboe etaire boe emode tuiwodo rakudu
Mare Paore tumearudu kuricigoi paidu awadudo, paro pega kimo dutabo. Cristoi tuiwodo pagai dukoia
Mare oinore icare paedorogodure ku koia, u kodi icare Cristo mitodu koiare umode paginorudo Pao korigodui pai dupiji
Paga karega, pagonai pudui dukeje, Paore pabemegado pudui Tonaregedu bi koia ma, oino icare, pabemegai pudui dukeje, umode paginorudo Tonaregedu jewodu koia
Paegarewo Pao ji, Pagimejera Jesus Cristo koia, koiare ure pabemegado Pao ji. Adão mare Jesus Cristo

Ia imedu ui mito tu je dukoiare ure boe ero pegarewudo turemo awu mototo; boe ero pegarewu ure boe ewidodu arego. Du inodu koiare boe ewidodu ure taodo boe eiamedu boe eiogi, boe eiamedu boe ero pegare kodi
Boe eroiagudu makudumode boe etai du otodai, boe ero pegarewu jeture awu moto keje marigudu. Mare cewu boe ero pegarewu ukare boe epegado, boe eroiagudu bokwa keje
Mare Adão piji jii Moisés ae boe eiamedu boe ewire; ro pegakare Adão ro pegamagai tui tudugu Pao bataru kudadu reorewuge ewire jamedu. Adão jebatodure cewu aregodumodewuji

Mare epadure pumekeje, paga karega, Pao o boe pemegarewu makudui boe etaidu jebatodukare Adao ro pegarewuji kodi: Makarewuge ewire ia imedui mito tu je du ro pegarewu koia rugadu. Mare Pao o boe pemegarewu kodu remawunure nowu ro pegarewu kori. Ure boe einorudodu makudu pagado boe eiamedu boe etai, ia Imedui mito tu je du mearudu kuricigoi boei dukoia, dure Jesus Cristo rema

Paore makuboe rore tuginoi, cewu imedu ui mito tu jedu ro pegarewu rore tuginoi jamedu (epadure pumekeje): Ia boe ero pegarewu ui mito tu je dukoiare ure boe ewarigu boe pegarewuto, mare Pao o boe pemegarewu ure makarewu boe ero pegarewu okwado

Ia imedui mito tu je du ro pegarewu koiare ure boe ewidodudo tubodo boe ebo, mare Jesus Cristo ui mito tu je du ro pemegarewu kodu remawure nowu ro pegarewu kori, dukodire boe pemegarewu makudu awadure etaiwuge, Paore jetorogodudowuge eemode rugadu Jesus Cristo mito tu je dukoia
Dukodire, boemagai ia boe ero pegarewu ure boe eiamedu boe ewarigu boe pegarewuto, du reorere ia boe ero pemegarewu ure boe eiamedu boe einorudo, ure boe edo tuguo pugeje

Jamedu, boemagai boe eiamedu boe ere turo pegado ia imedu ui mito tu je du meartorukai Pao bataru jitu koia, du reorere boe eiamedu boe eedorogodumode ia Imedu ui mito tu je du meartorui Pao bataru jitu koia
Boe eroiagudu aregodure tuwo boe ero pegarewu ko tao kae. Mare boe ero pegarewu kuricigorewo kejere, Pao o boe pemegarewu kodure tao kae kori

Oino, boemagai boe ero pegarewu jeture boei tui boe ewogwado dutabo, du reorere Pao o boe pemegarewu jeture boei tui boe eedorodo dutabo, ure parego boe ewimodukarewo kae, Pagimejera Jesus Cristo koia
Kode, inoba pagagomode? Paro pegamodukana kimo Pao o boe pemegarewu koduwo tao kae?
Boro! Ukare ino! Pawire marigudu paro pegarewu kai, dukodire padumodukare keje pugeje
Boe jokodure taeruduware pagaimodure Cristo apowuge eiamedu boe, bi tadaie pagaimodure
Awu pagaimodure dukoia, padugudodure Cristo apo tuwi tada, duma, boemagai Cristo jewodure bireuge epiji Pao ro rakarewu koia, du reorere pagi jamedu paewodu maidumode jamedu
Pagodure apo bi reore, icare pagodumode apo jewodu reore jamedu
