Ema remawumode ei, eeruduwa kawo awara jetororewuji, mare tuiorudui jitu dukeje, emode tugirimi tuibagi tui tuiaedo Bakaru Pemegarewu kogadodure pudaiwu pijidu, ema karega
Boere ei nono boe egoi arigao jitu reore: Arigao ure tuweari kowuje pugeje (Prov 26,11), iarema boe egoi jugorewu jitu reore: jugorewu kabidure, dukeje, ure tugirimi rotukuruto pugeje
Imearudu kurire jiwu iwiemage, ire atugodo tagai bapera atugo rekodajiwu reo. Ei pobe dukeje ire tado tawiabutudo taeruduware jiboeji ma, taeruduwa pemegawo ji
Tawiabutudo profetadoge pemegarewuge ewadaru keje, tawiabutudo apostolodoge ere taeruduwado jiwu ure paginorudowu Pagimejera Jesus Cristo ui taroiagudu keje
Taeruduwado awu inoduji boetoji: Boe akedu puredugodu kejere, bataru pegarewuge, bataru okirureuge etaregodumode, duwugere eedure turo pegarewu tada
Egomode: Kaiba akore taregodumodedu padure? Paomage ewi rekodaji boe jamedu boere nono tureore kimo, ure nono awu moto todu paru pijidu reore
Ere tuwiago taobiji boe otoji baru, moto, todure marigudu duji, Pao bataru ui udo tudawuje pobo oia biji duji
Ewiagodure awu moto kejewu boe ewogware pobo tada Pao koia dupiji
Mare baru, moto, todure oino mai du, Pao batarure jetudo turugadu joru kai, nowu umode tugogado boei kejewu meri keje, dukejere ro pegarewuge ewogwamode
Mare imearudu kurire jiwuge tagi, tawiagodu kaba awu bakaru piji: Pao jekai, ia meri ure nono jorui mil cedu reore. Jorumode mil cedu ure nono meri mito tu je du reore
Pao umodukare boedo jii tuwadaru keje, iaboe emeardae reore. Mare ure tuwudugugo tai, aidukare iaboe iaboewo tuwogwado, aidure boe eiamedu boewo tumeardae kirimi pudae duji

Pao aregodumode jiwu meri ure nono iwogureboe aregodumode jiwu meri reore. Nowu meri ji, baru akedumode tuiaruru kuricigo tabo, baru tadaboe jamedu boe akedumode jamedu jorureia keje, awu moto okwamode jeture kejeboe jamedu boe tabo. Baru maiwu, moto maiwu
Awu boe jamedu boe akedumode, dukodire tameardae tugu taro pemegawo du bogai, tamagowo tabaru tabo jamedu
Tabagai nowu Pao o meri bogai, akedo tai nowu meri aregodumodedu bogai; nowu meri keje baru akedumode, baru tadaboe jamedu boe kowudumode joru tabo
Pagirema pabagamode baru maiwu bogai, moto maiwu bogai, du tadare boe jetorogodureu mugure, Pao bataru rekodaji. Bapera ao
Dukodi icare, imearudu kurire jiwu iwobe, tadurudo tai, ioruduwo tai taro pegarewu bokwaji, boe enogituwai taidu bokwaji, boe butugureu tada
Taeruduwawo: Pagimejera okudu uiagudu ure paginorudo. Ure nono pamearudu kurire jiwu pawie Paulo ure bapera atugodo tawogai du reore, makudure aiwu joruduwa rakarewu rekodaji

Oinore rore to bapera atugo jamedu boe keje, makoi awu inoduji dukeje. Kejere ia boe eeruduwakare kuri jiboe padure, dukoiare ia joruduwa rakakarewu duru rakarewu ime ere tuiodo nowu bataru keje, mare tuwo tuwarigu boe pegarewuto, ero magai ia bapera atugo pemegarewu jitu reore
Dukodi icare, tagi iwiemage, ire tamearudu awadudo, boe aregodumode pudaedu otodai. Tamearudu awadudo tai tawudu kawo tagodu pemegarewu piji, nowu boe ewadaru rikikarewu koia

Mare tarijodudo ure paginorudowu Pagimejera Jesus Cristo o boe pemegarewu tabo, taeruduwai jitu tabo. Emare boewo akaru kurido oino, boe jameduji jii je. Oino godu. I. JOÃO JOÃO O BAPERA ATUGO BOETOJIWU
Rakojere jii boe paru pijiwu, cemearudure jiwu, ceerudure jiwu, cedaiwore jiwu, cegera jeture jiwu bataru jerewu jire cemagore
Paga karega, Jereboere towadudo, ceerudure ji. Cenure Jereboe akedu bokwarewu kogado tawiegai, du mugure Pao tada, du ure towadudo paegai
Cereadodure tawiegai ceerudure jiboeji, cemearudure jiboeji, ma, cemedagewo tagi jamedu. Ica, Pare pamedagedo puje Pao apo, Onaregedu Jesus Cristo apo
Cere bapera atugodo awu inoduji tawogai ma, taegare kororogoduwo. Urugureboenure Paoce
Cemearudure jiwu bakaru dure cere awadudo tawogai du reo: Urugureboenure Paoce, boeco bokware tada
Pamagomode paragojeie apo, mare paragojei boeco tada dutabo ma, pawadararodu rabodu ure, pamerukare boe rikireuji

Mare pamerumode urugu tada, mugu magai turugu tada du reore ma, pamugumode pamedage ebo puapo, Onaregedu Jesus Cristo ku umode pabemegado paro pegarewu jamedu boe piji. Boe eregodui turo pegarewu pijidu
Pamagomode paro pegarewu bokwaie ma, panure paekuri pagado pagaobiji, boe jokodure emaboe metukare padoda
Mare pamode boe pa paro pegaji ma, Pao rakojere nono tubemega tabo, tuiedorogodu tabo, tuwo paro pegarewu okwado, tuwo pabemegado boe pegarewu jamedu boe piji
Pamagomode paro pegarewu bokwaie ma, panure batararodaedo ema, o bataru metumodukare padoda
Itore kugure, inure bapera atugodo awu inoduji tawogai, taro pega kawo. Mare ia tagi ro pegare ma, makore Pao ji pabaru tabo boere, dure ro jetororewu Jesus Cristo rema
Emare paro pegarewu mori rema. Mare pagi tu je karega, awu moto kejewu ro pegarewuge eiamedu boe emorinure ema jamedu. Boe erowo nono Paoi boe eroiagudure
Paromode nono ui paroiagudu reore ma, pamode boe pa paeruduwai jitu duji
Akore tuioruduwaie ji, mare rokare nono ui boe eroiagudu reorewu, batararodunure, boe rikireu mugukare apo
Mare rore nono makore jiboe jiwu, Pao mearudu kuriae mugure apo rugadu. Awu inodu tabore paeruduware pamugui apo duji
Akore tumuguie apowu, romode nono ro pemegai du reore

Imearudu kurire jiwuge tagi, ikarega ure bapera atugodo boe eroiagudu maiwuji tagai, mare boe eroiagudu mariguduwu makudure tagai boetojiwuji. Awu boe eroiagudu mariguduwure awu tamearudure jiwu bataru rema
Mare oino imode bapera atugodo ia boe eroiagudu maiwuji tagai, dure maiwure jokodu tagai, ai jamedu. Paga karega, boeco akedu, boe jokoduwu urugureboe aregodunure
Akore turagojeie urugureboe tada, mare kodu kagirire tuwie jiwu, rakojenure boeco tada kimo
Mearudu kurire tuwie jiwu rakojere urugureboe tada, bure akurumodukare boeto
Mare kodu kagirire tuwie jiwu rakojere boeco tada, merure boeco tada, jorudukare kaiba tumode tuwure akurudo. Boecore joku mitudo. Awu moto kejewu boe epagudae
Itore kugure, inure awu bapera atugodo tagai, taro pegarewu okware Jesus ie tabo kodi
Boe etuomage, inure awu bapera atugodo awu inoduji tagai, taeruduware cewu rakojere jii boe paru pijiwuji kodi. Ipare, inure bapera atugodo tagai, tare tamorido pegareboeji kodi

Boe etore kugure, inure bapera atugodo tagai, taeruduware Pao ji kodi. Boe etuomage, ire bapera atugodo tagai, taeruduware Aroe Eimejeraji kodi. Ipare, ire bapera atugodo tagai, tadurure kodi, Pao o bataru meture tagabo kodi, tare tamorido pegareboeji kodi
Tamearudu kurikaba awu moto ji, awu moto kejeboeji. Iaboe mearudu kurimode awu moto ji ma, Pao mearudu kuriae mugukare apo
Awu moto kejeboe jamedu boe, boe ekodu meardae pegarewu, boe eeku akemo pegarewu, boe enojaroae, aregodukare Pao piji, mare moto piji
Awu moto akedumode tumeardae pegarewu tabo, mare rore nono Pao aidu rekodajiwu imedu rakojemode jii je rugadu. Onare Cristo jiwuge
Itore kugure, boe puredugodunure. Tamearudure onare Cristo jiwu aregodumode duji. Mare icá: onare Cristo jiwuge emagare marigudu, dukodire paeruduware boe puredugoduie ure duji
Ere tudawuje pabiji mare pagabowuge karega. Mare oinore ure boe eeruduwawo eiamedu kaegae pamedagere emage
Tagirema, Pao Utaroe Pemegarewu makudure tagai, dukodire taeruduware boe jamedu boeji
Ire bapera atugodo tagai, mare taeruduwa bokwai boe rikireuji dukodi karega, mare taeruduware ji dukoia, boe ewadararodae aregodukare boe rikireu piji kodi
Ioguduba batararodure? Cewu akore Cristo kaegae Jesus cedu jiwu. Onare Cristo jiwunure awuce, ure tuioruduwa bokwado Uoji, Onaregeduji
Cewu aidukare Onaregedu jiboe, etaidukare Uoji jamedu. Aidure Onaregedu jiboe jamedu boe, etaidure Uoji jamedu
Tamearudure ji boe otojiboe metu pemegado tagabo. Tamearudure ji boe otojiboe metumode tagabo ma, taedumode Onaregedu apo, Uo apo jamedu
Akore tumode maku pagaiboe reo: Jereboe akedu bokwarewu
Awu inodu jiboe itaidure iwo bapera atugodo ji tagai: nowu ure tawarigu boetowuge eiboeji

Tagirema, makudure tagaiwu Aroe Pemegarewu mugure tagabo, umodukare turugadu boewo taeruduwawo ji pugeje, mare Aroe Pemegarewu unure taeruduwado boe jameduji; boe rikireunure ema, boe ewadararodae karega ure ema. Tamugudo apo ure taeruduwadodu magai du reore
Oino, itore kugure, tamugudo apo, duma, umode towadudo dukeje, paegarewo, pagiarigodu kawo paedu jaei piji duji, aregodu keje
Taeruduware ro jotororewuie ure Jesus ce duji, taeruduwado ro jetororeboe eiamedu boe ewodui piji duji
Tameardae tugu Pao mearudu kurii paiduto. Pagiere Pao Aroe Eimejera ore: U! orenure pagi rugadu. Dukodire awu moto kejewu boe eeruduwakare pai, eeruduwakare ji kodi
Imearudu kurire jiwu iwiemage, oinodu piji Pao orenure pagi, mare pamodedu ukare towadudo roga kodi karega. Paeruduware inodu umode towadudo dukejeie pamode nono Pao reore, paerudumode ji uredu reore
Upagare bogaiwuge eiamedu boe epemegamode nono pemega reore
Ro pegarewuge eiamedu boe enure boe eroiagudu okwado, paga karega, boe ero pegarewu ure boe eroiagudu okwadodu rema
Taeruduware Jesus aregoduie mato tuwo boe ero pegarewu okwado duji, taeruduware ro pega bokwaie jamedu duji
Rakojere apowuge eiamedu boe ero pegakare. Ro pegarewuge eerudukare ji, eeruduwakare ji jamedu
Itore kugure, iaboe iaboe ekawo taeruduwa pegado. Rore boe jetororewu jiwu, ro jetorogodureboenure ema, Jesus ro jetorogudure du reore
Ro pegareboe, Aroe pegarewu ogenure emage, paga karega, Aroe pegarewu ro pegare boe paru piji jii oino. Icá, Pao Onaregedu ure towadudo tuwo Aroe pegarewu ro pegarewu okwado
Boture Pao pijiboe eiamedu boe ero pegakare, Pao orenure emage kodi; ero pegamodukare, ewodure Pao piji kodi

Awu inodu tabore boere boe pawuje Pao orere emawugei, Aroe pegarewu orere emawugei. Ro jetorogodukarewuge eiamedu boe, Pao ore karega ure emage; mearudu kurikare tumana, tuwie jiwuge, Pao ore karega ure emage jamedu. Boe ekodu kagirii puidu, boe emearudu kurii puidu
Awu inodu tamearudure ji boe paru piji: Pamearudu kuriwo pui
Parokawo nono Caim ro magai tui tuwie bito du reore, Aroe pegarewu oenure ema kodi. Kodiba ure bito? Ro jamedu boe pegare kodi, nowu uwie rema ro pemegare
Iwiemage, taereru kaba boe ekodu kagirii taiduji
Paeruduware padarudodui pawi piji pae kaeduji, mare pamearudu kurii pawiemagei dukodi. Mearudu kurikarewu meture tuwi tada
Kodu kagirire tuwie tumana jiwu boe ecebanure ema. Taeruduware boe ecebare emaboe eragoje raikae duji
Paeruduware boe emearudu kuriaeji, Jesus ui tumagu pagai dukeje. Pagi jamedu pamode pamagu pawiemage pamanamage ewugeje
Awu moto kejewu ia oe kurireboe jorudumode tumana tuwie marenarui ema duji, umode tuwabo mi ai ma, inoba Pao mearudu kuriae umode tada?
Itore kugure, pamearudu kurikawo boei pamago tabo, pageru tabo, mare paro pemegarewu tabo, boe jokodu tabo
Awu inodu tabore pamode boe pa pamugui boe rikireu jaogwai duji, pawabo butugugodumode jekai
Pawabo umode pamorora amagadudo dukeje; paga karega, Pao kuricigore pameardae kori, joruduware boe jamedu boeji
Imearudu kurire jiwu iwiemage, pawabo umodukare pamorora amagadudo pai ma, pabagamode Pao bogai
Cenogwamagudumode jiboe jamedu boe, umode maku pagai, parore nono ui paroiagudu reore kodi, paro pemegare jekai kodi
Ui paroiagudu reo: pameartoruwo Onaregedu Jesus Cristo ieji, pamearudu kuriwo pui ui paroiagudu reore
Rore nono ui boe eroiagudu reorewu, rakojere Pao apo, Pao rakojere apo. Paeruduware rakojei pagabo duji, ure maku pagaiwu Utaroe koia
Imearudu kurire jiwge tagi, tameartoru paga paga kaba boe eiameduji, mare tagado Pao oge emode du bogai jao. Paga karega, pagawu profetadoge makarewuge ere turagojedo awu moto keje
Awu inodu kejere boe emode boe pa Pao utaroeji: cewu akore Jesus Cristoie imedudo pudumiwu jamedu boe, Pao ogenure emage
Ukare Jesus Cristo akaru pemegadowu boe eiamedu boe, Pao oge karega ure emage, mare onare Cristo jiwu ogere emage, du tamearudure aregodumode duji. Mare rakojere awu moto keje marigudu
Itore kugure, Pao ogenure tagi dukodire tare tamorido onare Cristo jiwuji. Paga karega, mugure tagabowu kodure nowu ore moto cewu kori
Moto kejeboenure emage, dukodire egoino moto kejeboeji, moto kejewuge ewiapagare ewadaru ji

Pagirema, Pao ogenure pagi, joruduware Pao jiwuge ewiapagare pawadaru ji, Pao ogekare emawuge ewiapagakare pawadaru ji. Awu inodu tabore paeruduware bataru jetororewuji, bataru jetorokarewuji. Boe enogudui puidu
Imearudu kurire jiwuge, pamearudu kuriwo pui. Boe emearudu kurii puidu aregodure Pao piji. Mearudu kurire tuwiemageiwu jamedu boe ewodure Pao piji, eeruduware Pao ji
Mearudu kurikarewu joruduwakare Pao ji, paga karega, mearudu kurireboenure Paoce
Pao mearudu kuriae ure towadudo pagai dukodiboe reo: Ure tonaregedu ui mito tu jedu utudo pawogai awu moto kae, koiawo ure paedo dukodi
Awu inodure boe emearudu kuriae rema: Pamearudu kurii Pao koia karega, mare Pao mearudu kurii pai boetoji dukoia, tui Tonaregedu arego pawogai tuwo paro pegarewu morido tuwi tabo
Itaidure jiwu iwobe, Pao mearudu kurire pai oino ma, pagi jamedu pamearudu kurimode pui jamedu
Iaboe iaboe eerudukare Pao ji, mare pamearudu kurimode pui ma, Pao mugumode pagabo, mearudu kuriae mugu kororogodumode pagabo
Awu inodu tabore pamode boe pa pamugui apo duji: Ui Tudaroe maku pagai dukoia
Ceeruduware Paoi Tonaregedu utudo mato tuwo awu moto kejewuge einorudo duji, cereadodure awu inoduji jamedu
Akore Pao Onaregeduie ure Jesus cewuge eiamedu boe, Pao mugure ebo, eedure Pao apo jamedu
Paeruduware pameartorui Pao mearudu kurii paidu jituji. Boe emearudu kuriaenure Paoce. Mearudu kurireuge eiamedu eedure Pao apo, Pao mugure ebo
Pamearudu kuriae kororogodumode padoda ma, pabagamode Pao umode tugogado boei kejewu meri bogai, paga karega pare nono ureore awu moto keje kodi
Boe epagudu bokware mearudu kuriae keje. Boe emearudu kuriae ure boe epagudae barigu, paga karega, boe epagudae ure boe ekori reko pudabo, pagudureu mearudu kuri pemegamodukare
Dukodi icare, pamearudu kuriwo Pao ji, emare mearudu kurire pai boetoji kodi

Iaboe egomode: Imearudu kurire Pao Aroe Eimejeraji oino, mare kodu kagirimode tuwieji tumanaji ma, batararodunure. Paga karega mearudu kurikare tuiorudure jiwu tuwieji tumana jiwu, roiwamodukare tumearudu kuriwo tuiorudukare jiwu Pao ji jamedu
Paore ui paroiagudu reo: Mearudu kurire Pao jiwu, mearudu kurimode tuwiemagei, tumanamagei jamedu
Meartorure Cristoie ure Jesus cewuge eiamedu boe, ewodure Pao piji. Mearudu kurire Uo jiwuge eiamedu boe, emearudu kurimode Onaregeduji jamedu
Pamearudu kurimode Pao ji, paromode nono ui paroiagudu reore ma, awu inodu tabore paeruduware pamearudu kurii Pao ore ei duji
Paga karega, boe emearudu kurii Pao jitu, boe eroi ui boe eroiagudu jitu du rema. Ica, ui boe eroiagudu motudukare, barire
Boture Pao pijiboe eiamedu boe ere tumorido awu moto kejeboeji. Pameartoru tabore pare pamorido awu moto kejeboeji
Ioguduba umode tumorido awu moto kejeboeji? Meartorure Pao Onaregeduie ure Jesus cedu jiwuge karega? Aregodure pobo tabo, boe eku tabowure Jesus Cristo rema
Pobo tabo tu je karega, mare pobo tabo, tugu tabo. Pao Utaroere tuiodo awu inoduji, emare boe jokodureu rema
Ure tuiodo awu inodu kejewuge ere pobe ma jewu metuia bokware
Aroe Pemegarewu, pobo, boe eku; awuge ere tuiodo keje pureore
Pameartorumode ime ewadaru ji ma, Pao makore jiboe kodure ime enoe kori. Ica, cereadodure jiboere, Pao makore tonaregedu jiboe rema
Meartorure Pao Onaregedu jiwuge eiamedu boe, nowu Pao makore jiboe meture ebo. Meartorukare Pao jiwu, unure batararodaedo ema, meartorukare Pao makore tonaregedu jiboe jitu kodi
Awu baru tadawu bakaru reo: Paore jereboe akedu bokwarewu maku pagai, awu jereboe mugure Tonaregedu apo
Pao jereboe jeture apowu, jereboe meture apo jamedu. Pao Onaregedu rakojekare apowu, jereboe metukare apo jamedu
Awu inodu jire ire bapera atugodo tagai, jereboe akedu bokwarewu jetuwo tagabo, tameartorui Pao Onaregedu ie jitu kodi
Pagogwamagudumode Pao ji dukeje, pameartorumode pagogwamagudure ji bogaiboe aidae rekodajiboe, umode maku pagai duji
Pameartorumode umode pagogwamagudure ji bogaiboe jamedu boe maku pagai ma, paeruduware pagogwamagudure ji bogaiboe ure maku pagai rugadu

Iaboe eerudumode ia tuwie ro jokodu kaduji, okwamagududo Pao ji paru tabo, dutabore Pao umode awu pawie jedo. Mare umode boe ewidowu ia boe ero pegarewure, imagomodukare boe enogwamaguduwo awu boe ero pegarewu paru tabo
Boe ero pegarewu jamedu boe, pegare, mare ia boe ero pegarewure du ukare boe erego tuwi kae. Bapera ao
Paeruduware boture Pao pijiboe eiamedu boe ero pegakare; boture Pao pijiwuge eiamedu boe Pao jeture ei, dutabore pegareboe umodukare tugeragu ei
Paeruduware Pao ogeie ure pagi duji, awu moto jamedu boe mugui pegareboe ro kuda duji

Paeruduware Pao Onaregedu aregodui tuwo paeruduwa maku pagai paeruduwawo boe rikireuji. Pamedure boe rikireu keje, pamugui Pao Onaregedu Jesus Cristo tada, dure Aroe Eimejera remawu rema, jere jii jeboe rema
Itore kugure, taiaedo paokare emaboe piji. II. JOÃO JOÃO O BAPERA ATUGO REKODAJIWU Boe paru
Codureu imedu imi, ire awu bapera atugodo boe eimejerago pemegarewudo bogai, imearudu kurire jiwu ore ewogai jamedu; mare imi tu je karega, mare joruduware boe rikireu jiwuge eiamedu boe jamedu
Awu boe rikireu jeture pagabo, mugumode pagabo jii je jamedu
Boe pemegarewu, boe okudureu, boe butugureu aregodure Pao pijidu, Jesus Cristo pijidu, muguwo tagabo, boe rikireu keje, boe emearudu kuriae keje. Boe emearudu kurii puidu
Iegare kuricigore iorudui ia akore ekodui boe rikireu kejeduji, Paoi paroiagudu reore
Oinore inogwamagudunure ai, ikimejerago, mare iwo aroiagududo pugeje du bogai karega, mare Paore paroiagudu jii paru pijidu reo: Pamearudu kuriwo pui

Boe emearudu kurii paidu reo: Parowo nono ui paroiagudu reore. Mare Paoi boe eroiagudu boetojiwu reo: Tamearudu kuriwo pui jii je, awu inodu jire taeruduware ji boe paru piji. Profetadoge paga pagawuge
Batararodureu makarewuge ere taodo moto joki, duwugere emagore Cristo kae imedudo pudumi. Akoinowu, ure boe eekuri pagadowu onare Cristo jiwunure ema
Tamearudu awadudo tai, takawo pamaragodure jiboe barigu boeto, mare mori pemegarewu remawu makuduwo tagai
Mare paga karega, mugukare Cristore boe eeruduwado jiboe kejewu boe eiamedu boe, Pao mugukare ebo. Mugure ure boe eeruduwado jiboe kejewu, Pao mugure apo, Onaregedu mugure apo
Iaboe etaregodumode tagae awu ure boe eeruduwado jiboe bokwa tabo ma, tagaba edo turemo tawaito, tagimadukaba ebo jamedu
Paga karega, imadure ebowu umode tumedagedo emage ero pegarewuji. Boe ao
Itaidure iwo bapera atugododu maedo tawogai, mare itaidukare irowo oino bapera atugo tabo, mare itaidure ituwo tawogai imagowo tai inogwa tabo ma, taegare kororogoduwo
Atuie pemegarewudo ore eimadunure awogai. III. JOÃO JOÃO O BAPERA ATUGO BOIGODUWU Gaio jiboe
Codureu imedu imi, imearudu kurire jiwu imeduia Gaio bogai
Imeduia, itaidure akodu pemegawo amaragodae jamedu boe keje, boe pemegawo ai, akaroe pemegagoduwo gu gu je
Iegare kuricigore pawiemage etaregodui itaeduji, emagoi iwiegai akodui aro akago jetororewu tabo duji
Iegare kuri remawunure imearudui itore ekodui boe rikireu keje duji
Imearudu kuricigore jiwu imedu, anure ameartorure jiboe to aro pemegai pawiemagei dutabo, ia pawiemage etaregodui moto tuginoiwu pijiwuge ei jamedu
Awuge ereadodure amearudu kuriaeji pawobe ewiegai. Amode etogeadure jiboe jamedu boe maku etai etawara ji, du pemegamode, Pao meardae rekodaji
Paga karega, eture tumearudu kuri koia Pao ieji, boe makudukai etai aopegokarewuge ekera piji dutabo
Dukodire parumode pageragu ure inowu imei, pawo pagera braredo ei, emaragodui boe rikireuji dutabo. Ditrefes jiboe
Ire ia iwadaru atugodo Pao uwobe etai. Mare Ditrefes, ocaro rakaguragare puduiwu imedu, aidukare tuwo tugeragu cei

Dukodire, itaregodui nono dukeje, imode biabutudo turo pegarewu keje, tui tuwadaru pegado cei dutabo. Jamedu aidukare tuwo tugeragu pawiemagei, ukare aidure tuwo tugeragu eiwuge edo tugeragu ei, ure etawuje Pao uwobe epiji jamedu
Imearudu kurire jiwu imeduia, aro kaba nono pegareboe erore, mare arodo nono pemegareboe erore. Ro pemegarewu boture Pao piji, ro pegarewu joruduwakare Pao ji. Demétrio jiboe
Demtério jiboe, boe eiamedu boe emago pemegare ji, boe rikireu jore keje jamedu. Cegi jamedu cemago pemegare ji. Aeruduware cemogoi boe rikireu jituji. Boe ao
Itaidure iwo bapera atugododu maedo awogai, mare iromodukare ino bapera atugo tabo
Ipagamode itu mariguwo ioruduwo ai, dukeje pamagomode pagogwa tabo pui
Boe butugureu muguwo akabo. Pamedage eimadure awogai. Akimadudo pamedage remawuge ebo. J
Judas, Jesus Cristo utugare, Tiago uwie, imearudu kurire Pao kejewu pemegarewuge etai, Jesus Cristo ure tugeragu ji pudaiwuge etai
Boe okudureu, boe butugureu, boe emearudu kuriae kororogoduwo tagabo. Boei tudurudo joruduwa paga pagawuge ime eidu

Imearudu kurire jiwu iwiemage, ake rakaguragare ii iwo bapera atugodo tawogai umode paginorudo boeji. Dukodire itaidure iwo awu bapera atugodu tawogai, inogituwawo tai, tagedu rakawo makudure Pao uwobe etaiwu boe emeartoraeji

Paga karega, ia ro pegarewu ime emedure padoda podu tabo, duwuge eonare boewo tugogado ei marigudu. Ere Pao o boe pemegarewu pegado, ere tuioruduwa bokwado ure paeruduwadowu Pagimejera mitotu jewu Jesus Cristoji
Imode tawiabutudo, taeruduware awu inodu jameduji kodi karega. Paore toge einorudo Egito piji dukeje, ure meartorukarewuge eeda kedodo
Jamedu ure ia to tupadoge ekai tudo nono iaboere, ei tumuga pemegarewu pijido dutabo, ure ekogudo akedumodukarewu bukigu tabo jii umode tugogado boei jiwu meri kurireu kae

Jamedu Sodoma, Gomorra bakurireuge, ia oieiwu bakurireuge, duwuge erore turo pegarewu boeji, ere tumagu boe eromodukare emawu turo pegarewuto, dukodire epadure toro joru akedu bokwarewu kuda, boe eerdaece
Du reorere awu ime etaora pega remawure, ere tugodu pegado, ere Pao o bataru redugodudo, ere togwa pegado aroei
Aró! Cewu tupa kurireu iei Miguel cedu rugodui Aroe pegarewuge eimejeraji, Moisés bire dukoia, dukeje, ukare togwa pegado ji, mare akore oino ji tu je: “Aroe Eimejera umode tugogado ai”. Oino
Awugerema emago pegare tuioruduwakare jiboeji. Eerudure tu awu moto kejeboeji barege eerudu magai tuioku tabo du reore, dure ure ewogwado boeto
Eiwo pegare, mare ekodure Caim utawara ji kodi. Ere tuwogwado Balaão ui tuwogwado du reore tugodui boe emori rekodaji dukoia. Eeda kedore cewu Coré rugodui boei dukeje

Ere boe pegado tagogwage boe keje. Enogwagere tagabo, turokai nono boe erore dutabo, tui tuguredudo dutabo. Ere nono bakuru ure rekowu boetugu biororewu reore. Iguru tudu bokwarewu reorewuge, ewidodure pobe, tugwa bokwa koia
Pobo maerewu pobuto pegarewu ui todaro rurureu barigudu reorewuge. Kuiejedoge ekodui jice woje tuwo tuwogwado boeco akedumodukarewuto du reorewugenure emage
Nowu Henoc, ure pobe taci ikera awubowutowu Adão rekodajiwu, akore oino ei boemoduie oino ei ia boiboe keje. Akore: Ica, Pao kurireu aregodure pemegarewu makarewuge ebo
Tuwo tugogado boe eiamedu boei, tuwo pegarewuge epogurudo, tuwo eredugodudo ero pegarewu koia, ewadaru pegare Pao jiwu jamedu boe koia
Butugugodu bokwarewu mako pegarewunure emage, ekodure tuwadaru rekodajiwu ime, enogwa makore tojarore jiboeji, eebogodure iaboe eroji, mare moridoduwo pudai du bogai. Boe enogituwadodu
Tagirema, imearudu kurire jiwuge tagi, tawiabutudo Pagimejera Jesus Cristo utugarege ewadaru keje
Duwugere egoino tai: Boe puredugodu keje batararodureuge etaregodumode, duwuge eromode nono tuiordae tumeardae pegarewu rekodaji
Ere boe erugo pui jice wojewuge ime, meardae pegarewu ime, duwugere Aroe Pemegarewu mugukare ebo
Tagirema, imearudu kurire jiwuge tagi, taragoje rakado puapo tameartorure jiboe keje
Tamugudo Pao mearudu kuriae keje, tabagai Pagimejera Jesus Cristo okudu uiagudu bogai dutabo ma, taewo jii je
Taiodo pagudureuge ewugeje
Iage edo cinorudo, tai etawuje joru piji dutabo. Taiagududo iagei, mare tabagudu tabo, tagaidu kai ekudae rorogodudodure boe ekodu tabo duji jamedu. Bapera ao
Cewu roiware tukawo tawududo, tuwo tugeragu tai turugu kurireu kae, tabega bokwa tabo, taegare tabowu,

Cewu ure paginorudo Pagimejera Jesus Cristo koia Pao mito tu jewu, boewo jekaredo, boewo kurido, boewo boe eimejerado ema, boewo ro rakado, jii boe paru piji jii oino, boe jameduji jii je. Oino godu A

book:

Apocalipse

Apocalipse

Apocalipse

Apocalipse

Apocalipse

book:
Apocalipse

bororo_text: Nowu aroe tarigo reorewu jorudui tuwarigudodui moto kae duji dukeje ure tudugu tudo nowu kuri buture negedurogu apowu aredu bogai turugoduwo ji

Apocalipse

Apocalipse

Apocalipse

Apocalipse

bororo_text: Dukodi icare nowu awagu korigodu kuricigore nowu aredu bogai, dukodi icare rugodure mugure awu moto kejewu orei, biapagare Paore boe eroiagudujiwuge ei, iedure Jesus bataru jiwuge ei

book:
Apocalipse

book:
Apocalipse

bororo_text: Icare iorudure ia barogo ui tudawuje pobo maerewu piji duji. Nowu barogo ukigadogere ikera pudogidure, aoradogere ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto, boe etaogajejeboere nono ikera pudogidure ukiga boe oto keje, boe emago pegaidu padure aora boe keje

book:
Apocalipse

book:
Apocalipse

bororo_text: Boe ecebae ui boe ewidodu padure ia aora keje, mare ecebae bitudodure. Dukodi icare boe eiamedu boe epagudugodu kuricigore, ekodure nowu barogo apo,

book:
Apocalipse

Apocalipse

book:
Apocalipse

Apocalipse

bororo_text: Ro raka makudure ai rugoduwo pemegarewugei, uwo tumorido ei. Ro raka makudure ai boe eiamedu boei, boe ewadaru padui pumekeje duji, boe eno moto padui pumekeje duji

book:
Apocalipse

bororo_text: Icare cewu ie padukare nowu Cordeiro jiworewu o bapera jerewu keje, jii boe toduidu oto piji mato, mugure awu moto kejewuge emode tubujodo ji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Biajarewu biapagamode awu inoduji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Aidure tuwo tumedage ewarigu baicorewutowuge, ewarigudumode baicorewuto jamedu. Umode tumedage ewido toriga raireu tabowuge ewimode toriga raireu tabo jamedu. Awu inodu tabore pemegarewuge emode turokogado tuduruji tumeartoraeji

book:
Apocalipse

book:
Apocalipse

bororo_text: Ro pegare nono boetojiwu barogo ro pega reore, meardae, jordae rekodaji. Ure moto, moto kejewuge edo tubujodo cewu umode bitowu ucebae bitureu boetojiwu barogoji

book:
Apocalipse

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Ure tumago rakaguragado tagoi oino dutabo: - Buture. Babilônia kurireu buture. Aroe pegarewuge eeda, aroe pegarewuge eiari, kiege pegarewuge eiarinure ema pugeje

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Paga karega, moto padui pumekejedu eiamedu boe ekudure ro ako pegarewu kodu kagiraece, moto kejewu brae eimejerage ero pegare apo, awu moto kejewu ure akirodo boejiwuge ere toroe kuricigodo oroe kuricigorewu tabo

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Imearudure ia boe emagoji pugeje, akore: - Iwobe, taebu piji, tarokawo nono ro pega reore, takawo metagedo tagi ucebae keje

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Paga karega, ro pegarewu itodure, aregodure baruto, Pao biabuture ro pegarewu keje

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Ro magai tai du reorere taromode ji jamedu, ro pegarewu mori maku ai tao kae. Ure tagududo towu ruwobo, okorawu, maku ai pugeje tao kae

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Umagai boe eerududo toroe kurireu jitu reore, tamode ucebae, oragudu, maku ai jamedu. Paga karega, akore oino tuwabo keje: imugure boe eimejerage emuga keje boe eimejeragoi imi dutabo, mare oredu bireu aredu reore karega, imarenarudumodukare iaboe keje iaboe keje

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Dukodire awu ucebae boe aregodumode ae meri mitoduji: boe ewi, boe etoragudu, boe eke boi jidu, jorumode akedudo, mare paga karega, ure tugogado jiwu Pagimejera Aroe Eimejera ro rakare

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Ro pegare apowu awu moto kejewu brae eimejerage etoragudu kuricigomode bukeje, erudui jeredudui tudawuje piji dukeje

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Eragoje jaemode ji tubagudu koia ucebae roi jituji, egomode: - Iai, iai! Babilônia bakurireu! Babilônia bakurireu! Boe raigirikare boei tugogado ai dutabo

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Awu moto kejewu baare akiró tabowuge etoragudumode etogeamode bukeje jamedu, ure akirodo enoroe jiboe bokware pugeje kodi

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Enoroe meriri ekureu, meriri kigadureu, tori mori kuricigorewu! tori motureu, aroia kigadureu, aroia kujagureu, aroia kurukurureu, aroia kujagu rakaguragarewu, awu ira boe rorewu jamedu boe, enoroe barege eto rakarewu, enoroe ira mori kuricigorewu, enoroe meriri kujagureu, meriri koadureu

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Enoroe tori kororogodureu, ia enoe roreboe padui pumekejedu jamedu boe, bokadoboe rorewu, eke boe parera kuru, boe kaguru, eke iro boe, eguiee jamedu boe, eguiee ovelhadoge, kawarudoge, eno imarido boe, etugarege boe, ime boe

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Akagemore jiboe rugadu akedure akoe kuri inodu, boe urugu boe akedure, aerudumodukare inoduji pugeje

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Ure akirodo awu inodu boe jiwuge emode tuburedodu jaedo tubagudu tabo ucebaece, etoragudumode etogeamode, tagoi oino dutabo

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Jiwo pegarewu bakurireu kurireu! Ure aroia pemegarewu, aroia kujagureu, aroia kurukurureu upodo pudabo, ure cenawudo meriri ekureu tabo, tori mori kuricigorewu tabo, tori motureu tabo

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Mare awu oroe kuri inodu jamedu boe akedure pi tuku je. Ure ika kurireu redowuge eiamedu boe, pobo maerewu kaowuge eiamedu boe, ika kurireu epage eiamedu boe, maragodure pobo kaowuge eiamedu boe ere tuburedodu jaedo ji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Etaiwoi jeredudui tudawuje nowu joru cei nowu bakurireuto dupiji du kae, egore: Kakoduwu bakurireu ure nono awu bakurireu kurireu reore?

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Ere moto rugudu tugu taoto, toragudu tabo, tumago tabo: Jiwo pegarewu bakurireu kurireu! Ure ika kurireu epage eiamedu boe enoroe kuricigodo toe kurireu tabo. Mare akedure pi tuku je

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Aki, baru, aegaredo ji, tagi jamedu, pemegarewuge, apostolodoge, profetadoge, taegaredo ji, paga karega, Paore tugogado ji tui tamorido dutabo

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Icare ia tupa ro rakarewu ure tugeragu ia tori kurireuji, ure barigu pobo maerewuto, akore: - Oinore Babilônia bakurireu kurireu barigudumode, boe eerudumodukare ji pugeje

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Boe emearudumodukare awugeje iera akore citara jiwuge ekera akoji, urarewuge eraji, okwa akorewuge enogwa akoji pugeje. Boe eerudumodukare atoda ia maragodureboeji pugeje, boe emearudumodukare atoda pugeje ure boe a kududowu tori akoji pugeje

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Jorugu ja urugumodukare awugeje pugeje, boe emearudumodukare awugeje uwirerewu, ukogerewudo emagoji pugeje. Paga karega, ure akirodo akoroe taboboe awu moto kejeboe eimejerare emage moto padui pumekejedu eiamedu boe ere tuwogwado boeto aro pegarewu koia

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Awugejere boe eerudure profetadoge ekuji, pemegarewuge ekuji, cewu bitodure moto kejewuge eiamedu boe ekuji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Oinodu rekodaji imearudure baru tada ia makareboe eragoduji. Egore: - Paegarewo. Pao ore boe einorudae, urugureboe, rorakareboe

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Paoi tugogado boeidu rikire, jetorogodure. Ure tugogado cewu aredu kurireudo, ro pegarewudoji, duwudo ure moto pegado turo pegarewu tabo

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Ure tugogado ji tudugarege eku mori bogai. Dukejere icare eragodure pugeje, egore: - Paegarewo, nowu aredu pegarewudo uredudu rutumode baruto boe jameduji jii je kodi

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Dukeje icare cewu Paopegadogei ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure pobepuibiji pugejedu, cewu jereboe ei pobepuibijidu ere tubujodo Pao ui tumugudo nowu mugureu keje duji, egore: - Oino rugadu! Paegarewo

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Nowu muga piji iaboe emago aregodure, akore: - Tagi taiamedu boe, Pao utugarege biegarewuge, kurireuge tabagudui cedu, tarago ji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Awu inodu keje imearudure ia makarewuge eragoduji, eiarurure nono pobo makarewuge eiarurure, ure nono boiaruru rakarewuge eiarurure, egore: - Paegarewo, Pagimejera Pao ro rakarewu jeture boei kodi

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Paegarewo, paegare kuricigowo, pawo akaru kurido. Paga karega, nowu Cordeiro iera makudumode aredu aidu puredugodunure, nowu iera makudumode aiwudo ure tudo turugadu kodi

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Boere jeonado aroia pemegarewu motureuji, awu aroia jebatodure pemegarewuge ero pemegarewuji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Dukejera akore oino ii: - Awu inodu bu bapera keje: Returudodure ewogaiwuge eeruduwo Cordeiro iera makudui aredu aidu jiwuge eiwo aidugirinure. Icare akore oino ii kimo: - Awu Pao bataru boe rikireunure ema

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Iwudure bure paru iwo ipujodo ji, mare akore oino ii: - Aro kaba ino! Pao utugarenure imi areore, amanamage emeatorure Jesus bataru jiwuge ereore. Pao jire amode apujodo. Boe jokodu Jesus Cristo bataru jire profetadoge emagore. Cristo ui tumorido barege pegarewuge eidu

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Iorudure kimo baru jaji: ia kawaru kigadureu jepadure piji. Mugure kejeboe iere Boe Rikireu, Boe Jokodureu; boe jetororewu tabore ure tugogado boei, rugodure tonare jiwugei

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Joku jeragudure. Boe etaogajejewu makare aogajeje, ia boe eeruduwakare jiwu boe ekie padure keje, ema mitotu jere joruduware ji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Ia aroia, boekure jokiwure, meture ji. Iere Pao o Bataru rema

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Baru tadawu tugobaigarege emugui kawaru kigadureuge ewugejedure ekodure apo, aroia kigadureu motureu meture ei

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Ia toriga raireu ore puibijiwure aregodure ja piji, uwo padure pumekejewu meartorukarewuge etogorido tabo. Umode tuwure jodo boere tuwure jodo parera kejeboe okorobadui Pao kodu kagirae tabodu keje

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Opore apowu aroia keje, upeagajejewu keje, atugododure oino: Boe eimejerage Eimejera, boe eimejerage kurireuge Eimejera Kurireu

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Icare iorudure ia tupa rakojei meri joku bukeje duji, akore tumago raka tabo kodure baru otojiwu kiege baregei: - Tado pui mato, Paore tagogwage kuricigomode jiboe udo turugado du kae

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Tawo brae eimejerage ekodu kowuje, tawo tugobaigarege eimejerage ekodu, ro rakarewuge ekodu kowuje, tawo kawarudoge ekodu, mugure ewugejewuge ekodu kowuje, tawo boe etugarekare emawuge, boe etugare emawuge, biegarewuge, kurireuge ime ekodu kowuje

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Iorudure cewu barogo pegarewuji, iorudure awu moto kejewu boe eimejerage ei tudo pui to tugobaigarege ebo, turugoduwo cewu mugure nowu kawaru kejewu tugobaigarege ei jamedu du bogai

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Mare cewu barogo pegarewu ieragogudodure, cewu profeta pegarewu apo, dure ure turo tuginoiwu towuje tui cewu barogo pegarewu kruca padure ewugejewuge, ure tubujodo ure nono reoredu jiwuge eekuri pagado dutabo. Ei pobedu ewarigudodure jorubo ekureu ure nono kuruga reoreboe uruto

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Cewu mugure kawaru kejewu ure iage ewido cewu aregodure tuiabijiwu tariga raireu tabo. Kiege barege eiamedu boe ere tuguredudo nowuge ekodu tabo

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Icare iorudure ia tupai turawuje baru piji duji, iedure jewoduio baiporo epaji, iedure ia meriri iku rairewuji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Ure tugeragu nowu aroe tarigorewuji, nowu mariguduwu awagu, duwu Aroe pegarewuge eimejara rema, ure iera gogudo jii jorumode mil cedu kae

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Ure barigu jewoduioto, ure baiporo mi baiporo epa tabo, ure ia kruca bu baiporo keje, ukawo boe epadui pumekejedu eekuri pagado pugeje, jii jorumode mil cedu akedumode du kae. Awu inodu rekodaji ieragoga kiwujedumode biega tu je

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Iorudure boe emuga boeji, kejere umode tugogado boeiwuge emugure, cewu itoru kadodure egoi Pao bataru ji, Jesus bataru jitu koiawuge etaroe rabodu, cewu ukare tubujodo barogo pegarewu jiwuge, ureoredu jiwuge, kruca padukare eri kejewuge, ekera kejewuge eiamedu boe rabodu, eedodu maidure, eeture boei Cristo apo jorure mil ceduji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Cewu ia bireuge emodukare tugirimi tuibagi, eewodumodukare jii jorumode mil cedu akedumodedu kae. Dure boetojiwu boe eewodu reno

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Cewu rakojere jewodure ca boetojiwuge ebowu, pemegare, jiwo aidugirire. Boe ewi rekodajiwu ro rakamodukare ji, mare Pao burejoiadogemode emage, Cristo burejoiadogemode emage, etumode apo boei jorumode mil ceduji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Jorumode mil cedu akedu keje, Aroe pegarewuge eimejera umode tudawuje tuwaicorewu piji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Umode tudawuje tuwo boe padui pumekeje moto okwajidu (Gog, Magog) eekuri pagado du bogai. Umode eeto pui turugoduwo. Emagaguragamode nono pobo maerewu tadawu kugaru reore. Emode taodo moto joki, emode bakuredo pemegarewuge eedaji, Pao mearudu kurire jiwu bakurireuji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Mare ia jorure tudawuje baru piji, ure erugadu kowu. Nowu ure ekuri pagadowu Aroe pegarewu, barigududodure ia jorubo ekureu kuruga uruto

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: cewu barogo pegarewu meture tada marigudu nowu profeta pagarewu apo duto. Du tadare ewudugugodumodukare boekoriji meri ji, boecoji, boe jameduji jii je. Paoi tugogado boe jamedu boe jitu

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Icare iorudure ia boe emuga kurireu urugureuji. Iaboe ure tumugudo keje. Baru, moto eregodure je piji, icare boe eerudumodukare eedumode kejeboeji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Iorudure bireuge kurireuge, biegarewuge eragojei nowu muga otodai duji. Baperadogere tuiado, ia baperare tuiado jamedu, bapera jerewu. Boere tugogado bireugei, boe padu magai nowu bapera kejedu reore, ero boe rekodaji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Pobo maerewure meture tudodawuge emagu. Du reorere meture boe ewi tadawuge, moto tadawuge emagudure jamedu. Boere tugogado ei, ero boe rekodaji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Boe ewi, bireuge eeda moto kudawu, barigududodure kuruga joruto. Nowu kuruga joru boe ewi rekodajiwunure ema

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Cewu ie padukare bapera jerewu kejewu, barigudure kuruga joruto

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Icare iorudure ia baru maiwuji, ia moto maiwuji, mare boetojiwu baru, boetojiwu moto ewogware, pobo maerewu bokware pugeje

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Iorudure bakurireu pemegarewu Jerusalém maiwu ui turawuje baru piji duji, ia aredu magai tugera pemegado pudui toredu togidu reore

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Du tonajire imearudure ia boe emago kurireu aregodui nowu boe mugureu piji duji. Akore: - Pao mugui ime ebowu uwai reo. Mugumode ebo, uwobemode emage. Pao rugadure rakojemode ebo

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Umode eeguru rugadu kabi. Boe ewimodukare pugeje, boe emarenarudumodukare pugeje, boe enoiogwarimodukare pugeje, boe ecebaemodukare pugeje, mariguduboe akedure kodi

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Icare cewu mugure tumuga kejewu akore: - Ca! Imode boe jamedu boe maidudo pugeje. Akore oino kimo: Awu inodu boe bu bapera keje, mare awu bataru boe remawu boe jokodunure ema kodi

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Akore oino pugeje: - Ure turugadu! Alfanure imi, Omeganure imi. Dure oino: Boe paru boe otonure imi. Imode pobo jari pijiwu po jerewu makudu pagado pobo boire jiwu ai, kuduwo ce

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Awu jamedu boe makudumode umode tumoridowu ai. Uomode imi, itonaregedumode ema

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Uru barigodureuge, poguru bokwarewuge, ropegarewuge, ure tubujodo boe pega jiwuge, batararodureuge eiamedu boe, jorubo ekureu urukori rakarewu, rekodajiwu boe ewi, makudumode etai. Baru tadawu bakurireu motu

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Dukeje icare cewu tupadoge ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu eedure turuwobo boe enorogobadui boiwu boe ecebae tabodu ia emeduia aregodure, akore oino ii: - Mato, imode aerududo Cordeiro mugumode apowu aredu ji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Ure irego itaroe tada ia torekari rico raireu ao kae, ure iorududo bakurireu pemegarewuji, aregodure baru pijiwu puredu Pao pijiwu Jerusalemji

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Meture Pao urugu tada duji. Nowu urugu ure nono meriri kurureu tori motureu reore

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Motori okwatorureu ricoraireure padure oiei, baiporodogere ikera pudogidure pobe taci ikera awubowuto. Tupadogei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu eragojere nowu baiporodoge ewugeje tuietu tabo ei. Israeldoge etuwobe ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu ekie padure nowu baiporodoge ewugeje

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Baiporodogere pobe ma jewu metuia bokware meri rutu jaogwai, ecerae eiaogwaire baiporodogere pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, tugarege eiaogwaire baiporodogere pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, meri butu jaogwaire baiporodogere pobe ma jewu metuia bokware

book:
Apocalipse

Bakaru Ui Boemode Pao Uwobe Eidu Awadudodu
bororo_text: Nowu motori padui bakurireu oieidu bure jore toridogei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu keje, nowu Cordeiro utugarege ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu ekie padure ewugeje
